name: Voter Action Project
subject: New Texas gerrymander
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=KXRIxJJC0VUMRSQktl9SB+KMm5J9MguiStGUmwfGTkJTK8/ToT6TYL0RBrdnh6/KScevDwvqPkuWgsly5zPQKU6cr6y8tYAIJV7guxTO88k=]
Democracy Docket: Top GOP Map-Drawer and Right-Wing Law Firm Team Up to Target Texas Minority Voters [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=25.00&contactdata=KXRIxJJC0VUMRSQktl9SB+KMm5J9MguiStGUmwfGTkJTK8/ToT6TYL0RBrdnh6/KScevDwvqPkuWgsly5zPQKU6cr6y8tYAIJV7guxTO88k=]
The fight against gerrymandering never ends, Team.
Reports from Texas indicate that the opponents of voting rights who run one of Texas’s biggest counties have recruited the top conservative map-drawer, as well as a leading Washington, D.C.-based anti-voting group, to ram through a new gerrymander that aims to expand the U.S. House majority.
For background: Voters in Tarrant County — Texas’s third-largest county, with a population of around 2.2 million, and home to Fort Worth — elect four commissioners who, along with the County Judge Tim O’Hare, make up the county’s five-member governing body, known as commissioners court. (In Texas, a county judge is not a judicial officer, but a regular elected official.) O'Hare, for context, is an opponent of voting rights who tried to remove polling sites from college campuses ahead of the 2024 election.
Now that panel -- finalized in a 3-2 party-line vote -- has moved to redraw Tarrant County's maps and put local minority communities' right to fair representation at risk. The new map packs many of the county’s Black and brown voters into one heavily partisan district , switching the balance of the other district back in their direction. The map was shared publicly only in the past week and had not been discussed at public hearings.
Voter suppression anywhere changes the balance of Congress and hurts everyone, everywhere. Help us fight back for fair maps with $25 or whatever you can today and defend our fundamental right to vote >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=25.00&contactdata=KXRIxJJC0VUMRSQktl9SB+KMm5J9MguiStGUmwfGTkJTK8/ToT6TYL0RBrdnh6/KScevDwvqPkuWgsly5zPQKU6cr6y8tYAIJV7guxTO88k=]
If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=15.00&tknfa=KopI0Fx_dFItvMg9YrS5iYKAbKZm_jK8GiiwKeTkMHw=&contactdata=KXRIxJJC0VUMRSQktl9SB+KMm5J9MguiStGUmwfGTkJTK8/ToT6TYL0RBrdnh6/KScevDwvqPkuWgsly5zPQKU6cr6y8tYAIJV7guxTO88k=] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=25.00&tknfa=KopI0Fx_dFItvMg9YrS5iYKAbKZm_jK8GiiwKeTkMHw=&contactdata=KXRIxJJC0VUMRSQktl9SB+KMm5J9MguiStGUmwfGTkJTK8/ToT6TYL0RBrdnh6/KScevDwvqPkuWgsly5zPQKU6cr6y8tYAIJV7guxTO88k=] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=50.00&tknfa=KopI0Fx_dFItvMg9YrS5iYKAbKZm_jK8GiiwKeTkMHw=&contactdata=KXRIxJJC0VUMRSQktl9SB+KMm5J9MguiStGUmwfGTkJTK8/ToT6TYL0RBrdnh6/KScevDwvqPkuWgsly5zPQKU6cr6y8tYAIJV7guxTO88k=]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=100.00&tknfa=KopI0Fx_dFItvMg9YrS5iYKAbKZm_jK8GiiwKeTkMHw=&contactdata=KXRIxJJC0VUMRSQktl9SB+KMm5J9MguiStGUmwfGTkJTK8/ToT6TYL0RBrdnh6/KScevDwvqPkuWgsly5zPQKU6cr6y8tYAIJV7guxTO88k=] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=250.00&tknfa=KopI0Fx_dFItvMg9YrS5iYKAbKZm_jK8GiiwKeTkMHw=&contactdata=KXRIxJJC0VUMRSQktl9SB+KMm5J9MguiStGUmwfGTkJTK8/ToT6TYL0RBrdnh6/KScevDwvqPkuWgsly5zPQKU6cr6y8tYAIJV7guxTO88k=] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=20.00&contactdata=KXRIxJJC0VUMRSQktl9SB+KMm5J9MguiStGUmwfGTkJTK8/ToT6TYL0RBrdnh6/KScevDwvqPkuWgsly5zPQKU6cr6y8tYAIJV7guxTO88k=]
This is all part of a sweeping national strategy that uses map-drawing to boost one party’s power at the expense of non-white voters and is now playing out at the local level.
How do we know? The D.C.-based attorney who oversaw much of these redistricting fights for a conservative law firm just took over as the top anti-voting lawyer at the MAGA version of the Justice Department.
The involvement from the start of national-level anti-voting operatives highlights the striking sophistication and coordination of this multi-pronged campaign to suppress democracy.
At a public hearing about the new map, Commissioner Matt Krause, a Republican, said, “ My entire intention is to allow Tarrant County to go from three Republicans, two Democrats on the commissioners court to four Republicans, one Democrat .” Within hours of the map vote, an anti-voting state lawmaker announced that he plans to run in the new district that’s been gerrymandered to favor his party.
Opponents of voting rights will stop at nothing in their pursuit of power and control. Please, chip in $25 or whatever you can to protect voting rights and fair representation >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2?am=25.00&contactdata=KXRIxJJC0VUMRSQktl9SB+KMm5J9MguiStGUmwfGTkJTK8/ToT6TYL0RBrdnh6/KScevDwvqPkuWgsly5zPQKU6cr6y8tYAIJV7guxTO88k=]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=KXRIxJJC0VUMRSQktl9SB+KMm5J9MguiStGUmwfGTkJTK8/ToT6TYL0RBrdnh6/KScevDwvqPkuWgsly5zPQKU6cr6y8tYAIJV7guxTO88k=]

name: Tom Cotton
subject: This is a test of resolve
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee
body:
Iran can never be allowed to obtain a nuclear weapon.
Iran can never be allowed to obtain a nuclear weapon.

| [](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=6530684ef8474e80ab2c4c3e0bf70b9d&_e=IVDCzSilycDuELbnjKoe5Tidfq3jvicRuDtDXUA5W5gr6IN3yhVq08dPOEGm3Ygyf6mSBrfAsbIGVWaLilBWTDSxgWlYciKE4mpVQesZDi-bq_rwsCsgPpPDu-cNRmiTfXhM63E9fkOHjulRYwEawIqYP8wTMUuMBzUXntsS3OowKgQ1Qc219zPcSV0LyHRLLJnqi2vdc2xZ6vWNsN-yyp6ytRni6yOAaAqVeqO3cQ_UbehJqBI-8HuUycYnqJ1dO2nb-1cjctnFug0yfijezkrCFRFSamZagn0lAVZ7iFoCbaMxeYgXj0aFOzbooc4EDEVpKq6qVE7yavJb6HydOhH5ofy4DhR7IKjEcK1cV0ruqP04cHRB6wxglkR6FNQp4oR1ucQLpP9Akel4NCgZ_2PjqHXUTHpYCY42LiljE5vbAqY-RO-FmF1D9nqp3w_TsFbfs3SnK1-XBVpyiqOTrkz80njgujDZhO3M3Y1e50I-RATP3C-Y93TDLcST7u-W0u9yu8UR0Q-vp_lpze98ZJdo3czHCdl7n1V_fBehUtXPGbzShC4ktBPQSncpeJtL)
---
_" Iran can never be allowed to obtain a nuclear weapon. It is attacking American forces, threatening our allies, and advancing its nuclear program with clear intent. This is a test of resolve, and we must meet it with strength." _
_\- Pat Harrigan, (R, NC-10)_

Patriot, Congressman Pat Harrigan is right.

The threat of a nuclear Iran is very real.

Here's the full picture:

**_First_** : Obama made a horrible deal with Iran that loosened sanctions and gave them a path to a nuclear weapon.

**_Then_** : President Trump ended it. He walked away from a bad deal and implemented maximum pressure on Iran.

**_Next_** : Biden unfroze $16 billion of Iranian assets, which they used to fund terror proxies.

**_NOW_** _:_ Iran is once again on the move when it comes to obtaining a nuclear weapon.

Democrats aren't worried about stopping Iran. They're busy obstructing President Trump's agenda and defending criminal illegals.

**Pat and I need to know if you'll stand with us and President Trump as we do everything we can to prevent Iran from obtaining nuclear weapons.**

Now comes the hard part. Asking you, a strong conservative, for money. But it's one of the most important ways for you to stand with us.

**[Will you chip in $25 to stand with Congressman Pat Harrigan and me?](http://links.harriganfornc.com/u/click?_t=687026f8d8f7415aa539c5385c376b1f&_m=6530684ef8474e80ab2c4c3e0bf70b9d&_e=IVDCzSilycDuELbnjKoe5Tidfq3jvicRuDtDXUA5W5gr6IN3yhVq08dPOEGm3Ygyf6mSBrfAsbIGVWaLilBWTDSxgWlYciKE4mpVQesZDi-bq_rwsCsgPpPDu-cNRmiTfXhM63E9fkOHjulRYwEawIqYP8wTMUuMBzUXntsS3OowKgQ1Qc219zPcSV0LyHRLn3O7MRVz7g5kfnprr5bUjvzwI9sFTxHOcEsto_wnVkbTQGE1Ka_rWQwRk8Djpt9aRgtC1sZ_hgb7clx_drNUBVxJ_qQ3nClGGiuheippfVZ4Ug9C2bBp0zSQ63tc8W29MjyUafKW1ZMRe56uonx-cUYyEkQqA5b7MfZWr2-rekWNGe8UDJb3Qmdnv4qK6cEfpgWeVietJC2XwKwCLCdNTgfwjQz3XsbEfkn6hwUbwgzZCEKwn7GxP1BZS0eWIqD1mSOw1TWEVvtC3MVFOveTz36k0nXcXwrUXWSWlJs8m88cKgxJ9i4jihAPrxxYjRCXOoGyiYRUDof4q_TZMxomhUBqI3eNAeDFuzBemLypJ_Bf3STWMVjxxYirscNJFM_g)**

Pat is a fellow veteran, decorated Green Beret, and tested leader. He's a strong conservative, and I'm proud to stand shoulder to shoulder with him.

We can't let Democrats retake the House and Senate. They're weak when it comes to stopping Iran, and that's a threat to our country's safety and security.

This fight to keep Iran from obtaining nuclear weapons, and the fight to make America strong again, are tests of our resolve. We must meet it with strength.

clean_body: Iran can never be allowed to obtain a nuclear weapon. Iran can never be allowed to obtain a nuclear weapon. | " Iran can never be allowed to obtain a nuclear weapon. It is attacking American forces, threatening our allies, and advancing its nuclear program with clear intent. This is a test of resolve, and we must meet it with strength." \- Pat Harrigan, (R, NC-10) Patriot, Congressman Pat Harrigan is right. The threat of a nuclear Iran is very real. Here's the full picture: First : Obama made a horrible deal with Iran that loosened sanctions and gave them a path to a nuclear weapon. Then : President Trump ended it. He walked away from a bad deal and implemented maximum pressure on Iran. Next : Biden unfroze $16 billion of Iranian assets, which they used to fund terror proxies. NOW : Iran is once again on the move when it comes to obtaining a nuclear weapon. Democrats aren't worried about stopping Iran. They're busy obstructing President Trump's agenda and defending criminal illegals. Pat and I need to know if you'll stand with us and President Trump as we do everything we can to prevent Iran from obtaining nuclear weapons. Now comes the hard part. Asking you, a strong conservative, for money. But it's one of the most important ways for you to stand with us. Pat is a fellow veteran, decorated Green Beret, and tested leader. He's a strong conservative, and I'm proud to stand shoulder to shoulder with him. We can't let Democrats retake the House and Senate. They're weak when it comes to stopping Iran, and that's a threat to our country's safety and security. This fight to keep Iran from obtaining nuclear weapons, and the fight to make America strong again, are tests of our resolve. We must meet it with strength. In Service, Tom Cotton | Paid for by The Pat Harrigan Committee PO Box 97275, Raleigh, NC 27624 Copyright (C) 2025 Pat Harrigan for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Libby Schneider (via Democrats.org)
subject: Hi, I’m Libby 👋💃
body:
---
Hi Derek, I’m Libby Schneider, one of the Deputy Executive Directors at the DNC. If we haven’t yet met, hi! It’s so nice to meet you. I’ve been at the DNC since 2019 (whoa!) — most recently serving as the Chief of Staff — and I have had the privilege of working to elect Democrats at every level, from statewide to Senate races to presidential campaigns. It’s work that is such an honor to do because I know I am doing it alongside folks like you. Folks who know that our party is full of people fighting to make life better for Americans. I was born and raised in North Dakota (Never been? You’re in good company! You can stay with my Mom when you visit!), and I’ve spent my career fighting to ensure that Democrats are reaching and organizing voters everywhere — in rural communities, red districts, and every corner of the country. Now, as Deputy Executive Director, I’m laser-focused on building the strongest possible Democratic Party — one that can win in 2025, 2026, 2028, and beyond. That means hiring and retaining talented staff, investing in organizing infrastructure, expanding our footprint in every state, and showing up for the candidates and communities who need us most. From big cities to places like my hometown of Fargo to our country's most rural areas, we need to organize everywhere. Now is the time to get out and talk with folks about how Trump and his Republican agenda are hurting their bottom line, harming those they love and putting our country and their families into a tailspin. In order to stop the hurt, we need to organize. **And the DNC is doing just that. But we can’t do any of this without you.** That’s why I’m hoping you make a donation to the DNC today. $3 — that’s the ask. $3 to build lasting infrastructure in _every_ state, and make sure Democrats have the tools to compete everywhere. $3 to support the organizers who are building year-round relationships with voters in places Democrats can’t afford to overlook. $3 to elect Democrats up and down the ballot — in state legislatures, governors’ races, Senate contests, and the presidency — and stop Trump and Republicans from dismantling our democracy. If you believe in this work — if you believe in the power of a Party that organizes early, everywhere, and for everyone — I hope you’ll chip in. **[Can you please contribute $3 (or whatever you can afford) to the DNC today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-june-2025?refcode=em_20250610_3697_fr&amount=3&refcode2=3697_22930333_Qapj90&akid=3697%2E22930333%2EQapj90)**

clean_body: Hi Derek, I’m Libby Schneider, one of the Deputy Executive Directors at the DNC. If we haven’t yet met, hi! It’s so nice to meet you. I’ve been at the DNC since 2019 (whoa!) — most recently serving as the Chief of Staff — and I have had the privilege of working to elect Democrats at every level, from statewide to Senate races to presidential campaigns. It’s work that is such an honor to do because I know I am doing it alongside folks like you. Folks who know that our party is full of people fighting to make life better for Americans. I was born and raised in North Dakota (Never been? You’re in good company! You can stay with my Mom when you visit!), and I’ve spent my career fighting to ensure that Democrats are reaching and organizing voters everywhere — in rural communities, red districts, and every corner of the country. Now, as Deputy Executive Director, I’m laser-focused on building the strongest possible Democratic Party — one that can win in 2025, 2026, 2028, and beyond. That means hiring and retaining talented staff, investing in organizing infrastructure, expanding our footprint in every state, and showing up for the candidates and communities who need us most. From big cities to places like my hometown of Fargo to our country's most rural areas, we need to organize everywhere. Now is the time to get out and talk with folks about how Trump and his Republican agenda are hurting their bottom line, harming those they love and putting our country and their families into a tailspin. In order to stop the hurt, we need to organize. And the DNC is doing just that. But we can’t do any of this without you. That’s why I’m hoping you make a donation to the DNC today. $3 — that’s the ask. $3 to build lasting infrastructure in every state, and make sure Democrats have the tools to compete everywhere. $3 to support the organizers who are building year-round relationships with voters in places Democrats can’t afford to overlook. $3 to elect Democrats up and down the ballot — in state legislatures, governors’ races, Senate contests, and the presidency — and stop Trump and Republicans from dismantling our democracy. If you believe in this work — if you believe in the power of a Party that organizes early, everywhere, and for everyone — I hope you’ll chip in. name: Eleni Kounalakis
subject: I spoke to ABC10 about what’s happening in LA and Trump’s call to arrest Governor Newsom.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Eleni Kounalakis for Governor 2026
body:
#
Peter -
Donald Trump is intentionally and actively creating chaos and escalating tensions in California.
He is trying to inject violence into largely peaceful protests. He is usurping the authority of state and local law enforcement, who are best equipped to manage and de-escalate any situations, by sending in the National Guard and now the Marines.
He wants conflict and spectacle. That’s why he called for Governor Newsom’s arrest, with of course, no allegations of any laws being broken.
This is something I hoped I’d never see in America. It’s straight out of the autocrat’s handbook — which I witnessed Viktor Orban write during my time as US ambassador to Hungary.
[**I spoke to ABC10 yesterday about all that is happening. I hope you’ll take a few minutes to watch and share my interview.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109350666/550833490/-803653937?v=ZmwLCK-afU4&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MjgwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ODk4ZGMwNC01YzQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XOpJTWtdLSR-eVkl0VkmYyNi2TBfRjHoT8ZlzVrr_qI=&emci=9361097c-5646-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=9898dc04-5c46-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=18887817)

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: Peter, I need you to see this today.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Preview text here
I wanted to inform you that your House GOP Membership is up for renewal.
&2nbsp;
|
---
| | | Peter,

I wouldn't be coming to you like this if it wasn't important.

My team just informed me that, as of today, your House GOP Membership has YET to be renewed.

subject: re: groundwork
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
I launched this campaign back in 2023 with a clear vision: to put Virginia first as our next Governor.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109351135/550853390/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-06-10_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNTFlNmI1YjUtNjI0Ni1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=_h0caB4fkLLZJiV1EDn7_0lPJynjO191lwY6W56F_kI=)

| Peter, we have _one week_ to go until the start of the general election.

I launched this campaign back in 2023 with a clear vision: to put Virginia first as our next Governor. Since then, we've met thousands of voters, released action plans on critical issues Virginians care about, and recruited hundreds of organizers, volunteers, and full-time staff.

We've laid the groundwork. _But there's a ton of work still ahead to flip Virginia blue._

Democrats lost this seat by two points in 2021. That's why national Republicans are ready to unload millions of dollars worth of attacks against us to elect Winsome Earle-Sears and give Trump a symbolic victory.

_And it's why I'm counting on your donation today to flip Virginia blue._

[_**Peter, it's going to take every last dollar to air the ads and build the support we need to win. clean_body: I launched this campaign back in 2023 with a clear vision: to put Virginia first as our next Governor. | = | Peter, we have one week to go until the start of the general election. I launched this campaign back in 2023 with a clear vision: to put Virginia first as our next Governor. Since then, we've met thousands of voters, released action plans on critical issues Virginians care about, and recruited hundreds of organizers, volunteers, and full-time staff. We've laid the groundwork. But there's a ton of work still ahead to flip Virginia blue. Democrats lost this seat by two points in 2021. That's why national Republicans are ready to unload millions of dollars worth of attacks against us to elect Winsome Earle-Sears and give Trump a symbolic victory. And it's why I'm counting on your donation today to flip Virginia blue. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for having my back, Abigail Spanberger * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States | = =

body:

| | Hi Friend, I’m Lateefah Simon. [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109351209/550854954/-1048634449?&refcode=E13603-20250610-BioEmail-Image-CandidateBio&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDhjY2YzMzctNjQ0Ni1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NHdLiTD_F760G5R2teCnZ9CifwauzIYTMjVeTzTJZs0=)**Every day I’m working for you, I carry with me the lessons I learned growing up in San Francisco’s Fillmore District—lessons about resilience, justice, and commitment to our communities. ** Raised by a single mom, I got my first job at the Young Women’s Freedom Center when I was 16, and by 19, I was leading it. I was in and out of trouble in high school, but getting a job and finding a community with the Young Women’s Freedom Center changed my life. That experience taught me the power of giving people a second chance and making sure no one gets left behind–because I got a chance. Now, I’m proud to serve in Congress, fighting every day for the people who’ve too often been left out and left behind. Whether it’s fighting for more affordable housing, expanding mental health services, or securing federal funding to make our neighborhoods safer, I’m committed to making sure your concerns are addressed, and the voices of everyday people are heard in Washington. But I can’t do it alone. We’re up against powerful interests that want to keep the system rigged for the few, and I need your help to keep building a future where everyone—no matter who they are or where they come from—has a real shot at success. Will you stand with me? | [**DONATE TODAY →** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109351210/550854955/-1048634449?&refcode=E13603-20250610-BioEmail-SB-CandidateBio&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ0NDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZDhjY2YzMzctNjQ0Ni1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NHdLiTD_F760G5R2teCnZ9CifwauzIYTMjVeTzTJZs0=)
---
Thank you for being in this fight with me. Together, we’re making a difference.
—Lateefah

clean_body: From my earliest days to Congress, every step has been about lifting up our community. | = = | | Hi Friend, I’m Lateefah Simon. day I’m working for you, I carry with me the lessons I learned growing up in San Francisco’s Fillmore District—lessons about resilience, justice, and commitment to our communities. Raised by a single mom, I got my first job at the Young Women’s Freedom Center when I was 16, and by 19, I was leading it. I was in and out of trouble in high school, but getting a job and finding a community with the Young Women’s Freedom Center changed my life. That experience taught me the power of giving people a second chance and making sure no one gets left behind–because I got a chance. Now, I’m proud to serve in Congress, fighting every day for the people who’ve too often been left out and left behind. Whether it’s fighting for more affordable housing, expanding mental health services, or securing federal funding to make our neighborhoods safer, I’m committed to making sure your concerns are addressed, and the voices of everyday people are heard in Washington. But I can’t do it alone. We’re up against powerful interests that want to keep the system rigged for the few, and I need your help to keep building a future where everyone—no matter who they are or where they come from—has a real shot at success. Will you stand with me? | = Thank you for being in this fight with me. Together, we’re making a difference. —Lateefah If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = = | = = | = = | * | | ---|---|--- Lateefah Simon for Congress 1714 Franklin St #100 - 438 Oakland, CA 94612 mailto:info@lateefahsimon.com = = Lateefah Simon has spent her career fighting for justice—fighting for folks without a voice. | Team — let’s be clear about what is happening in Los Angeles right now: Donald Trump has classified peaceful protest as rebellion and has deployed the National Guard over the objection of a sitting governor for the first time since 1965. _This is almost certainly illegal_. Now, he is even mobilizing the marines to police our neighborhoods. **This is authoritarian intimidation and is the playbook of dictators, not democratically elected leaders.** **[But California is fighting back. Because we do not bow before any king or dictator. Governor Gavin Newsom has just announced that he is SUING Donald Trump to stop this unlawful circus. Will you consider making a donation to fund organizing programs we are aiming to launch up and down our state? This is authoritarian intimidation and is the playbook of dictators, not democratically elected leaders. = = What we are seeing in Los Angeles County is a purposeful provocation by the Trump Administration. From arresting immigrants, to detaining labor leaders, to mobilizing military personnel against peaceful citizens, to threatening the arrest of our Governor, Trump has made his intentions clear — to demonize, divide, and destroy our communities. But California Democrats are California Strong because we stand together – united by our shared values of justice, equality, opportunity, and resilience. | Friends, It is a great day for New Hampshire parents! This morning, **Governor Kelly Ayotte signed both our _Parents' Bill of Rights_ and _Universal School Choice_ bills into law!** Year after year, Senate Republicans have worked hard to get these two bills signed into law. Parents know what is best for their children and can now be involved in every aspect of their education. Additionally, **every Granite State family now has access to universal school choice, providing more options for their children.** Expanding the Parents Bill of Rights ensures all parents know their rights so they can better guide their children’s education. Education Freedom Accounts opens educational possibilities for all Granite State families. **We are providing families more transparency in the classroom which will help New Hampshire’s future leaders flourish in school environments that best suit them.** **

name: Phil Izon
subject: I was asked to explain the PFD Doomsday Clock and why I made it
body:
Please send to your friends and family | | | | [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6848fede6aa63a17d372838e&u=https%3A%2F%2F907honest.com%2F%3Fss_source%3Dsscampaigns%26ss_campaign_id%3D6848fe5de8b8fc7095254b46%26ss_email_id%3D6848fede6aa63a17d372838e%26ss_campaign_name%3DI%2Bwas%2Basked%2Bto%2Bexplain%2Bthe%2BPFD%2BDoomsday%2BClock%2Band%2Bwhy%2BI%2Bmade%2Bit%26ss_campaign_sent_date%3D2025-06-11T03%253A58%253A45Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6848fe5de8b8fc7095254b46&l=en-US&s=cWgPB0PuleB4UHltiYsragJd4AA%3D) |
---|---
| **I was asked to write an article for Mukluk News in Tok.****The article was explaining the PFD Doomsday Clock that I made. "Hello, Thanks for reaching out about your article on the PFD Doomsday Clock for your paper in Tok.****I’m glad to help explain what the tool is—and why it matters now more than ever. The PFD Doomsday Clock is a website that shows Alaskans exactly how much money they've lost from their Permanent Fund Dividend (PFD) checks since 2016—the year the State Legislature stopped following the formula written in law.****The tool was created by Phil Izon, an Alaskan and the author behind the campaign to repeal Ranked Choice Voting in 2022–2024. He built the Doomsday Clock so Alaskans can quickly see how much of their dividend has been withheld—and redirected. Here’s the truth: Since 2016, instead of paying out the full PFD as required by law, Alaska politicians—starting with Bill Walker and continuing through today—have funneled that money into government programs, public sector unions, and politically connected nonprofits.****Billions of dollars have been quietly taken from the people and used to expand the size and reach of state government. And behind much of this shift is a well-funded political network tied to Lower 48 interests—namely, Hansjörg Wyss, Arabella Advisors, and the 1630 Fund. These are the same players who funded the push for: Ranked Choice Voting (via Alaskans for Better Elections), Automatic Voter Registration, and various “climate” and “equity” programs run by groups like SalmonState, Alaska Venture Fund, and Alaska Outdoor Alliance.****These organizations have deep ties to Arabella’s dark money network—the same network pushing progressive agendas nationwide. And here in Alaska, they’ve successfully supported the election of lawmakers who’ve gutted the PFD while quietly growing union power and state spending. Some quick facts from the tool: 2018: Full PFD should’ve been $2,900—only $1,600 was paid. $800M withheld. 2020: PFD was $992, roughly $1B withheld. 2022: Should’ve been $4,200, but only $3,284 was paid. $600M withheld. 2023: Supposed to be $3,900, only $1,312 paid. That’s $1.5B taken. 2024: Expected $4,000, paid $1,718. Another $1.3–$1.4B redirected. Looking ahead, if the statutory formula had been followed, PFDs would climb above $4,000 after 2029 and reach nearly $5,000 by 2035.****That means a family of four will have lost over $180,000 from 2016 to 2035. That’s money that could have gone to college tuition, housing, medical bills, groceries, heating oil, or gas. So where did it go? Largely to K–12 education bureaucracies, government union benefits, and non-transparent nonprofits that push political agendas with outside money. The public never voted to give away the PFD—but the same interests who engineered election reforms also helped install the politicians who voted to take it.****The PFD Doomsday Clock doesn’t just display lost money—it shows a long-term, strategic redirection of Alaska’s wealth away from its people and toward a class of insiders and operatives. It raises the question every Alaskan should be asking: Should the Legislature be allowed to override the law, gut the PFD, and hand the money to groups backed by billionaires from out of state?****I also created the tool to promote my movie "The Permanent Short- Alaska's Reallocation of $25+ Billion from the Citizens of Alaska to Unions and NGOs" the movie will come out in October. You can find the PFD Doomsday Clock 2.0 that is adjusted for inflation and investment possibilities, Alaska's Budget Analyzer, and see my movies that will be coming out on my website**[**http://TropicTundra.com**](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6848fede6aa63a17d372838e&u=https%3A%2F%2Ft.co%2FegtWTAOo1Z&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6848fe5de8b8fc7095254b46&l=en-US&s=wZGf1Eyam2pI3RYllIfk3WW7dW8%3D)**Please let me know if you have any additional questions, Phil Izon"**
---
---
|
---
#### [**Click Here To Go To Website**](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6848fede6aa63a17d372838e&u=https%3A%2F%2FRCVAlert.org&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6848fe5de8b8fc7095254b46&l=en-US&s=fzKbdM0j2kG5pOeD7lCY3pBqWXo%3D)****[**RCVAlert.org**](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6848fede6aa63a17d372838e&u=https%3A%2F%2FRCVAlert.org&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6848fe5de8b8fc7095254b46&l=en-US&s=fzKbdM0j2kG5pOeD7lCY3pBqWXo%3D)
---
**I put these materials together for the good folks of Michigan to help stand strong against Ranked Choice Voting. I’d be honored if you took a moment to visit the website I built—it's something I poured my heart into for the people of that great state. Everything you’ll find there was made with one goal: to help stop Ranked Choice Voting. And I want to be clear—I'm doing this on my own dime, not a penny asked.****If you believe in the work I’m doing to stop Ranked Choice Voting across this country, I humbly ask for your support in helping fund the films I’m making. You’ll find links to that below.****I’m proud to be working with folks from national groups like Stop RCV, and many others that I won’t name. Together, we’re building tools like interactive guides and educational apps to make it easier for everyday Americans to understand what’s really at stake. When you visit the website, I hope you’ll take time to check out the new applications I built right here in Alaska—they explain Ranked Choice Voting in ways folks haven’t seen before.****I also built a custom chatbot that can answer your questions about RCV using the material I’ve written and collected. You’ll find short animated videos and even a full animated short film that tells the story plain and true. My documentary** _**Frozen Odds**_**tells the story of Alaska’s fight against Ranked Choice Voting, and I plan to show it in theaters across Alaska, Oregon, Michigan, and other places where this voting system still threatens the voice of the people.****Thank you for standing with me. These last three years have been a journey I’ll never forget. The friendships and partnerships I’ve built across the country have changed my life—and I believe, together, we can protect our Republic.**
---
---
|
---
---
|
---
### **Ranked Choice Voting has now been banned in 17 States and Counting, Iowa became the 17th State Today.**
---
---
| [](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6848fede6aa63a17d372838e&u=https%3A%2F%2Fpfd-doomsday-clock-23332009477.us-west1.run.app&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6848fe5de8b8fc7095254b46&l=en-US&s=b1GlR9Kn7gfdhpnGE937zJyLbKw%3D)
---
#### **💸 Alaskans: Curious about how much you’ve lost from your PFD since 2016?
**
#### **Use the PFD Doomsday Clock, it’s been used by tens of thousands in a couple days.**
#### [**https://pfd-doomsday-clock-23332009477.us-west1.run.app/**](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6848fede6aa63a17d372838e&u=https%3A%2F%2Fpfd-doomsday-clock-23332009477.us-west1.run.app%2F&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6848fe5de8b8fc7095254b46&l=en-US&s=E6QIArXf4SAbuZD8VReEuRu_wmk%3D)
#### **The tool has garnered widespread attention, being featured in both Must Read Alaska and Alaska Watchman.**
#### **The calculator empowers Alaskans to quantify the financial losses they’ve experienced due to reductions in the Permanent Fund Dividend (PFD) since 2016. **
#### **For instance, a family of four has reportedly lost over $60,000 during this period . **
####

#### This Memorial Day, while we honor the service and sacrifice of those who gave everything for our freedoms, we also reflect on what those freedoms are meant to protect—**honest government, fair opportunity, and a voice for the people**.
#### But in Juneau, the people are being forgotten.
#### The Legislature just closed its latest session—not with discipline, not with restraint, but with a **stampede of giveaways**. Millions of dollars in taxpayer funds handed over to the **National Education Association** and entrenched union bureaucracies—while schools close their doors, and more Alaskan families than ever turn to charter schools and homeschooling.
#### What was the dividend meant to do?
The **Permanent Fund Dividend** was designed as a promise—that all Alaskans would share in the wealth of our natural resources. It was never meant to become a **slush fund for lobbyists, consultants, and political machines controlled by out-of-state interests.**
#### This is not just bad budgeting.
It’s a betrayal of the people—and the purpose—of Alaska.
#### Our upcoming film, _The Permanent Short: Alaska’s Billion Dollar Betrayal_ , will expose this corruption. We’ll follow the money and show how generations of Alaskans are being denied their share, their voice, and their future.
#### And the movement is already growing.
#### Our **Angel tickets were the first to sell out for “Frozen Odds”** —a powerful signal that Alaskans are ready to fight back. Angel supporters receive exclusive access to both _The Permanent Short_ and _Frozen Odds_ , the film that lit the fuse.
#### This is just the beginning.
#### The fight for Alaska’s future isn’t over.
It’s just getting started.
---
#### [**Click Here To Get Your Angel Ticket**](https://a1e0.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6848fede6aa63a17d372838e&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tropictundra.com%2Fthe-permanent-short&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6848fe5de8b8fc7095254b46&l=en-US&s=fnihYbSF3WUEXuLfqUn0XCHMH-o%3D)
---
#### **In 2001, Enron collapsed under the weight of one of the largest corporate frauds in American history—over $25 billion evaporated overnight, leaving pensions gutted and lives destroyed. It was called the smartest disaster money could buy.**
#### But what if the next Enron wasn’t a corporation?
What if it was your own government?
#### This film asks the billion-dollar question:
**What happens when a state quietly reallocates tens of billions of dollars meant for its citizens—without a vote, without consent, and without accountability?**
#### We follow the money—through shadowy nonprofits, bloated bureaucracies, and politically connected networks like **Arabella Advisors** , **Alaska Venture Fund** , and the **1630 Fund**.
#### It’s a financial betrayal not buried in spreadsheets—but broadcast in silence.
**$25 billion gone** —not from shareholders this time, but from the people of Alaska.
#### This is _The Permanent Short_.
#### More announcements coming soon.
**Thank you for being part of this journey.**
---

### **Now we have 108 supporters for “Frozen Odds”**
---
#### **Frozen Odds How do you take on $15 million with nothing but determination, grassroots organizing, and a clipboard? Frozen Odds is a gripping documentary that uncovers the raw power of citizen-led initiatives in Alaska. Following the journey of a small but determined movement, this film reveals how everyday people—outspent 100 to 1 by out-of-state interests—rallied together to challenge the system. Led by an Alaskans for Alaskans who helped write the law and push it to the ballot, this battle wasn’t just about policy—it was about democracy in its purest form. With 400+ volunteers braving the cold, gathering 42,000 signatures when only 26,000 were needed, they proved that people—not money—should shape the laws that govern them. Through intimate interviews, on-the-ground footage, and stunning Alaskan landscapes, Frozen Odds captures the high-stakes struggle against political elites (aka Lisa Murkowski and George Soros, etc.) and the enduring spirit of grassroots activism. Though the campaign fell just 700 votes short out of 320,000, it laid the groundwork for a new wave of initiatives—this time, with three fresh petitions ready to take the fight forward. In a world where billionaires and lobbyists try to control the political process.**
#### **Frozen Odds asks a bold question: What happens when ordinary citizens refuse to back down?**

clean_body: Please send to your friends and family | | | | | ---|--- | I was asked to write an article for Mukluk News in Tok.The article was explaining the PFD Doomsday Clock that I made. "Hello, Thanks for reaching out about your article on the PFD Doomsday Clock for your paper in Tok.I’m glad to help explain what the tool is—and why it matters now more than ever. The PFD Doomsday Clock is a website that shows Alaskans exactly how much money they've lost from their Permanent Fund Dividend (PFD) checks since 2016—the year the State Legislature stopped following the formula written in law.The tool was created by Phil Izon, an Alaskan and the author behind the campaign to repeal Ranked Choice Voting in 2022–2024. He built the Doomsday Clock so Alaskans can quickly see how much of their dividend has been withheld—and redirected. Here’s the truth: Since 2016, instead of paying out the full PFD as required by law, Alaska politicians—starting with Bill Walker and continuing through today—have funneled that money into government programs, public sector unions, and politically connected nonprofits.Billions of dollars have been quietly taken from the people and used to expand the size and reach of state government. And behind much of this shift is a well-funded political network tied to Lower 48 interests—namely, Hansjörg Wyss, Arabella Advisors, and the 1630 Fund. These are the same players who funded the push for: Ranked Choice Voting (via Alaskans for Better Elections), Automatic Voter Registration, and various “climate” and “equity” programs run by groups like SalmonState, Alaska Venture Fund, and Alaska Outdoor Alliance.These organizations have deep ties to Arabella’s dark money network—the same network pushing progressive agendas nationwide. And here in Alaska, they’ve successfully supported the election of lawmakers who’ve gutted the PFD while quietly growing union power and state spending. Some quick facts from the tool: 2018: Full PFD should’ve been $2,900—only $1,600 was paid. $800M withheld. 2020: PFD was $992, roughly $1B withheld. 2022: Should’ve been $4,200, but only $3,284 was paid. $600M withheld. 2023: Supposed to be $3,900, only $1,312 paid. That’s $1.5B taken. 2024: Expected $4,000, paid $1,718. Another $1.3–$1.4B redirected. Looking ahead, if the statutory formula had been followed, PFDs would climb above $4,000 after 2029 and reach nearly $5,000 by 2035.That means a family of four will have lost over $180,000 from 2016 to 2035. That’s money that could have gone to college tuition, housing, medical bills, groceries, heating oil, or gas. So where did it go? Largely to K–12 education bureaucracies, government union benefits, and non-transparent nonprofits that push political agendas with outside money. The public never voted to give away the PFD—but the same interests who engineered election reforms also helped install the politicians who voted to take it.The PFD Doomsday Clock doesn’t just display lost money—it shows a long-term, strategic redirection of Alaska’s wealth away from its people and toward a class of insiders and operatives. It raises the question every Alaskan should be asking: Should the Legislature be allowed to override the law, gut the PFD, and hand the money to groups backed by billionaires from out of state?I also created the tool to promote my movie "The Permanent Short- Alaska's Reallocation of $25+ Billion from the Citizens of Alaska to Unions and NGOs" the movie will come out in October. You can find the PFD Doomsday Clock 2.0 that is adjusted for inflation and investment possibilities, Alaska's Budget Analyzer, and see my movies that will be coming out on my website let me know if you have any additional questions, Phil Izon" | I put these materials together for the good folks of Michigan to help stand strong against Ranked Choice Voting. I’d be honored if you took a moment to visit the website I built—it's something I poured my heart into for the people of that great state. Everything you’ll find there was made with one goal: to help stop Ranked Choice Voting. And I want to be clear—I'm doing this on my own dime, not a penny asked.**If you believe in the work I’m doing to stop Ranked Choice Voting across this country, I humbly ask for your support in helping fund the films I’m making. You’ll find links to that below.I’m proud to be working with folks from national groups like Stop RCV, and many others that I won’t name. Together, we’re building tools like interactive guides and educational apps to make it easier for everyday Americans to understand what’s really at stake. When you visit the website, I hope you’ll take time to check out the new applications I built right here in Alaska—they explain Ranked Choice Voting in ways folks haven’t seen before.I also built a custom chatbot that can answer your questions about RCV using the material I’ve written and collected. You’ll find short animated videos and even a full animated short film that tells the story plain and true. My documentary Frozen Oddstells the story of Alaska’s fight against Ranked Choice Voting, and I plan to show it in theaters across Alaska, Oregon, Michigan, and other places where this voting system still threatens the voice of the people.Thank you for standing with me. These last three years have been a journey I’ll never forget. The friendships and partnerships I’ve built across the country have changed my life—and I believe, together, we can protect our Republic. | | Ranked Choice Voting has now been banned in 17 States and Counting, Iowa became the 17th State Today. | 💸 Alaskans: Curious about how much you’ve lost from your PFD since 2016? Tag your neighbors. Let Alaska know. Your Household Size and Select the Date Range and Watch the Amount of money total up.Cumulative Impact (Per Person Total): If you sum up the withheld amounts: $1,030 + $1,200 + $1,300 + $1,304 + $2,108 + $2,686 + $916 + $2,588 + $2,282 = $15,414 not paid per Alaskan over 9 years By Joel Davidson May 26th 2025 | Two Free Ranked Choice Voting Applications Made By Phil Izon, please share | RCV Field Manual App Your guide to Ranked Choice Voting—anytime, anywhere. Based on Field Manual to Ranked Choice Voting: Lessons from the Last Frontier, this app delivers clear, evidence-based insights into RCV’s impact on U.S. elections. From Maine to San Francisco, explore real-world case studies, funding sources, and implementation challenges—all from your phone or computer. Features: Chapter-based navigation Searchable case studies and data Expert analysis and critiques Offline and mobile access Stay informed. Understand RCV. Share the truth. | Manufactured Majority App Alaska’s 2022 Elections—Unpacked. Anywhere. Anytime. Based on Manufactured Majority by Phil Izon, this app gives you instant access to a deep dive into Alaska’s 2022 U.S. House and Senate races under ranked-choice voting and jungle primaries. From skyrocketing costs to record-low turnout, explore the real consequences behind the headlines. Key Features: Election data and turnout insights Breakdown of vote-splitting and outcomes Mobile-friendly analysis of RCV impacts Access from any phone or computer Understand what really happened—and why it matters. | This Memorial Day, while we honor the service and sacrifice of those who gave everything for our freedoms, we also reflect on what those freedoms are meant to protect—honest government, fair opportunity, and a voice for the people. But in Juneau, the people are being forgotten. The Legislature just closed its latest session—not with discipline, not with restraint, but with a stampede of giveaways. Millions of dollars in taxpayer funds handed over to the National Education Association and entrenched union bureaucracies—while schools close their doors, and more Alaskan families than ever turn to charter schools and homeschooling. What was the dividend meant to do? The Permanent Fund Dividend was designed as a promise—that all Alaskans would share in the wealth of our natural resources. It was never meant to become a slush fund for lobbyists, consultants, and political machines controlled by out-of-state interests. This is not just bad budgeting. It’s a betrayal of the people—and the purpose—of Alaska. Our upcoming film, The Permanent Short: Alaska’s Billion Dollar Betrayal , will expose this corruption. We’ll follow the money and show how generations of Alaskans are being denied their share, their voice, and their future. And the movement is already growing. Our Angel tickets were the first to sell out for “Frozen Odds” —a powerful signal that Alaskans are ready to fight back. Angel supporters receive exclusive access to both The Permanent Short and Frozen Odds , the film that lit the fuse. This is just the beginning. The fight for Alaska’s future isn’t over. It’s just getting started. In 2001, Enron collapsed under the weight of one of the largest corporate frauds in American history—over $25 billion evaporated overnight, leaving pensions gutted and lives destroyed. It was called the smartest disaster money could buy. But what if the next Enron wasn’t a corporation? What if it was your own government? This film asks the billion-dollar question: What happens when a state quietly reallocates tens of billions of dollars meant for its citizens—without a vote, without consent, and without accountability? We follow the money—through shadowy nonprofits, bloated bureaucracies, and politically connected networks like Arabella Advisors , Alaska Venture Fund , and the 1630 Fund. It’s a financial betrayal not buried in spreadsheets—but broadcast in silence. $25 billion gone —not from shareholders this time, but from the people of Alaska. This is The Permanent Short. More announcements coming soon. Thank you for being part of this journey. | Now we have 108 supporters for “Frozen Odds” Frozen Odds How do you take on $15 million with nothing but determination, grassroots organizing, and a clipboard? Frozen Odds is a gripping documentary that uncovers the raw power of citizen-led initiatives in Alaska. Following the journey of a small but determined movement, this film reveals how everyday people—outspent 100 to 1 by out-of-state interests—rallied together to challenge the system. Led by an Alaskans for Alaskans who helped write the law and push it to the ballot, this battle wasn’t just about policy—it was about democracy in its purest form. With 400+ volunteers braving the cold, gathering 42,000 signatures when only 26,000 were needed, they proved that people—not money—should shape the laws that govern them. Through intimate interviews, on-the-ground footage, and stunning Alaskan landscapes, Frozen Odds captures the high-stakes struggle against political elites (aka Lisa Murkowski and George Soros, etc.) and the enduring spirit of grassroots activism. Though the campaign fell just 700 votes short out of 320,000, it laid the groundwork for a new wave of initiatives—this time, with three fresh petitions ready to take the fight forward. In a world where billionaires and lobbyists try to control the political process. Frozen Odds asks a bold question: What happens when ordinary citizens refuse to back down? | | | | Follow Me On X @907Honest | | Phil Izon 12110 Business Blvd Ste A06 Box #113 Eagle River 99577 United States

body:
When we dropped the CIA tapes, it wasn’t just news—it was a reckoning. Supporters say we’re “the only ones with the guts to take on the spies.” Critics? They squawk about “ethics” while ignoring the rot we uncover. I don’t care about their noise.

| [****](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z02go91t7h4p8mainhdur0tsvmiuqugnekme342o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdj66o32cjh2bs)

I'm James O'Keefe, and at OMG, we've gone where others won't--deep into the shadows. We caught CIA operatives on hidden cameras, bragging about sabotaging President Trump, spilling secrets from DHS and DoD too. _The Federalist_ called it "**a bombshell that rocks the deep state** ," and X users said "OMG's doing God's work." It's dangerous, it's real, and it's why I've got no life outside this mission.

The left's tried to break me from the start. Jailed on trumped-up charges, my home raided by the FBI over Biden's diary, lawsuits raining down--**they want me gone**.

But I'm still here, fighting for the truth, because you deserve to know what's happening in those locked rooms.

[**OMG needs**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgealj3qglqlisdv476se8hbrgjkbr4lpmt8pce0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdj66o32cjh2bs)**[**$64,600 by July**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z7m8jl1a0sdiddvf3q65h4f6drsq286cmhsmff30_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdj66o32cjh2bs)**[**to keep going, and I 'm asking you to step up. Can I count on you?**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztn9i3lqrpd7rksrp0mrqo3l0o656glp4auqgh7o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdj66o32cjh2bs)

People call OMG "relentless." When we dropped the CIA tapes, it wasn't just news--it was a reckoning. Supporters say we're "the only ones with the guts to take on the spies." Critics? They squawk about "ethics" while ignoring the rot we uncover. I don't care about their noise. I care about the operatives I've heard, their casual treason on tape, and the fire it lights in me. But this fight's expensive--legal battles, gear, risks--and we're on the edge.

[**Your support keeps us digging.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zff0kckpf5ebr6nrm57n3bduf7evr3na3gdp7evg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdj66o32cjh2bs)

I've paid a price most can't imagine. That raid? Humiliating. The jail time? Grueling. The lawsuits? Endless. **But it 's worth it to expose a system that thinks it owns you.**

We've got more coming--bigger, darker--[**but**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkhcit6fin6og35og9la26jb5j8t4mvpmdcdd708_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdj66o32cjh2bs)**[**$64,600 by July**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zo1bftiksi14cjudq7ik8n5rpg0n6mtjc3sd6398_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdj66o32cjh2bs)**[**is our make-or-break**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zg4lmrdekn3hefsbp17pv9168q7ics0nrpftbjig_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdj66o32cjh2bs). Without it, the deep state wins, and I can't live with that. [**Please, support OMG and help us keep going.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgsp5t7tfup1r4uim4esecu0iopiq16gf01ltli8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdj66o32cjh2bs)

If you want accountability--not platitudes, not spin--[**then this is your fight**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvucfl04nc52i810c3899sei3es8fk1ibkut30io_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdj66o32cjh2bs).

[**Your donation today, $10 or $500, keeps us in the shadows, exposing what they hide.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkjd5iu7vqp2h3io6f0t06giot7at8l9u7sbht0g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdj66o32cjh2bs)

I'm not here to play safe; **I 'm here to win.**

Thank you for considering this. **With you, we 're a force they can't stop.**

Without it, the deep state wins, and I can't live with that. [**Please, support OMG and help us keep going.**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3s9sdadmfft8rc51cf53hrbv066kscoj6lorou8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdj66o36c1h2bs)

If you want accountability--not platitudes, not spin--[**then this is your fight**](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zba5c2ooc1t18rdutsj0935ifr5kaho6qvelnhj8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdj66o36c1h2bs).

name: Mayra Flores
subject: Let me tell you my story.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mayra for Congress
body:
My name is Mayra Flores, and my story is not normal.

[](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zklv3bk31tpcv9nf4df7g25n7fta0etoeu3b9s08_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdj66o36cth2bs) I am not sure we've ever met before, but I promise if you give me just 2 minutes of your time it will be worth it.
**My name is Mayra Flores, and my story is not normal. **
But I take heart in what is written in Jeremiah 29:11 _"__' For I know the plans I have for you,' declares the Lord, 'plans to prosper you and not to harm you, plans to give you hope and a future.'"_
I know God has a plan for me, and that he will use me for the betterment of his Kingdom. [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z6jntqc1r0ah9t7s89r1ma2rfac7j059f81qee30_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdj66o36cth2bs) See, I was born and raised with humble beginnings in Burgos, Tamaulipas, Mexico. My parents and grandparents raised me with strong conservative values and to always put God and family first.
I came legally to the United States at six years old with the help of my father and became a proud, naturalized American Citizen.
Growing up, I worked alongside my parents in the cotton fields in Texas to earn extra money for school clothes and supplies.
I graduated in 2014 as a Respiratory Care Practitioner with the support of my family, and then worked caring for the elderly and disabled with chronic respiratory issues. [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zj4td3al2cvtmpfr0vlob1jo56vhd17f24ujavno_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdj66o36cth2bs) In 2022, I shocked the political establishment when I won a special election in South Texas. I defeated a Democrat in a seat that had been a Democrat stronghold for over 100 years until we flipped it red in a stunning special election upset against Biden & Pelosi.
[I was honored to become the FIRST Mexican-born Congresswoman in American history! ](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z1qtr3ppl5gh7hhrsv4elsf57ja9dr33gkvipnlo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdj66o36cth2bs)
Once in Congress, I focused on securing the border, growing the economy, and standing up to business as usual in D.C.
But the Democrats hated everything I stood for, and they spent millions to take me out.
Losing was a tough setback, but my parents and grandparents taught me to never give up and to never back down to bullies! [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zm2pt40hd00ctaf08evpe54tm8m64j63hh8fhmgg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdj66o36cth2bs) So I threw my hat back in the ring last year, running alongside President Trump and helping deliver record turnout and performance for Republicans in Hispanic-dominated south Texas.
But the Democrat Machine was just too much for us. We came up short by less than 3%. Only 5,000 votes stood between victory and defeat.
[But just like President Trump, I'm using this setback to stage the ultimate comeback...and I hope you will stand with me as I step back into the arena.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zng6h55cknf6on0u06ejni5mk322g7edg0eeaak8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdj66o36cth2bs)
My opponent this go around: a corrupt Democrat who has been in office over 20 years and who has been charged by the FBI with BRIBERY!
I know this will be our toughest fight yet, but I also know the Lord will bless our campaign. I am building an army of grassroots supporters who will help us stand up to the lies and attacks that will soon come our way.
[That is why I need your help, and I know your support is a gift, not a given.](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zt29gnk52dbgtbbjmdq49uamqsoi5k56q7hfi9v0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdj66o36cth2bs)
So I will not put a number on it, nor a deadline, just asking you to give what you can, when you can because our country, and our movement need you now more than ever before. [Donate Today
](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z7p2g50omq975f2e4e7hv1o0g9gr9r3hu9jo521g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdj66o36cth2bs) Thank you for taking just a few minutes to read my story. Now that you have made it this far, I hope you can understand why [I am so humbly asking for your help and support!](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zdmn8v8f39irf697jv1tgkirdsdfqpj65jc5mj60_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdj66o36cth2bs)
Thanks for everything! Your support means the world to me! [](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2z417fc4nn0us5t7kd35dflrmn60k6f7epplbpk50_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdj66o36cth2bs) All glory to God, Mayra Flores | | |

Michael from Overhaul PAC here — and it’s time to say what nobody in D.C. has the guts to say: It’s time for Tom Homan to step in and ARREST Gavin Newsom. Because THIS is not a protest — 👉 It’s an invasion. 👉 It’s mob rule. 👉 It’s open warfare on American soil. And Newsom is letting it happen. In Los Angeles: 🔥 Illegals torched cars. 🔥 Mobs attacked ICE agents. 🔥 Police officers were assaulted. 🔥 National Guard troops were ambushed. All because ICE dared to enforce the law. Newsom isn’t just allowing it — he’s protecting it. This is DERELICTION OF DUTY. 👉 He’s spitting in the face of federal law. 👉 He’s shielding foreign criminals. 👉 And he’s actively obstructing ICE, law enforcement, and national security. If you or I did this, we’d be arrested immediately. Patriot — enough is enough. It’s time to demand federal action. name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Flood Congress with Calls Now!
body:
The left is calling every day. Will you match their intensity for America First?
| | | |
---
|
---
| Patriot-

---
| **** The actions you take right now to pressure Congress are crucial. Beyond making your voice heard, we must now combat a highly organized, well-funded left-wing opposition that mobilizes its activists to call _every day._ If we don't match their efforts, especially on so-called "squishy" members, they'll have every excuse to reject the legislation and policies we support.
**Emails to Congress are useful, but phone calls are even more effective.** [**Our new action page**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794abd857bb/1edb9794abc1d821) makes it quick and easy to place calls using our provided scripts--and it also connects you to your members' online contact forms so you can send messages that way too.
This week, we're asking you to repeat the same requests from last week. You can find the list below or [**go straight to the action page**](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794abd857bb/1edb9794abc1d823 "go straight to the action page") and use the scripts there. **Even if you called before, please call again --elected officials tell us repeated calls move the needle.**If you care about the America First agenda and taking back our country, don't grow weary--fight, fight, fight! __ **__****__****__****__** __ **__** **** ************
---
| | [ TAKE ACTION ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794abd857bb/1edb9794abc1d825)
---
| **** **********What are the messages for the Senate?**
1. **Confirm the nearly** **100 presidential nominees who are still pending. **It's time for the Senate to get to work! Stop taking so many days off and moving slowly on nominations.
2. **Urge your senators to strengthen the One, Big, Beautiful Bill and then pass it right away.** The changes that would strengthen it are:
* **Eliminate all of the Green New Deal/Inflation "Reduction" Act spending; **especially the wind and solar tax credits that are draining taxpayers, sending jobs to China, and threatening our national security.
* **Get rid of the $1,000 new taxpayer-funded entitlement for babies, or revise it so taxpayers aren 't funding them. **They can incentivize private donations, but leave the taxpayers out of it.
* **Leave the State and Local Tax (SALT) cap untouched. **Low-tax red states should not have to subsidize high-tax blue states.
3. **Tell your U.S. Senators to pass the $9.4 billion rescission package the White House is sent to Congress last week.** This bill will start to codify the DOGE cuts and set the stage for even more wasteful spending cuts later in the summer. Making the cuts in this manner means the Democrats cannot filibuster.
**What is the message for the House?** We want the House to also pass the $9.4 rescission package. You must urge your representative to support making DOGE cuts permanent and to stop wastefully spending American tax dollars. We want a real reduction in spending!
Don't let the left flood the phone lines and sway vulnerable Republicans. **Even if your member is a Democrat,[ call anyway](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794abd857bb/1edb9794abc1d827 "call anyway")--pro-America First messages** **to every office build momentum and give GOP lawmakers confidence to back our agenda.**
Thank you for all you do and make sure to pass this call to action on to everyone you know!
In liberty,
Jenny Beth Martin __ **__****__****__****__** __ **__** **** ************
---
| | [ CONTRIBUTE ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794abd857bb/1edb9794abc1d829)
---
|
---
|
---
| | [ ](https://qcgp-cmpzourl.maillist-manage.com/click/1edb9794abd857bb/1edb9794abc1d82b)

| Message from my good friend Senator Tammy Mulchi:
Dear Friends
I want to invite you to meet our next Governor of Virginia, our current Lt. Governor, Winsome Sears. She has been hard at work traveling the Commonwealth and will be visiting Southside on June 20th. This is a great opportunity to get to know her and support her campaign.
I've had the honor of serving with her in the Senate for the past two years. She is a proven conservative and exactly the kind of leader Virginia needs. With Winsome as our Governor, she will stand up for parental rights, cut taxes, and continue delivering common-sense conservative leadership! | The One Big Beautiful Bill Act
---
| |
---
| House Republicans Delivered for the American People. We proudly passed the One Big Beautiful Bill Act to:
✅ Prevent the largest tax increase in American history ✅ Lower costs for families and businesses ✅ Secure the southern border ✅ Unleash American energy dominance ✅ Strengthen Medicaid ✅ Invest in a stronger national defense
House Republicans are united behind this transformative legislation. Now, the Senate must act. It's time to pass this bill and deliver real solutions for our nation.
Republicans have the winning message and policies to lead our country toward a safer, stronger, and more prosperous future.

### Pro-American Energy Policies
* Requires onshore and offshore oil and gas leasing
* Mandates federal coal leasing
* Resumes paused leasing for energy production
* Supports development of domestic critical mineral mining
* Creates a fast-track permitting process with fee-based expedited reviews and legal protections for project sponsors

### Pro-Border Security Investments
Total Commitment: Over $150 Billion to Secure Our Border
* $46.5B to complete the border wall system
* $45B to expand ICE detention capacity
* $21.2B to strengthen Coast Guard's border operations
* $14.4B for air and ground transportation to support 1M+ removals annually
* $8B to hire 10,000 ICE Enforcement Officers, 1,000 HSI agents, and 750 staff
* $5B for Department of Defense support of DHS enforcement efforts
* $5B to modernize and expand CBP facilities
* $4.1B to add 3,000 Border Patrol agents, 5,000 CBP officers, 200 Air & Marine agents, and support personnel
* $3B to increase housing for unaccompanied minors at the border
* $2.7B for enhanced border surveillance technologies
* $2B for annual bonuses and hiring incentives for CBP personnel
* $1.32B to hire 2,700 new ICE OPLA attorneys for faster removals
* $1.25B to hire 200 new immigration judges and expand courtroom capacity
* $500M to reinstate the Remain in Mexico policy

| Loving Virginia's 5th Congressional District! This past Saturday at the Gladys Truck & Tractor Pull, I had the honor of presenting Michele and Carol Schrock each with a Congressional Record in memory of their late husbands, Ed and Paul Schrock.
These two inseparable brothers weren't just passionate about farming and tractor pulling--they were the heart and soul of the Gladys community. As founding members of the Central Virginia Antique Tractor Pullers, they played a major role in making the sport what it is today.
I read the Congressional Record aloud on the track, paying tribute to their legacy of service, innovation, and community spirit. Whether it was building tracks for pulling events, mentoring young drivers, or fine-tuning engines late into the night, Ed and Paul did it all--together. Their impact lives on in every pull, every roar of an engine, and every gathering that brings this community together. They were more than competitors--they were builders of tradition, of friendship, and of Gladys itself. Rest easy, Ed and Paul. Your legacy pulls on. Learn more at Gladys Truck & Tractor Pull We are putting in the miles, meeting folks everywhere, and with our great team solving problems for you. Thank you for the opportunity to serve. Hope to see you around the district soon!.

| The Victoria Truck & Tractor Pull
---
| |
---
| We had an incredible experience while making new friends and meeting some amazing people, "We the People", from several counties in Virginia's 5th Congressional District at the Victoria Truck & Tractor Pull.
The Victoria Truck & Tractor Pull, held twice a year, is more than just a local tradition--it's a community event with heart, with all proceeds going to support Victoria Fire & Rescue.
We had a little rain and even some hail, but it didn't slow us down one bit. The crowd stuck it out, the engines roared, and the spirit of the event never wavered.
I was honored to drive my truck with the American flag flying proudly on the track for the National Anthem. Later, I had the privilege of addressing the crowd from the stage. I spent nearly four hours there, shaking hands and thanking the event organizers, firefighters, law enforcement officers, vendors, and volunteers who made the day such a success.
Throughout the event, I had countless one-on-one conversations with constituents. I collected their information, and my team and I are already working to address the issues they shared with me. It was a fantastic display of community spirit, horsepower, and patriotism. Looking forward to the next pull!
The Tractor Pull categories included:
Truck Outfitters 6200 Outlaw 10,000 Super Pro Farm 5200 V8 Classic Modified 6200 Small Block 8000 Hot Street Diesel Street Gas

| I had the pleasure of meeting many incredible people across Virginia's 5th District.
In Living in Lynchburg, we honored our veterans at Monument Terrace, where Lynchburg Police Department Chief Ryan Zuidema presented a plaque to U.S. Marine Steve Boseman and team for their unwavering support of fellow veterans. Following the ceremony, we toured the impressive new Lynchburg Police Headquarters and had the opportunity to meet with some of the dedicated officers who serve our community.
On Memorial Day, I joined President Donald J. Trump, Vice President JD Vance, Pete Hegseth US Secretary of Defense, The Secretary of the Navy John Phelan, Commandant of the Marine Corps Gen. Eric M. Smith, Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard, Gold Star families, World War II veterans, and many others at Arlington National Cemetery Website to honor and remember those who gave their lives in defense of our nation. That same day, I returned to Goochland County to participate in a local Memorial Day observance with Benedictine College Preparatory Schools President and U.S. Marine Jesse Grapes, and others.
Throughout the week, I also waved good morning to folks heading to work a few times after my early workouts -- always a great way to start the day with neighbors and a reminder of the hardworking spirit in our district.
I joined several interviews, including: Tony Perkins President of the Family Research Council Brian and Marie on WLNI Radio in Lynchburg The John Fredericks Show Radio Jeff Katz on WRVA Radio I also visited and met with folks across the district, including: Goochland Cares, supporting families in need ODEC's natural gas power plant in Louisa Ace Hardware in Louisa Hi-Test Laboratories in Buckingham County RMA Logging in Buckingham County Buckingham County Sheriff Billy Kidd for lunch Women for the American Constitution luncheon in Charlottesville where I was the Keynote Speaker Charlottesville Hyperbarics, a wellness and recovery center Bedford County Supervisors and Administrators to discuss broadband and infrastructure needs Johnson Health Center in Madison Heights The Caterpillar Club Christian Daycare in Amherst The Victoria Truck & Tractor Pull, where I had the honor to drive my truck on the track and speak to the crowd Dover Baptist Church for an American flag-raising ceremony I also spoke with the CEO of a major company considering bringing many new jobs and investment to our region -- exciting opportunities ahead for the 5th District.
It's been a full and inspiring week, and I'm continually reminded of the strength, service, and spirit of the people who make our communities great. We have been helping people with IRS, SSN, VA, passport, and many other challenges around the district. I have a fundraiser in Charlottesville tomorrow and then back to D.C. Tuesday. Your continued prayers are appreciated. Hope to see you soon!
