Charlottesville: Women for the American Constitution | | | | | | | | I was honored to be a featured speaker at the May Women for the American Constitution Speakers' Forum in Charlottesville VA. These amazing people asked a lot of good questions. The radical left is doubling down on their fake news, war on women, and "America last" policies. Thank God president Donald J. Trump is improving safety, the economy, and lowering the cost of energy, food, housing, and more for all Americans. They said it "was one of our best" forums so far! It was a privilege to speak alongside my friend, Virginia Delegate Chris Runion. Together, we shared important updates and insights from both Washington, D.C.--including the "One Big, Beautiful Bill"--and the latest developments in Richmond. It is an honor to represent you in Washington. God bless America! 🇺🇸🇺🇸 | Thank You For Your Service | | You can never have enough Marines Around. Semper Fi brother! | Racist DEI offices quietly shuttered? | | What do you think? Suddenly, racist DEI isn't a "core value," it's a liability. Meetings with the White House? Website scrubs? Racist DEI offices quietly shuttered? Classic academic integrity--right up until the money's on the line. Universities are now tripping over themselves to gut their DEI programs faster than you can say "endowment tax." Apparently, watching Harvard get pummeled with frozen grants, visa bans, and threats to their tax status really inspires "soul-searching." Universities across the nation are suddenly discovering their deep commitment this racist and leftist ideology, diversity, equity, and inclusion (DEI) is, well, not so deep after all. Facing the Trump administration's aggressive push to eliminate DEI initiatives, many institutions are scrambling to align with the new federal directives. Some, like the University of Virginia, have swiftly shut down their DEI offices, citing the need to comply with federal regulations. Others, such as the University of Pennsylvania, have removed DEI content from their websites, opting for vague statements about "initiating reviews" to ensure compliance. The "Golden Age" = a return to common sense and meritocracy! | The Victoria Truck & Tractor Pull | | | We had an incredible experience while making new friends and meeting some amazing people, "We the People", from several counties in Virginia's 5th Congressional District at the Victoria Truck & Tractor Pull. The Victoria Truck & Tractor Pull, held twice a year, is more than just a local tradition--it's a community event with heart, with all proceeds going to support Victoria Fire & Rescue. We had a little rain and even some hail, but it didn't slow us down one bit. The crowd stuck it out, the engines roared, and the spirit of the event never wavered. I was honored to drive my truck with the American flag flying proudly on the track for the National Anthem. Later, I had the privilege of addressing the crowd from the stage. I spent nearly four hours there, shaking hands and thanking the event organizers, firefighters, law enforcement officers, vendors, and volunteers who made the day such a success. Throughout the event, I had countless one-on-one conversations with constituents. I collected their information, and my team and I are already working to address the issues they shared with me. It was a fantastic display of community spirit, horsepower, and patriotism. Looking forward to the next pull! The Tractor Pull categories included: Truck Outfitters 6200 Outlaw 10,000 Super Pro Farm 5200 V8 Classic Modified 6200 Small Block 8000 Hot Street Diesel Street Gas | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | I had the pleasure of meeting many incredible people across Virginia's 5th District. In Living in Lynchburg, we honored our veterans at Monument Terrace, where Lynchburg Police Department Chief Ryan Zuidema presented a plaque to U.S. Marine Steve Boseman and team for their unwavering support of fellow veterans. Following the ceremony, we toured the impressive new Lynchburg Police Headquarters and had the opportunity to meet with some of the dedicated officers who serve our community. On Memorial Day, I joined President Donald J. Trump, Vice President JD Vance, Pete Hegseth US Secretary of Defense, The Secretary of the Navy John Phelan, Commandant of the Marine Corps Gen. Eric M. Smith, Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard, Gold Star families, World War II veterans, and many others at Arlington National Cemetery Website to honor and remember those who gave their lives in defense of our nation. That same day, I returned to Goochland County to participate in a local Memorial Day observance with Benedictine College Preparatory Schools President and U.S. Marine Jesse Grapes, and others. Throughout the week, I also waved good morning to folks heading to work a few times after my early workouts -- always a great way to start the day with neighbors and a reminder of the hardworking spirit in our district. I joined several interviews, including: Tony Perkins President of the Family Research Council Brian and Marie on WLNI Radio in Lynchburg The John Fredericks Show Radio Jeff Katz on WRVA Radio I also visited and met with folks across the district, including: Goochland Cares, supporting families in need ODEC's natural gas power plant in Louisa Ace Hardware in Louisa Hi-Test Laboratories in Buckingham County RMA Logging in Buckingham County Buckingham County Sheriff Billy Kidd for lunch Women for the American Constitution luncheon in Charlottesville where I was the Keynote Speaker Charlottesville Hyperbarics, a wellness and recovery center Bedford County Supervisors and Administrators to discuss broadband and infrastructure needs Johnson Health Center in Madison Heights The Caterpillar Club Christian Daycare in Amherst The Victoria Truck & Tractor Pull, where I had the honor to drive my truck on the track and speak to the crowd Dover Baptist Church for an American flag-raising ceremony I also spoke with the CEO of a major company considering bringing many new jobs and investment to our region -- exciting opportunities ahead for the 5th District. It's been a full and inspiring week, and I'm continually reminded of the strength, service, and spirit of the people who make our communities great. We have been helping people with IRS, SSN, VA, passport, and many other challenges around the district. I have a fundraiser in Charlottesville tomorrow and then back to D.C. Tuesday. Your continued prayers are appreciated. Hope to see you soon! | L3 Harris Radios Manufactured in VA 05 | | L3 Harris radios are used by our military and many law enforcement units around the country. These radios are manufactured right here in Virginia's 5th Congressional District. National Cattleman's Beef Association's Young Cattleman's Conference | Last week, a group of young cattlemen and women traded their saddles for scooters as they navigated the streets of Washington, D.C. They were in town for the National Cattleman's Beef Association's Young Cattleman's Conference--bringing a touch of the ranch to the nation's capital, in modern style. My district, VA-05, is deeply rooted in agriculture, and with the average age of a U.S. farmer nearing 60, it's both encouraging and inspiring to see the next generation stepping up to lead the future of American farming. | Trump Forced to Deploy 2,000 National Guardsmen | | | Los Angeles Police Chief Jim McDonnell, appointed by a far-left city council, has openly refused to cooperate with Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE), undermining federal law and endangering our communities. The consequences are tragic and undeniable. Illegal criminal aliens are robbing, raping, and killing innocent Americans--yet the left refuses to even acknowledge victims like Laken Riley. Her name is never mentioned in their agenda. Thank God we have a president who stands up and puts Americans first. Now, chaos has consumed the city. Rioters storm the streets, torching cars and wreaking havoc with little to no response from local law enforcement. ICE agents were surrounded by aggressive protesters, abandoned without backup. In photo after photo, flames light up the night sky as vehicles burn and protesters wave Mexican flags--an unmistakable rejection of American sovereignty and the rule of law. | | | Knocking Doors in VA 05 | | | | | | | | | We are making significant strides in our support for Winsome Earle-Sears for Governor. This November, let us choose common sense over democrat political extremism and unite for a stronger, more prosperous future. I urge you to pray, volunteer, and cast your vote for Republican candidates--from Governor to the House of Delegates. Together, we can build on the successes of Governor of Virginia Glenn Youngkin and chart a path toward continued growth and opportunity for all Virginians. Please encourage your friends to pray for our candidates, from Governor to House of Delegates, write letters, knock on doors, and volunteer. And for a better future, don't forget to vote this November for Winsome Earle-Sears for Governor and the Republican ticket! **Good Morning!** On this day in 1949, country music legend Hank Williams Sr. played the Grand Ole Opry radio broadcast for the first time, one of the most famous debuts in the show's history. Williams was called out for six encores. [Here's a recording](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DFrwzAUBOBfI28xepIsx4OGQgh0cIdS2lHI1nOsVraC9GKT_vqSjl27fgd3cB-97V2IYb28uAUNTcmuuJeIRJjt4koJG_qcViyUwxeOM7orFiu4aA5cHwCsdyHeraq8mRAFygoNtKrTUoNqqtnAqMRRDhqU6lqFLdcD584BNNOx9a6pgnm0cQ0AnAshahDIVdtBBwOCaoEpjj5QyvVnCivNOMV72jDXY1qqaGaia2HyiYkzE-d93-t7utFtwEf-EEfjzOR5Y_Kkn7_fb81bsn3PhI6hEJOn1z9cyGWy2fmQmDxBlY2_7iHGUHTLFL8sLsTfbfrXYZsRPwEAAP__m-F9FA). Today, we're reporting on "[office chair butt](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LHOnDAQBOCnMd2e7D3O_BQu0tD9aVMiH17jzfkwsjeHePuIvEKaaUb6NJpf3_O358zb-tO_yUks80ZHyyRCdX771vhDoZaNmlR-0ZLI79Rm1PgAbcGYOXjO59x3wUUipHtHzgz9aO_W9I8uueVxD6P2XwMOIZqIiBEthcFYE-34_OrYXZq2xhitEfFmkHQ_jGY0TzL9YFSvKbCUevtdeJNEMZ_lQ_W2lHeXXRLZm7r_UDgpnLZzL02uSuF0wQonba8YFU6ZIzU5MymcSoy8ECzJc4XnHxHgBit_eFvhKPVFtYGHUEvZTwhUK1MlSFSpQSoHSIEmZQdJBM2vCqeuurAfnDM3O6her2_P-d9K-a9rPw7_BgAA__8fCY1f)"--a not-so-flattering term for gluteal muscle loss that comes from too much sitting. Even short bursts of movement can make a big difference. So we're curious:**How do you keep yourself moving these days?** Reply and let us know your favorite way to stay active. We're sponsored today by [Organixx](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkcGO2yAQhp8G34hgcHBy8KFS5FtWK2WlHtEYhpgWgwUku_v2Vbabe6Ve__-bT5qZn2dzxhBDur7gSmPz2SR6r5Fao2JWrDXcyZWcqLYSfpNdCDeqBgTsudBcSuMwxE_Td270RECqo1EO_VErLft9t4zOSr136NXsZlBzf7Bez6RAgzj0zrsujA-b0FJKIQBgJ4FEPxzlUc4k-0GyXpALLZfdrxxSW8jHz3ynsrN57eK4tLZVpn4wmBhMuVwxhY-PR8lgspEw8ZpvxZLjNseIV0qV34GpCc0cHFMnb_0Mg7AMNBr8imormBwDfWur-TvO1Am9DzFgo-9iJRduK1Mnu9nvyObUKLUHzODw1BwZaIcNganTc1v-Np0vry8X_nY5v3JbLS9h49l7bjdkoO2C6V_xroxuew8xhqoH1ovriiF-3af911PvI_wJAAD__-XSsxU), your source for collagen supplements to keep you looking younger.

## Russia Unleashes Massive Drone Strike on Ukraine
Russia launched one of its [largest air assaults yet, firing 315 drones and seven missiles](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0MFugzAQBNCvMTeQdzEmOfhQqULqIb32iAxeYBtjR7ZFxN9XyS_0PNJo3vzcxptlz2H9tjuZssQx0DN7KoXSuNuc-SCXYqBcEt9p3sg-KI8osaulrgFGZ9mfo6qcWYiQ2ooM9OqqWw2qqzZDeHFKWSu1AoClnS-dxKmVCNhPspsrNq82qQFASkRsAEmq_gpXmAhUD0JJclxian4jh7LR4s94UGrmuFfebKU8smg_BA4CBzvNL0GzxlcscPgKhVKwhWOwXuBwP_moU5zv5OpEnkLxlHP9RtY758ye6smmZFcSOOQS0ynagZ1oPwFR91pKWSXjHk_2nrPuhZLrbtm_95R_nXgY_AsAAP__tyGFhA) over a five-hour barrage across Ukraine, killing at least eight and injuring dozens more. Ukraine’s air force said it downed the majority of drones, but strikes still hit civilian infrastructure in Kyiv, Odesa, Dnipro, and Chernihiv. In Odesa, a maternity hospital and emergency center were among the targets. [See a video here](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO8yAQBOCnwV0ido1NXFD8jbv87ZUIwxJvDpsIkKO8_cn3CteNpvikma-7vTtOvD_-u41Mi9nu9K6JWqNiN1crHxRK3qm2wt_kV3IvqhYlDhc5XgBscJw-VnXBRCKkviMDWk1jP4IautVAiCEuPoZbHBzeJPZEOqoleAnT5FzH5tTkCABSIuIVkKTSE0ywECgNQkkK3HK5PjPvbaWYPvmgcvV565JZW3tV0f8TOAucl8WfvcD5HCJwdqWxT3RGfzyGz3N_65ByV0x4vTklrqMWSj42x-lXbH-64TD4EwAA__9mcXG0). President Zelensky condemned the attack and called for “action from America” and stronger pressure from Europe and global allies. The strikes followed a recent round of [prisoner exchanges between Russia and Ukraine](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLEOmzAURb_GbEa2MTgMHrqwpWtHZPBLeI3B6D0TK39fpUN_oOu90tU959d9vgdMeDx_hh18eeT5gMoJSgGa98CMb4iUD-BC-IJ1g3ACz0aZXqpBaj3HgOkz2yb6B4CBrgGvnR2HbtC2bzYPbrGLc8utD7cuxghDHJfV9n03au3UrUH_XVOD1lopY0yrDSjrRj3qBbR1WlgFEUum9nfGo2zwSJ_8BmrXvDfJb6WcLLofwkzCTLXWluAqQPztv0mmFIWZ4KJ8gjATXcwY5PWigAdIruGUeyaQJyHnA4hlDST3zGuuksOH5T9eJczUkI9nxZSQByeseu4B098z5b8Mvr35EwAA__8jU4V2) after talks in Turkey.
## States Sue to Stop 23andMe Genetic Data Sale
Twenty-seven states and D.C. are suing to block bankrupt DNA testing firm 23andMe from [selling genetic data without customer consent](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykks2upCAQhZ8Gd3SqCtTbCxeTdNzd2c7SIJTKNC1G6Pb2PP2Eub7BrA7nfOHwk_r1OXwaH_w6_zQP7vIUh5WPFDhn3oeHScm_2O1x5ZR3f2e7sNk4DQRUS2gk4uCMD-9BV66bmIlVxR22-tqoBnVdLZ1WjbO6Vh-2BgbLbTPhZB2PNGls9Vj5rrRBg4gARHRBYtDtFa84MuoWhQZ2Psf98jv6NS88hXd88X6x8VGFbsl5S0L9ENQL6o_juIS4PF2hgvqU4_4W1JdnFXnLc1UOFdRDI6hHKIEyq3uwDOZIT5_l-pbpyUnmKMcQ7V3OvHL2VjqTjUwmcEGLnxdOWY7eOd7lsZhc4vsaD0H9h0ZV120N0JbrqX5es7TTLtQNBTWzNdKaLNRtO93TF5b3J58Bb9kLdfuDSC21GwBhDfZbGKBWAK9vNgIo_PpyRZr63D6VcoLraV0S6pbitvhq79x2-BB8alqhYX4YH_79aP6vMXh19DcAAP__6vO9VA). The lawsuit argues that [biological samples and health traits are too personal](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOtCAUhZ9GOyZcQNCC4m-mm7_d0lzhOrKDaIBx4ttv3FfY8uQkJ-f7vh7jA0MM6fkfV7J13sZEnxKpVsrjiqWEg3zeEpWaw4vcQrhTGQUXHeOaAYweQzxH1Xo7EwmSLVkwatBSg-raxfpe-cmD7Pg8dD03CnqQgox02pOGqQ32WuMaADgXQtxAEFdmgAEmAmWgUZx8qFu-fW8h1YXmeG4H5Zvb1jbapda9NPJfI-6NuON-AVzVFXINLlIj7kJi8iuxCdMrv_fqTuYTMo8V2Z7Dge5kET_lHSrrlXKu89JIwbtJSnIKaQY9GYlqcLrN1u-fEGMo2jSKP1cM8fdM_ZPBw4qfAAAA__-zhYNq) to be treated as assets in a bankruptcy sale. The lawsuit follows Regeneron's $256 million acquisition attempt and a surprise $305 million counterbid from 23andMe co-founder Anne Wojcicki. 23andMe insists the sale complies with its privacy policies and applicable law, but states argue those protections aren’t enough for 15 million customers. A court decision is pending as the bankruptcy sale process continues.

On this day in 1949, country music legend Hank Williams Sr. played the Grand Ole Opry radio broadcast for the first time, one of the most famous debuts in the show's history. Williams was called out for six encores. . Today, we're reporting on ""--a not-so-flattering term for gluteal muscle loss that comes from too much sitting. Even short bursts of movement can make a big difference. So we're curious:How do you keep yourself moving these days? Reply and let us know your favorite way to stay active. We're sponsored today by , your source for collagen supplements to keep you looking younger. | Russia Unleashes Massive Drone Strike on Ukraine Russia launched one of its over a five-hour barrage across Ukraine, killing at least eight and injuring dozens more. Ukraine’s air force said it downed the majority of drones, but strikes still hit civilian infrastructure in Kyiv, Odesa, Dnipro, and Chernihiv. In Odesa, a maternity hospital and emergency center were among the targets. . President Zelensky condemned the attack and called for “action from America” and stronger pressure from Europe and global allies. The strikes followed a recent round of after talks in Turkey. States Sue to Stop 23andMe Genetic Data Sale Twenty-seven states and D.C. are suing to block bankrupt DNA testing firm 23andMe from . The lawsuit argues that to be treated as assets in a bankruptcy sale. The lawsuit follows Regeneron's $256 million acquisition attempt and a surprise $305 million counterbid from 23andMe co-founder Anne Wojcicki. 23andMe insists the sale complies with its privacy policies and applicable law, but states argue those protections aren’t enough for 15 million customers. A court decision is pending as the bankruptcy sale process continues. America's 10 Cheapest New Cars in 2025 The list of shows the 2024 Mitsubishi Mirage as the least expensive at $18,015. Only three vehicles start below $20,000—two Mitsubishi Mirage models and the Nissan Versa at $18,330—compared to the $48,000 average price for new cars in the U.S. Nine of the 10 cheapest models come from Japanese or South Korean manufacturers, with one from Germany. No American automakers made the list. Only three new car models are available for under $20,000 in 2025. . **Good Morning!** On this day in 1926, Luling oilman Edgar Byram Davis [threw a free barbecue](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0DEOnDAQQNHTmA40tlkDhYs0dJs2JRrwAKMYe2WPlt3bR8kVcoH_pffruTyRI6fjJ17k5bPnJdFdI4lQWXijV8lCVaoU5BSoIMeL0mLAPFpwrdZLQI7fpW-CXyFMuiGvh35yPZjJNaen0Y4DajC238K4IQA-3GjdY3WDBbAN-78xcFprDdrabg1m3B2Mesdhn9CpHiiw5NLJSUIfrHv85jeVbstXE_0p8qrK_lBmVma-77uTemJOkRN1uRzKzCemsOb8W5mZkhSmqswc8M21pXBgaddvwaspPrxujpGrG1QPx4Uc_03k_2je3vwJAAD__1sqeSk) for friends, associates, and employees to celebrate the sale of his leases to Magnolia Petroleum in what may have been the biggest oil deal in Texas up to that time. ## Anti-ICE Protesters Arrested in Austin, Dallas
More than a dozen anti-ICE protesters were [arrested in downtown Austin](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGO3DAMRU8jdxpIHI_GLlSkcbdpUxq0RNtEZGkgcdc7tw8c5AbpHx7536-P-QM5cd5-4kFevtcyZzpbIhGqMwd61SLUpElFzpEqcjooz2DgoY3T1s4ROb3nvot-MXG0HXn77EfXGxhdt_sFKWCMw7o-B7PckQBHHCA-FggxxkfH_pIZZ621xt7vtyXCsDoz2BWf64hO9YYiS6k32UnoG9ua3uWL6i2Uo0t-F3k1df-hYFIwned5C4nDb9jLZ5OSL0rBdM1SMF23FEzGKZisUTCFWs7Y9IayU9WcNX424awjpoRNS9H_EmgOpDEIl9wuLpWmMW-U6PJ21cfXySlxc0_Vm-1ATn8flP_L-uXhTwAAAP__bQ-OwA) Monday night, and at least one person was detained during a demonstration in Dallas. A large crowd gathered at the Capitol around 7 p.m. and [marched to the J.J. Pickle Federal Building](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOqzAQRb_GdEYewzOhcPEaumy7JRpgnIzWYGTPhuTvV0T7B9vO6N6jcz-v4xU58nb7wJW8PEMaNzpKJBHKI8-05yRUpEhG3hbKyHGlbbTG_tPGaYBxQY6vsa0WP5mlh4o8dG3vWmN7V929a2zvHJium7vJdtiGAA1g00zOAqGr2J9lxgEAGGiaelrsJThzgYBd6NGp1tDCknItdxJ6YgnxlR6U6zmtVfR3kb2o5r-yg7LDcRz11xO386nscNooO8Q0Y1R2wO8ivJ0HfpCeYrppnkn_WmoU_QboGXeWdCaq7Jf94Bi5uE615rYixzdZ_rbXw9ufAAAA__9QnoAi), which ICE uses as a holding facility for detainees. The building was vandalized with pink paintballs and messages like "ICE Needs 2 Surrender & Release the Hostages." ## Man Allegedly Spikes Girlfriend's Drink with Abortion Pill
Justin Banta, 38, a North Texas man who works in IT for the Department of Justice, is accused of causing his pregnant girlfriend to miscarry her baby after allegedly [spiking her drink with an abortion pill](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGypCAQRb9GM6YAGdSAYBOzt-mGViuN9j4Eq2HGmb_fmv2FF9-qW-ecP1_zF1CktP2GA119hTwnvErEWpFnWvHkXLHUUhkoeWSgeGCatdR3Ia1QavZA8T2b1rtF-lG16FRvRmukHm27u_u4mGEYzV1i1_d3u_YLDGrRizGdtLZvyX3OpFVKKam67rZ4PQQrBxWgDyPYxkj0VDPf6o4VX1BCfOcn8m3NRxvdXutZmu5Xo6dGT9d13UJ-fSw-e6OnR2n05PNfcWX-RhYBVixihZMqRHE82COLdQfeUECMuKGPb1EinSelTcCSuVJOwvNjExtxDEyYfBGeKX237Px5UYxUbN8YuR1A8T9Z_VnPp9P_AgAA__8UMY3X). The woman reportedly told Banta about her pregnancy in September, insisting she wanted to deliver the baby after Banta suggested abortion. An [Oct. 17 prenatal appointment](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHS2yAQhJ8GdXgAKZJVUKRR96dNqTngZF-CQHOcrd9vn7FfIe3u7M7u9_tr_QLKVG6_YEcv31tdC54towjyShEProJNmjBQSchAeceyOuN-aDNqa9cElF_r0CUfTJpth95OwzwOxs1jd_fXqY_DZOEawzz1KTo0cXOTCdGOaKPryL_LzGittcb2_SUkd91Gc7UbTNsMoxoMJpLKF7mj4De0Lb_qE_kS695lfxc5mup_Krcot5zneYmhvV-8feWWT0S55S0pt_x5NKGioci9lpcOUAQ0MGMTTDrCQQJZ7w9OyPpRQuWiA4SXFmCGIvoA_ousY30UIWyayhOb0A2EalFu6din46ScqY2TGsxtB8qfrfJ_hJ_e_QsAAP__nAiVgA) indicated the baby “had a strong heartbeat, displayed good vital signs, and was said to be healthy by her doctor.” She met Banta at a coffee shop later that day. Surveillance footage reportedly shows her drinking the entire beverage Banta ordered for her. She experienced “extreme fatigue and heavy bleeding” the next day and lost her baby on Oct. 19. Banta allegedly admitted to ordering an abortion pill for the woman during an interview with police, and he's accused of [remotely resetting his phone](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkTGOpDAQRU9jMrdsAwYCgk3IZtMNUdku05aM3SqKZvr2K-YKE7-vJz39f1_rF6ScyvYXdpz5O9a14HVkZEZak8cXVcaDDyZIJSBByjuW1SjTS2Wl1muAlD9r14TZqTDpBmc9dJPtlJls85yn3rWd6wYfAKMbYfQqur4zwfeDNlE3ab5lymqttdJt-3DBjNGqUUcY4gRWdApD4koPfiLjNxwxf-ob6eHr3uT5yfw6RPtHmEWY5bquxxUBbijMAsTJZxRmubuEWXL1kIVZGIigsPT1LPy5eSV-yh-_3KFIIMKDMcj9pIAkwfvzwCAP9IScP3JL71Q2-SLcym3aEuVICUuQ4CpxqkWmEk5_rwKdmzCLGQc5jNjGaIMcjfWy0zHKyfROur4f3RjtFFTb0BxeV8o5HXYQndp2SPmnl3_30ns2_wMAAP__40qp_w) after he handed it over. He was booked into the Parker County Jail on Friday and released after posting bonds of $520,000.
## STAAR End-of-Course Test Results Released
The Texas Education Agency [released the spring 2025 results](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDHO4yAQRk-DOyzAGJuCYht32XZLawJjBy3GFkzi5PYrp9gL_O2M9PS99-c23yCmmNffsKGj97LPGc-akAjLHD0eZSesVKlAzAELxLRhnpVQPReGSzkHiOkz6ya4uwhWNujkoK3RQlnTPJxeRNBGgxw63w92xNH0nb33MIzWe9E30V0wYaSUUsiua-9BjYsRo1xgWCwYpgWGSHtp6YGEb6hL-uwvLK3ftya5B9FRWfeLqYmp6TzP9u8b8vVkarpsmJowPD1Q3DNT0xfB_184rJj9hxdMCBUrr0eJeeVfxUoAhV8FeMH6THTBmuLCccaUYjUD02LdIKbvGPpZwpdT_wIAAP__k7qHlA) from the five mandated high school end-of-course assessments yesterday. The scores showed modest year-over-year gains in Algebra I and Biology and slight declines in English I, English II, and U.S. History. The percentage of students who met grade-level standards in Algebra I increased from 45% to 47%, still far below the 62% who did so [prior to the COVID-19 pandemic](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGO5CAURE-DM1qAMdgBQSfeaDbd0KLNxyBhY_F_j2duv_JcYbIqlVSqev8-lg-fSz62v34HR1-xLgdcWIAI2pJXOFslQEJqPh8Bms9lh2NRQg1cGC7lEnwu34vugnuJMMkOnLR6MlqoyXTJRROEVau11r7WNfZe21GLYRDajEMMU5fdXSaMlFIK2fePV1BjNGKU0ds4ecO0gJCptgclIPjyGMt3_YT2WOveFZeITmT9k6mZqfm6rseOx50xNcPB38jUfJ9iav7RSN43jmttgNw34PVNPMHtUr14yhh4ylviuKZaC0d6BzgI-Qkt1rZDYGr2jT-f8k_DLXfNhfPKpWQ0lmmx7T6Xn230O6KfTv0PAAD__5ddjNA). In Biology, 62% of students met grade-level standards, up from 57% last year and on par with the 63% who did so in 2019. The percentage of students who met grade-level standards in English I and English II [dropped 3% and 4%](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLGOpDAMhp8GuqAkMAkUKa6h22uvRIY4TKSQoNjM7r79aeZ08wJb2r_16fP_52P5gJhi3n_DgY6_QlkyflJCZqxL3PCshZGYuELMHivEdGBetNQ3IY1QavEQ0_cytN6t0k-qRafsMJlB6sm0d6f6AZTy1nrVw9braQzW6ttoVh82e4M2uidMGqWUkqrvu9XrMRg5qgA2TGCaQaKPXGrHd2T8Agrpuzywdls52uTuzCc1_a9Gz42eGaF7HXV7eTR6hrVcLBih0fPzNQHZi-NKHA_08b2tmBAI6f_8dPpHe0eCzhrz_ooEMUCtArMXJYitXJVQABESHZhZVKQrMbXV-fMzphTJ2GaQ-wExvbz5Z20_nP4bAAD__3rQluY), respectively, but both sets of scores—51% and 56%—were higher than those in 2019. The woman reportedly told Banta about her pregnancy in September, insisting she wanted to deliver the baby after Banta suggested abortion. An indicated the baby “had a strong heartbeat, displayed good vital signs, and was said to be healthy by her doctor.” She met Banta at a coffee shop later that day. Surveillance footage reportedly shows her drinking the entire beverage Banta ordered for her. She experienced “extreme fatigue and heavy bleeding” the next day and lost her baby on Oct. 19. Banta allegedly admitted to ordering an abortion pill for the woman during an interview with police, and he's accused of after he handed it over. He was booked into the Parker County Jail on Friday and released after posting bonds of $520,000. STAAR End-of-Course Test Results Released The Texas Education Agency from the five mandated high school end-of-course assessments yesterday. The scores showed modest year-over-year gains in Algebra I and Biology and slight declines in English I, English II, and U.S. History. The percentage of students who met grade-level standards in Algebra I increased from 45% to 47%, still far below the 62% who did so . In Biology, 62% of students met grade-level standards, up from 57% last year and on par with the 63% who did so in 2019. The percentage of students who met grade-level standards in English I and English II , respectively, but both sets of scores—51% and 56%—were higher than those in 2019. In U.S. History, 68% of students met grade level standards, down from 69% last year and 75% in 2019. subject: Augusta and Rockland Send Conflicting Signals When It Comes to Cooperating with ICE
body:

** Augusta and Rockland Send Conflicting Signals When It Comes to Cooperating with ICE (https://mainepolicy.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a975bf67c40a8d8be91ad606d&id=2bde3add06&e=f093fa355c)
------------------------------------------------------------
By Seamus Othot on Jun 11, 2025 06:59 am
While a key committee in Augusta moved legislation to the floor that would make it more difficult for police in Maine to cooperate with federal authorities enforcing immigration law, councilors in the Knox County seat of Rockland shot down a similar measure this week in a signal that state and local officials may not be [...]

name: Mayra Flores
subject: Pictures like this make my blood boil.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mayra for Congress
body:
#
[https://secure.winred.com/mayra-flores-for-congress/la-riots/?recurring=true&amount=29&utm_campaign=20250611_WA90.117703_t1652490-2299&ex_tid=20250611_WA90.117703_t1652490-2299&utm_term=lrm-active]

I picked cotton. They picked violence and destruction.

I’m Mayra Flores, a proud Mexican-born LEGAL immigrant.

My family came to the United States the right way— waiting our turn,
with deep respect for the greatest nation on earth.

I worked in the cotton fields in South Texas, where I learned the
value of hard work, perseverance, and community.

Today, I’m running for Congress to defend those values. The chaos of
the ongoing Los Angeles riots is an insult to legal immigrants who
came to this country the right way!

These riots aren’t protests— they are senseless acts of
destruction, shattering businesses, families, and hope.

I will always be against this lawlessness, advocating for peace,
order, and opportunity. We need strong leadership to rebuild, not tear
down.

Your support for our campaign, in any amount, will fuel my mission to
restore sanity to our streets, protect our communities, and secure a
future where hard work, not chaos, defines us.
[https://secure.winred.com/mayra-flores-for-congress/la-riots/?recurring=true&amount=29&utm_campaign=20250611_WA90.117703_t1652490-2299&ex_tid=20250611_WA90.117703_t1652490-2299&utm_term=lrm-active]

Will you help me amplify this message so we can stop this violence.

STOP THE CHAOS!

Together, we can restore safety and prosperity.
#
[https://secure.winred.com/mayra-flores-for-congress/la-riots/?recurring=true&amount=29&utm_campaign=20250611_WA90.117703_t1652490-2299&ex_tid=20250611_WA90.117703_t1652490-2299&utm_term=lrm-active]

God bless you,
Mayra Flores

PO Box 516
Los Indios, Texas 78567-0516

[https://www.mayrafloresforcongress.com/privacy-policyAddress:?recurring=true&amount=29&utm_campaign=20250611_WA90.117703_t1652490-2299&ex_tid=20250611_WA90.117703_t1652490-2299]

name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: The Mountain Minute: 6/11/2025
body:
Released and reloaded: Montrose bond records show cracks feeding Colorado’s criminal underworld
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
---
**PRESENTED BY[ROCKYMOUNTAINVOICE.COM](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
| | Hi folks,
Last night saw unrest in Denver, and we're working on bringing you the full story today. Keep an eye on our social channels and website for live updates and in-depth reporting.
Listen to today's Mountain Minute podcast [here](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), or watch on [YouTube](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) or [Rumble](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)! Here is a summary of today's top stories:
🏔️ **Here in Colorado...** Montrose bond records show repeat offenders [slipping through the system](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), while Coloradans push back on the [state’s delivery fee](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) with a new petition. [Mike Lindell](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) defended himself in a Denver defamation trial, and [Aurora saw fresh protests](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) over immigration enforcement. Despite ranking [5th in the nation for work hours,](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) many residents still can’t keep up with the cost of living.
🇺🇸 **On the National Stage...** New data shows nearly all job growth under Trump [came from the private sector](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.), unlike Biden’s mix with 25% government jobs. As debate over Trump’s economic bill heats up, OMB Director Vought warns failure could lead to [recession and steep tax hikes](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.). Meanwhile, RFK Jr. [reconstituted an advisory committee](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) to avoid conflicts of interest, calling it a step toward accountability.
🗣️ **Commentary Spotlight...** C. J. Garbo criticizes California’s sanctuary policies, blaming them for [enabling lawlessness](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.) and fueling the recent ICE riots in L.A. He argues that officials have betrayed public safety, applying a double standard compared to January 6, and warns that putting ideology over law invites further chaos.
This is the Mountain Minute for Wednesday, June 11, 2025.
– Team RMV
---
|
---
**TODAY'S TOP STORIES**
**[False claims, real consequences: Judge rejects activist’s First Amendment defense](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
When a Montrose County woman was released on a $0 personal recognizance bond after skipping court in late 2023, it wasn’t her first time facing charges. It wouldn’t be her last either. Within nine months, she was arrested again – this time for second degree assault, harassment and criminal attempt. Her story is not an outlier. It is a warning.
“There’s a revolving door with criminals or serious crime,” said Montrose County Sheriff Gene Lillard in a recent interview with RMV. “Last month we picked up one person five times – they were released on PR bond. There’s no consequences.”
To illustrate how Colorado laws are contributing to rising crime and lawlessness, Sheriff Lillard prepared and shared a document showing just one small snapshot in time.
**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
**DON'T MISS OUT ON THE MOUNTAIN MAJESTY GALA —LIMITED TICKETS AVAILABLE 🎟️ **
[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
[GET YOUR TICKET HERE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Garbo: Sanctuary policies led to chaos—and now they’re blaming ICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**[ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Riots in Los Angeles following ICE enforcement are a direct result of sanctuary city policies that have undermined federal immigration law, argues author C. J. Garbo.
* He says California leaders, by refusing to cooperate with ICE and prioritizing illegal immigrants over lawful citizens, have enabled lawlessness while shifting blame onto federal agents.
* Garbo highlights the double standard between the January 6 Capitol riot and the ongoing unrest in LA, warning that selective enforcement of laws is eroding national sovereignty and trust.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
|
---
**[Petition launched to stop Colorado’s nickel-and-dime delivery surcharge](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** [COMPLETE COLORADO](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)
* Colorado’s 29-cent retail delivery fee—criticized as a burden on low-income families—could be repealed under a new ballot initiative.
* Despite generating nearly $90 million in 2023, mostly for transportation, the fee has been slammed for disproportionately affecting households earning under $25,000.
* The initiative is targeting the 2026 ballot, after previous repeal attempts by Republicans were blocked by Democrats in the legislature.

**[READ MORE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
|
---
** ONLY ON ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE ⤵️ **
**[False claims, real consequences: Judge rejects activist’s First Amendment defense](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY JEN SCHUMANN****| LOCAL | JUNE 10** _For more than a year, Derrick Wilburn – father, community leader and now an elected school board member – was publicly branded a “child predator” by a vocal district parent. The accusations, repeated at school board meetings, online and even in state legislative testimony, painted him as a man who preyed on children._
__
**[Hunter: More than a price tag—what that doggie in the window really cost](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)****BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | JUNE 9** _How much is that doggie in the window? Remember this cheerful tune? It’s a jingle from another era, when the dream of a family pet felt as simple as a walk past a shop window. But today, that question echoes with heavier meaning._
__
**[Devotional: The breastplate of righteousness isn’t a costume—it’s combat gear](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice.)** **BY DRAKE HUNTER | COMMENTARY | JUNE 8** _Reflecting on the lives of remarkable figures—Abraham Lincoln, Nelson Mandela, Mother Teresa, Billy Graham, etc.—we discover a golden thread that weaves through each of their stories: character._

**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** We'd love to talk with you about becoming an RMV Contributor. Reply to this email (or reach out to [tori@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:tori@rockymountainvoice.com?subject=Contributor%20Interest%20\(via%20Mountain%20Minute\))) or send us a message on social media to chat!
|
---
|
---
**🦇 DID YOU KNOW?** The **bumblebee bat** is the smallest flying mammal in the world. Also known as Kitti’s hog-nosed bat, it weighs less than a dime and measures just over an inch long. Found only in a few limestone caves in southwest Thailand, this tiny creature rivals the Etruscan shrew for the title of world’s smallest mammal.
|

**CARTOON OF THE DAY**
|
---
**QUOTE OF THE DAY** "Moderation in temper is always a virtue; but moderation in principle, is a species of vice." – Thomas Paine

name: America First War Room Sponsor
subject: The "Invisible Scam" Nobody Knows About — Except The Big Food Companies Behind It
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
| [View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMFuwjAMhp8mvVElThqvhxzGqjJtsAmNC8coNRDW0DYtrdjTTzDG1f7s_9NvQ1v73cUwnDOAg696BsDkMwPotlOI52N4X8xWXYGzTn-E7LqFlzs6wgM-Obv_nn-tabnJ-60MmyV161E88OHS0gO-h6YUrK-vUyySyshdxVVCRqDKtQJUOjkYhByRpMwluR1wR1oITc4KkdMTgk68AQ4Z10IIkYHgqXTK6hytRAdcoGWK33JSGyh6Z0U_TDbGpgmpa0JSm8MwtP1NrGRQTrFJT2dX07n_O3NNYFDelRmUI4Nyu_hps71dxYLJ8laaLI7ybXylT7VMoqnayde17zUyxff_b5LRwG8AAAD__-A4biM)
| | One of America’s top doctors is hoping you’ll read this before you set foot in another grocery store.

Renowned cardiothoracic surgeon Dr. Steven Gundry has found an “invisible problem” affecting almost everything we eat. But almost nobody knows it’s happening — except the big food companies responsible for it.

And Dr. Gundry’s research shows it could be the true cause of low energy, digestive issues, and unwanted weight gain in millions of Americans over 35.

But that’s not even the worst part.

“Because this problem has flown under the radar for decades, there are no rules to protect us. Nobody is stopping these companies from doing this to our food,” says Dr. Gundry.

He exposes exactly what’s happening — and what you can do about it — in a **[new whistleblowing video report that reveals his shocking research.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zk2PsjAQwPFPU26SzvRNDj08avCgPolZk12PBap0pQq02vjtNxjjdeaX-Y_xfedOT03UgiC2rgkEkbB_BHE4Jj_ef_1mPdsNKzUb5H8vpi0u3_SBH3ytzfmy-Nrb7aEIR-YPWzvsH_Dh8dnbD35Hc-uN66apWmWNZqeG8sxqULyQHBWXWauhmjNRNHYuKyuEBQknxEaIGkRFqZGZ00hRUAkAIBBozmpuZKEMUzVSUIZw-urkxtvR1QZCTGYcbzef1zefdbqNsQ-vx0qCZUopby-9jXG8XM8TIVhu9viz_CZYsp1cb6GYKCvDvQLCVpIrmo266ZPrOhekIpyeX8Xp_kPjXwAAAP__aWRn1Q)**

**“Once you’ve seen this,” Dr. Gundry says, “you’ll never buy groceries the same way again.”**

In his free video, Dr. Gundry reveals a new method for protecting yourself and your family from this little-known problem affecting food all across America.

It’s a technique he’s been using himself — and at age 74, he says it’s the reason he looks and feels decades younger.

The video has quickly gone viral, with thousands of people saying they’ve been using Dr. Gundry’s simple discovery at breakfast every day.

And as a result, they report having more energy, improved digestion, more comfortable joints, and a slimmer waistline.

Dr. Gundry has granted permission for us to share the full video below, completely free.

“Every American should have this information,” he says. “And if this video opens your eyes to what’s happening out there, I hope you’ll share it with your loved ones.”

[ ](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zk2PsjAQwPFPU26SzvRNDj08avCgPolZk12PBap0pQq02vjtNxjjdeaX-Y_xfedOT03UgiC2rgkEkbB_BHE4Jj_ef_1mPdsNKzUb5H8vpi0u3_SBH3ytzfmy-Nrb7aEIR-YPWzvsH_Dh8dnbD35Hc-uN66apWmWNZqeG8sxqULyQHBWXWauhmjNRNHYuKyuEBQknxEaIGkRFqZGZ00hRUAkAIBBozmpuZKEMUzVSUIZw-urkxtvR1QZCTGYcbzef1zefdbqNsQ-vx0qCZUopby-9jXG8XM8TIVhu9viz_CZYsp1cb6GYKCvDvQLCVpIrmo266ZPrOhekIpyeX8Xp_kPjXwAAAP__aWRn1Q)

name: Tom Cotton
subject: Zero tolerance for foreign-flag waving rioters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e233031/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvNGRuTXhOeGNhRQ/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA2MTE/LbmNscExQdWQ2QQ/qP2hpZHM9bmNiZ0F1MzVMVDhkZ29scw/gaElyPQ/s0j1b650cea)
What’s happening in Los Angeles is unacceptable.

People throwing rocks, cement, and fireworks at police are not “protestors” or “demonstrators.”

_**[They’re criminals who should be arrested — and any foreigners should be deported immediately.](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)**_

The lesson from the BLM riots five years ago is clear: we must have zero tolerance for violent insurrectionists. And especially zero tolerance for foreign-flag waving rioters fighting for criminal illegal aliens.

If you needed a reminder that Democrats put illegals first and Americans last, and that they don’t really care about the rule of law in this country, here it is.

Not one single prominent Democrat has forcefully condemned this mob. Kamala Harris is siding with them. And of course Gavin Newsom is reminding us all that he’s a national disgrace.

The Democrats stand with the violent illegal aliens rioting, looting, blocking traffic, and assaulting cops.

I’m glad President Trump is in the White House. He’s cleaning up the mess they created.

**[Now, we just have to do everything we can to stop these lunatics from regaining power.](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)**
In service,

[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
Tom Cotton

clean_body: What’s happening in Los Angeles is unacceptable. People throwing rocks, cement, and fireworks at police are not “protestors” or “demonstrators.” The lesson from the BLM riots five years ago is clear: we must have zero tolerance for violent insurrectionists. And especially zero tolerance for foreign-flag waving rioters fighting for criminal illegal aliens. If you needed a reminder that Democrats put illegals first and Americans last, and that they don’t really care about the rule of law in this country, here it is. Not one single prominent Democrat has forcefully condemned this mob. Kamala Harris is siding with them. And of course Gavin Newsom is reminding us all that he’s a national disgrace. The Democrats stand with the violent illegal aliens rioting, looting, blocking traffic, and assaulting cops. I’m glad President Trump is in the White House. He’s cleaning up the mess they created. In service, Tom Cotton ****************************************************************************************************** | Paid for by the NRSC. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: NDRC Ohio Watch Team
subject: Ohio Republicans 🤝 Map Manipulation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Can you support our work?
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109362691/550868523/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY5NmQ4MjY2LWJkNDYtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gV9CJCreRLZ9d8edP1m1dN7kQOiAYd73gdxvb0eIuSs=&emci=af5b9eb7-4646-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=696d8266-bd46-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, let’s get into all things Ohio: _**First:**_ Ohio Republicans sabotaged last year’s ballot initiative to create an independent redistricting commission by altering draft language and running a wildly misleading set of ads against it. _**Then:**_ The ballot initiative did not pass, allowing Ohio Republicans to continue holding the reins around redistricting and solidifying their grip on power. _**Now:**_ Ohio lawmakers are preparing to redraw the congressional map this year under the **exact same system** that Republicans exploited in order to avoid having to enact a fair map. **Peter, the NDRC is working tirelessly to prevent Ohio Republicans from abusing the map-redrawing process for anti-democracy power grabs. But we need the support of grassroots donors like you.** [**Will you make a donation to fight ongoing attempts at gerrymandering in Ohio and across the country?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109362692/550868524/-1156862612?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_OhioFTN_email_20250611-NDRC-Tier1-OhioFTN_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250611-NDRC-Tier1-OhioFTN_&utm_campaign=OhioFTN&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY5NmQ4MjY2LWJkNDYtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gV9CJCreRLZ9d8edP1m1dN7kQOiAYd73gdxvb0eIuSs=) Ohio conservatives have a history of blatantly disregarding their citizens. A decade ago, voters passed a constitutional amendment that created a new redistricting process, but state lawmakers have kept on pursuing extreme gerrymanders. Their skewed legislative and congressional maps have been struck down by the state courts SEVEN TIMES this decade. Ahead of the midterm elections, Republicans in Ohio are likely planning to once again abuse their power. Here’s what we’re looking at:
* Ohio Republicans have consistently tried to pack the state’s Democratic voters into a small number of districts.
* They have the opportunity to pick up not one, not two, but three congressional seats, depending on how extreme the gerrymander.
* That means this doesn’t just affect Ohio — any district they gerrymander in their favor gets Republicans one seat closer to holding the House majority.

**As Ohio Republicans lead the map redrawing process ahead of 2026, we know what they’re capable of. It’s on us to expose and fight back against their efforts to manipulate maps to hold on to power.** [**We’re gearing up for this congressional map redraw in Ohio — donate now to make sure we’ll be ready for the fight.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109362693/550868525/-1156862612?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_OhioFTN_email_20250611-NDRC-Tier1-OhioFTN_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250611-NDRC-Tier1-OhioFTN_&utm_campaign=OhioFTN&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjY5NmQ4MjY2LWJkNDYtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=gV9CJCreRLZ9d8edP1m1dN7kQOiAYd73gdxvb0eIuSs=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: Can you support our work? | Peter, let’s get into all things Ohio: First: Ohio Republicans sabotaged last year’s ballot initiative to create an independent redistricting commission by altering draft language and running a wildly misleading set of ads against it. Then: The ballot initiative did not pass, allowing Ohio Republicans to continue holding the reins around redistricting and solidifying their grip on power. Now: Ohio lawmakers are preparing to redraw the congressional map this year under the exact same system that Republicans exploited in order to avoid having to enact a fair map. Peter, the NDRC is working tirelessly to prevent Ohio Republicans from abusing the map-redrawing process for anti-democracy power grabs. But we need the support of grassroots donors like you. = Ohio conservatives have a history of blatantly disregarding their citizens. A decade ago, voters passed a constitutional amendment that created a new redistricting process, but state lawmakers have kept on pursuing extreme gerrymanders. Their skewed legislative and congressional maps have been struck down by the state courts SEVEN TIMES this decade. Ahead of the midterm elections, Republicans in Ohio are likely planning to once again abuse their power. Here’s what we’re looking at: Ohio Republicans have consistently tried to pack the state’s Democratic voters into a small number of districts. They have the opportunity to pick up not one, not two, but three congressional seats, depending on how extreme the gerrymander. That means this doesn’t just affect Ohio — any district they gerrymander in their favor gets Republicans one seat closer to holding the House majority. As Ohio Republicans lead the map redrawing process ahead of 2026, we know what they’re capable of. It’s on us to expose and fight back against their efforts to manipulate maps to hold on to power. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thank you. We’ll be in touch with more as we know it. NDRC Ohio Watch Team = = Since 2017, the NDRC has executed a comprehensive redistricting strategy that shifts the redistricting power, creating fair districts where Democrats can compete. Our victories have been made possible by our strong community of grassroots supporters. = If you want to receive periodic updates from the NDRC on our fight for fair maps, text MAPS to 36787. Text HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg & Data rates may apply. We know we send a lot of emails, but we think it's important to keep you updated with the latest information on Republican gerrymandering and voter suppression and how we're fighting back -- regardless of whether you choose to donate. = to make a donation. Every dollar you give will go toward our fight to end gerrymandering and voter suppression. | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States ** if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC.

body:

| Who Are We Endorsing for Attorney General?
---
| Friends-
There is just a little under a week until Virginia's primary election, and with federal job cuts, tariffs, and rising unemployment rates, it's more important than ever to vote for an affordable Virginia. That's why we're proud to endorse former Delegate Jay Jones for Attorney General. Delegate Jones' commitment to lower the cost of living by going after corporate price gougers, including landlords, grocery chains, and perpetrators of hidden fees exemplifies the leadership we need in Virginia.

* **TOP NEWS**

"**Abbott sends Texas National Guard troops to San Antonio ahead of protests,** " San Antonio Express-News'**Nancy M. Preyor-Johnson** and**Sig Christenson** - "Texas Gov. **Greg Abbott** has deployed National Guard troops to San Antonio in advance of planned protests in the city against a Trump administration crackdown on undocumented immigrants.

The San Antonio Police Department said Chief **William McManus** contacted state officials Monday night seeking to confirm the presence of guardsmen in the city.

McManus "was able to confirm that Gov. Abbott deployed National Guard troops to San Antonio," SAPD Assistant Chief **Jesse Salame** told the San Antonio Express-News.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $7/mo](https://substack.com/redirect/5916a380-9ccb-46af-91fb-403c3cea2d76?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
State officials provided no other details, Salame said.

Without mentioning San Antonio specifically, Abbott's press secretary, **Andrew Mahaleris** , told the Express-News that National Guard soldiers "are on standby in areas where mass demonstrations are planned in case they are needed.
[BECOME A PAID SUBSCRIBER: $70/yr](https://substack.com/redirect/5916a380-9ccb-46af-91fb-403c3cea2d76?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"Peaceful protests are part of the fabric of our nation, but Texas will not tolerate the lawlessness we have seen in Los Angeles," Mahaleris said in a statement Tuesday night. "Anyone engaging in acts of violence or damaging property will be swiftly held accountable to the full extent of the law."

Texas National Guard officials did not respond to a request for comment.

City leaders have scheduled a Wednesday morning news conference to discuss preparations for protests planned for Wednesday and Saturday evening in downtown San Antonio.

McManus, Mayor**Ron Nirenberg** and City Manager **Erik Walsh** will provide details on "the city's plan to support peaceful demonstrations while ensuring public safety," according to a news release. The news conference is scheduled for 9 a.m. Wednesday at City Hall.

Last week, there were protests outside City Hall and federal immigration court in San Antonio and at federal courthouses across the country, where federal agents have been arresting immigrants as they arrive for scheduled court appearances.

The Guard deployment in San Antonio comes amid nationwide demonstrations against immigration enforcement." [SAEN](https://substack.com/redirect/19b8ee04-cab1-42a8-9bbd-b951b1238d05?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) ($)

The San Antonio Police Department said Chief William McManus contacted state officials Monday night seeking to confirm the presence of guardsmen in the city. McManus "was able to confirm that Gov. Abbott deployed National Guard troops to San Antonio," SAPD Assistant Chief Jesse Salame told the San Antonio Express-News. State officials provided no other details, Salame said. City leaders have scheduled a Wednesday morning news conference to discuss preparations for protests planned for Wednesday and Saturday evening in downtown San Antonio. McManus, MayorRon Nirenberg and City Manager Erik Walsh will provide details on "the city's plan to support peaceful demonstrations while ensuring public safety," according to a news release. The news conference is scheduled for 9 a.m. Wednesday at City Hall. Last week, there were protests outside City Hall and federal immigration court in San Antonio and at federal courthouses across the country, where federal agents have been arresting immigrants as they arrive for scheduled court appearances. The Guard deployment in San Antonio comes amid nationwide demonstrations against immigration enforcement." TOP NEWS "Abbott sends Texas National Guard troops to San Antonio ahead of protests, " San Antonio Express-News'Nancy M. Preyor-Johnson andSig Christenson - "Texas Gov. Greg Abbott has deployed National Guard troops to San Antonio in advance of planned protests in the city against a Trump administration crackdown on undocumented immigrants. The San Antonio Police Department said Chief William McManus contacted state officials Monday night seeking to confirm the presence of guardsmen in the city. McManus "was able to confirm that Gov. Abbott deployed National Guard troops to San Antonio," SAPD Assistant Chief Jesse Salame told the San Antonio Express-News. State officials provided no other details, Salame said. Without mentioning San Antonio specifically, Abbott's press secretary, Andrew Mahaleris , told the Express-News that National Guard soldiers "are on standby in areas where mass demonstrations are planned in case they are needed. "Peaceful protests are part of the fabric of our nation, but Texas will not tolerate the lawlessness we have seen in Los Angeles," Mahaleris said in a statement Tuesday night. "Anyone engaging in acts of violence or damaging property will be swiftly held accountable to the full extent of the law." Texas National Guard officials did not respond to a request for comment. City leaders have scheduled a Wednesday morning news conference to discuss preparations for protests planned for Wednesday and Saturday evening in downtown San Antonio. McManus, MayorRon Nirenberg and City Manager Erik Walsh will provide details on "the city's plan to support peaceful demonstrations while ensuring public safety," according to a news release. The news conference is scheduled for 9 a.m. Wednesday at City Hall. Last week, there were protests outside City Hall and federal immigration court in San Antonio and at federal courthouses across the country, where federal agents have been arresting immigrants as they arrive for scheduled court appearances. The Guard deployment in San Antonio comes amid nationwide demonstrations against immigration enforcement." # [Paul Hodes (D-NH): Money, Obamacare, and politicians with a temper](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=2440398&post_id=165583934&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1NTgzOTM0LCJpYXQiOjE3NDk2NDY2NTgsImV4cCI6MTc1MjIzODY1OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTI0NDAzOTgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.6hDgQURhSxuj1GmQpoW3lceoBolFPzm4HPEHoxlwMLA)

Listen to the latest episode of _[Former Member](https://substack.com/redirect/320254dd-3bb0-44be-bfa0-097de0701600?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)_ , where I talk to former members of Congress--Democrats and Republicans--to get their perspectives on what it was like to serve, and how things are different today vs. when they were around.
Earlier this week, I spoke with [Paul Hodes](https://substack.com/redirect/0ffc9977-a24c-4084-84f1-18e967c7bbf8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg), a two-term Democratic Congressman from New Hampshire with one of the more fun introductions on Wikipedia: "an American lawyer, musician, and former U.S. representative."
We talked about money in politics, the 2008 financial crisis, and working for Marianne Williamson in 2020. (It's safe to say that he didn't enjoy it.)
He writes ["What Does Paul Say" on Substack](https://substack.com/redirect/3a9c6b58-ae01-4cac-8b39-6e6156b90f3b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and is a musician in [Paul Hodes and The Blue Buddha Band](https://substack.com/redirect/31d4f82d-7d37-48c7-9ac0-030fe42eacec?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).1
Give it a listen! Details below.
[Subscribed](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9iZW5zYW11ZWxzLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9hY2NvdW50IiwicCI6MTY1NTgzOTM0LCJzIjoyNDQwMzk4LCJmIjp0cnVlLCJ1Ijo5MDUwMTE5MiwiaWF0IjoxNzQ5NjQ2NjU4LCJleHAiOjE3NTIyMzg2NTgsImlzcyI6InB1Yi0wIiwic3ViIjoibGluay1yZWRpcmVjdCJ9.PAQFhARA6q0vdcf9YtTI09rRVpshzqzXfTr61dclC6g?)
### **Topics from my conversation with Paul Hodes**
* _0:00 - 2:09_: Introduction and time in Congress.
* _2:10 - 14:43_: The role of money in politics. (Namely, how members spend most of their time raising money.)
* _14:44 - 17:20_: Voting on a bill you haven't read yet. (It's [more common than you think](https://substack.com/redirect/d6f07385-b5ba-4807-a1d5-b420483adb7d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).)
* _17:21 - 21:04_: Anything that you regret?
* _21:05 - 28:48_: Serving from the [2006 Democratic wave](https://substack.com/redirect/efe41bff-663d-494d-b01a-3b146f21d9ca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) through the [2010 Tea Party wave](https://substack.com/redirect/821ef02f-0a81-450b-ba44-15f31ea40201?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
* _28:49 - 35:48_: The financial crisis, Obamacare, and their long-lasting impacts on American politics.
* _35:49 - 47:33_: Some (uncensored) thoughts on Marianne Williamson. ([Hodes worked for her](https://substack.com/redirect/74d593ab-8ad8-4a79-bd0d-88361e835375?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) when [she ran for President in 2020](https://substack.com/redirect/7bf0cb42-ac97-4f96-8165-8ba9911f93f3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).)
* _47:34 - 52:24_: Congressional group chats.
* _52:25 - 56:55_: Serving on the [National Council on the Arts](https://substack.com/redirect/bac51733-15ea-4ffb-a3fe-548fec4b952b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) under Trump.
* _56:56 - 57:21_: Wrap-up.

“**Abbott sends Texas National Guard troops to San Antonio ahead of protests,** ” San Antonio Express-News'**Nancy M. Preyor-Johnson** and**Sig Christenson** – “Texas Gov. **Greg Abbott** has deployed National Guard troops to San Antonio in advance of planned protests in the city against a Trump administration crackdown on undocumented immigrants.

The San Antonio Police Department said Chief **William McManus** contacted state officials Monday night seeking to confirm the presence of guardsmen in the city.

McManus "was able to confirm that Gov. Abbott deployed National Guard troops to San Antonio,” SAPD Assistant Chief **Jesse Salame** told the San Antonio Express-News.

"Peaceful protests are part of the fabric of our nation, but Texas will not tolerate the lawlessness we have seen in Los Angeles," Mahaleris said in a statement Tuesday night. "Anyone engaging in acts of violence or damaging property will be swiftly held accountable to the full extent of the law."

Texas National Guard officials did not respond to a request for comment.

City leaders have scheduled a Wednesday morning news conference to discuss preparations for protests planned for Wednesday and Saturday evening in downtown San Antonio.

McManus, Mayor**Ron Nirenberg** and City Manager **Erik Walsh** will provide details on "the city's plan to support peaceful demonstrations while ensuring public safety," according to a news release. The news conference is scheduled for 9 a.m. Wednesday at City Hall.

Last week, there were protests outside City Hall and federal immigration court in San Antonio and at federal courthouses across the country, where federal agents have been arresting immigrants as they arrive for scheduled court appearances.

The Guard deployment in San Antonio comes amid nationwide demonstrations against immigration enforcement." Become a PAID subscriber for $5/mo or $50/yr | TOP NEWS “Abbott sends Texas National Guard troops to San Antonio ahead of protests, ” San Antonio Express-News'Nancy M. Preyor-Johnson andSig Christenson – “Texas Gov. Greg Abbott has deployed National Guard troops to San Antonio in advance of planned protests in the city against a Trump administration crackdown on undocumented immigrants. The San Antonio Police Department said Chief William McManus contacted state officials Monday night seeking to confirm the presence of guardsmen in the city. McManus "was able to confirm that Gov. Abbott deployed National Guard troops to San Antonio,” SAPD Assistant Chief Jesse Salame told the San Antonio Express-News. » State officials provided no other details, Salame said. Without mentioning San Antonio specifically, Abbott's press secretary, Andrew Mahaleris , told the Express-News that National Guard soldiers "are on standby in areas where mass demonstrations are planned in case they are needed. » "Peaceful protests are part of the fabric of our nation, but Texas will not tolerate the lawlessness we have seen in Los Angeles," Mahaleris said in a statement Tuesday night. "Anyone engaging in acts of violence or damaging property will be swiftly held accountable to the full extent of the law." Texas National Guard officials did not respond to a request for comment. City leaders have scheduled a Wednesday morning news conference to discuss preparations for protests planned for Wednesday and Saturday evening in downtown San Antonio. McManus, MayorRon Nirenberg and City Manager Erik Walsh will provide details on "the city's plan to support peaceful demonstrations while ensuring public safety," according to a news release. The news conference is scheduled for 9 a.m. Wednesday at City Hall. Last week, there were protests outside City Hall and federal immigration court in San Antonio and at federal courthouses across the country, where federal agents have been arresting immigrants as they arrive for scheduled court appearances. The Guard deployment in San Antonio comes amid nationwide demonstrations against immigration enforcement." name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Beto came to Houston to attack me
body:
This is just the beginning, Peter
| | | | | | [ ](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JXFJ3MZ1REN0JZ4H4SAQFMJX_0)
---
| | | | Peter, Beto O’Rourke just held a rally right here in the Houston area. And he used his platform to launch a personal attack against me. After years of humiliating losses, you’d think he’d step aside. But instead, Beto is back and he’s dragging the full weight of the radical Left with him. The DCCC and their far-left Super PAC allies are already positioning themselves to flip traditionally Republican districts across Texas – _districts just like this one_. **Make no mistake: this is how it starts. A rally. A headline. A smear campaign. Then come the attack ads, dark money, and outside operatives flooding into our state. ** I’m not going to sit back and wait for it to happen. That’s why I need your help to fight back right now. [**Please make a contribution of $25, $50, $100, or even $250 to help me stand up to Beto and the radical Left and defend this district, defend Texas, and defend our House Majority from their assault.**](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JXFJ3MZ1REN0JZ4H4SAQFMJX_1)

| The truth is, if we let our guard down in even one district, we risk losing everything – the House majority, our ability to advance President Trump’s America First agenda, and the conservative firewall protecting America. That’s why I’m asking you to take this seriously. As a Navy SEAL, I know that the best way to win a fight is to meet the threat before it’s at your door. That is why I’m fighting back now. I’m counting on you to join me Peter. [**So please rush a contribution today to help me push back against the Left’s attacks, defend Texas, and keep Congress in conservative hands.**](https://ctrk.klclick1.com/l/01JXFJ3MZ1REN0JZ4H4SAQFMJX_9)

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zrj5ranu40vg5d7jhsd0u3v5h1o3hm6rt29ip8b0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdhmco34cph2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zgd29897ptmfrlriigjs551vnpmc8c05a0q06i2g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdhmco34cph2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zk3ajpitg7o5nrdfleaa4kkforjru8k6bc5mlo10_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdhmco34cph2bs)
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zc8hmucod4rn420244kqi8il6o8rbvd5nkai3m4o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdhmco34cph2bs)
What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2ztck5pbr4f820vnb7bln8sht34tobfkkotgnveq8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdhmco34cph2bs)

READ THIS PART FIRST: Virginia’s primary is happening THIS TUESDAY and, while we understand the instinct to sit out of primaries, we think there’s one primary in particular that you might want to take a look at. ↓

**Ghazala Hashmi is the ONLY woman running against five (!!) men in the primary election for Lt. Governor of Virginia – which is happening in a matter of DAYS. She is also the most experienced legislator in her race. We have been proud to support her in this important fight.**

---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109377053/550901479/1768720405?refcode=EM_F_250611primary_N_EH_90DO_10_G_N_P1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg4NDk1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUzYjFhMjRhLWNhNDYtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=fz7XOrwJBmrDtVDc1VQwRZGwTSH9OYWxHP7nIh0BmCs=)
---
When she first ran for office, she surprised political pundits by winning over more voters than the hand-picked candidate for the Democratic nomination. She then went on to win the general election by TEN points in a district that had been represented by a Republican for decades. As a result, Democrats gained a critical _one-seat majority_ in the state government, and **Hashmi was able to cast a tie-breaking vote to protect abortion rights.**

[**Senator Hashmi has released a TV ad – and she needs our help to keep it up on the air! For just $25, you can make sure 1,000 Virginia voters see this commercial. This is one of the best opportunities we’ve ever seen to help a candidate spread her message! Hashmi was motivated to run for office initially in opposition to Trump, and has challenged the Trump and Youngkin agenda in the General Assembly ever since.

**If she wins the primary election, Hashmi’s opponent will be extremist Republican talk-radio host, John Reid.** His campaign website features MAGA-inspired rhetoric, how he wants to “free education from leftist indoctrination,” and stop “wokeness.”

His website states, _“John Reid is pro life and has boldly spoken out on TV, radio, and in his personal testimony against the Democrats new radical unlimited any time-any place, day of birth abortion proposals.”_

**In case you were wondering, no one is proposing “any time-any place, day of birth” abortions... His accusations are dangerous, untrue, and offensive to pro-choice Americans.

Virginia is a competitive swing state – and, despite his intentionally misleading claims and radical ideologies, Reid actually has a chance of winning this race. The _current_ Lt. Governor has gone on record blaming rape and incest victims for getting pregnant in the first place...

[**Hashmi has taken on the MAGA agenda before, and now she’s ready to do it again as Lieutenant Governor. Help ensure her TV ad can reach as many voters as possible before her primary election on TUESDAY by rushing a split contribution of $25 or more today →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hbm-hashmi/?refcode=EM_F_250611primary_N_EH_90DO_10_G_N_L2&amount=25)

Erica Henry

Sec. of Defense Pete Hegseth **[went off at Democrat Rep. Pete Aguilar](https://substack.com/redirect/54a16c12-a22e-43de-868f-fbb0c1e558ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during a House Committee hearing, Tuesday, for insinuating that the Trump administration doesn't care about the wellbeing of troops it's sending to deal with the Los Angeles riots.
"I'm not going to take that!!"
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/54a16c12-a22e-43de-868f-fbb0c1e558ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/54a16c12-a22e-43de-868f-fbb0c1e558ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"I want to express my severe concern with the deployment of the National Guard in Los Angeles without consultation of the state of California," Aguilar told Hegseth. "There are photographs of these troops sleeping on the floor, and have not been provided food, fuel or water by DOD. How long will these deployments last and why were we unprepared to provide them basic necessities?"
Hegseth fired back, **["They responded incredibly rapidly to a deteriorating situation!" ](https://substack.com/redirect/54a16c12-a22e-43de-868f-fbb0c1e558ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**He reminded the Democrat that he was deployed in a similar manner responding to the 2020 Black Lives Matter riots outside the White House, holding a riot shield against agitators. "I know what it's like to be immediately deployed into a situation like that, there are moments where you make due the best you can, but we are ensuring they are housed, fed, water, in real time from my office!"
"You should check with your office," Aguilar quipped.
"I'm not going to take that we don't care about the troops!" Hegseth returned fire. **["Nobody cares more about the troops than this secretary,](https://substack.com/redirect/54a16c12-a22e-43de-868f-fbb0c1e558ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** the chairman and our department!"
Watch Hegseth stand his ground:
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/54a16c12-a22e-43de-868f-fbb0c1e558ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Together with BOXABL](https://substack.com/redirect/32e5a351-d5cf-48d8-8e3f-7f358826e7ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **Most car factories, like Ford or Tesla, reportedly build one car per minute. Isn't it time we do that for houses?**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/32e5a351-d5cf-48d8-8e3f-7f358826e7ef?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
BOXABL believes they have the potential to disrupt a **massive and outdated trillion-dollar building construction market** by bringing assembly line automation to the home industry.
BOXABL homes are built in their Las Vegas factory, folded, shipped on a truck, and then unfolded on site in one hour. They aim to**transform** **home construction** , much like how Henry Ford automated car manufacturing - bringing assembly line efficiency and mass production to an artisanal, slow industry.
And they're not just dreaming big; they're delivering:
* Initial prototype order delivered to **SpaceX** in 2020.
* Subsequent project order of **156 homes from the Department of Defense completed in 2021**.
* Now, after implementing what was learned from those prior orders, actively **delivering to developers and consumers**.

# Musk apologizes for attacks on Trump
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/10f8e84f-5114-49d1-a4ba-9cc1f8a5b511?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Musk publicly apologized for his recent attacks on Trump, admitting they "went too far" **[in an X post, Wednesday morning.](https://substack.com/redirect/10f8e84f-5114-49d1-a4ba-9cc1f8a5b511?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
* **The tech billionaire expressed regret** for explosive personal claims against Trump, including that he was in the Jeffrey Epstein files and suggestions that the president should be impeached.

* **The feud erupted over Trump's massive spending bill after Musk left his government efficiency role** \- Musk had spent months working to cut wasteful government spending through DOGE before criticizing Trump's "big beautiful bill," leading to escalating personal attacks where Musk accused Trump of "ingratitude" and claimed Trump wouldn't have won without his help.
* **Trump initially dismissed Musk as having "totally lost it" and said he wasn't interested in talking** \- The president told reporters he was "very disappointed" in Musk's criticism and claimed on social media that Musk went "CRAZY" after Trump removed electric vehicle mandates, while saying Musk was "wearing thin" and he "asked him to leave."
* **Both sides have begun softening their positions and showing signs of reconciliation** \- Trump said Monday "we had a great relationship and I wish him well," to which Musk responded with a heart emoji, and Musk has since supported Trump's response to anti-ICE demonstrations in Los Angeles by sharing the president's posts and responding with American flag emojis.

# Woman begs anti-ICE protesters to stop blocking traffic so she can get to work - They laugh in her face...
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/22251590-da01-4cf2-8c9f-04a2c6f896ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/22251590-da01-4cf2-8c9f-04a2c6f896ea?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **A New York mother begged anti-ICE protesters to let her get to work while they blocked traffic** \- The unidentified woman got out of her car during Tuesday's protests to plead with demonstrators, explaining "I have a kid and I need to go to work" as at least 80 protesters were arrested throughout the day.
* **The protesters showed no sympathy and mocked her concerns about providing for her child** \- When the mom asked "what about my kid?" after a protester said "these people are having their children taken," a male demonstrator sarcastically replied "Oh no, not work, I care so much" while dismissing her situation.
* **A reporter highlighted the racial dynamics of the confrontation** \- Turning Point USA's Savanah Hernandez, who filmed the exchange, asked the protesters how they felt as "white people stopping a black woman from going to work," drawing attention to the irony of the situation as the frustrated mother pointed out the traffic backup they were causing.

We couldn’t agree with her more! Social Security must be protected.

But, we have no idea if Democrats in your area agree...
