name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I’m now forced to say it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
........................

........................
| [](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2z3got3nk6l7jrp6htcma5h08v6a03nudallm4qeo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdhmapr2cth2bs)
---
Friend,
---
All of my life, those closest to me – and even those who only knew me from politics – have known me to be a _helper_.
---
I helped take down the mob in New York...
---
I helped unify our city and our country as America’s mayor after tragedy struck on September 11th...
---
I helped keep our streets and our citizens safe... **
---
And I helped successfully defend President Trump from one of the Left’s most vicious witch hunts imaginable.
---
Those were the headlines that defined me to so many Americans like _YOU_.
---
But over the last year, I’ve instead woken up in the mornings to headlines like these:
---

**_“Giuliani losing his home amidst 2 indictments...”_**
_[MSNBC]_

**_“Giuliani bankruptcy case dismissed, opening door to creditors pursuing collection”_**
_[CNBC]_

**_“Giuliani Disbarred from the Practice of Law in New York” _**
_[New York Times]_

---
**And sadly, as I stare down the Democrats’ _FINAL_ sham indictment against me, I am now the one forced to ask _you_ to help _me_. **
---
That’s truly something I NEVER wanted to have to say, Friend...
---
_Asking for help as opposed to offering it unsettles me to my core._
---
But I hope you understand that you truly are my FINAL HOPE.
---
_**Right now in Arizona, the Democrat Attorney General is seeking to use a _state-level_ charge that President Trump cannot pardon in order to throw me in prison until I’m 100 years old!** _
---
My crime? Refusing to forsake the TRUTH and standing by the side of my dear friend and our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump.
---
_And the punishment the Left wants in return? My personal, professional, and financial ruin along with me taking my last breath in a prison cell!_
---
Make no mistake, if we can’t beat this sham case here and now, if we fail to secure true justice and my ultimate vindication, then this scheme of the Left’s can be used against every last red-blooded patriot as the Deep State’s bulletproof measure to TAKE DOWN their political enemies.
---
And the _ONLY_ way to defeat a regime like the Deep State is to **NEVER,_EVER_ SURRENDER** to it.
---
_...Just ask President Trump!_
---
The Democrats unjustly filed my MUGSHOT under **booking # 2313757.**
---
[](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zmsk8t1gqgrg14n7s4s5dedlpdghv6pqkkqj06s8_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdhmapr2cth2bs)
__
---
_So, to show these left-wing crooks that good and honest Americans like _YOU_ will also never surrender as they destroy the life of an INNOCENT man, I’m humbly asking for your support to raise **$231,375.70** for my Legal Defense Trust to win this last fight for my freedom and justice. _
---
[**Please make a contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me WIN the FINAL BATTLE for my freedom and justice against the Deep State as they attempt to JAIL me for the rest of my life in Arizona.**](https://e.firstlook.news/rd/9z2zncrptba6tvfd7fq6armqsfns0hav4l7e672hmrg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdhmapr2cth2bs)

Fellow activist,

Pennsylvania is one of only 8 states in the country where Supreme Court justices are initially elected through partisan elections. At the end of their 10 year terms, voters decide on whether to retain them in non-partisan retention elections. In November, Pennsylvania voters will vote “yes” or “no” to retain three Pennsylvania Supreme Court Justices on the ballot. Which means PA is once again a key battleground state this year.

Here is how it will work:

As reported by _WHYY News_ , Democrats currently hold a 5-2 majority on the state's highest court, but three justices elected as Democrats are nearing the end of their terms. This November, voters will get to vote either “yes” or “no” on whether they should serve another term, and MAGA Republicans are eyeing these races as their chance to flip the balance of the courts.

If Republicans are successful in their anti-retention campaign, the PA Supreme Court could have three vacancies until the Governor is able to appoint and confirm their replacements (which is unlikely as this would require support from Republicans in the PA Senate) or until the next judicial election in 2027.

[**With the Trump regime getting more and more aggressive in its attempts to strip away our freedoms and undermine our nation’s constitution, it’s more critical than ever that we ensure our courts are fair and independent. These races are a TOP priority for the Republican party – we cannot take this moment for granted. Will you help us prepare for the fight ahead by pitching in a MATCH contribution today?**](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz7N1bdan8dqslucv3braa57iroH1-2FNyT9glGiUy6uuKR2eq3-2F4fiEYqSAtTt0phtS3EtmzcUlWc2hNJsk0XPJr9K4LtZlnISC5-2BXkcbGd1eC-2BA4fEAQYkDV2gNBMmm80Ow-3DuOyC_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYKo-2FrIrWJV81b3uI8DgP-2FLieZdyNKgFaSkaWgDEaoxUqK-2FK1v1MwNbSMUsWfjZ8-2FMuUFDcFJSJQSGMtKKxeEULXlRt8ks9CEcwuRPrE5ta5IHNzcbTFcnPwqeUYs58FrtSi8no2XaEmOuKZfBnZcsTFc9sPTh4KMQRVwzWw2BJjfyLMa-2Fy2a8i87bwyLRD9GhtklTeNlaPE9azY4oyLF-2FJA-3D-3D)

Republicans aren’t sneaky with their plan – they want a Republican majority on the PA Supreme Court before the next presidential election in 2028. That is why they are trying to rally their base by regurgitating Trump’s baseless Big Lie to say the 2020 election was stolen.

We know the truth: If the GOP is successful in electing a MAGA majority, it will lead to voter suppression and further restrictions on our freedoms, including reproductive rights. As NPP’s CEO, Kadida Kenner, has stated, “Our courts would just become another political tool instead of a critical check and balance, and it’s up to us to ensure that doesn’t happen.”

[**We need you in this fight. As a reminder, we have an incredible match opportunity provided by a generous angel donor who agreed to double all donations up to $50,000. Will you rush a $25 or more donation now to support our critical voter education and mobilization work ahead of this year’s judicial elections?**](https://u44255144.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=u001.ekJ0nzuGxxKMd6ADw0n9Yr19exo8ATdRfiqRDml-2FPz7N1bdan8dqslucv3braa57iroH1-2FNyT9glGiUy6uuKR2eq3-2F4fiEYqSAtTt0phtS3EtmzcUlWc2hNJsk0XPJr94gv-2FyILmLkSf9GX0UEqRrShKghB1N3I6PlOmEbGONjU-3DoWgM_9XnTPLnaEjN9OHWhKYUffDeECIVzR9M-2B5LaO5RH8NVAKmTIthZAqug-2BBe3TY9jweA5gYJTWBMeK2mbEu1GsUAWbMxqbbanoccXqIiueqpc6DIzHn4ElffI7A3Y14vKdCNksTNdqpcPsZ-2Fywu-2FMuXA4y3CGiU9X4tiAddJTMlizHBV3fCrFnIJPehcpV1HfrYKo-2FrIrWJV81b3uI8DgP-2FLieZdyNKgFaSkaWgDEaoxUqk2pBlE5ztSG7E-2FzEwWcW4Zx5lJjJsJa8kWo4OZ0pxtmz09GSc2s5wWTUQJIDs9iDPOk5Z-2FcdrTPI7QE3Sbcp4YTVlfZgqLfWOnU3up06rdnN64xQXYuaJFd8hThLL7cWA1Mb8oPSYXnAYKj-2F7Iq4MrLuHayf8UUJUbAiVqFmQSw-3D-3D)

_Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round.

| | _The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth._

clean_body: | | | Fellow activist, Pennsylvania is one of only 8 states in the country where Supreme Court justices are initially elected through partisan elections. At the end of their 10 year terms, voters decide on whether to retain them in non-partisan retention elections. In November, Pennsylvania voters will vote “yes” or “no” to retain three Pennsylvania Supreme Court Justices on the ballot. Which means PA is once again a key battleground state this year. Here is how it will work: As reported by WHYY News , Democrats currently hold a 5-2 majority on the state's highest court, but three justices elected as Democrats are nearing the end of their terms. This November, voters will get to vote either “yes” or “no” on whether they should serve another term, and MAGA Republicans are eyeing these races as their chance to flip the balance of the courts. If Republicans are successful in their anti-retention campaign, the PA Supreme Court could have three vacancies until the Governor is able to appoint and confirm their replacements (which is unlikely as this would require support from Republicans in the PA Senate) or until the next judicial election in 2027. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: Republicans aren’t sneaky with their plan – they want a Republican majority on the PA Supreme Court before the next presidential election in 2028. That is why they are trying to rally their base by regurgitating Trump’s baseless Big Lie to say the 2020 election was stolen. We know the truth: If the GOP is successful in electing a MAGA majority, it will lead to voter suppression and further restrictions on our freedoms, including reproductive rights. As NPP’s CEO, Kadida Kenner, has stated, “Our courts would just become another political tool instead of a critical check and balance, and it’s up to us to ensure that doesn’t happen.” In solidarity, New Pennsylvania Project Donations to the New Pennsylvania Project supports our staff’s community engagement efforts including; organizing and hosting town halls, educational webinars, community conversations, and creating digital content, bi-weekly blasts and social media to reach the communities we engage year-round. | | The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. Will you support us with a monthly contribution today? || || || The New Pennsylvania Project is a 501(c)(4). Contributions are not for charitable purposes and are not tax deductible. | Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project Our Contact Information New Pennsylvania ProjectP.O. Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381412-699-6771 | | | |

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: UPDATE: Our race was just called in New Jersey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
The general election begins now.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250611-1?refcode=em20250611-2093&refcode2=2093_21716_6S6xyR&akid=2093%2E21716%2E6S6xyR)
Team, I am so honored to be the official Democratic nominee for governor here in New Jersey. Thank you to everyone who played a part in this victory. I wouldn’t be here without this incredible grassroots team who chipped in, volunteered, and voted.
And we can’t stop now.
We know what we are up against. The general election starts this morning — and if recent history is any indication, it’s going to be an expensive, hard-fought race decided by a razor-thin margin. [**Will you help us get off to a strong start against Trump’s handpicked Republican nominee by splitting $25 between my campaign and Sarah McBride today?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250611-1?refcode=em20250611-2093&amount=25&refcode2=2093_21716_6S6xyR&akid=2093%2E21716%2E6S6xyR)
**[Donate $25 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250611-1?refcode=em20250611-2093&amount=25&refcode2=2093_21716_6S6xyR&akid=2093%2E21716%2E6S6xyR)**
I was raised to believe that we have an obligation to our community and our country.
It’s why I took my first oath to the Constitution as a teenager when I entered the Naval Academy.
It’s why I spent nearly a decade in the Navy as a helicopter pilot and Russian policy officer.
It’s why I went to law school, and became an outreach and reentry coordinator and a federal prosecutor.
It’s why I first ran for office — flipping a Republican-held congressional seat here in New Jersey that no one thought we could win at the time.
And it’s why I’m running to serve as our next governor. It’s too hard to get ahead in New Jersey, and too often, our kids have fewer opportunities than we did. The system feels broken, and Donald Trump’s agenda is only making it worse. I can’t accept that — and as governor, I won’t.
**But the fact is, New Jersey is now a battleground state, and Trump is _already_ campaigning for my opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, a career politician who has promised to pass an abortion ban, defund public schools, and bring DOGE to New Jersey. So, truthfully, we won’t win this race unless we have a strong grassroots team behind us right from the start.**
[**If you’re with me in this fight, I would be incredibly grateful if you could become a Founding Donor to our general election campaign by splitting a donation between my campaign and Sarah McBride today →**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250611-1?refcode=em20250611-2093&refcode2=2093_21716_6S6xyR&akid=2093%2E21716%2E6S6xyR)
**[Donate $25 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250611-1?amount=25&refcode=em20250611-2093&refcode2=2093_21716_6S6xyR&akid=2093%2E21716%2E6S6xyR)**
Thank you so much for your support,
Mikie
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20250611-1&t=1&refcode2=2093_21716_6S6xyR&akid=2093%2E21716%2E6S6xyR)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=2&akid=2093%2E21716%2E6S6xyR)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=3&akid=2093%2E21716%2E6S6xyR)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=2093%2E21716%2E6S6xyR)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

[](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=27ashpt4bcn59holyhs74w4enrlt4vtv6xk08gzxu7ixldxbxw2w3h8t2rjsakxb9fjhkc8tj2ss565s02iodg0htvm2t7tesclidlu2i8mkpl7bf5eu9rv7n1mx63d7visedv7kblr7u0zsn3ggog624cythma3m2x6l6iusjp0o63q1dkb1ij5e79gnhtkgem5uutzbkndmedonrh2pvqch3ae5i4suxo0ip1npoqd88do2qrqkvqdgk59&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxp3yq&__onlt=h) | **[America's Worst Nightmare](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=27ashpt4bcn59holyhs74w4enrlt4vtv6y7fhdl5qty6nhwf728i31u0mqgqv7kjgst922eq04d2fndvp983g823yd5rygggxvball6jcfrdcpq7mog52rgrz3mxqj38j214lj6v1hogpvvixr3a2nsytvmz5ircmbzy74dkyqcwol66g3no3lk3ndrusva58yb4cpmnbrjcp7s3k2lavj8kkvbdwklxpmyi80rakx3wmszzb4tes6j6eyxc&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxp3yq&__onlt=h)**
Who will pay the price for Washington's $37 trillion debt spiral? Tensions between President Trump and Jerome Powell's Fed are escalating. Are we on the brink of a modern-day **Debt Jubilee?** [**Read More**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=27ashpt4bcn59holyhs74w4enrlt4vtv6ytzubmbmdnczlviewr827dvupdopto6r30y5rom371bttpycrvgiy3ndl0eeu7icort7khexqwx2dwadvhdhs5zl5mxzcrmm7xt8n53pdmt92sohcotded6gnkesu7pnoc1r2zqdi44pe8lyqzl62l0hnx6x7gnyt43k82lajvbry4hwc4mcn371lcd01gc7ljdvzg2vfepoavlngw5jgrxcn10&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxp3yq&__onlt=h)
* * *
**[When the U.S. Gets a Downgrade,
No One Is Safe.](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=rcxll3fful39u70pqzz6ar61ppa9emwar5hq00g9plpm8b36e2tmthdzrq4az1icxjc2yqodiurcs3u1xzwe8iimqi2ykfclh9emn3p98tscza2vzwrixsu17qm6dmmiswkpgqn15k0ec1wbwzdog9rw5hdshi2yzu0kolz7ahz1i4pdsq2uvvxn7q0clkcw9k6z6k0o2l18hbz1ekxspgq7zx6nxtrj05vs2gr8alzbb6l6uo6ok79gzafba&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxp3yq&__onlt=h)** America's credit rating was just cut again - this time from a AAA to AA+. And it wasn't just Uncle Sam. Moody's has now downgraded **10 regional banks** and issued negative outlooks for even more. This isn't about "Wall Street noise." This is about the **foundation of your wealth, cost of your money, the stability of your bank, and the future of your retirement savings.** Here's what a downgrade actually means:
* ❌ Higher interest on U.S. debt
* ❌ More pressure on the dollar
* ❌ Greater strain on banks already exposed to risky bonds
* ❌ Lower confidence in America's financial system

And when confidence drops... **so do markets.** So ask yourself: Are you really comfortable having your nest egg - your 401(k), IRA, or savings - tied to paper assets that depend on the government's ability to pay its bills? **[That's why banks and more Americans are taking steps to hedge their retirement with real, physical gold and silver.](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=rcxll3fful39u70pqzz6ar61ppa9emwar7f8d1eqhsr2gfoeolcna0ns42qjm8uhwxldc7y82mdnzhr5vowobib0o01aulhh1plylj60xlclneizjgvudcbit4u8tkiu64v0g1wfct3lq7ltplc43sqaihz6vmh6o226xsugvh7s9h5a5cequp3jctp2x6ytaqt5yf06zo9u8g369l2m38f5835nsbfnutscfafto1s4ol517jv8hcseh6zt5&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxp3yq&__onlt=h)** Not ETFs. Not gold stocks. Not promises. **Real metals. Stored securely. Held in your name.** **It's about control in an out-of-control system.** [**Download your FREE 2025 Gold and Silver Protection Guide and discover how to:**](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=rcxll3fful39u70pqzz6ar61ppa9emwar9d3u2cwojshsjypjilog4h8ecb5jr50vm9sg0ha832ihzo9t1vj6itc940c360c7u6lackdlu17ljce84z4k0jdcgcm8zu3ha3zfagyn0762qq97nahozpfzhui6bzc0y3qfjqtqgdgzxjwh3umt6yw9wbq6qur2gda2a017btdxkvmclv3ez82ex4nnk6c0fq1wv7bl38v0dmhjui4f9zd2at98&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxp3yq&__onlt=h)
* ✅ Legally move funds from your IRA or 401(k) into physical metals
* ✅ Hedge against inflation, rate hikes, and market volatility
* ✅ Regain control of your retirement

**Claim My Free Protection Guide** _No Cost or Obligation!_ [](http://trk.thedcbugle.com/?xtl=rcxll3fful39u70pqzz6ar61ppa9emwarnak93abgqua31hlug8q09r1tqlqwxd5tkv5jg54phqu3r9pqcvtzims67ldzo5xpyqopwdvp0nsa2wiuqcd4n5z0wknlo3bx7amfo4qhvmocwf10zzyxgokqhqxg4s9b64z2qm49go91obtws86s056ea1bdyqotn26uulhe2c0l2lr7llju1z0p33n76w4v5nonpxky50javscz490cegbm6n1v&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=sxp3yq&__onlt=h)

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z69mdhslmnt9ecgcv0f7f5sbrg4o3l9fmvbrc0hg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdhm6or4cjh2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv4fh3lakgmafsp1ei403v9cghm8pldtbbgspr18_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdhm6or4cjh2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zokdhqcacabl0ginhiqk6nvh3k4qoo9n144885jg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdhm6or4cjh2bs)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zikj2vuvt0qfhft9bb268ri08l0cog8k8v5a0180_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdhm6or4cjh2bs)
What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z75l4hdsvkjn74q1nv6543sdfrifodfnjn54o2uo_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdhm6or4cjh2bs)

subject: My take on what the polls tell us

body:
Peter, in the span of one day, two outlets released polls of the Virginia Governor's race.
The first had me running way ahead of my opponent. _The second had us neck-and-neck._
Now, what these polls tell us is that there are a lot of undecided voters out there, and the campaign that's able to raise the money necessary to reach these folks will win. We just launched our first TV and digital ads, and your support will help us keep those ads running.
_So, I'm asking you directly, Peter:_

name: hear.com
subject: Hearing aids just got their biggest upgrade...
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zu92nk1jf3gaqak8b4gm7e683e456haaqo1fll48_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdhmepb1chh2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ztpq363tdctd4rp9s445ipqdv2gsgcutghs6u468_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdhmepb1chh2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's [hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zrflqdq5dvn92tu09oa0r7ssagffcjihahmc8f48_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdhmepb1chh2bs) **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **[hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpjhp56i5ufgs8kceeqnmf5bnaam5kqp5jf5blhg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdhmepb1chh2bs) IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zvan4cquvj8cpr79hlc74vbisilii2blq0h7e16o_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdhmepb1chh2bs)
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zdt9qlt2krn6rq14sit37ibhmvvin9jvhja7lp6g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdhmepb1chh2bs)
What makes [hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zafqend5v91tc9lhbr8p2soi7aca0fqk14fe3m3g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdhmepb1chh2bs) IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that [hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z0cghqt6pd7qd0s41mis7ah9ma232ppfq66lmkg0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdhmepb1chh2bs) IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains [hear.com's](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z36i5mdq32g2juit30lc8igocoiot2kg5gp14pug_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdhmepb1chh2bs) founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ze6n3jc8a1nh2oo7re8h1nek8d1368b7m3snmps0_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdhmepb1chh2bs)

Pop Acta Media | Your America
---
_PO Box 461 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zq7u7mrtahdo2tpsu4ldn5kmgsrejf49hjtmndkg_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjkjrrasjk6mqj4t5m6gpq7d9neprqastmelp3cthieip3adt7skqu2c3neior3d5medjm05plmgqb3ct66uqr695lshgmaor4cpi648d245p25oh4ctgm9or3ctim2p324no)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6m189ldmfoktvt6l19pscqn9p0n70ces62cdqhg_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdhmepb1chh2bs)_

[](http://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zpkseou11a4r58u0rhvds2ijupb8srgp5okm2v7g_rp22sh2s8i6eob4sdhmepb1chh238h5e8he49h666qbcdli6uon49fg)

subject: 5 bills you must know about
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Florida Freedom Fund
body:
These are a few of the important pieces of legislation that Governor DeSantis signed into law. | | | [](http://links.freedom.rondesantis.com/s/c/rCdKlE2EeZP_ltLkARHt8mhFZhym6gOTmN1x_46P6csDJGkgWJPfLy-rSk2U8-fNGMR8WCNpN6KQ_D7u4_QbjQDwQSPVjLKcyKTiMcGEz2X9shXmYFnbofBxAdesJKsC2zxMnjiQdTK4ZAZRplT422Nh1650PL3T8wWdmW7iC7wgmz2o3m42cgiW3u-yVveCxwD-VZzXSmVA11wrSSwoDSCvo7kdHCvpZgDNyxhKS82TDQEyrLpyp7-mEz9_pvqYzubIlu9aJ1iKvyOKcEMKYto90Rhwh-7C4nrOBXll7OeMDv-9kdkMi5TSLFTCjIl5lNfeivlRBJbAmxCTLmCwh939W7szZavopvUQImYq1o8b5SSY24FImOATCFpDYe87ZgSG86KJqReW_rDtzbSA64729SAyWz1LQGY2efUkJbCFAmy_Grsy9uVbGcuimNzscw7WlMZQQWfMNmy2g1qRA_vkon9bk8CMRhTHICSdMHe9Mij5Ds5LkUL_DCQ3rGx38kq6AAWosuyV1g7JMXHVEm0CMgF_tRqHo_tQG4U-_HIgAcjkp3Xb3yDiyYjpVLW3PplsPhzk4BZ2kzn1OfR9AJknYfG2C20VnJ9lWeV_e1XtHlzLCCvU8kAzDADydxu5YrO_U4DLrQ/XOiUdGdIqTatwoPsNTTgZi6JQNj9FB2B/9)
---
Friend, Republican legislators are busy, working to deliver on their promises to protect our conservative values. We’re excited to say Governor DeSantis signed a number of bills into law. Here are just a few we wanted to highlight for you:
---
**Protecting Our Firefighters**
---
|
---
* HB 929 - Expands the Florida Firefighters Occupational Safety and Health Act to include occupational diseases and suicide prevention.

---
**Honoring Our Veterans**
---
|
---
* HB 797 - Removes bureaucratic obstacles to streamline access to long-term care for veterans and their spouses.

* HB 116 - Expands suicide prevention programs to include preventative measures, not just emergency intervention.

* SB 910 - Cracks down on predators trying to take advantage of the veterans’ benefits process by banning referral kickbacks and requiring background checks for those offering paid benefits.

---
**Standing With Property Owners**
---
|
---
* SB 322 - Expedites the removal of squatters occupying commercial properties.

---
-Florida Freedom Fund
---
| | |
---
| |
---

name: Forward Party
subject: Fast Forward - Expenditure Decrease Follow Up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
It was a big week at Forward - here's what you missed.

| | [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=JgyyvCfQwldlSeD7KJl_Ih7269o_4hwqOhPs1_PHvgI&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_68&n=1)
---
Wednesday, June 11, 2025 | Peter -- When the Big, Beautiful Bill passed the House and we asked about your thoughts on tackling the national debt, most responses highlighted the need to both increase revenue and decrease spending, with the primary debate being _how much_ to focus on each area. So we dug in, asking you last week about where you think we should look to increase revenue. This week, we asked about where to cut spending. We had our best response rate yet, with more than 3,000 of you voting in this week's poll! A substantial plurality of you think that cutting military and defense spending is the best way to reduce our national debt. The U.S. spends more on our defense program than any other country; in fact, more than the next 20 countries combined. Further, we contribute more to our NATO defense commitment than any other partner. Our military budget makes up nearly 15% of our yearly spending. Interestingly, reducing government overhead and operating costs, and reducing entitlement spending were tied, each with a quarter of the votes. Arguments of a specific implementation aside, it seems as if the _goals_ of DOGE are something that a good percentage of you believe in. And while reductions to Social Security, Medicare/Medicaid, and SNAP programs are politically and financially difficult because of the nature of those programs, many Forwardists see that as necessary towards long-term fiscal health. We'll be digging into that one in a future poll to get more specific! To summarize the comments: **Subsidy & Corporate Tax Break Reform**
* While reducing subsidies to businesses was the least selected option, those who selected it were among the most vocal. Many called for a change to what some of you referred to as our "corporate entitlement program." You stated that giving tax breaks to oil and real estate organizations (the most commonly named) was unnecessary and wasting our money.

**Defense Downsizing**
* Many of you called for the downsizing of naval fleets, reduction of redundancy in equipment, and more efficient investing in drone technology.

**Entitlement Reform**
* Some of you called for a reform to Social Security, claiming that it was poorly managed and costing taxpayers money.
* Others worried about fraud in the system costing taxpayer dollars.
* As noted, we'll follow up on this one to see which reforms to these systems are most popular with Forwardists.

**[FWD CEO Lindsey Williams Drath Joins Chuck Todd on The Toddcast](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEouH4SjeZmYtvTWulgNFAfbVxsFlevpWCYVQEYWPLV5F&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_68&n=2)** | **The Chuck Toddcast** Lindsey joins Chuck Todd to discuss all things Forward in an hour-long call about the Party. They talk about what it means to be Forward and how the party will grow in the coming years. **[Andrew Yang Talks AI and Jobs on CNN](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_BNtuvNT9V_JqWn2w6nll_RG4hprnLLmetm2WHRpCYDdlNRCLOur2VGJtQqH0d_c&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_68&n=3)** | **CNN** Over 2 million young people are graduating college last month and this month and AI is replacing a huge portion of the job market that they traditionally would have stepped into - banks need fewer analysts, law firms need fewer associates, and news orgs need fewer researchers.
**June 12 | Civic Engagement With The Young Forwardists
** Join the Young Forwardists team at 7:00 PM EST/4:00 PM PST for an exclusive Civic Engagement opportunity! As our political divisions continue to grow, it's up to every student at every high school and college to lead the charge toward change, starting with local ordinance and political engagement!. **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/civic_engagement_20250612?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_68&n=4)** **June 17 | National Volunteer Call
** Meet up with NOVA Forwardists for food, drinks, & conversation at a fun location in Fairfax County. Bring your questions, ambitions, and thirst! Why not grab a few friends to come with you, too? **[Register →](https://home.forwardparty.com/nova_fwd_social_20250617?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_68&n=5)**
**[Lindsey Williams Drath Joins MSNBC To Discuss Musk's "Kill The Bill" Push](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_BNtuvNT9V_JqWn2w6nllxRaRhqOn9y7EcyCPG8qT9ZmogHHFlJD1RyW4IMrab5-&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_68&n=6)** | **MSNBC** **[Lindsey Williams Drath Joins News Nation To Talk Blue Collar Jobs](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_BNtuvNT9V_JqWn2w6nllxsZG4hH5Y6aPjykVocaqwxrPPtDQvDHeohaGi-YwLl2&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_68&n=7) | NewsNation**
[ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HN-VuZ6-MtyTZDOwpLeQohBI2w5n1fstLPCAOB1eS8pn49pgKy1KM2eEYboZkJaE&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_68&n=8) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=HR9MoATtHgNjF_4kmlo5pN8R4zJ-fGDLgTAMST8PY6mgKwzOK4bTDEpy9KU5BOzg&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_68&n=9) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=C67zBN9acu3ZSVmLPV47peHvpkNPm4HcBUGM4-0XJTPgmEVLc_dN12xbGWLIkZIR&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_68&n=10) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=KO8ZOB0mq2gq63DvFrKfe08uhOv-byHfKpIIFrTtOpPikh4D0waR8pVrn6wFcdzO&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_68&n=11) [ ](https://home.forwardparty.com/r?u=_KeSraPW0gSlxEBMOvJrEuogCR1FcLzdL_LSGKjfikF5BT1dZn3HN2gM4OEGEI0z&e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_68&n=12) Copyright © 2025 Forward Party, all rights reserved. Our mailing address is:
1701 Rhode Island Ave NW, Washington, DC 20036, United States Paid for by Forward Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

[Unsubscribe](https://home.forwardparty.com/unsubscribe?e=61868e7acdd36ae0ddf3e39aa8429171&utm_source=forwardparty&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=fast_forward_68&n=13)

name: Rob Bonta
subject: Fwd: Update on our lawsuit re: Trump deploying military to Los Angeles
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642
body:
President Trump has doubled down on his unlawful and unprecedented military escalation in California.
# [](https://act.robbonta.com/go/3?refcode=em20250611&t=1&akid=1824%2E1088799%2E-bvynq)
I have an urgent update for you on the situation in Los Angeles.
On Monday, Governor Newsom and I announced a lawsuit against President Trump and Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth for unlawfully deploying 2,000 California National Guard Troops without the Governor’s consent or authorization.
After our announcement, the President doubled down, deploying 2,000 more troops and deploying an additional 700 U.S. Marines — _an extremely rare move by a U.S. president._
**Yesterday, I filed a temporary restraining order in court to stop Trump and Hegseth from using military and federalized National Guard to patrol our communities.**
**[We need to remain steadfast in our fight for state sovereignty and against this administration’s unlawful actions. If I have your support, can you rush a contribution of $5 or more to power our campaign?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250611?refcode=em20250611-1824&amount=5&refcode2=1824_1088799_-bvynq&akid=1824%2E1088799%2E-bvynq)**
More updates soon when I have them. Thanks for standing with me.
— Rob
\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: Rob Bonta [info@e.robbonta.com]
Date: Mon, Jun 9, 2025 at 7:37 PM
Subject: An abuse of authority
To: [dpwillis67@gmail.com]
Last weekend, President Trump and Department of Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth federalized 2,000 California National Guard troops without authorization from Governor Newsom and against the wishes of local law enforcement.
**This move was unnecessary, unprecedented, and unlawful — so the Governor and I are suing to stop it.[If you have our back, chip in now →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250611?refcode=em20250611-1824&amount=5&refcode2=1824_1088799_-bvynq&akid=1824%2E1088799%2E-bvynq)**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250611?refcode=em20250611-1824&amount=5&refcode2=1824_1088799_-bvynq&akid=1824%2E1088799%2E-bvynq)
Let me be clear: _There is no invasion or rebellion in Los Angeles or the state of California._ The President is trying to manufacture chaos and crisis on the ground for his own political ends.
Calling in these troops to respond to protests is not only **counterproductive** but also deeply unfair to the members of the National Guard who are hard at work every day protecting our state, preparing for and responding to natural disasters, and training so that, if called, they can fight our nation’s wars.
**We don’t take the President’s abuse of power and violation of California’s sovereignty lightly.** We’re asking a court to put a stop to this unlawful, unprecedented order.
**[If you’re with us in this fight, please consider chipping in $5 or more to support our people-powered campaign as I focus on holding the President accountable to the law.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250611?refcode=em20250611-1824&amount=5&refcode2=1824_1088799_-bvynq&akid=1824%2E1088799%2E-bvynq)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-20250611?refcode=em20250611-1824&amount=5&refcode2=1824_1088799_-bvynq&akid=1824%2E1088799%2E-bvynq)**
To anyone outraged with this administration who feels moved to stand up and speak out, I urge you to do so peacefully, safely, and lawfully. We will get through this together.
Thank you,
Rob
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb-email-wrapper?refcode=em20250611&t=2&refcode2=1824_1088799_-bvynq&akid=1824%2E1088799%2E-bvynq)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=1824%2E1088799%2E-bvynq)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.robbonta.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.robbonta.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=1824%2E1088799%2E-bvynq)

To give by check:
Rob Bonta for Attorney General 2026
c/o Deane & Company
1700 Tribute Road, Suite 201
Sacramento, CA 95815
Email us: [info@robbonta.com](mailto:info@robbonta.com)
PAID FOR BY ROB BONTA FOR CALIFORNIA ATTORNEY GENERAL 2026 FPPC ID #145642

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: It’s official: we just won the Democratic primary in New Jersey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Governor
body:
The general election begins now.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109385158/550924577/18178104?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-06-11_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjA5NmVkYzYtZDQ0Ni1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5APWmaP4EoAuguv6JvGRehMoF42JumKp3dgQeWpBeqw=)
---
Peter, I am so honored to be the official Democratic nominee for governor here in New Jersey. Thank you to everyone who played a part in this victory. I wouldn’t be here without this incredible grassroots team who chipped in, volunteered, and voted.

And we can’t stop now.

We know what we are up against. The general election has begun — and if recent history is any indication, it’s going to be an expensive, hard-fought race decided by a razor-thin margin. [_**Will you help us get off to a strong start against Trump’s handpicked Republican nominee by splitting $25 between my campaign and Abigail Spanberger today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109385159/550924578/18178104?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-06-11_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjA5NmVkYzYtZDQ0Ni1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5APWmaP4EoAuguv6JvGRehMoF42JumKp3dgQeWpBeqw=)

Peter, I was raised to believe that we have an obligation to our community and our country.

It’s why I took my first oath to the Constitution as a teenager when I entered the Naval Academy.

It’s why I spent nearly a decade in the Navy as a helicopter pilot and Russian policy officer.

It’s why I went to law school, and became an outreach and reentry coordinator and a federal prosecutor.

It’s why I first ran for office — flipping a Republican-held congressional seat here in New Jersey that no one thought we could win at the time.

And it’s why, Peter, I’m running to serve as our next governor. It’s too hard to get ahead in New Jersey, and too often, our kids have fewer opportunities than we did. The system feels broken, and Donald Trump’s agenda is only making it worse. I can’t accept that — and as governor, I won’t.

**But the fact is, New Jersey is now a battleground state, and Trump is _already_ campaigning for my opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, a career politician who has promised to pass an abortion ban, defund public schools, and bring DOGE to New Jersey. So, truthfully, we won’t win this race unless we have a strong grassroots team behind us right from the start.**

[_**Peter, if you’re with me in this fight, I would be incredibly grateful if you could become a Founding Donor to our general election campaign by splitting a donation between my campaign and Abigail Spanberger today →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109385161/550924607/18178104?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-06-11_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjA5NmVkYzYtZDQ0Ni1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5APWmaP4EoAuguv6JvGRehMoF42JumKp3dgQeWpBeqw=)

clean_body: The general election begins now. | = Peter, I am so honored to be the official Democratic nominee for governor here in New Jersey. Thank you to everyone who played a part in this victory. I wouldn’t be here without this incredible grassroots team who chipped in, volunteered, and voted. And we can’t stop now. We know what we are up against. The general election has begun — and if recent history is any indication, it’s going to be an expensive, hard-fought race decided by a razor-thin margin. = | = Peter, I was raised to believe that we have an obligation to our community and our country. It’s why I took my first oath to the Constitution as a teenager when I entered the Naval Academy. It’s why I spent nearly a decade in the Navy as a helicopter pilot and Russian policy officer. It’s why I went to law school, and became an outreach and reentry coordinator and a federal prosecutor. It’s why I first ran for office — flipping a Republican-held congressional seat here in New Jersey that no one thought we could win at the time. And it’s why, Peter, I’m running to serve as our next governor. It’s too hard to get ahead in New Jersey, and too often, our kids have fewer opportunities than we did. The system feels broken, and Donald Trump’s agenda is only making it worse. I can’t accept that — and as governor, I won’t. But the fact is, New Jersey is now a battleground state, and Trump is already campaigning for my opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, a career politician who has promised to pass an abortion ban, defund public schools, and bring DOGE to New Jersey. So, truthfully, we won’t win this race unless we have a strong grassroots team behind us right from the start. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you so much for your support, Mikie Use of the photograph in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. * | | Paid for by Spanberger for Governor Spanberger for Governor P.O. | Dear friends, This is Rusty Hicks, California Democratic Party Chair and a proud Navy veteran. What we are seeing in Los Angeles is purposeful provocation by the Trump Administration. Donald Trump has classified peaceful protest as a rebellion. Federalized the national guard over the objection of the governor, and even called for the arrest of that governor. And the latest is to authorize the deployment of active duty military personnel to city streets. **Another sad day. Another line crossed. Another abuse of power.** We’ve got to remember what this is about. This is about control. This about control of institutions and control of communities and a complete betrayal of our American values and our Constitution. Like many of you, I was proud to wear the uniform. Voter Action Project [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=/dKQhDeGMB47zaOqyBLmKSMVRi4O/RKXx1oIg52TUL92trSo0e4jAjO6ub88nWOR02SVlN1cKyPlunwLQOmVciXz87BXCkeo7/OHKmhbhUE=]
AP: Georgia Supreme Court overturns some election rules, curbing State Election Board’s power [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=25.00&contactdata=/dKQhDeGMB47zaOqyBLmKSMVRi4O/RKXx1oIg52TUL92trSo0e4jAjO6ub88nWOR02SVlN1cKyPlunwLQOmVciXz87BXCkeo7/OHKmhbhUE=]
A great update from Georgia, everyone: Georgia’s highest court overturned four rules passed by the State Election Board just before last year’s general election, ruling the board overstepped its authority and intruded on lawmaking power reserved for legislators under the state constitution.
To refresh your memory: The State Election Board passed a slate of controversial new rules in August and September, including requirements that ballots be hand-counted after the close of polls, that someone delivering an absentee ballot in person provide a signature and photo ID, that county election board members be allowed to conduct a “ reasonable inquiry ” before certifying results, and that county election board members be granted broad access to election-related documents.
These new rules brought an outcry that the board’s majority was trying to improperly use its power to help MAGA candidates and follow disproved conspiracy theories about our elections.
The state Supreme Court’s unanimous decision to overturn these highly partisan, suppressive rules limits the ability of the State Election Board and other executive branch agencies of Georgia’s government to try and put their fingers on the scales and tip elections their way.
We know this isn't the end of voter suppression in Georgia, Team. Chip in $25 or whatever you can today to provide the resources we need to defend our right to vote in the states like Georgia, in the courts, and beyond >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/pdjfDAEu4UCpXPQPEnrW-A2]
If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately:

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=25.00&contactdata=/dKQhDeGMB47zaOqyBLmKSMVRi4O/RKXx1oIg52TUL92trSo0e4jAjO6ub88nWOR02SVlN1cKyPlunwLQOmVciXz87BXCkeo7/OHKmhbhUE=]

To refresh your memory: The State Election Board passed a slate of controversial new rules in August and September, including requirements that ballots be hand-counted after the close of polls, that someone delivering an absentee ballot in person provide a signature and photo ID, that county election board members be allowed to conduct a “ reasonable inquiry ” before certifying results, and that county election board members be granted broad access to election-related documents. These new rules brought an outcry that the board’s majority was trying to improperly use its power to help MAGA candidates and follow disproved conspiracy theories about our elections. The state Supreme Court’s unanimous decision to overturn these highly partisan, suppressive rules limits the ability of the State Election Board and other executive branch agencies of Georgia’s government to try and put their fingers on the scales and tip elections their way. We know this isn't the end of voter suppression in Georgia, Team. Chip in $25 or whatever you can today to provide the resources we need to defend our right to vote in the states like Georgia, in the courts, and beyond >> [] If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [=] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [=] OTHER AMOUNT [=] = [=] [] [] [] [] Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [=] Donate Now [=] Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I’m often asked this one question:

body:
Was it worth it? For the TRUTH - you bet!
| [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ac578807353340e0ba0e744f8632874a&_e=38EO92iCUXus7eB5OS2AC83MCNr5CR-ztZkXigRtNEQpIhRsxBfwGAZn2G-Vlhc4AslUDqxgdk9BKRpORdlVHuYIbrpWKuBXiWVf_gnHp0Rlef07ht-JQm5PAFoNdkLNLvHT0TBsm8DhBSEGp1B9TUTVFFThXq3olZNe6cP0-sobe9cgoXkwFfmVEU7QGdaHhi6mGSK8V7mhNLRHSFMokWYAJX7E4DidgUq4dfIbqPMA95JC_lp0vvd_INo8lZvhWHEkJWidPgRuAX4-k6bAKF7Pwt3jfYEnn3S9gKiRecWbeC9tg3kqSNsJ3toEr91WiOWrfak1vk2v_L3aU7DiNC3yz5F2Od1T7PQRTBrrjz1b5dtYUDZ1FXtbqgKk1esO)
---
Peter,
---
Over the course of the last two years, many friends and kind souls have asked me if it was worth it.
---
Was it worth it to be relentlessly targeted by the Democrats’ Deep State all because I defended our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump – from unimaginable and vicious witch hunts and refused to disavow the truth?
---
These rabid leftists have labeled me a “ _DEAD_ _MAN_ _WALKING_ ,” RAIDED my home, ARRESTED me, took a MUGSHOT of me, forced me into BANKRUPTCY, and even now, are _still_ attempting to throw me in PRISON for the rest of my life, but the _TRUTH_ remains...
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ac578807353340e0ba0e744f8632874a&_e=38EO92iCUXus7eB5OS2AC83MCNr5CR-ztZkXigRtNEQpIhRsxBfwGAZn2G-Vlhc4AslUDqxgdk9BKRpORdlVHuYIbrpWKuBXiWVf_gnHp0Rlef07ht-JQm5PAFoNdkLNLvHT0TBsm8DhBSEGp1B9TUTVFFThXq3olZNe6cP0-sobe9cgoXkwFfmVEU7QGdaHhi6mGSK8V7mhNLRHSFMokaS6KzdfpiBBtc7kXP_UQ-ulH3ULxTCdi6ENtBXyPDj4tJAevFc8XjXJaoCQbuEGh062g_qOGu5RIrIUbyS1XaaxJlb9KTUN2nN61X-aMAZP_75aNJuwhddk9p96s_SpiE8IaN5SJMCPDaGtKvsUqJo7AH2GaPgqZLcYiR62lYAH)
__
---
...Being an _enemy_ of the Deep State like President Trump is not something to fear, _it’s a badge of honor – a sign that you were willing to take the arrows for what you know is RIGHT!_
---
**_So yes, Peter. For the truth, liberty, and justice – you bet it was worth it._**
---
When I look back at the past few years and all that the Radical Democrats and the Biden-Harris _regime_ did to try and make an example out of me, I have ZERO REGRETS.
---
My resolve _NEVER_ wavered, and that’s all thanks to you!
---
_Every step of the way I’ve fought with every fiber of my being – supported by generous patriots like _YOU_._
---
**But there is one thing I must confess: through every sham indictment, false arrest, and bogus charge where I’ve had to defend my innocence and good name, I’ve been saddled with enormous legal bills, unimaginable costs, and debts.**
---
And if we’re being honest with each other, it’s a cost I simply cannot bear on my own.
---
Make no mistake, this was the vindictive Democrats’ plan all along...
---
_This latest sham criminal case in Arizona – where if the Democrat Attorney General gets her way, I could take my last breath in prison – is designed to bleed me dry._
---
**That’s why I now have no choice but to set a goal to raise $100,000 this month for my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – so that I can continue fighting to remain a _FREE_ man.**
---
I hate reaching out like this, and this is difficult for me to say, but right now, my fate is truly in _your_ hands.
---
[**Please make a grassroots contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me raise the $100,000 I need to cover the costs to continue fighting for my freedom and justice as the Democrats try to JAIL me for LIFE as an innocent man.**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=ac578807353340e0ba0e744f8632874a&_e=38EO92iCUXus7eB5OS2AC83MCNr5CR-ztZkXigRtNEQpIhRsxBfwGAZn2G-Vlhc4AslUDqxgdk9BKRpORdlVHuYIbrpWKuBXiWVf_gnHp0Rlef07ht-JQm5PAFoNdkLNLvHT0TBsm8DhBSEGp1B9TUTVFFThXq3olZNe6cP0-sobe9cgoXkwFfmVEU7QGdaHhi6mGSK8V7mhNLRHSFMokeAKeQ1jmfe3ci5cIXKr7sfbaz5_ijETPdNAJoFsDycYS0wawSxQT4DM2wslX665oAfz_pIpicPjcMNt4ttyDE2jGvSnppTob5WXJkYu0oCwoMYruAvcgcCzm1C-IMz9IHqLCXDWg58DWx78vPIDmSBatKlV5Vi4WUgpclJa-d3B)

body:
Parents and educators, you're invited to the Educators' Summit 2025 in Tampa, Florida. Join us in restoring virtue and biblical truth in education. This summit equips education leaders to shape the future with courage and clarity.
| [ ](https://d1K2-504.na1.hubspotlinks.com/Ctc/DN+113/d1K2-504/VXg8zr78thlRN68YwFVDP-zZW4sKGqD5xHWkVN1MKF-T3qn9gW7Y8-PT6lZ3l6W1C2hCC4YbGJ1W1YGpN568-2l-W8tvWlP1q-0nTVP8-xD2wK2QwW6WDF226t-rbCW3HRkgK3Gqz9QW7rZTJh3ZlbjNW5WMM1r5mWkMXW7w4vT_9jXf79W7-G5M138t6qTW3lyyY32v4JRgW4MVzK759Vkl_W2JXMH22VxHHjW4xtN0N2Cn81WW5gY2Hm5BpstQW6lv9R95wTlZcW2tGZDX3QSDK4W1fK7hS6CRYWHN1KxqTTstCf9W63kHdz6p72r9W4hRT6N7_f4DWW2N5TlY80j9XvW182cfP3dkRYSW7v_6Hm8-fBhPW7DZxJj2BGD9ZW2zwYrb7n81NJf9kY1Md04)

Dear Peter, With truth under constant attack and secularism working to redefine what is moral and real, discipleship through education has never been more urgent. As an education advocate, you have the unique privilege of discipling and shaping the whole student for God’s Kingdom: mind, heart, and soul. Turning Point Academy’s Educators’ Summit is where pastors, ministry leaders, and Christian educators deepen their calling, take their discipleship to the next level, and reclaim education with a biblical worldview.
---
---
You’ll hear from speakers who firmly believe that God is still the sole arbiter of truth, including Pastor John Amanchukwu, Christopher Perrin, Riley Gaines, and more! Join us at the Educators’ Summit to reclaim, revive, and restore virtuous education focused on truth, goodness, and beauty again.
---

clean_body: Parents and educators, you're invited to the Educators' Summit 2025 in Tampa, Florida. Join us in restoring virtue and biblical truth in education. This summit equips education leaders to shape the future with courage and clarity. | Dear Peter, With truth under constant attack and secularism working to redefine what is moral and real, discipleship through education has never been more urgent. As an education advocate, you have the unique privilege of discipling and shaping the whole student for God’s Kingdom: mind, heart, and soul. Turning Point Academy’s Educators’ Summit is where pastors, ministry leaders, and Christian educators deepen their calling, take their discipleship to the next level, and reclaim education with a biblical worldview. You’ll hear from speakers who firmly believe that God is still the sole arbiter of truth, including Pastor John Amanchukwu, Christopher Perrin, Riley Gaines, and more! Join us at the Educators’ Summit to reclaim, revive, and restore virtuous education focused on truth, goodness, and beauty again. | Blessings, The Turning Point Academy Team | Turning Point USA, 4940 East Beverly Road, Phoenix, AZ 85044, United States of America, (844) 872-1776

body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109387021/550930223/41798106?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzg5NGFkZi1kNjQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KEgl9FscvH5Q0rGQX_MKIRbS9A_0W6CuQk9ptAt3hss=&emci=1228bd08-cb46-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=c3894adf-d646-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=26261389)

| | Over the past six months, we've been reminded of how much harm can be done when those in power choose chaos and corruption. Trump's presidency looks a lot like his "business model" – looking for what makes him money, not caring how he harms everyone else. The corruption in the administration runs deep, and the American people are paying the price. That's why the level of distrust in politics right now is so high, and in order to fix it, we can't just trim around the edges. People right now are hungry for something different – and we don't have to wait for it: **On June 28th, voters in Virginia will have the chance to elect Irene Shin – the candidate who I know brings a different kind of politics to the table – to Congress to represent Virginia's 11th District.** [**I'm asking you to join me in helping make sure that Irene Shin has the resources to win. Will you chip in $11 to her campaign today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109387022/550930224/6581572?refcode=2025-06-11-shinkim&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=c3894adf-d646-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzg5NGFkZi1kNjQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KEgl9FscvH5Q0rGQX_MKIRbS9A_0W6CuQk9ptAt3hss=) Irene Shin is the kind of leader that this moment demands: someone who refuses to accept "business as usual." **She's never shied away from a fight.** In the Virginia House of Delegates, she's spent four years taking on powerful special interests to deliver real results for Virginia families; battling the insurance industry to make pregnancy a qualifying life event so people can actually get health insurance when they need it most, and passing legislation to stop utility companies from cutting people's power during public health emergencies. That's why I know we can count on her to take on Donald Trump and the special interests bending our democracy to their will. We have a lot of work to do to seek real change, but I know that with leaders like Irene Shin fighting back, we can make an impact. [**If you're hungry for a different type of leadership, I hope you'll pitch in $11 or anything you can right now to Irene Shin's campaign >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109387023/550930225/6581572?refcode=2025-06-11-shinkim&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=c3894adf-d646-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMzg5NGFkZi1kNjQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KEgl9FscvH5Q0rGQX_MKIRbS9A_0W6CuQk9ptAt3hss=) Thank you for standing with me, _Andy Kim_ |

subject: A MAGA Baby Account with $1,000 for every newborn?

body:

There's a reason the Radical Left is up in arms about DOGE.

They'd rather spend **YOUR** tax dollars on transgender comic books in Peru, forcing unsuspecting Serbians into feminist sensitivity training, or on a drag rendition of Hamlet in Columbia.

name: GIFFORDS Action Team
subject: Join us in demanding that the Trump administration stop putting our communities at risk!
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
#

**Urgent Wednesday update for you.**
Donald Trump’s Department of Justice is working to make it easier for potentially dangerous people to regain their right to own guns. This is not what Americans need.
Let us explain.
There used to be a robust process to ensure that anyone who has their gun rights restored is not a danger to their communities. Sadly, the Trump administration removed this process, allowing dangerous criminals, including those convicted of domestic violence, to get their guns back — without any consideration of the danger for their communities or their victims.
This will put our communities in danger. Full stop. We are doing all we can to make sure Donald Trump hears our voices loud and clear, which is why we’re reaching out today:
**The public comment period for this rule ends on June 18th, and more than 11,000 people have already submitted their comments. We must continue putting pressure on the DOJ these final few days.**
[**By June 18th, please submit a comment to let the Trump administration know you oppose this action. We have suggested language for you to use below.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/62655?t=1&akid=10567%2E3935704%2EAXQuxl)
**[SUBMIT A COMMENT](https://go.giffords.org/go/62655?t=2&akid=10567%2E3935704%2EAXQuxl)**
Here is some suggested language for you to use:
_“I strongly oppose the Department of Justice’s rule that weakens the review process of firearm rights restoration applications. This rule opens the door for dangerous criminals, including those convicted of domestic violence and other crimes, to have access to guns, posing a threat to both their victims and communities across the country. This is putting families at unnecessary risk.”_
We will continue working to stand up against the Trump administration to protect our communities. Thank you for your support.
-- GIFFORDS
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-june25.m4W6Vr&refcode=em250611-1-b&t=3&akid=10567%2E3935704%2EAXQuxl)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=10567%2E3935704%2EAXQuxl) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Rep. LaMonica McIver
subject: I was just indicted for standing up to Trump
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-mciver [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-mciver]
Team—it’s LaMonica McIver. Last month, the Trump administration brought charges against me because I was doing my job as a member of Congress. Now, I’ve been officially indicted.
Let me be clear: under the law, members of Congress are explicitly authorized to conduct oversight at ICE facilities. I was there to do my job and make sure that this administration isn’t abusing people’s rights. And I was charged and now indicted. The administration’s attacks are baseless and the facts are on my side, but that’s not stopping them from going after me. So I need you on my side, today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-mciver]
These charges hold no factual merit. But there’s a reason they brought them: the Trump administration thinks they can intimidate me and scare me out of doing the job I was elected to do. They’re wrong.
I need your help to send an unmistakable message: Americans won’t stand for this.
Will you contribute a split donation between me and Sara Jacobs to stand against the Trump administration's unjust political intimidation? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-mciver]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-mciver?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-mciver?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-mciver?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-mciver]
We set a goal of 5,000 new grassroots donors to stand with us before our 11:59pm deadline TONIGHT.
If we stand together we can amass the resources to mount a legal defense against this baseless indictment and show the Trump administration that the people who oppose his cruel agenda won’t be intimidated into silence.
This is far bigger than one person. The rule of law is under attack, and what we do next matters.
Can we count on you to donate now and stand up against the Trump administration’s attacks on oversight, decency, and all who dare to speak up for what’s right? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sjj-em-mciver]
We’re in this together,
Rep. LaMonica McIver

name: Wes Moore
subject: I know about the impact of policy
body:
This is so important, Peter.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=160%2E1086043%2Eoc250Q)
Policy has a direct impact on people’s lives, Peter.
That’s what makes our work so important. And we’ve kept up a steady pace. Together, we are:
🏫 Making historic investments in public education and setting Maryland’s students up for success.
💰Delivering hundreds of millions in cost savings in the state's budget over the years to come.
🌊 Uplifting every sector of the economy that depends on the Chesapeake Bay, while modernizing our water protection programs and speeding up restoration.
🏢 Creating a dynamic economy, bringing jobs to Maryland, and supporting public servants who’ve been fired by the Trump administration.
**Peter, our successes aren’t measured in metrics, but in how we make people’s lives better.** Everything we’ve gotten done is thanks to the support of folks like you who believe in our mission.
**[If you’re with me and ready to help me keep fighting for Maryland, can you chip in $5 or anything you can to our reelection today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250611-1?refcode=em-20250611-1&refcode2=160_1086043_oc250Q&akid=160%2E1086043%2Eoc250Q)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250611-1?amount=5&refcode=em-20250611-1&refcode2=160_1086043_oc250Q&akid=160%2E1086043%2Eoc250Q)**
I appreciate everything you do, Peter.
Elevate,
Wes

Together, we are: 🏫 Making historic investments in public education and setting Maryland’s students up for success. 💰Delivering hundreds of millions in cost savings in the state's budget over the years to come. 🌊 Uplifting every sector of the economy that depends on the Chesapeake Bay, while modernizing our water protection programs and speeding up restoration. 🏢 Creating a dynamic economy, bringing jobs to Maryland, and supporting public servants who’ve been fired by the Trump administration. Peter, our successes aren’t measured in metrics, but in how we make people’s lives better. Everything we’ve gotten done is thanks to the support of folks like you who believe in our mission. I appreciate everything you do, Peter. Elevate, Wes

name: Tim Kaine
subject: We are in very, very dangerous territory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Friends,
I’m sure you’ve seen imagery and news updates out of California this week as President Trump and Secretary of Defense Pete Hegseth have activated thousands of National Guard members and 700 Marines in California in response to immigration protests.
We need to talk about this.
The President’s decision to deploy thousands of Guard members to quell protests in Los Angeles — without a request by the California Governor and in fact, over the objection of the California Governor — is nearly unprecedented.
We are in very, very dangerous territory. I am concerned about this, the American public is concerned about this, and we are right to be.
The ability to peacefully assemble and petition our government for redress of grievances is in the First Amendment to the Constitution — and it’s in there because the founders of this country believed that peaceful dissent made our democratic government better.
Now, many Americans are worried that if they express dissenting voices to policies of this Administration, the military could be deployed against them.
Here’s an important disharmony to consider:
We have a President who refused to deploy the National Guard to protect the Capitol on January 6th, despite repeated requests from the Mayor of DC and the head of the Capitol Police — because those protestors supported him.
And we have a President who has now deployed the National Guard (and Marines) in the absence of a request and over the objection of the Mayor of LA — because those protestors don’t support him.
The President is not a king and the military is not his palace guard. We can’t be disinterested bystanders while he acts as one.
So my message today to any concerned citizens, whether in California, here in Virginia, or anywhere in between, is this:
Fully inhabiting your First Amendment right to peaceably assemble is more important now than it has been at any point in my lifetime.
We need brave and patriotic citizens who are willing to, without fear, exercise rights that were guaranteed to them from the very first days of this country.
If you agree, I hope you’ll sign on today to stand strong. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/cskGpMVFkEGB9wX9zMvrow2]
Thank you for your commitment to democracy and to bettering this country through active participation, and for your time reading this message.
-Tim Kaine
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185
Emails like this one are a critical part of staying in touch during this important election year. We value your support, and are so glad to have you on the team. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/P5FfEbyeIEejNQSsVSzanQ2?unsubscribedata=BhIPmKf9yLNEbPHiUUm8vgHhd5us9ihKb9O8cWamnKC%2BHn%2BP76juypu3EJQagFIncG4l7Ea4myhDTxqgAk1Z4IcQHZDts96ooWSLnelVEwCyYBI5YF%2FvekuQEV7FpZ7guAmrmmufXtL9tqs%2BaV5ycAnAcPLXsl2MNZnH4bHZTOr1ZX21R2wZKeyJ2kK2kpR1FSluLBhsTi%2FbTq%2FP4PzwvCIjGQh6DC6KoSVmjIk2KEGqDbn9M1Fk8QruhnUL2vt02CvYjWybdkvWKBIwdODkVdWjSMwanFUqtpom69tJyaLA%2FAnBPC7BHWUUhpAzJ6k4C6ucbHc%2B8xgL45GCYYBCfbkNRII9bF1pGnWlRppaLQhKdnXnbQYw2Ow9PwN%2BmacNIF9w39qdsitac%2FUIJmZZHTGyofyuoxhZgZcm%2FjHgCRo%3D .

name: Keisha Lance Bottoms
subject: BIG NEWS: Are you with me?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
I wanted you to hear it from me first...
#
Hi Peter, this is Keisha Lance Bottoms.
I wanted you to hear it from me first:
**I’m running for governor of Georgia.**
As at least a fifth generation Georgian, I have dedicated over twenty years of my career to public service — and I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and get to work to deliver for our state.
**[I want to know that you’re with me — will you split a contribution between me and State Democrats Committee today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89555?refcode=em20250611-8997&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8997%2E614464%2ER6PIWs)**
**[DONATE →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89555?refcode=em20250611-8997&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8997%2E614464%2ER6PIWs)**
Peter, as mayor of Atlanta, I steered the city through some very difficult times, including the pandemic.
Under my leadership, we increased access to affordable housing, gave our first responders a _historic_ pay increase, took steps to put more money back into the hands of the hardworking people of Atlanta, and more.
But our fight is far from over. And these days, most Georgians are right to wonder: _Who is looking out for us?_
Donald Trump is a disaster for our economy and our country. From his failure to address rising prices to his giving an unelected billionaire the power to cut Medicare and Social Security, **it’s one terrible thing after another.**
**It’s time for a leader who has your back and who will fight back — that’s why I’m running.**
**[I’m running for governor because Georgia families deserve far more than what Donald Trump and Republicans are giving us. If you’re with me, become a founding donor of my campaign by splitting a contribution between me and State Democrats Committee today →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89555?refcode=em20250611-8997&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8997%2E614464%2ER6PIWs)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89556?refcode=em20250611-8997&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=4&akid=8997%2E614464%2ER6PIWs) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89556?refcode=em20250611-8997&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=5&akid=8997%2E614464%2ER6PIWs) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89556?refcode=em20250611-8997&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=8997%2E614464%2ER6PIWs) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89556?refcode=em20250611-8997&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=8997%2E614464%2ER6PIWs) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89556?refcode=em20250611-8997&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=8997%2E614464%2ER6PIWs) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89556?refcode=em20250611-8997&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=8997%2E614464%2ER6PIWs) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89555?refcode=em20250611-8997&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=8997%2E614464%2ER6PIWs)
---
As governor, I will make expanding Medicaid my top priority.
I’ll do more to protect those who protect us, just like I did as mayor when I gave first responders a historic raise.
I’ll work to eliminate state income taxes for teachers, focus on supporting small businesses, crack down on corporate landlords who are raising rent and housing costs, and invest in our children’s future.
**We need to look out for each other — and that’s the kind of governor I will be for Georgia.[Join me in the fights ahead by splitting a donation between me and State Democrats Committee.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89555?refcode=em20250611-8997&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=8997%2E614464%2ER6PIWs)**
Thank you, and let’s get to work!
— Keisha

But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_state-democrats-committee/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.statedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_state-democrats-committee/?t=13&akid=8997%2E614464%2ER6PIWs).
clean_body: I wanted you to hear it from me first... Hi Peter, this is Keisha Lance Bottoms. I wanted you to hear it from me first: I’m running for governor of Georgia. As at least a fifth generation Georgian, I have dedicated over twenty years of my career to public service — and I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and get to work to deliver for our state. Peter, as mayor of Atlanta, I steered the city through some very difficult times, including the pandemic. Under my leadership, we increased access to affordable housing, gave our first responders a historic pay increase, took steps to put more money back into the hands of the hardworking people of Atlanta, and more. But our fight is far from over. And these days, most Georgians are right to wonder: Who is looking out for us? Donald Trump is a disaster for our economy and our country. From his failure to address rising prices to his giving an unelected billionaire the power to cut Medicare and Social Security, it’s one terrible thing after another. It’s time for a leader who has your back and who will fight back — that’s why I’m running. If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: As governor, I will make expanding Medicaid my top priority. I’ll do more to protect those who protect us, just like I did as mayor when I gave first responders a historic raise. I’ll work to eliminate state income taxes for teachers, focus on supporting small businesses, crack down on corporate landlords who are raising rent and housing costs, and invest in our children’s future. We need to look out for each other — and that’s the kind of governor I will be for Georgia. Thank you, and let’s get to work! — Keisha Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.

Our democracy is under attack and Montanans are paying the price.

Montana’s farmers are being left behind. While Daines rams through his disastrous spending bill to cut taxes for the rich, Montana farmers suffer.
Rural Montana faces:
* Medicaid cuts that undermine local healthcare
* Federal cuts to BLM, USDA, and USFS
* Devastating defunding of public education
