name: Jesse Binnall, The Kash Foundation
subject: Law enforcement officers are being handcuffed
body:
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e6414577/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvaDZTN3lYQkdlNg/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA2MTE/LbmNsb29YdWdqOQ/qP2hpZHM9bmM5UkJ1bTlFdEdsOHdscw/gaEmn5A/s4m878772cb)

[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

Friend,

You, me, and every American should be terrified.

Here is what is happening right now in cities across our country:
* In _**Los Angeles**_ , radical activists are burning American flags and cop cars during violent riots.

* In _**Washington, D.C.**_ , homicides are hitting record highs, and the city council still wants to cut funding for law enforcement.

* In _**Chicago**_ , elected officials are setting illegal immigrants free, even those with prior weapons charges, all because it’s a so-called “sanctuary city.”

* In _**Texas**_ , ICE agents were publicly smeared by President Biden after being falsely accused of _“whipping”_ illegal immigrants. A claim that was completely debunked, but never retracted.

**You see, the very people who swore to protect us are under attack, all because they dared to wear the badge.**

But I have a plan to fight back.

My name is Jesse Binnall. You might have seen me before on Fox News or Newsmax fighting against election fraud and weaponized government prosecutions. Today, I’m humbled to serve as the President of The Kash Foundation.

[The Kash Foundation, founded by Kash Patel, supports law enforcement who are being politically targeted, wrongfully prosecuted, and silenced for doing their jobs.](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

_Although Kash has been called to a new mission,_ the Kash Foundation continues to embody the bold vision he set in motion, one rooted in truth, justice, and fearless accountability.

But we can’t do it alone.

[Please donate any amount you can afford to support the Kash Foundation’s mission today. We are looking to raise $56,000 this month to support our nation’s law enforcement. Click here to donate >>](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

[DONATE](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

Law enforcement is being set up to fail. And it’s patriots like you who pay the price.

This is what is at stake:
* **The radical Left is targeting law enforcement:** They're using politics and public pressure to punish those who protect us, and it's working. Now, many are scared to act, second-guessing every decision, and wondering if anyone still has their back.

* **Crime is spilling into every neighborhood:** Carjackings, home invasions, and violent assaults aren’t just big-city problems anymore. They’re happening in suburbs, small towns, and rural communities.

* **Emergency response is slowing down:** In some areas, it takes 15, 20, even 30 minutes for law enforcement to arrive...if they come at all. That delay can cost lives.

Good cops across the country desperately need backup, and right now, you are the backup they need to protect our country.

The Kash Foundation is assembling a team. A team that can’t be bought. Can’t be bullied. And won’t back down from defending the truth.

And we’re asking you to join the force.

Not with a badge, but with bold action to help defend truth, justice, and those who keep us safe.

[Please donate today because when law enforcement calls for backup, you answer!](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

[DONATE](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

When others turned their backs, we stepped in.

The Kash Foundation hasn’t been around long, but in our short existence, we’ve distributed over $1,000,000 in grants to America First patriots in need.

The Kash Foundation is proud to share that it has been able to:

* Provide financial support and care for families of fallen officers. When a law enforcement officer doesn’t make it home, we can help cover funeral expenses and provide direct support to the spouse and children left behind.

* Provide scholarships to children of those who gave everything. The loss of a parent in the line of duty is life-shattering. We provide scholarships that help those kids so their parents’ sacrifice doesn’t define their future.

* Fund legal defenses for service members falsely accused and abandoned by the system. When they are caught up in a political firestorm that costs them their job, we help them and their family make do while they are in the eye of the storm.

And with your help, we’ll do even more.

**You and I can’t sit this one out, not while those who protect us are being taken down by politics and fear.**

We need your help to step in where others won’t and provide legal aid, emergency grants, and support to law enforcement and their families when politics leaves them out in the cold.

[So with that in mind, if you can afford to send $10, $35, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, or even more – I hope you do.](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

[DONATE $10](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

clean_body: Friend, You, me, and every American should be terrified. Here is what is happening right now in cities across our country: In Los Angeles , radical activists are burning American flags and cop cars during violent riots. In Washington, D.C. , homicides are hitting record highs, and the city council still wants to cut funding for law enforcement. In Chicago , elected officials are setting illegal immigrants free, even those with prior weapons charges, all because it’s a so-called “sanctuary city.” In Texas , ICE agents were publicly smeared by President Biden after being falsely accused of “whipping” illegal immigrants. A claim that was completely debunked, but never retracted. You see, the very people who swore to protect us are under attack, all because they dared to wear the badge. But I have a plan to fight back. My name is Jesse Binnall. You might have seen me before on Fox News or Newsmax fighting against election fraud and weaponized government prosecutions. Today, I’m humbled to serve as the President of The Kash Foundation. Although Kash has been called to a new mission, the Kash Foundation continues to embody the bold vision he set in motion, one rooted in truth, justice, and fearless accountability. But we can’t do it alone. Law enforcement is being set up to fail. And it’s patriots like you who pay the price. This is what is at stake: The radical Left is targeting law enforcement: They're using politics and public pressure to punish those who protect us, and it's working. Now, many are scared to act, second-guessing every decision, and wondering if anyone still has their back. Crime is spilling into every neighborhood: Carjackings, home invasions, and violent assaults aren’t just big-city problems anymore. They’re happening in suburbs, small towns, and rural communities. Emergency response is slowing down: In some areas, it takes 15, 20, even 30 minutes for law enforcement to arrive...if they come at all. That delay can cost lives. Good cops across the country desperately need backup, and right now, you are the backup they need to protect our country. The Kash Foundation is assembling a team. A team that can’t be bought. Can’t be bullied. And won’t back down from defending the truth. And we’re asking you to join the force. Not with a badge, but with bold action to help defend truth, justice, and those who keep us safe. When others turned their backs, we stepped in. The Kash Foundation hasn’t been around long, but in our short existence, we’ve distributed over $1,000,000 in grants to America First patriots in need. The Kash Foundation is proud to share that it has been able to: Provide financial support and care for families of fallen officers. When a law enforcement officer doesn’t make it home, we can help cover funeral expenses and provide direct support to the spouse and children left behind. Provide scholarships to children of those who gave everything. The loss of a parent in the line of duty is life-shattering. We provide scholarships that help those kids so their parents’ sacrifice doesn’t define their future. Fund legal defenses for service members falsely accused and abandoned by the system. When they are caught up in a political firestorm that costs them their job, we help them and their family make do while they are in the eye of the storm. And with your help, we’ll do even more. You and I can’t sit this one out, not while those who protect us are being taken down by politics and fear. We need your help to step in where others won’t and provide legal aid, emergency grants, and support to law enforcement and their families when politics leaves them out in the cold. Thank you for answering the call and fighting with The Kash Foundation for a better future, promoting public interest, civil liberty protections, and real justice. For law, order, and liberty, Jesse Binnall President The Kash Foundation Disclaimer: Kash Patel founded the Kash Foundation but is no longer affiliated in any capacity. body:

Winsome Earle-Sears is trying to distance herself from her long-standing anti-choice views ahead of next week’s gubernatorial primary in Virginia.

That's because 71% of Virginians support abortion rights, and Earle-Sears knows her extremist views are a _huge_ political liability.

She's right to worry, and we're making sure every Virginian knows where Winsome Earle-Sears truly stands on this issue. ****[**So, before I tell you the truth about Earle-Sears' anti-choice track record, will you donate now to support Democratic pro-choice women who are taking on anti-choice extremists like her?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109390452/550940648/-1082512980?refcode=WUEFE620_20250611_STRSWinsome_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1056369&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzIwMjJlMS1kYzQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XGj9S7M-F1q0w0MhIqafKs-UrO2uZYwIklbF-0dXiHo=)**** | [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109390461/550940661/-1686146655?refcode=WUEFE620_20250611_STRSWinsome_ALL_v1s3&sourceid=1056369&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3MzIwMjJlMS1kYzQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=XGj9S7M-F1q0w0MhIqafKs-UrO2uZYwIklbF-0dXiHo=)

**Here's the truth about Winsome Earle-Sears, Peter:**

In 2021, Earle-Sears said she considered abortion to be "genocide" and said that she wanted to make abortion illegal in almost all cases.

And later that same year, Earle-Sears said she supported a near-total abortion ban like the one that had just taken effect in Texas.

In 2022, just days after the U.S. Supreme Court overturned _Roe v. Wade_ , Earle-Sears said, "We need to make our choices before we're pregnant, not, you know, after."

**Winsome Earle-Sears can run for election, but she can't hide from her long history of anti-choice extremism.**

That's why we've endorsed Abigail Spanberger — a pro-choice champion who can call out Earle-Sears' extremist record AND beat her at the ballot box.

clean_body: She can't hide from her anti-choice record | = Peter, Winsome Earle-Sears is trying to distance herself from her long-standing anti-choice views ahead of next week’s gubernatorial primary in Virginia. That's because 71% of Virginians support abortion rights, and Earle-Sears knows her extremist views are a huge political liability. She's right to worry, and we're making sure every Virginian knows where Winsome Earle-Sears truly stands on this issue. **= | = Here's the truth about Winsome Earle-Sears, Peter: In 2021, Earle-Sears said she considered abortion to be "genocide" and said that she wanted to make abortion illegal in almost all cases. And later that same year, Earle-Sears said she supported a near-total abortion ban like the one that had just taken effect in Texas. In 2022, just days after the U.S. Supreme Court overturned Roe v. Wade , Earle-Sears said, "We need to make our choices before we're pregnant, not, you know, after." Winsome Earle-Sears can run for election, but she can't hide from her long history of anti-choice extremism. That's why we've endorsed Abigail Spanberger — a pro-choice champion who can call out Earle-Sears' extremist record AND beat her at the ballot box. =** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Thanks, Ben Ray (he/him/his) Interim Vice President of Federal and Gubernatorial Campaigns, EMILYs List = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109391091/550942742/-1787004069?refcode=header&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTI5MDRlZmUtZGQ0Ni1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PEmo9BYdliLhiMv0E2VmsjLj1H_ln1nO4XuDUpaUGGs=) | I often think about my grandfather. He was born in Eveleth to Jewish immigrants who fled Lithuania, leaving persecution and a place where people didn’t have the basic right to choose who governed them. They came here searching for freedom. They ran a dry goods store in Hill City and eventually made their home in St. Paul. Those roots mean something to me. **It’s why I’ve dedicated my life to protecting our democracy, and why I won’t stop now.** **[We’ve faced unprecedented threats to voting rights this year. And if we’re going to keep fighting back, we need to raise $27k by June 30th. I’ve spent my time in office doing what my family taught me: **work hard, look out for others, and try to be part of something bigger than yourself.**
That’s why I’ve worked across party lines to expand absentee voting, enact online registration, and protect election workers from threats and intimidation. It’s why I travel regularly to all 87 counties in Minnesota—to listen, to learn, and to make sure every voter’s voice is heard.
**[When the stakes are high, we don't sit back, we show up. Let's do that now. Please chip in before my critical end-of-quarter fundraising deadline by chipping in $10 or more now →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109391099/550942787/1241229473?amount=25&refcode=ss_em_fr_90DO_250611&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS8xMDAzNTUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTI5MDRlZmUtZGQ0Ni1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=PEmo9BYdliLhiMv0E2VmsjLj1H_ln1nO4XuDUpaUGGs=) **

clean_body: = | I often think about my grandfather. He was born in Eveleth to Jewish immigrants who fled Lithuania, leaving persecution and a place where people didn’t have the basic right to choose who governed them. They came here searching for freedom. They ran a dry goods store in Hill City and eventually made their home in St. Paul. Those roots mean something to me. It’s why I’ve dedicated my life to protecting our democracy, and why I won’t stop now. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed now. | ************=********** | **********=********** | **********=********** | **********=********** | **********=********** | **********=********** I’ve spent my time in office doing what my family taught me: work hard, look out for others, and try to be part of something bigger than yourself. That’s why I’ve worked across party lines to expand absentee voting, enact online registration, and protect election workers from threats and intimidation. It’s why I travel regularly to all 87 counties in Minnesota—to listen, to learn, and to make sure every voter’s voice is heard. = Thank you, Steve | = | = With Steve’s leadership, Minnesota has led the nation in voter turnout for the past three out of four elections. name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: UPDATE: Our race was just called in New Jersey
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
The general election begins now.
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250611_1_split?refcode=em20250611-2530&refcode2=2530_400544_Jn3oWb&akid=2530%2E400544%2EJn3oWb)
I am so honored to be the official Democratic nominee for governor here in New Jersey. Thank you to everyone who played a part in this victory. I wouldn’t be here without this incredible grassroots team who chipped in, volunteered, and voted.
And we can’t stop now.
We know what we are up against. The general election has begun — and if recent history is any indication, it’s going to be an expensive, hard-fought race decided by a razor-thin margin. **[Will you help us get off to a strong start against Trump’s handpicked Republican nominee by splitting $25 between my campaign and Deb Haaland today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250611_1_split?amount=25&refcode=em20250611-2530&refcode2=2530_400544_Jn3oWb&akid=2530%2E400544%2EJn3oWb)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250611_1_split?refcode=em20250611-2530&refcode2=2530_400544_Jn3oWb&akid=2530%2E400544%2EJn3oWb)**
I was raised to believe that we have an obligation to our community and our country.
It’s why I took my first oath to the Constitution as a teenager when I entered the Naval Academy.
It’s why I spent nearly a decade in the Navy as a helicopter pilot and Russian policy officer.
It’s why I went to law school, and became an outreach and reentry coordinator and a federal prosecutor.
It’s why I first ran for office — flipping a Republican-held congressional seat here in New Jersey that no one thought we could win at the time.
And it’s why I’m running to serve as our next governor. It’s too hard to get ahead in New Jersey, and too often, our kids have fewer opportunities than we did. The system feels broken, and Donald Trump’s agenda is only making it worse. I can’t accept that — and as governor, I won’t.
**But the fact is, New Jersey is now a battleground state, and Trump is _already_ campaigning for my opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, a career politician who has promised to pass an abortion ban, defund public schools, and bring DOGE to New Jersey. So, truthfully, we won’t win this race unless we have a strong grassroots team behind us right from the start.**
**[If you’re with me in this fight, I would be incredibly grateful if you could become a Founding Donor to our general election campaign by splitting a donation between my campaign and Deb Haaland today →](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250611_1_split?refcode=em20250611-2530&refcode2=2530_400544_Jn3oWb&akid=2530%2E400544%2EJn3oWb)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250611_1_split?refcode=em20250611-2530&refcode2=2530_400544_Jn3oWb&akid=2530%2E400544%2EJn3oWb)**
Thank you so much for your support,
Mikie
_Use of photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense._
* * *
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails-dh/?t=1&akid=2530%2E400544%2EJn3oWb)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.debhaaland.com/signup/update-your-information-dh/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.debhaaland.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-dh/?t=2&akid=2530%2E400544%2EJn3oWb)

Email us: [info@debhaaland.com](mailto:info@debhaaland.com)
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO

name: Team Evergreen
subject: JOIN: Nationwide day of defiance on June 14
disclaimer_text: paid for by Evergreen Action
body:
While Trump has his dictator parade, we'll march
| | | | [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3674848/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
| Friend—

This Saturday, Donald Trump is throwing himself an extravagant birthday bash, complete with a self-aggrandizing military parade. **And he’s paying for it with OUR taxpayer dollars, all while trying to gut life-saving federal programs, including clean energy funds.**

He may think his rule is absolute, but here in America, we don’t do “kings.” That's why **on June 14, we’re joining millions across the country for one of the biggest days of mass protest in our lifetimes** to rise up and show the world what democracy really looks like. [**Find an event happening near you and join us.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3674849/87SdQ4wZ)**👇** |
| [](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3674850/87SdQ4wZ) |
---|---|---
---
[SAY "NO KINGS" ON JUNE 14](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3674851/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| Instead of allowing Trump’s dictator parade to be the center of gravity, we’re taking to the streets to make **_everywhere else_** the story of America that day: **one of people coming together in communities across the country to reject strongman politics and corruption.**

Whether you’re outraged by attacks on our clean energy future, skyrocketing costs, abductions and disappearances, the gutting of essential services, or the assault on free speech— _this moment is for you_. Whether you’ve been protesting for years or you’re just fed up and ready to take action—** _this moment is for you_**.

Because we’re not gathering to feed Trump’s ego. We’re gathering to build a massive, visible, national rejection of Trump and the GOP’s fascism and corruption. To build a movement that leaves him behind.

So to make sure June 14 will be the worst day for Trump and the best day for defending our freedoms, [**take a few minutes to find a rally near you.**](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3674852/87SdQ4wZ) |
---
[FIND AN EVENT NEAR YOU](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3674853/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
| In solidarity,

The team at Evergreen |
---
* * *
---
| _Evergreen is building the ambitious, actionable policy roadmap for an all-out mobilization to defeat climate change—and to create millions of jobs in a thriving, just, and inclusive clean energy future. None of this would be possible without your support._ |
---
[DONATE](https://actnow.evergreenaction.com/s/3674854/87SdQ4wZ)
---
---
---

| | Friend, When we talk about strengthening our democracy by fighting for the freedom to vote, we also have to ask, _“What comes next?” “What are we voting for, and what does it protect?”_ We ask this because our fight goes _**beyond**_ casting our ballot. **It’s about being free to set our own futures.** Today, we’re reaching out about a group of people whose liberty is under continual, tremendous threat right now. **Fair Fight Action is beyond proud to be in solidarity with Mijente, a political home for Latinx and Chicanx people who seek racial, economic, gender, and climate justice. ** One area of focus for them is their #NoTechForICE campaign, which raises awareness on the threat of privatized technology being used and abused by the U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE). The campaign addresses how a core pillar of democracy — the right to live free of surveillance — is being threatened by the current administration. The role of big tech has become _all too prominent_ in the surveillance, detention, and deportations of immigrant communities. But friend, this goes beyond immigration. This is about authoritarian tactics being used to suppress, control, and intimidate communities of color. **These are the same tactics that drive voter suppression efforts in Black and brown communities across the U.S. ** Fair Fight Action is proud to join Mijente in this fight because the freedom to vote and the freedom to exist safely in your community must go hand in hand — and together, we’re fighting to advance democracy, NOT diminish it. [**Right now, Black, brown, and immigrant communities are vulnerable to these coordinated anti-democracy authoritarian attacks. Mijente isn’t just exposing these harmful systems, but also organizing to dismantle them — empowering and training new generations of changemakers, mobilizing Latinx communities to use their power in our democracy, and pushing forward with pivotal campaigns:
**📚 Education:** Together with Just Futures Law, Mijente launched Ni Un Dato Más, their new popular education campaign that seeks to address the gap between tech justice work and monolingual Spanish-speaking, immigrant communities. In addition, their End the Contract Coalition directly connects with law students at 15+ law schools throughout the country to fight to end the complicity of data broker companies with ICE, on and off campus.
**🤝 Eliminating ICE Loopholes:** Sanctuary efforts, as well as welcoming protections across the country have been hard fought, but government agencies like ICE are still able to circumvent them through contracts with data broker companies. Mijente provides strategic and technical support to local groups organizing to eliminate this loophole, including leading efforts in Cook County, Illinois to pass model policy.
**🧐 Monitoring** and exposing exploitation tactics by ICE by tracking how they abuse technology advancements. This includes research and reports about local data sharing with ICE and the national changes to DHS surveillance programs under the current administration.
Whether it’s big tech bro-ligarchs, anti-voter extremists, anti-immigrant radicals, or someone who falls in between — ALL of these bullies fall under the anti-freedom, anti-democracy bucket, trying to diminish our power.
**So, we’re joining forces with Mijente, and together, we’re building a movement for multi-racial democracy. But this can only happen when we recognize that our fights are interconnected and work together. **
[**Contributions split between Fair Fight Action and Mijente power mobilization and grassroots education, building the resistance to anti-democracy forces, and more. clean_body: | | | Friend, When we talk about strengthening our democracy by fighting for the freedom to vote, we also have to ask, “What comes next?” “What are we voting for, and what does it protect?” We ask this because our fight goes beyond casting our ballot. It’s about being free to set our own futures. Today, we’re reaching out about a group of people whose liberty is under continual, tremendous threat right now. Fair Fight Action is beyond proud to be in solidarity with Mijente, a political home for Latinx and Chicanx people who seek racial, economic, gender, and climate justice. One area of focus for them is their #NoTechForICE campaign, which raises awareness on the threat of privatized technology being used and abused by the U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE). The campaign addresses how a core pillar of democracy — the right to live free of surveillance — is being threatened by the current administration. The role of big tech has become all too prominent in the surveillance, detention, and deportations of immigrant communities. But friend, this goes beyond immigration. This is about authoritarian tactics being used to suppress, control, and intimidate communities of color. These are the same tactics that drive voter suppression efforts in Black and brown communities across the U.S. Fair Fight Action is proud to join Mijente in this fight because the freedom to vote and the freedom to exist safely in your community must go hand in hand — and together, we’re fighting to advance democracy, NOT diminish it. = If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Mijente isn’t just exposing these harmful systems, but also organizing to dismantle them — empowering and training new generations of changemakers, mobilizing Latinx communities to use their power in our democracy, and pushing forward with pivotal campaigns: 📚 Education: Together with Just Futures Law, Mijente launched Ni Un Dato Más, their new popular education campaign that seeks to address the gap between tech justice work and monolingual Spanish-speaking, immigrant communities. In addition, their End the Contract Coalition directly connects with law students at 15+ law schools throughout the country to fight to end the complicity of data broker companies with ICE, on and off campus. 🤝 Eliminating ICE Loopholes: Sanctuary efforts, as well as welcoming protections across the country have been hard fought, but government agencies like ICE are still able to circumvent them through contracts with data broker companies. Mijente provides strategic and technical support to local groups organizing to eliminate this loophole, including leading efforts in Cook County, Illinois to pass model policy. 🧐 Monitoring and exposing exploitation tactics by ICE by tracking how they abuse technology advancements. This includes research and reports about local data sharing with ICE and the national changes to DHS surveillance programs under the current administration. Whether it’s big tech bro-ligarchs, anti-voter extremists, anti-immigrant radicals, or someone who falls in between — ALL of these bullies fall under the anti-freedom, anti-democracy bucket, trying to diminish our power. So, we’re joining forces with Mijente, and together, we’re building a movement for multi-racial democracy. But this can only happen when we recognize that our fights are interconnected and work together. = Thanks for your solidarity. The Fair Fight Action Team = | * 1270 Caroline Street | Suite D120-430 | Atlanta, GA 30307 ©2025 Fair Fight Action - All rights reserved. Emails like this one are the best way to communicate updates with voting rights activists like you. Thank you for being in the fight to ensure access to democracy for all. name: Dan Goldman
subject: I won’t stop fighting for LGBTQIA+ rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
Add your name: Pass the Equality Act |
#
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109391687/550944955/1917668775?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250611_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGJkZmFiMS1kZTQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nx5sxbFIAO74epCyQ8N48ZvORop8GLrHqL72kGHyMLs=&emci=dee4d7e8-7a45-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=74bdfab1-de46-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13556823) Peter — Each June, we celebrate Pride Month to honor the LGBTQIA+ community and to recognize the long legacy of resistance and joy that defines it. I’m proud that my district is home to the Stonewall Inn — the site of the 1969 uprising that helped ignite the modern queer rights movement. It’s a reminder that Pride began not as a party, but as a protest. And this year, that spirit is more important than ever. With Donald Trump back in the White House, Republicans across the country are wasting no time launching new attacks on LGBTQIA+ Americans, from working to ban gender-affirming care to threatening marriage equality and gutting civil rights protections. Let’s be clear: this is about control, cruelty, and erasing queer and trans people from public life. And this Pride Month, we must fight back with everything we’ve got. **[That’s why I’m calling on Congress to finally pass the _Equality Act_ to protect LGBTQIA+ people from discrimination in housing, employment, and education. Will you sign on now to demand action?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109391688/550944963/1917668775?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250611_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGJkZmFiMS1kZTQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nx5sxbFIAO74epCyQ8N48ZvORop8GLrHqL72kGHyMLs=&emci=dee4d7e8-7a45-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=74bdfab1-de46-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13556823)** | [SIGN ON NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109391689/550944970/1917668775?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250611_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGJkZmFiMS1kZTQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nx5sxbFIAO74epCyQ8N48ZvORop8GLrHqL72kGHyMLs=&emci=dee4d7e8-7a45-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=74bdfab1-de46-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13556823)
---
This legislation is long overdue, and passing it would be a critical step forward. We need to stand up and prevent Republicans from rolling back decades of progress and silencing the very communities Pride was created to uplift.
Let’s remember that Pride is about resistance — and that real allyship means action.
Thank you for standing with me. And Happy Pride Month.
— Dan
Dan Goldman for New York
PO BOX 3306
New York, NY 10008
United States **[dangoldmanforny.com](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109391690/550944977/1064912967?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20250611_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NGJkZmFiMS1kZTQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nx5sxbFIAO74epCyQ8N48ZvORop8GLrHqL72kGHyMLs=&emci=dee4d7e8-7a45-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=74bdfab1-de46-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=13556823) | [info@dangoldmanforny.com](mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com)** | **Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**

name: NPR + PBS Protection Alert via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Tell Congress to save NPR and PBS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

In just 24 hours, the House of Representatives will vote on Donald Trump's
reckless request to defund public media – but pressure is building and
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31850?source=email-20250611w&t=1011&akid=8740%2E5885482%2EqrZauM ]if enough of us speak out, we can save NPR and PBS!

Two House Republicans have said they oppose the cuts, expressing concern
about the impact of slashing our public media on communities nationwide.
And Trump can only lose three votes, giving us a HUGE opportunity to pile
on the pressure and stop these reckless cuts.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31851?source=email-20250611w&t=1012&akid=8740%2E5885482%2EqrZauM ]Headline: Senior Republican opposes White House proposal to cut public
media funding

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31850?source=email-20250611w&t=1013&akid=8740%2E5885482%2EqrZauM ]This is an all hands on deck moment. Will you send an URGENT message to
your representative RIGHT NOW to vote NO on Trump's dangerous defunding
proposal?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31850?source=email-20250611w&t=1014&akid=8740%2E5885482%2EqrZauM ]ADD YOUR NAME

Momentum is on our side. But MAGA is mobilizing to push all Republicans to
vote yes – which is why we need EVERYONE to step up and help us overwhelm
Congress with opposition.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31851?source=email-20250611w&t=1015&akid=8740%2E5885482%2EqrZauM ]Headline: Partisan battle lines form over Trump's plan to defund NPR &
PBS

There's no question: PBS and NPR belong to the American people, not to
partisan politics. Public media broadcasts unbiased news, education,
cultural programming, and groundbreaking shows that corporate media just
doesn't produce.

Despite Trump's desperate attempts to silence the truth so he's free to
spread disinformation with abandon, the fact is we know that
people-powered action works. We've won this fight before during Trump's
last term and we can do it again – but we have no time to waste.

Our Revolution has been mobilizing and fighting back for months to
preserve independent, community-centered media that ensures democracy
shines beyond partisan politics. We've sent tens of thousands of messages
to Congress, rallied outside of NPR HQ, and are confronting key lawmakers
to put them on the spot.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31850?source=email-20250611w&t=1016&akid=8740%2E5885482%2EqrZauM ]Now, we ALL need to come together to stop these extremist cuts – before
it's too late. Will you urgently tell your representative that public
media belongs to ALL of us – not Trump's extreme agenda?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/31850?source=email-20250611w&t=1017&akid=8740%2E5885482%2EqrZauM ]ADD YOUR NAME

Together let's send Congress a clear message: the American people stand
united to defend our public media and reject Trump's dangerous defunding
scheme.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

Patriot,

You, me, and every American should be terrified.

Here is what is happening right now in cities across our country:
* In _**Los Angeles**_ , radical activists are burning American flags and cop cars during violent riots.

* In _**Washington, D.C.**_ , homicides are hitting record highs, and the city council still wants to cut funding for law enforcement.

* In _**Chicago**_ , elected officials are setting illegal immigrants free, even those with prior weapons charges, all because it’s a so-called “sanctuary city.”

* In _**Texas**_ , ICE agents were publicly smeared by President Biden after being falsely accused of _“whipping”_ illegal immigrants. A claim that was completely debunked, but never retracted.

**You see, the very people who swore to protect us are under attack, all because they dared to wear the badge.**

But I have a plan to fight back.

My name is Jesse Binnall. You might have seen me before on Fox News or Newsmax fighting against election fraud and weaponized government prosecutions. Today, I’m humbled to serve as the President of The Kash Foundation.

[The Kash Foundation, founded by Kash Patel, supports law enforcement who are being politically targeted, wrongfully prosecuted, and silenced for doing their jobs.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8z8GPnCAUx_G_Bm8aeAg4Bw9tzWyTpk2aPXUuk6fiyK6AA6id_37jxMz1wzd5_NDOkxkeNVHfCcBo-kgACP9GAO7_NhuWD_vrLedv1Ud-l3-s2F_hx5Gu8Ipdh-pxeZe38DPEUl_et99_Lyt75ekx61d8HC20RTPtqpqsr_nQ0zLTNVPlSYrqVEE21q1Qqm25oFWlmCix7RmiHigVggtoITM1UBBUMsYkgBAFClp1oERJGUV5qkhJn3cKtDqYDllMG4bgvS06b7OpHlOa4_NjZwLnNOr8E-OYD35xPSbjXRH0uhadJ3CObd57h0nvMT8vyV47tDOamyO8AUEFVQTk7lb3ZrGEN0GvccSgD0867ApUVvK6BXZw9EvoNOFNbA_pvEvaJcKbpP-n62TcJ8tC3c-bmSYTpSIlvT2X7TvWGr4CAAD__zNujew)

_Although Kash has been called to a new mission,_ the Kash Foundation continues to embody the bold vision he set in motion, one rooted in truth, justice, and fearless accountability.

But we can’t do it alone.

[Please donate any amount you can afford to support the Kash Foundation’s mission today. We are looking to raise $56,000 this month to support our nation’s law enforcement. Click here to donate >>](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8z82O2yAUhuGrwTtbcPhzFl60tTKVqlaqZtVsIgZwzIwBD2C7ufuRIyvbl0c6fMrPkxvuHZLfEcDoTEYAiH5DAJ__Np-Wd__rpaYv7Xv9Kf54vr_Cj4Ou8MRBK3m_vIpb-pkys5fX7fffy0qevNxn-8TH0cZ65aa9yr4yHR0MZpXtiGQnwdtTC9XY4QFbfiLtIIzRTDKsB6zEiXEuqNTMVK4DDBwLQogA4LxRHLcaJGeY7LJFDD_uNMrb5LQiuWwqpRh9o6Ovpm4sZc6Pj50RnMto6w-Vx3qISzCquBiaZNe10RHBOb_VJgZV7I7peSn-qpWflbsFRHvgmGOJQOzdW-MWj2if7JpHlezRi017BSxacd0SOXKOS9IW0T6_HUXHUGwoiPbF_i_XyYUPqFJn5s1Nk8tCIoZvj2X7jrWDrwAAAP__UlqOCA)

Law enforcement is being set up to fail. And it’s patriots like you who pay the price.

This is what is at stake:
* **The radical Left is targeting law enforcement:** They're using politics and public pressure to punish those who protect us, and it's working. Now, many are scared to act, second-guessing every decision, and wondering if anyone still has their back.

* **Crime is spilling into every neighborhood:** Carjackings, home invasions, and violent assaults aren’t just big-city problems anymore. They’re happening in suburbs, small towns, and rural communities.

* **Emergency response is slowing down:** In some areas, it takes 15, 20, even 30 minutes for law enforcement to arrive...if they come at all. That delay can cost lives.

Good cops across the country desperately need backup, and right now, you are the backup they need to protect our country.

The Kash Foundation is assembling a team. A team that can’t be bought. Can’t be bullied. And won’t back down from defending the truth.

And we’re asking you to join the force.

Not with a badge, but with bold action to help defend truth, justice, and those who keep us safe.

[Please donate today because when law enforcement calls for backup, you answer!](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8z8GO2yoUxvGnwTtbcDAYL7y4t1amUtVK1ayaTUTgJGbGGA9gu3n7ypGV7Y-_dPi0n0d3e3Sk-Z8ADM4mAkD4fwTg68_m4_Lhf7yV_E19lF_ylxf7K3w70hVe8WR08zi_y3v8HlON5_ft5-_zyl55fsz4io-jFXrtxl2bvrAdv1laF9ixpm6lUK2CYujwqqiU5qaUBUs1NrRVTHLJr1SAMm3hOqAgqGSMSQAhKi2oMtCImjKqZatITZ93Ku0xOqNZypuOMQRfmeCLsRtyntPzYycCpzxg-anTUN7CMlmdXZiqiOtamUDglK6lDZPOuMf8tGR_MdrP2t0nwnsQVNCGgNzdo3WLJ7yPuKZBRzw8Y9wVqFTyskV2cApLNEh4n66HmDBlnDLhfca_-TK66ZMXsbPz5sbRJdmQmt6fy_Ydawf_AgAA__8kK43b)

When others turned their backs, we stepped in.

The Kash Foundation hasn’t been around long, but in our short existence, we’ve distributed over $1,000,000 in grants to America First patriots in need.

The Kash Foundation is proud to share that it has been able to:

* Provide financial support and care for families of fallen officers. When a law enforcement officer doesn’t make it home, we can help cover funeral expenses and provide direct support to the spouse and children left behind.

* Provide scholarships to children of those who gave everything. The loss of a parent in the line of duty is life-shattering. We provide scholarships that help those kids so their parents’ sacrifice doesn’t define their future.

* Fund legal defenses for service members falsely accused and abandoned by the system. When they are caught up in a political firestorm that costs them their job, we help them and their family make do while they are in the eye of the storm.

And with your help, we’ll do even more.

**You and I can’t sit this one out, not while those who protect us are being taken down by politics and fear.**

We need your help to step in where others won’t and provide legal aid, emergency grants, and support to law enforcement and their families when politics leaves them out in the cold.

| | There is an urgent new warning about vitamin C.

[Click here now to find out if you’re at risk.](https://links.gunowner-news.com/a/1537/click/21571/6374453/b4941cbb0521758028e5cbb9dd5987d6c4e42d12/0d1f9d19092b17f1eccea17e452d74daad16ee56) Millions of people are currently using these popular vitamin C products to stay healthy—so we must get the word out quickly. Peter — June is National Dairy Month, and that’s something we know how to celebrate here in Wisconsin. 🥛🧀🐄 Growing up in Madison, I always knew that _no one_ does dairy quite like Wisconsin. Whether it’s cheese, milk, or other dairy products, our state simply can’t be beat. It all starts and ends with the hard work and long days our dairy farmers put in — folks I’ll never stop fighting for. I’m proud to represent America’s Dairyland in the Senate, but Donald Trump’s reckless trade war is hurting our dairy farmers right here in Wisconsin. **[We can’t let him get away with it, Peter. If you’re with me in the fight to protect Wisconsin farmers and our beloved dairyland, please donate now:](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/4513?c0=stb-em-jun25.1mF5PM&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250611_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=4755%2E35263%2EWhkhh2)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=stb-em-jun25.x5VxaC&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250611_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=4755%2E35263%2EWhkhh2)

name: Jason Crow
subject: My bowl cut
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
|
#
---
Hey, Check out this old pic. What do you see? [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109392687/550949059/-1634501027?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC60_20250611_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmY2NDVlZS1lMDQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O_N1jmGhyg9yeUvTxwiVZU1ZHjw4vZhTLzeCsMto1_U=) Beneath that bowl cut, there's a kid who had _no idea_ what life had in store for him. His world revolved around Legos and backyard adventures. Growing up in a working-class family, I learned early on about the importance of hard work and perseverance. Those childhood days taught me the invaluable lesson of never giving up, even when times were tough. Like so many American families, mine faced financial struggles as I grew up. I took on jobs — from newspaper deliveries to construction to working at Arby's — to contribute where I could. After high school, I enlisted in the National Guard to help pay for college. Then, the whole world shifted on September 11, 2001. That day, I became driven by a call to serve. I became a paratrooper and then an Army Ranger, committed to defending our nation's values through tours in Iraq and Afghanistan. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109392688/550949060/-1634501027?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC60_20250611_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmY2NDVlZS1lMDQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O_N1jmGhyg9yeUvTxwiVZU1ZHjw4vZhTLzeCsMto1_U=) Returning home, my mission to serve continued. I went to law school and offered pro bono legal aid for veterans easing back into civilian life. But then, Donald Trump became president, and his extremism threatened our health care, vilified immigrants, and shook the very foundations of our democracy. I couldn’t sit back and watch as the values I fought overseas to defend were destroyed, so I decided to run for Congress. In 2018, Coloradans shared my vision, electing me as the first Democrat to represent Colorado’s 6th District. It has been the honor of my life to serve my community in this way, and while it's never easy, it's worth the fight. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109392689/550949061/-1634501027?refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC60_20250611_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmY2NDVlZS1lMDQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O_N1jmGhyg9yeUvTxwiVZU1ZHjw4vZhTLzeCsMto1_U=) Today, our democracy is being threatened by Donald Trump and his allies yet again. Costs are rising for working families, the President’s policies abroad are making us less safe at home, and immigrants across the country are living in fear. But I’m fighting back. **That’s why I’m counting on your support today.[Can you chip in $10 (or any amount) right now to help fuel my fight and stand up to extremism nationwide?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109392690/550949062/-1634501027?amount=10&refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC60_20250611_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmY2NDVlZS1lMDQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O_N1jmGhyg9yeUvTxwiVZU1ZHjw4vZhTLzeCsMto1_U=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109392691/550949063/-1634501027?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=AU_JC_FR_GEN_GEN_AC60_20250611_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODUyMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmY2NDVlZS1lMDQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=O_N1jmGhyg9yeUvTxwiVZU1ZHjw4vZhTLzeCsMto1_U=)

I couldn’t sit back and watch as the values I fought overseas to defend were destroyed, so I decided to run for Congress. In 2018, Coloradans shared my vision, electing me as the first Democrat to represent Colorado’s 6th District. It has been the honor of my life to serve my community in this way, and while it's never easy, it's worth the fight. = Today, our democracy is being threatened by Donald Trump and his allies yet again. Costs are rising for working families, the President’s policies abroad are making us less safe at home, and immigrants across the country are living in fear. But I’m fighting back. That’s why I’m counting on your support today.= If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for having my back. — Jason Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Army or the Department of Defense. Jason Crow for Congress 8547 E Arapahoe Road, STE J-543 Greenwood Village, CO 80112 United States | mailto:info@jasoncrowforcongress.com | Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress Jason Crow was a Captain in the U.S. Army. name: Rose Penelope Yee
subject: Checking In—And Keeping the Fight Alive
body:
Let’s organize. Let’s mobilize. Let’s stand up for what’s right.

| | | | | [|
---](https://roseforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=35bf91c695e8f4a5dc8a9dd42&id=37f8938eae&e=8c53948e4c)
| | | | [|
---](https://roseforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=35bf91c695e8f4a5dc8a9dd42&id=86925ff09b&e=8c53948e4c)
| Rose and Yuba County delegates at the California Democratic Convention May 31
---
|
# Checking In—And Keeping the Fight Alive
---
| Dear friends,It’s been a while since we last thanked you for everything you did—for volunteering, for supporting, and for believing in our Rose for Congress campaign. So thank you again! And how have you been these past few months?
**Have you felt anger? Anxiety? Maybe even fear? I have.** There have been moments of deep despondency, even hopelessness. Watching our democracy strained to its limits, seeing immigrant families torn apart, facing financial uncertainty from the chaos of trade wars, and bearing witness to the devastating loss of innocent lives in genocidal wars—it’s enough to shake anyone’s faith.
**But just as those feelings threaten to overwhelm, something else stirs. A stubborn defiance; a refusal to surrender.** We knew the fight was never going to be easy. The priorities of our campaign—Medicare for All, ending billionaire control of our government, championing workers’ rights, a safe and clean environment, tuition-free college and trade schools—are as urgently needed as ever. Our rights are too precious for us to stay silent and do nothing.
**We dust ourselves off, square our shoulders, and keep the fight going.** We hug, we cry, and yes, despite everything we find occasions to laugh. We reach out to each other and build deeper and stronger connections. We’re all in this together.
That is what this email is about. I’m not done fighting for North State communities, and I know you’re not either.
**Let’s organize. Let’s mobilize. Let’s stand up for what’s right.**
**June 14:** I’ll be participating in the nationwide [**No Kings event**](https://roseforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=35bf91c695e8f4a5dc8a9dd42&id=fe49d57f42&e=8c53948e4c) in Redding at Redding City Hall, 777 Cypress Ave., Redding, CA 96001
Residents of Mt. Shasta, Chico and other cities are also hosting No Kings Events–find one near you using [**this map**](https://roseforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=35bf91c695e8f4a5dc8a9dd42&id=062b01161c&e=8c53948e4c).
**June 29:** North State Medicare 4 All is holding its annual meeting from 2:00 to 4:00 pm. No need to RSVP–just show up at Valley Oaks Village Common House,1950 Wild Oak Lane, Chico (Please park in any uncovered parking space or in the streets near the entrance to this Co-Housing Community)

### Onward!
---
| **Let us know what’s going on in your community:** We’re going to start sending regular newsletters on North State issues, solutions and actions. If there’s an event you’d like us to include or needs we should know about, let us know.
---
| [SEND NEWS](mailto:rose@roseforcongress.com?subject=Newsletter%20topic&body=undefined)
---
| | | | | [](https://roseforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=35bf91c695e8f4a5dc8a9dd42&id=5cb098e369&e=8c53948e4c)
---
[](https://roseforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=35bf91c695e8f4a5dc8a9dd42&id=609b4cbaa6&e=8c53948e4c)
---
[](https://roseforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=35bf91c695e8f4a5dc8a9dd42&id=a3535caf69&e=8c53948e4c)
---
| | | | | | | | [View email in browser](https://mailchi.mp/roseforcongress/kicklamalfaout-action-august-6746781?e=8c53948e4c)
Rose for Congress * 3335 Placer St # 288 * Redding, CA 96001-2364 * USA
[update your preferences](https://roseforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/profile?u=35bf91c695e8f4a5dc8a9dd42&id=3466a1d36e&e=8c53948e4c&c=d0b98fe771) or [unsubscribe](https://roseforcongress.us13.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=35bf91c695e8f4a5dc8a9dd42&id=3466a1d36e&t=b&e=8c53948e4c&c=d0b98fe771)
---

name: Breaking News via RTP
subject: Under Trump’s Orders: 700 Marines in Los Angeles. Now he wants Gavin Newsom arrested.
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-fightback?refcode=061125_2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-fightback?refcode=061125_2]
Peter, if you've been waiting for the moment to act - this is it.
Because Donald Trump just crossed another line.
🚨 He sent 700 Marines into Los Angeles to help the National Guard suppress peaceful protests against his inhumane ICE raids.
🚨 He’s using the military to intimidate civilians - on American soil.
🚨 And now, he’s calling for the ARREST of California Governor Gavin Newsom... simply for daring to stand up to him.
This is what fascism looks like in real time.
We cannot be passive. We cannot wait. We must respond with overwhelming resistance — right now.
We’re mobilizing emergency resources to support Democrats who are bravely fighting back against Trump’s authoritarian power grabs. But we’re falling short of what we need to scale up fast. Can you rush a donation immediately - $10, $25, whatever you can - to help fund this fight? Every moment we wait is a moment Trump gains more power. name: Seth Koslow
subject: Let’s send Bruce Blakeman packing. Here's how.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Koslow for Nassau
body:
We’ve got just one month to hit a MAJOR fundraising deadline on July 11. | | Hi Friends,

We’ve got just **one month** to hit a _MAJOR_ fundraising deadline on **July 11** , and I’m asking you to be a part of it.

If we’re going to defeat Bruce Blakeman and bring real leadership back to Nassau County, we need to start strong right now – and stay strong through November. That’s why I’m asking you to chip in $20.25 monthly starting today.

**[➡️ [Give $20.25 Monthly Now]](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109393596/550952139/1454987050?contactdata=z4fOp3SelVYnMZC5pt/+bOEsKmpfL2o6Mpv5iy6kmi9K5zv+es8Lolz8DIvDAOpYCFysrnZSG4D60rtlTQrwAWrCw700DRJqfDc1BokUIHM=&am=20.25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTYyMTQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMDJmMTBmNzctZTI0Ni1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=C-52RxuDKFbtcEa5JIwADeuTFUpfJnCCcDD9fKpdOMI=&emci=e7ed04bb-ca46-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=02f10f77-e246-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=17551891)**

This isn’t a one-day fight. Over the next few months, I’ll be crisscrossing Nassau County, talking with voters about the need for change – and about why Bruce Blakeman needs to go.

His politics are divisive, his priorities are backwards, and families across our county deserve better.

With your help today, we’ll build the grassroots momentum we need to take him on.

Your monthly donation will:
✅ Help us hit our July 11 goal
✅ Power our message through the summer
✅ Keep us organizing through Election Day in November

Then on July 11, I’ll ask you to give a little more if you can – to show we’re serious, ready, and not backing down.

But for today, I hope you’ll take the first step with me.

Will you start a $20.25 monthly donation today?

clean_body: We’ve got just one month to hit a MAJOR fundraising deadline on July 11. | | Hi Friends, We’ve got just one month to hit a MAJOR fundraising deadline on July 11 , and I’m asking you to be a part of it. If we’re going to defeat Bruce Blakeman and bring real leadership back to Nassau County, we need to start strong right now – and stay strong through November. That’s why I’m asking you to chip in $20.25 monthly starting today. [➡️ [Give $20.25 Monthly Now]]() This isn’t a one-day fight. Over the next few months, I’ll be crisscrossing Nassau County, talking with voters about the need for change – and about why Bruce Blakeman needs to go. His politics are divisive, his priorities are backwards, and families across our county deserve better. With your help today, we’ll build the grassroots momentum we need to take him on. Your monthly donation will: ✅ Help us hit our July 11 goal ✅ Power our message through the summer ✅ Keep us organizing through Election Day in November Then on July 11, I’ll ask you to give a little more if you can – to show we’re serious, ready, and not backing down. But for today, I hope you’ll take the first step with me. Will you start a $20.25 monthly donation today? [➡️ [Yes – I’m In for $20.25 Monthly]]() Let’s win this, Seth Koslow | * | Paid for by Koslow for Nassau Koslow for Nassau 998 Old Country Road STE C Box 152 Plainview, NY 11803 United States We try to send only the most important info and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can .

clean_body: TRUMP TO THE DEEP STATE: Hands Off Our Social Security! Peter, President Trump is proposing a bold plan to ELIMINATE THE TAX ON SOCIAL SECURITY and put more money in YOUR pocket. But he can't do it alone. He needs your help to make this plan a reality. So we're asking: Our President is working around the clock to put more money in your pockets and stop giving it to big government - but he needs your help to put his HUGE plan into action. That's why we're asking YOU for your opinion. Thank you, GOP HQ Paid for by the Republican National Committee Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

name: Kathleen Clyde, ODP Chair
subject: I wanted to introduce myself
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I couldn’t be more thrilled to be the new chair of the Ohio Democratic Party
|
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109393672/550952445/-1734405283?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_ChairIntro_250611_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWRkZTc5Yi1lMjQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1mBaGhxy5upPEyQFqDfG2aUnFT5xwvTKX3N8-5zn5dM=) Team,

I couldn’t be more thrilled to have been elected the new chair of the Ohio Democratic Party.

I decided to run because I knew we could build a stronger, more inclusive, and more energized movement that will put us in a position to win in the months and years ahead.

Ohio means everything to me – that’s why I’ve spent my entire career working here in public service. As a state representative, county commissioner, and voting rights advocate, I’ve spent decades championing Ohio’s working class families and fighting for the dignity of work.

**I know what it takes to run a winning campaign, and I pledge that I can and will do the work necessary to help our incredible candidates across the state.**

**_[I believe that we can build a more inclusive party that fights harder, organizes smarter, and wins next year’s critical elections. If you’re with me, I hope you’ll chip in to the Ohio Democratic Party right now>> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109393673/550952446/-1734405283?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_ChairIntro_250611_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWRkZTc5Yi1lMjQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1mBaGhxy5upPEyQFqDfG2aUnFT5xwvTKX3N8-5zn5dM=)_**

That’s right, I’m jumping right in, because we’ve got our mid-month fundraising deadline in a matter of days, and at the end of the month, our numbers will go public for all to see. Let’s show the GOP what we’re made of.

I look forward to leading with integrity, strategy, and a commitment to the values that define our party, and I’m glad you’re with me.

Thank you, [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109393674/550952447/-1734405283?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_ChairIntro_250611_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWRkZTc5Yi1lMjQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1mBaGhxy5upPEyQFqDfG2aUnFT5xwvTKX3N8-5zn5dM=) Kathleen Clyde, ODP Chair **[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109393675/550952448/-1734405283?refcode=ODP_ATA_EM_FR_ChairIntro_250611_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0ZWRkZTc5Yi1lMjQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1mBaGhxy5upPEyQFqDfG2aUnFT5xwvTKX3N8-5zn5dM=)**

name: Shawnna Bolick
subject: June 11th Capitol Update
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK
body:
| | | [ ](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=591eda7081&e=a7ab36849c)
---
| | Good morning fellow freedom fighter!

It has been a crazy busy time even though the legislature hasn’t been regularly meeting due to budget negotiations. Hopefully, we are almost at that point in session where the Senate and House have some agreement to craft appropriation bills to vote and send to the executive before the end of June.

During this time, I have been maintaining regular office hours, keeping in-person meetings or calling constituents to address concerns, and working through final revisions of some of this year’s legislation to get a vote in the House.

This morning I will host a bipartisan group of Senators and Representatives at the Capitol with a briefing with Arizona Supreme Court Justices Ann Timmer and Clint Bolick on civil legal aid services in light of the Trump Administration’s plan to defund and dismantle the legal services corporation. This law has been around since the Nixon Administration and serves as the major source of funding for the three legal aid agencies in Arizona.

Later today, hopefully, the House will vote out three more of my bills, including our animal cruelty bill (a.k.a. Jerry's Law) that has been endorsed by Maricopa County Sheriffs past and present, Joe Arpaio and Jerry Sheridan. If you support this bill, please contact your [House legislators](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=ef1ba2ba08&e=a7ab36849c) this morning to let them know you do, too.

When constituents bring new issues to me this late in our legislative session it just means I spend additional time during the interim to look at the problem to see if it warrants a legislative solution because not everything does. As you may know, the deadline to introduce new legislation passed many months ago so there isn't an opportunity to bring forward new legislation at this time.

Over the last few weeks, I have stopped by a few local small businesses to introduce myself, as well as, have attended a new networking group in north Phoenix.

Yesterday, I stopped by Northwest Christian High School to present the team and their boys volleyball coach a State Senate sanctioned [proclamation](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=dfb41554e7&e=a7ab36849c) for this year’s boys high school varsity champions of their division. Go Crusaders!

Last week, I had a chance to meet Anthony Anderson who is the CEO of Guardian of Valor Media LLC while he was in town. Anthony was a strong advocate for getting our state’s [stolen valor bill](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=f3cfd3e95e&e=a7ab36849c) across the finish line. He and his family rented an RV and came to Arizona to personally thank us for passing this bill to honor and protect the uniform.

On Thursday morning I stopped by Four Peaks Brewing Company annual [teacher appreciation day](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=cefe6c6927&e=a7ab36849c) in Tempe helping to hand out canvas bags for teachers to pick up much needed school supplies for their classrooms for their upcoming school year.

In non-legislative news, my daughter took me to a [puppy yoga class](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=ee82a2f121&e=a7ab36849c) a few weeks ago and it was a great way to release stress. How can you resist a sweet puppy pack kissing you while you are stretching, or doing downward dog? Those smile lines became more permanent that morning. If you are looking for something fun to do as outdoor temperatures soar, we highly recommend it.

_Bolick Bills In the News_

Senate Bill 1658 Animal Cruelty Legislation

[https://azcapitoltimes.com/news/2025/06/06/supporters-of-animal-cruelty-measure-still-hopeful/](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=8d93b118dd&e=a7ab36849c)

[https://pro.stateaffairs.com/az/legislative-report/news/supporters-want-montenegro-to-let-the-animal-cruelty-bill-off-the-leash](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=59c721db8a&e=a7ab36849c)

[https://www.chandlernews.com/santan/news/tighter-animal-cruelty-bill-faces-rough-going-in-arizona-legislature/article_d2b193bc-c139-49e9-bae4-18a49683577d.html](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=f427a8836d&e=a7ab36849c)

[https://www.chandlernews.com/santan/news/tighter-animal-cruelty-bill-faces-rough-going-in-arizona-legislature/article_d2b193bc-c139-49e9-bae4-18a49683577d.html](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=293098d6e4&e=a7ab36849c)

Senate Bill 1229 Starter Home Legislation

[https://reason.com/2025/06/03/starter-homes-live-in-texas-die-in-arizona/](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=d158b64f5d&e=a7ab36849c)

[https://azfreenews.com/2025/05/lawmaker-claims-american-dream-of-homeownership-is-being-crushed-in-arizona/](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=67f96d6e93&e=a7ab36849c)

[https://arizonarepublic-az.newsmemory.com/?publink=599131f7f_134fa0e](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=0e2618a173&e=a7ab36849c)

Senate Bill 1106 Ava’s Law signed into law

[https://www.themesatribune.com/opinion/opinion-mom-s-determination-closed-school-predators-loophole/article_8b3b4927-9b2d-42e8-9d4c-d993fb1d22c2.html](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=6e9409b878&e=a7ab36849c)

**Campaign Information**

Do you reside in one of these Legislative District 2 zip codes:
85022 85023 85024 85027 85029 85032 85050 85053 85085 85308 85310 85331

If you answered yes and you are a registered Republican or an Independent voter, [**please take a minute to sign my secure online nomination petition**](https://bolickforarizona.us7.list-manage.com/track/click?u=3214fdbd528e32d06cf84fc86&id=58d2277677&e=a7ab36849c) ensuring my name appears on the Republican primary ballot on the August 4, 2026.

After session my team and I, will actively work to accomplish our campaign goals for the interim, but I’d surely appreciate your help. Today, you can use your driver's license to log on and sign my online nomination petition.

Thank you for your continued support!

Finally, to all of those lucky Dads out there have a wonderful Father's Day.

_"Dads are most ordinary men turned by love into heroes, adventurers, storytellers, and singers of song." ~ Unknown _

Take care,
Shawnna

clean_body: | | | | | Good morning fellow freedom fighter! It has been a crazy busy time even though the legislature hasn’t been regularly meeting due to budget negotiations. Hopefully, we are almost at that point in session where the Senate and House have some agreement to craft appropriation bills to vote and send to the executive before the end of June. During this time, I have been maintaining regular office hours, keeping in-person meetings or calling constituents to address concerns, and working through final revisions of some of this year’s legislation to get a vote in the House. This morning I will host a bipartisan group of Senators and Representatives at the Capitol with a briefing with Arizona Supreme Court Justices Ann Timmer and Clint Bolick on civil legal aid services in light of the Trump Administration’s plan to defund and dismantle the legal services corporation. This law has been around since the Nixon Administration and serves as the major source of funding for the three legal aid agencies in Arizona. Later today, hopefully, the House will vote out three more of my bills, including our animal cruelty bill (a.k.a. Jerry's Law) that has been endorsed by Maricopa County Sheriffs past and present, Joe Arpaio and Jerry Sheridan. If you support this bill, please contact your this morning to let them know you do, too. When constituents bring new issues to me this late in our legislative session it just means I spend additional time during the interim to look at the problem to see if it warrants a legislative solution because not everything does. As you may know, the deadline to introduce new legislation passed many months ago so there isn't an opportunity to bring forward new legislation at this time. Over the last few weeks, I have stopped by a few local small businesses to introduce myself, as well as, have attended a new networking group in north Phoenix. Yesterday, I stopped by Northwest Christian High School to present the team and their boys volleyball coach a State Senate sanctioned for this year’s boys high school varsity champions of their division. Go Crusaders! Last week, I had a chance to meet Anthony Anderson who is the CEO of Guardian of Valor Media LLC while he was in town. Anthony was a strong advocate for getting our state’s across the finish line. He and his family rented an RV and came to Arizona to personally thank us for passing this bill to honor and protect the uniform. On Thursday morning I stopped by Four Peaks Brewing Company annual in Tempe helping to hand out canvas bags for teachers to pick up much needed school supplies for their classrooms for their upcoming school year. In non-legislative news, my daughter took me to a a few weeks ago and it was a great way to release stress. How can you resist a sweet puppy pack kissing you while you are stretching, or doing downward dog? Those smile lines became more permanent that morning. If you are looking for something fun to do as outdoor temperatures soar, we highly recommend it. Bolick Bills In the News Senate Bill 1658 Animal Cruelty Legislation Senate Bill 1229 Starter Home Legislation Senate Bill 1106 Ava’s Law signed into law Campaign Information Do you reside in one of these Legislative District 2 zip codes: 85022 85023 85024 85027 85029 85032 85050 85053 85085 85308 85310 85331 If you answered yes and you are a registered Republican or an Independent voter, ensuring my name appears on the Republican primary ballot on the August 4, 2026. After session my team and I, will actively work to accomplish our campaign goals for the interim, but I’d surely appreciate your help. Today, you can use your driver's license to log on and sign my online nomination petition. Thank you for your continued support! Finally, to all of those lucky Dads out there have a wonderful Father's Day. "Dads are most ordinary men turned by love into heroes, adventurers, storytellers, and singers of song." ~ Unknown Take care, Shawnna | "Donate" | "Sign My Petition" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | PAID FOR BY VOTE BOLICK. name: Jacky Rosen
subject: I’ll be blunt.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Nevada State Democratic Party, NVDEMS
body:
We have a narrow window to change the trajectory and it starts here in Nevada. | | | Hi friend, I’ll be blunt. Republicans are pushing their reckless agenda — threatening health care for millions and slashing support for working families while handing out tax breaks to billionaires. It's cruel, it's dangerous, and we have to stop it. We have a narrow window to change the trajectory and it starts here in Nevada. **[_Early investment is crucial in a top battleground state like this one, so that’s why I’m reaching out to you personally for your support. Please, send any amount right now to NV Dems. Every dollar you give today helps us:_](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yTXL6bWk1iRCMprVoR5FeEcA_dER2bIsG5D9lEWZ8KHOBTM8vI3CbOfAu3H8IMiBBEqtuXKEdaqaWdn0Ty2ZN0oJde9budpnivQ5cPpmdSF3H8QTv8nHDJNmhMNudWIn7KxvMGTK1DTytkmReRtlZf7h6hWnkpmUEIcPGRQWJNFIHO1aMlApv95edp_fwuZ2nDAGhDVByBwrpYa8n3E2pyIgGAh0e8FMU652d4GfVpZaG3HblpOsRQSA4JLRU0L5-ZSzYdmN9ZwcRhlhyUfc6VBVhYoz7I9cgUoMpBp_snospf3N4DFJM4PUGQT7iCSIS9/4h9/tY5KNHpzTZyIfVQ5789YQw/h0/h001.nBZmEDjYFoPWwUj0wnJOcWkCx8f8VC4lKvEOVhNCASo)**
* **Build a strong field organizing program** now so we’re not playing catch-up next fall.
* **Recruit and train** Democratic campaign staff in every corner of the state.
* **Push back** against Republican lies and misinformation while holding GOP leaders accountable for extreme MAGA agenda.

We can’t afford to wait. We need to save our House seats and win statewide offices up and down the ballot in 2026. **[_I’m asking: will you chip in to NV Dems and help us take the fight directly to Republicans? Make the critical donations needed right now to help us win._](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu4ksFa5SF7IXH6Sr7Lz9yTXL6bWk1iRCMprVoR5FeEcA_dER2bIsG5D9lEWZ8KHOBTM8vI3CbOfAu3H8IMiBBEUnXODRyyaKt9B7y3UHe7JulMKjd0j3uCQR2gv002TdxRnNdHhwJqxrB1E3EoXthB24hKNwWQEZvMyCNTEm_xJaQB7NBg_CJkUpKa2t2_vVs8XQIRcO56DkT2zopdOB0SESFEBvsIToH2OQcahGD5-rZ015ROIeHT7kmEwQY6sguh04o-o8j-U376VDYjIbTWDiexpaJinF0Er_qq9thEHe47EdW97_kGKOxxrblytufp6p7DN4A7K1sggFqeB_8e/4h9/tY5KNHpzTZyIfVQ5789YQw/h1/h001.5JIshvkT13AEtbh9rwjF3yRO7Qf4PgwC0FxDH-iBFK4)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Tean Guzman
subject: We outraised again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman
body:

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: The Supreme Court needs a code of ethics. Here's how we fix it.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
We’re watching the Supreme Court make decisions that touch every part of our lives.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109396097/550961036/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZGY3MmQzNi1lNzQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fPlU_jBI-tAkj-IeRVJrtr-4GcMSUwxbw0GRd3yC7Ww=&emci=5fca9c05-3946-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=3df72d36-e746-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7731215)
---

| | We're watching the Supreme Court make decisions that touch every part of our lives — our bodies, our votes, our jobs, our rights, and our planet. And yet, it's the only branch of government that operates without a binding, enforceable code of ethics. **_That's unacceptable, and it has to change._** Headline after headline makes it painfully clear that we need stronger accountability and transparency. When Supreme Court Justices do not disclose lavish vacations, loans, private jet flights, and more from powerful people with business before the Court, it sends a message that justice is for sale. **The American people should never have to question whether a Justice's decisions are influenced by undisclosed gifts, political interests, or personal gain.** That's why I cosponsored Senator Whitehouse's Supreme Court Ethics, Recusal, and Transparency (SCERT) Act — legislation that would end this corruption and put real, ethical guardrails in place for the highest court in the land. **It's simple: Supreme Court Justices should follow ethics rules at least as strict as those that apply to every other federal judge. It's past time for real rules and real accountability.** The SCERT Act would:
* Require the Supreme Court to adopt a binding code of conduct
* Create a process to investigate violations of that code
* Strengthen recusal standards and require public explanations
* Increase transparency around gifts, travel, and income

Trust in our democracy depends on the integrity of our institutions, and right now, the Supreme Court is failing that test. This bill is a necessary step toward restoring that trust. I know you're with me in fighting for a government that puts people over powerful interests. Let's get this done. Onward! _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly:

body:
If every supporter reading this donated to support state Dems, we’d have the resources to defend and expand Democratic power from right-wing extremists in state legislatures across the map. | | |

subject: Netflix, Spotify, and Democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
Start a monthly gift for fair maps
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109396593/550962920/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU2YTA0NGQ0LWU4NDYtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qGHba1toR8jNNAOnxlH_QY7Z93wgIQlBZSxZMFBEb7M=&emci=6bc6691f-1646-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=e6a044d4-e846-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=8431045)
