**What will our budget look like this fall** when Ohio begins the process of redrawing its congressional maps (and we have to stop Republicans from trying to abuse their power again)?
**Will we be fully resourced to fight back** when the next proof-of-citizenship laws — like the SAVE Act in Congress — are proposed in state legislatures?
**Will we be able to direct critical resources to support democracy defenders** in the key state-level elections this fall or next year?
The answer depends — in large part — on the consistent support provided by our monthly donors. The further into the future we can budget, the more strategic and effective we can be.
**When you give monthly, you stay in the fight for our democracy every single month and become one of the most powerful supporters for fair maps.**
**[Start your monthly contribution today — even just a few dollars each month — and you’ll provide the steady, predictable funding we need to keep up our democracy-saving work.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109396599/550962926/1000002739?recurring=1&refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_MonthlyAppeal2_email_20250611-NDRC-Tier1-MonthlyAppeal2_mrch&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250611-NDRC-Tier1-MonthlyAppeal2_mrch&utm_campaign=MonthlyAppeal2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU2YTA0NGQ0LWU4NDYtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qGHba1toR8jNNAOnxlH_QY7Z93wgIQlBZSxZMFBEb7M=)**

We know that’s asking a lot, but with the stakes as high as they are, we can’t leave anything to chance. If you’re able, start your monthly donation to power the fight against gerrymandering — and rest assured that we will keep winning, together.
Onward,
Brianna Shamsuddoha

name: Rick Larsen
subject: The vital services of Cascade Job Corps:
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen
body:
Last week, Trump, Secretary of Labor Lori Chavez-DeRemer, and the Republican Rip-Off closed the Job Corps program in their efforts to give a tax break to the richest Americans and wealthiest corporations.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109396957/550964455/-201694504?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzY1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkNGMxNDFiYi1lOTQ2LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hTMtcq6vJ_gFxYBedJagCT5tjWENpbE6uS7ZURf5wl4=&emci=2c7ca874-2d42-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=d4c141bb-e946-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9494239)
---

| | **Last week, Trump, Secretary of Labor Lori Chavez-DeRemer, and the Republican Rip-Off closed the Job Corps program in their efforts to give a tax break to the richest Americans and wealthiest corporations.** **This is a harmful decision that will have devastating consequences for Northwest Washington.** During its 40-year history, Cascade Job Corps has:
* Helped more than **10,000 low-income young people** complete college credits and professional certifications.
* Currently, the program serves **250 young people** and employs **119 staff members**.
* Supports administrative capacity and career training services at the **Everett WorkSource Center**.

When the Trump administration officially shuts down Cascade Job Corps at the end of the month, many of those **250 young people** will lose access to housing and health care, and all of them will lose access to the education they were pursuing. All staff members will lose their jobs as well. Over a year ago, Secretary of Labor Lori Chavez-DeRemer was my colleague in the House of Representatives. Last year, she signed onto a letter supporting funding for the Job Corps program, but now, as the Secretary of Labor, she is shutting down the program. The Republican Rip-Off sows chaos, harms hardworking Americans, and disregards proven records of success like the Cascade Job Corps program. **These program cuts are not for efficiency; they are for funding a massive tax break to the richest Americans and wealthiest corporations.** More soon, _Rick_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly:

clean_body: Last week, Trump, Secretary of Labor Lori Chavez-DeRemer, and the Republican Rip-Off closed the Job Corps program in their efforts to give a tax break to the richest Americans and wealthiest corporations. | | | | Last week, Trump, Secretary of Labor Lori Chavez-DeRemer, and the Republican Rip-Off closed the Job Corps program in their efforts to give a tax break to the richest Americans and wealthiest corporations. This is a harmful decision that will have devastating consequences for Northwest Washington. During its 40-year history, Cascade Job Corps has: Helped more than 10,000 low-income young people complete college credits and professional certifications. Currently, the program serves 250 young people and employs 119 staff members. Supports administrative capacity and career training services at the Everett WorkSource Center. When the Trump administration officially shuts down Cascade Job Corps at the end of the month, many of those 250 young people will lose access to housing and health care, and all of them will lose access to the education they were pursuing. All staff members will lose their jobs as well. Over a year ago, Secretary of Labor Lori Chavez-DeRemer was my colleague in the House of Representatives. Last year, she signed onto a letter supporting funding for the Job Corps program, but now, as the Secretary of Labor, she is shutting down the program. The Republican Rip-Off sows chaos, harms hardworking Americans, and disregards proven records of success like the Cascade Job Corps program. These program cuts are not for efficiency; they are for funding a massive tax break to the richest Americans and wealthiest corporations. More soon, Rick | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Rick Larsen instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen. | This email was sent by .** Citizens to Elect Rick Larsen PO Box 326 Everett, WA 98206 United States Email is an important way for Rick Larsen to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Team Lizzie
subject: BREAKING: Texas Republicans looking at unprecedented power grab
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Non-Re-Elect%20Logo.png]
Every day this June, it feels like something unprecedented is happening. From the Trump/Musk breakup to today, the news is full of stories of attacks on our values and our democracy.
But there’s one alarming story we want to make sure you don’t miss. Monday night, the New York Times reported that President Trump’s political team is urging Texas Republicans to take “ruthless” action to stay in power. They’ve discussed the possibility of redrawing Congressional district maps, which could help Republicans gain up to five seats .
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250610?refcode=lpfe250611z_2 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250610?refcode=lpfe250611z_2]
We know a thing about these Democratic gains. This campaign is one of them . In 2018, Lizzie and several candidates in Texas fought hard to win Republican-held seats in Congress. They turned out Democrats all across the state, helping candidates state-wide. And, as you know, Lizzie and Colin Allred won those seats—helping win the House majority and meet the moment.
We know what it took to win this seat, and we know why winning it and giving Texans the representation they deserve was and is so important. We are not giving it back. Certainly, not without a fight.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250610?refcode=lpfe250611z_2]
We don’t usually say this, but we need your help right now. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250610?refcode=lpfe250611z_2] Here is why: We know what it takes to fight and to win. Right now, it takes resources to respond to this threat and to demonstrate to the people pushing this terrible idea that overwhelming support for Lizzie and candidates like her will shrink their majority in Congress, not grow it.
One way we show that is on our campaign finance report we will file this month. Will you make a contribution today to help us fight back? Every dollar you contribute helps to stop this dangerous power grab. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250610?refcode=lpfe250611z_2]
Together, we can make this plan backfire. We can remind the Republicans not to mess with Texas again. We can show why Lizzie and other Texas Democrats are representing our communities and our values in Congress today. But we can only do that if we have the resources to talk to people, to fight back in all the ways we need to, and to win what could be very tough elections next year.
We know we can—because of you. Thank you for standing with us in this critical moment.
—Team Lizzie

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250610?refcode=lpfe250611z_2]

We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6e96d569-d9c6-49df-aab0-2fb3c199abae/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| Peter, Donald Trump – our first CONVICTED FELON to serve as president – got away with even more crimes committed while trying to overturn Joe Biden’s 100% valid election. [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc75abee4-0e62-447e-b75e-2af46898ce88/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) We NEED to know if you think that Trump deserves to be impeached for his criminal behavior. Can you respond below and let us know? Should Donald Trump be impeached? [[YES, absolutely!]](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9a57a274-df48-4f71-996d-4684bea5899b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [[NO]](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tce3291a2-51b9-48b9-a994-40d042ef95cf/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) During his first term, Donald Trump was almost removed from office TWICE – but the GOP managed to block both attempts. If Democrats can take back control of the House and Senate, we can get the power to remove Trump from office once and for all. But we want to know if you think that Democrats should make impeachment a priority. Can you answer this one question poll and let us know your thoughts? Should Donald Trump be impeached? [[YES, absolutely!]](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc54929de-e174-4939-88fd-88e5a8beca3f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [[NO]](https://default.salsalabs.org/T90344c04-a120-4fc2-be98-2421376553d2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Thank you for your response! – Blue Amp Action

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T2b02e048-c342-410e-bd9b-cbdbc50f5b3c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

Thank you for your support for all we do! — You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can._ | Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC | | or

Peter,

I must've missed the update to Merrian-Webster's Dictionary for "peaceful," because this sure as heck isn't what I'd call a peaceful protest.

They're burning cars, ambushing law enforcement, and creating chaos in California.

**I 'm not sure about you, but I'd call this a violent riot.** We've got to hold everyone involved fully accountable, including Governor Newsom who refuses to step up, do his job, and restore law and order for innocent Californians.

He's even asked President Trump to arrest him.

_**Good. Lock him up.**_

As Alabama's next Governor, I'll do everything the opposite way as Governor Newsom handles the monstrosity he turned California into.

But the Left LOVES California, and they want all 50 states to be governed the same exact way. They're dumping MILLIONS of dollars into my race to flip Alabama blue.

Not on my watch.

Meet Coach Tuberville:

**Coach Tuberville was born in Camden, Arkansas, the third of three children of Olive and Charles Tuberville. College Football 's 2004 Coach of the Year and two-time SEC Coach of the Year, Tommy Tuberville is most often recognized for his success on the field. But it is the legacy of his father, a highly decorated WWII veteran and Purple Heart recipient, that motivates Coach Tuberville to give back to the brave men and women of the United States Armed Forces.

In 1989 Coach Tuberville met his future wife, Suzanne Fette, at the Sugar Bowl in New Orleans. They were married in 1991 and have two boys, Tucker and Troy, who continue to make their dad proud.

In his career as a College Football Coach, Tommy started a long and successful career at the University of Miami, starting as a graduate assistant and rising to the Hurricanes' defensive coordinator. He led the Canes to three AP national championships and coached future Hall of Famers Ray Lewis and Warren Sapp, as well as Dwayne "The Rock" Johnson.

In 1998, Coach Tuberville was announced as the next head coach for the Auburn Tigers. Tuberville's time at Auburn was a success by any measure, as the Tigers captured eight consecutive bowl appearances, including five New Year's Day bowl appearances, five SEC Western Division titles, one SEC Championship, and a 13-0 season in 2004, after which Coach Tuberville was once again named the AP's SEC Coach of the Year. For his efforts during the perfect 2004 season, Tuberville would be named Paul "Bear" Bryant Coach of the Year, Associated Press Coach of the Year, Walter Camp Coach of the Year, Sporting News Coach of the Year, and AFCA Coach of the Year, among others.

_In 2020, Coach Tuberville became Senator Tuberville, winning his election to represent all Alabamians in the United States Senate with the full support of President Trump. Since then, he's supported President Trump's America-First policies while fighting off the Radical Left. In his first term as Senator, Tommy was one of eight Republicans to vote against certifying the 2020 election, has been a strong pro-life advocate, and called out Democrats for being pro-crime.

Now, Coach Tuberville is running for Governor so he can continue representing Alabamians and Americans in his homestate of Alabama. The Radical Left thinks they can flip Alabama blue and turn it into the California of the South. Can he count on your support? _

** [**HELP COACH TUBERVILLE**](http://links.tubervilleforalabama.com/u/click?_t=b8b4efbe79f64b579dfa7d8da685a7a9&_m=94c22f7234104206a6ab68535e4e5b90&_e=0tm0sea_YEENjOB7W_c8eieoSvK_iVt_KHJKzIddbwgIClDwLKkAh4DTEI-6oFoVT6HOCvJj6y0WwX-JxQycO809gA-YjAkyPFZRVdP5tg51J8TSDWM3Ncq1eK0bUoJzDrFTcVIQPZJOtU9cDYUUUOqy7s6L6yXYLsrEOFL5twJobtGqbSK1b9-iT446uXGK6zEQLIEJ8HomgYma8mNX8N8qgh0F0A_d_Hz6C7foRNLr5zWhSwnGleOOXvwB9dOxW0OKBm4rm1HV3wXq0voQzCYGSu6a1OmsaOZwkAYBlOv66x0h7B3IUNqQRhE6vpYTA2jwhQ1q10sSitgkE6LxbdCPDS_U1t5Y1h8qJF2A2POFhhEoIZRdEI8MTA3jGa9jPcoNd9FntwotIII6Ssd5dytabtxG0Z-PWrBYGs_tSTEnUU9OSRLRDWmN_mFlbaOa3yN0ME2SCh14j1iCSCbtmy0mIkoD1kNwys-7kMVn8ZYjj01fKh4Yx_vVV0jAICkIN1ZlN4lgPDovIb6yKvu6_h3iI3vIFlgwqZsjNRqcYDLD9KL0yDUnU9--gg-v5sY9)

name: Randy Villegas
subject: No one’s humanity should be defined by a 9-digit Social Security number
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Villegas for Congress [#]
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP62/1/117525/images/Villegas%20Logo.png]
Friend,

As the son of immigrants, I am appalled by the events unfolding in Los Angeles and across the country these past few days. My family, like many others, came to this country in search of a better life for their children.

Immigrants are the backbone of this nation, and no one’s humanity should be defined by a 9-digit Social Security number. President Trump’s actions this weekend to deploy California’s National Guard against civilians is an abuse of power – not a solution to our broken immigration system. Our president has already crippled our local labor force by raiding workplaces; now, he is using our armed forces to terrorize our friends, neighbors, and community leaders.

Militarizing our cities is unacceptable. While I urge Californians to engage in peaceful protest and never condone violence, local authorities must also be able to do their jobs without the federal government creating chaos and destruction.

As the son of immigrants and an educator, I am disgusted by Congressman Valadao’s complicity and silence, as he continues to rubber stamp the Trump administration's agenda with every vote that he takes.

Thank you,

Randy Villegas

name: Gundry MD
subject: The "Invisible Scam" Nobody Knows About — Except The Big Food Companies Behind It
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
| [View in Web Browser](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMtu6jAQhp_G3hHZY8cOCy_OKTKLUlTRRaE73wKuYhJyFTx9BaXZznwz_6ffpKaK5VUh-R8BnKLvEABi_xDA5TCldvhOr-vFbXNMi4vYpvy-hZcnOsIMn50R4_RxOJN-0-22ZOC33edIZ7y_NmGGn6FZSCZW96lcYa9Y6QnHQVHJl0JwRgU-KcM4l84Kybm1wZpCFlZ6R6ynbGlzg6MCAjkRlFKZU1ZkNLAi97QkpSykM0vEySMnMym00Rna9ZNp27pOmasTrtSp75vuIaYR6Kmts_PgqjB0v2euTgj0UxmBHhHo_eqrOfZaX94Q04_S2IqtixT373XArfLNFKsqdkIiTo5_b_Co4CcAAP__RxJv7Q)
| | One of America’s top doctors is hoping you’ll read this before you set foot in another grocery store.

Renowned cardiothoracic surgeon Dr. Steven Gundry has found an “invisible problem” affecting almost everything we eat. But almost nobody knows it’s happening — except the big food companies responsible for it.

And Dr. Gundry’s research shows it could be the true cause of low energy, digestive issues, and unwanted weight gain in millions of Americans over 35.

But that’s not even the worst part.

“Because this problem has flown under the radar for decades, there are no rules to protect us. Nobody is stopping these companies from doing this to our food,” says Dr. Gundry.

He exposes exactly what’s happening — and what you can do about it — in a **[new whistleblowing video report that reveals his shocking research.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zsGOgjAQgOGnKTdJZ1paOPSwq8GDrsm6B9djhVa6UkWoNPr0G4zxOvNl_tG-a529KyI_CWLj6oEgEvZBEK_76Pvbn18tZ4_10c-uYuOzaYvzFx3xjc-VFmP82Z9pWA_bDb3xx3Y3wpuHe2fe-BVNjdeunaZykdSK2ZryxCiQvBCCMxBJozLGtDyANqwALLQ1h6q2BTci1zbTnCZOIcWMCgCQGbA8BcPyrAZLrcxlpQvC6bOTam96V2kYQtR9f7n4tLr4pFVNCN3wfKwkWMYY0-bUmRD60_k4EYLl6ht_5zuCJfsSyzUUE2XlcDsAYQvBJU16VXfRta0bhCScHp_F6f6o8D8AAP__pLlpWg)**

**“Once you’ve seen this,” Dr. Gundry says, “you’ll never buy groceries the same way again.”**

In his free video, Dr. Gundry reveals a new method for protecting yourself and your family from this little-known problem affecting food all across America.

It’s a technique he’s been using himself — and at age 74, he says it’s the reason he looks and feels decades younger.

The video has quickly gone viral, with thousands of people saying they’ve been using Dr. Gundry’s simple discovery at breakfast every day.

And as a result, they report having more energy, improved digestion, more comfortable joints, and a slimmer waistline.

Dr. Gundry has granted permission for us to share the full video below, completely free.

“Every American should have this information,” he says. “And if this video opens your eyes to what’s happening out there, I hope you’ll share it with your loved ones.”

[ ](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8zsGOgjAQgOGnKTdJZ1paOPSwq8GDrsm6B9djhVa6UkWoNPr0G4zxOvNl_tG-a529KyI_CWLj6oEgEvZBEK_76Pvbn18tZ4_10c-uYuOzaYvzFx3xjc-VFmP82Z9pWA_bDb3xx3Y3wpuHe2fe-BVNjdeunaZykdSK2ZryxCiQvBCCMxBJozLGtDyANqwALLQ1h6q2BTci1zbTnCZOIcWMCgCQGbA8BcPyrAZLrcxlpQvC6bOTam96V2kYQtR9f7n4tLr4pFVNCN3wfKwkWMYY0-bUmRD60_k4EYLl6ht_5zuCJfsSyzUUE2XlcDsAYQvBJU16VXfRta0bhCScHp_F6f6o8D8AAP__pLlpWg)

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8kMtuwjAQRb_G2RHZ48QOCy_aorAoQhVdtCwdP8BVHAc7D8HXV9CU7Z0zc49G-r519ioQf0UAZ6cTAkD0BQFcjrOP449_365uu5NfXdjel_cpvC3oBE-4U5JN8-exw8MuHfZ4LG6Hr4k88eHamye8lObGS9feU77JtKBW4yIzgvBizVhBCcvOQgPghnHLq9JqZq2ipSFFqWRD5dpWkDkBGErMCCG8JLTKiaFVqYnFlldcyTUq8KMnl95EpyRJwyxjDMHnKvisFedh6NNDrEZQzzHk3ahaM6a_NRU8gnpRRlCnsUkqun5woUsI6rFbksYgWj8-SDd0W3n3_RFMFoXuZ9e2LjGOCnz6v5lNAn4DAAD__3nEdgg)

body:
| | | Peter, I want to take a moment to thank you for your support, and for being a part of Team Knott. Through your encouragement, prayers, financial support, or simply standing with us, **_your commitment remains invaluable to Joanna and me._** Because of dedicated supporters like you, we continue to push forward, defending our shared conservative values and fighting for a stronger, safer future for all eight counties across NC-13 and our nation. As we look ahead to the 2026 election, I want you to know that I am energized and optimistic because we have such a passionate team by our side. **_With your help and God’s grace, we can accomplish anything._** Thank you for your trust and partnership. Let’s keep moving forward—together! With gratitude,Brad Knott

clean_body: | | | Peter, I want to take a moment to thank you for your support, and for being a part of Team Knott. Through your encouragement, prayers, financial support, or simply standing with us, your commitment remains invaluable to Joanna and me. Because of dedicated supporters like you, we continue to push forward, defending our shared conservative values and fighting for a stronger, safer future for all eight counties across NC-13 and our nation. As we look ahead to the 2026 election, I want you to know that I am energized and optimistic because we have such a passionate team by our side. With your help and God’s grace, we can accomplish anything. Thank you for your trust and partnership. Let’s keep moving forward—together! With gratitude,Brad Knott | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Paid for by Brad Knott for Congress Copyright © 2025 Knott for Congress Our mailing address is: Brad Knott for Congress PO Box 97275 Raleigh, NC 27624 If you would like to donate online, please visit our website . If you have any suggestions, comments, complaints, or feedback, please send your ideas to mailto:info@bradknott.com.

name: Sean Feucht
subject: URGENT: We're recruiting worshippers and revivalists to PRAY FOR L.A.
body:
| | |

| |

[](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=423443e60ff04ac4a17cfd05afb3394f&_e=S2cvfqX3rElDkrUlI7RgRjFNangCcDhbe-szaLVLjlcEsNVXMoKQAkViLYJf5-ZPdGLldwfbO-7JAVhRA-byoXMAelltFxNonmMZLwYaFNkcJT4pei51UPjcXW3uvsWAU0lAXlxZWa30tg7_-zTdAWzzFyR7NcJ5110z3zE-MKF57_-gqcgJVuukN7BfMCVJUglZkX492FnE4MF2L27PCwIzuyBVwUpZjDNs0mdj5dhpeIf7EPRA7QoL0lfQPA9rhFX6eZ3nmMdjj4vpYjn_m8qDFQkbAfCvEeTrGA6jGss7RlT3VMGZFX1TSnyJl3ECMKO-AiTMiG_3LHkwKYrj1Q%3D%3D)

Dear Peter,
---
Calling all worshippers and revivalists!! _TOMORROW IN LOS ANGELES,_ we are holding a time of prayer and worship for the city! _The extreme unrest in Los Angeles has spread to multiple cities across the country, and we need to PRAY!_ We've seen God move powerfully in Los Angeles, and we've seen Him move powerfully in the face of tragedy and catastrophe. And now we're crying out to Him to move once again! If you are in L.A. and can join us, we need you! We want to shake the walls of heaven and intercede on behalf of the millions of Believers who call California home, as well as the tens of millions who haven't yet bowed the knee to Jesus. This is bound to be a _POWERFUL_ night of prayer and worship — join us!
---

**WHERE** : Dream Center Chapel, 2301 Bellevue Ave. Los Angeles, CA This _PRAY FOR L.A._ revival wasn’t pre-planned and wasn’t budgeted for, so we’re putting out the call to the Let Us Worship army.

# Wednesday, June 11, 2025
---|---
**Good Afternoon!** We've got a quick note today from one of our sponsors, [IotaComm](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kL1uhDAQhJ_GdCD_YBsXLk46XXdpU1obezk2whiBjyhvH3GKUqbd79POaN7v4Q400_J4g4y-jiUkTBShYgqSS91y3Up1CaJJfkSUqBr0wvbOGKelaiZvFCKoZPWoLBd2kNZB7AcYhRMDaGjIn4-4EUIM3EjRRf6BcXQuOm1kj5r1HBPVsnWfhZY64Th_lwO3LpbczH6qdd2ZujB5Y_JGy4F77ahUiCXn0zmBuj1rDnt5bhGZumIGmpk05zFjomdm6roCpXaFrS647ROtvzxCXoEey8v4g2LgrTZD4KYVIkhhDTdWOe2azaf1i-aZdmNZzx9n1Ktq_Xe_w8ufAAAA__9nl3NX), offering an investment opportunity in breakthrough wifi technology. We hope you find [this opportunity compelling](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kL1uhDAQhJ_GdCD_YBsXLk46XXdpU1obezk2whiBjyhvH3GKUqbd79POaN7v4Q400_J4g4y-jiUkTBShYgqSS91y3Up1CaJJfkSUqBr0wvbOGKelaiZvFCKoZPWoLBd2kNZB7AcYhRMDaGjIn4-4EUIM3EjRRf6BcXQuOm1kj5r1HBPVsnWfhZY64Th_lwO3LpbczH6qdd2ZujB5Y_JGy4F77ahUiCXn0zmBuj1rDnt5bhGZumIGmpk05zFjomdm6roCpXaFrS647ROtvzxCXoEey8v4g2LgrTZD4KYVIkhhDTdWOe2azaf1i-aZdmNZzx9n1Ktq_Xe_w8ufAAAA__9nl3NX). -- Cole, _CEO_
* * *
[](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kL1uhDAQhJ_GdCD_YBsXLk46XXdpU1obezk2whiBjyhvH3GKUqbd79POaN7v4Q400_J4g4y-jiUkTBShYgqSS91y3Up1CaJJfkSUqBr0wvbOGKelaiZvFCKoZPWoLBd2kNZB7AcYhRMDaGjIn4-4EUIM3EjRRf6BcXQuOm1kj5r1HBPVsnWfhZY64Th_lwO3LpbczH6qdd2ZujB5Y_JGy4F77ahUiCXn0zmBuj1rDnt5bhGZumIGmpk05zFjomdm6roCpXaFrS647ROtvzxCXoEey8v4g2LgrTZD4KYVIkhhDTdWOe2azaf1i-aZdmNZzx9n1Ktq_Xe_w8ufAAAA__9nl3NX) **A $1.5T Tech Opportunity Bigger than Wi-Fi** Wi-Fi alone can't handle the technologies connecting businesses, schools, and major institutions. That's why major brands like **Crayola** and **GigNet** are tapping into [IotaComm's nationwide wireless network.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kL1uhDAQhJ_GdCD_YBsXLk46XXdpU1obezk2whiBjyhvH3GKUqbd79POaN7v4Q400_J4g4y-jiUkTBShYgqSS91y3Up1CaJJfkSUqBr0wvbOGKelaiZvFCKoZPWoLBd2kNZB7AcYhRMDaGjIn4-4EUIM3EjRRf6BcXQuOm1kj5r1HBPVsnWfhZY64Th_lwO3LpbczH6qdd2ZujB5Y_JGy4F77ahUiCXn0zmBuj1rDnt5bhGZumIGmpk05zFjomdm6roCpXaFrS647ROtvzxCXoEey8v4g2LgrTZD4KYVIkhhDTdWOe2azaf1i-aZdmNZzx9n1Ktq_Xe_w8ufAAAA__9nl3NX) The movement is part of a [$1.5T market brewing ](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kL1uhDAQhJ_GdCD_YBsXLk46XXdpU1obezk2whiBjyhvH3GKUqbd79POaN7v4Q400_J4g4y-jiUkTBShYgqSS91y3Up1CaJJfkSUqBr0wvbOGKelaiZvFCKoZPWoLBd2kNZB7AcYhRMDaGjIn4-4EUIM3EjRRf6BcXQuOm1kj5r1HBPVsnWfhZY64Th_lwO3LpbczH6qdd2ZujB5Y_JGy4F77ahUiCXn0zmBuj1rDnt5bhGZumIGmpk05zFjomdm6roCpXaFrS647ROtvzxCXoEey8v4g2LgrTZD4KYVIkhhDTdWOe2azaf1i-aZdmNZzx9n1Ktq_Xe_w8ufAAAA__9nl3NX)as schools, hospitals, factories, and cities turn to connected systems for air quality, energy efficiency, and safety. Their needs require **a standard of reliability and affordability that Wi-Fi simply can't meet.** [](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kL1uhDAQhJ_GdCD_YBsXLk46XXdpU1obezk2whiBjyhvH3GKUqbd79POaN7v4Q400_J4g4y-jiUkTBShYgqSS91y3Up1CaJJfkSUqBr0wvbOGKelaiZvFCKoZPWoLBd2kNZB7AcYhRMDaGjIn4-4EUIM3EjRRf6BcXQuOm1kj5r1HBPVsnWfhZY64Th_lwO3LpbczH6qdd2ZujB5Y_JGy4F77ahUiCXn0zmBuj1rDnt5bhGZumIGmpk05zFjomdm6roCpXaFrS647ROtvzxCXoEey8v4g2LgrTZD4KYVIkhhDTdWOe2azaf1i-aZdmNZzx9n1Ktq_Xe_w8ufAAAA__9nl3NX) IotaComm has the keys to this market, with **exclusive FCC-licensed spectrum.** Their proprietary Internet of Things (IoT) platform delivers real-time monitoring, analytics, and automation without relying on traditional Wi-Fi networks. For a limited time, shareholders have a unique opportunity to get **15% bonus shares** by investing before June 16th. **This is your chance to participate in IotaComm 's growth.** [I'm Ready to Invest](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJx8kL1uhDAQhJ_GdCD_YBsXLk46XXdpU1obezk2whiBjyhvH3GKUqbd79POaN7v4Q400_J4g4y-jiUkTBShYgqSS91y3Up1CaJJfkSUqBr0wvbOGKelaiZvFCKoZPWoLBd2kNZB7AcYhRMDaGjIn4-4EUIM3EjRRf6BcXQuOm1kj5r1HBPVsnWfhZY64Th_lwO3LpbczH6qdd2ZujB5Y_JGy4F77ahUiCXn0zmBuj1rDnt5bhGZumIGmpk05zFjomdm6roCpXaFrS647ROtvzxCXoEey8v4g2LgrTZD4KYVIkhhDTdWOe2azaf1i-aZdmNZzx9n1Ktq_Xe_w8ufAAAA__9nl3NX) ****
This is a paid advertisement for IotaComm's Regulation CF Offering. clean_body: I’ve already taken it on the chin several times with the Left's lies, and it will only get worse as we get closer to election day. | Peter, I won’t sugarcoat this. I’m in the fight of my life. The attacks on President Trump and his most loyal defenders in the Senate have been relentless. They’re rushing millions of dollars into battleground Senate seats across the country. I’ve already taken it on the chin several times with their lies, and it will only get worse as we get closer to election day. It will be a bare-knuckle fight to the finish because Montana could determine who controls the Senate Majority. Peter, I know by the end of this campaign, I’m going to be black and blue from all the Left’s attacks and the media’s brazen anti-Trump bias. For America, Steve Daines PS: The attacks from Democrats and the biased news media will be unrelenting and they have an endless stream of money. Steve Daines is a fifth-generation Montanan, life-long sportsman and father of four serving the people of Montana as their Senator. Steve is committed to always putting Montana first as he works to bring real change to Washington and fights for more jobs, less government and common sense solutions to get our country back on track. Senator Steve Daines | | Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana

> "This isn't just about protests here in Los Angeles. When Donald Trump sought blanket authority to commandeer the National Guard, he made that order apply to every state in this nation. **This is about all of us. name: IlhanOmar.com
subject: SIGN ON: Support Ilhan’s new bill protecting protesters
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Ilhan has introduced a new bill that would provide penalties for those in law enforcement that use violent force in response to a protest demonstration.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1665%2E791427%2Ekgqjvh)

[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-june25-protesters-bill/?source=em250611-1-180&akid=1665%2E791427%2Ekgqjvh)
Friend,
While Republicans — and even some Democrats — are busy praising ICE as they rip apart families and terrorize immigrant communities, Ilhan is working to hold ICE and other law enforcement accountable for wrongdoing.
Ilhan has introduced a new bill that would provide penalties for those in law enforcement that use violent force in response to a protest demonstration.
**[If you want to show you support for this common sense idea, sign on today and endorse Ilhan’s bill:**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-june25-protesters-bill/?source=em250611-1-180&akid=1665%2E791427%2Ekgqjvh)
**[ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-june25-protesters-bill/?source=em250611-1-180&akid=1665%2E791427%2Ekgqjvh)**
In Minneapolis and across the country, we’re seeing the Trump administration use militarized force to silence, intimidate, and brutalize, not just protestors who are exercising their First Amendment rights, but also members of the press.
This is part of a broader, more sinister, and deeply un-American agenda from the Trump administration to surveil and criminalize individuals for their political views.
What we have now seen throughout the protests in Los Angeles is that Trump is practically eager to unleash the National Guard, the Marines, and other armed law enforcement against nonviolent protesters.
And as a result, over the last week we have seen videos of citizens beaten with batons, journalists shot with less-lethal ammunition, and countless nonviolent protesters tackled to the ground and brutally arrested.
**This is why Ilhan has introduced legislation to make law enforcement violence against protesters a federal crime — now she is asking for your help to raise the alarm on this.**
**[Please, add your name today and endorse Ilhan’s legislation to hold law enforcement accountable for violence and wrongdoing. We can’t let the Trump administration get away with using violence to crush dissent like a dictator.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-june25-protesters-bill/?source=em250611-1-180&akid=1665%2E791427%2Ekgqjvh)
**[SIGN ON NOW](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-june25-protesters-bill/?source=em250611-1-180&akid=1665%2E791427%2Ekgqjvh)**
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=1665%2E791427%2Ekgqjvh)**. Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=1665%2E791427%2Ekgqjvh)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=1665_791427_kgqjvh&akid=1665%2E791427%2Ekgqjvh)**.

Washington D.C., 20033

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: California may be first, but it clearly will not end here
body:
| | |
---
| Friend,
Donald Trump, without consulting with California's law enforcement leaders, commandeered 2,000 of our state's National Guard members to deploy on our streets. Illegally, and for no reason. This brazen abuse of power by a sitting President inflamed a combustible situation putting our people, our officers, and the National Guard at risk. Last night I gave a speech about the situation that was carried on the cable networks and viewed millions of times on the internet. I hope you had a chance to watch it. [You can find the video here. Please watch and share.](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QxPlLgHPCEYHYX7ZzU_w02fb6LPTY8NzI3MOPhyAlEz7RUXHiMav-eehYRGF4RVmv7q_8eZm0jClLja62smcCTEbKiR_uKf2v5R69k0Miaja5P3SCBYQr9JU0IlX-FaLL_o_a6eUxwAonMpIjHr_DaKLJ-Yqiitx8M3QiFUuutF7ZbEDltVo3udjjBfd9vf3Mw4aoJ-Nm1vj630aDiHfsjjRuYQJMk1e&c=HPQHwHYLMVtf3tzVPnbGWIdmE0GeYKMz8FtrE5ToyHexJX8IfjYc_w==&ch=Pn1RKd4wYJGhjk6ZyyEVtDIFDwPFPlUMGEWjOdYz4tQYQ6CU6ng4_w==)

---
| [WATCH THE VIDEO](https://wep8ryhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001QxPlLgHPCEYHYX7ZzU_w02fb6LPTY8NzI3MOPhyAlEz7RUXHiMav-eehYRGF4RVmv7q_8eZm0jClLja62smcCTEbKiR_uKf2v5R69k0Miaja5P3SCBYQr9JU0IlX-FaLL_o_a6eUxwAonMpIjHr_DaKLJ-Yqiitx8M3QiFUuutF7ZbEDltVo3udjjBfd9vf3Mw4aoJ-Nm1uMweS_fGT_3N4ZXQw-ijzo&c=HPQHwHYLMVtf3tzVPnbGWIdmE0GeYKMz8FtrE5ToyHexJX8IfjYc_w==&ch=Pn1RKd4wYJGhjk6ZyyEVtDIFDwPFPlUMGEWjOdYz4tQYQ6CU6ng4_w==)
---
This isn't just about protests here in Los Angeles, when Donald Trump sought blanket authority to commandeer the National Guard, he made that order apply to every state in this nation. This is about all of us. This is about you. California may be first, but it clearly will not end here. Other states are next. Democracy is next. Democracy is under assault before our eyes. \- Gavin Newsom
---
| | | To my fellow Democrats -- don't scroll past this. Before you go, we are humbly asking you to split a donation between Gavin Newsom's Campaign for Democracy and Defend Our Courts. If you believe Democrats need to go on offense, even in Red States, we're asking you to donate $20 to help Gavin Newsom & Defend Our Courts get it done. If you care about abortion access, voting rights, and the future of our democracy, please take a minute to donate today. name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Use the 25th Amendment to Remove Trump NOW
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Use the 25th Amendment to Remove Trump NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T72f788f5-4dc2-4eda-9732-c8dfabb46d07/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T804a5af2-9e11-4aae-8d64-476fee20f8fc/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | It's hard to believe it, but Trump has gotten even worse. His asinine trade wars have wrought economic havoc and turned the world against us. He is no longer even pretending to follow the Constitution. He is sending combat troops to be used against our own citizens. And his cognitive decline has been rapid, obvious, and incredibly frightening. **Trump needs to go NOW. We can't endure 3 1/2 more years of this.[It's time to use the 25th Amendment to remove Trump.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T11f7121b-a2fa-4ad7-8563-d3cf1f7a0bef/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** The 25th Amendment allows the Vice President and a majority of cabinet members to remove the president, if they believe he is unable to perform his duties. We've reached that point. And we need put pressure on them to move NOW. Yes, the cabinet is full of Trump supporters, and is unlikely to move immediately. But as time goes on, and Trump worsens, there's a chance they will start turning against him, the way cabinet members from his first term did. The more pressure we put on them, the quicker we can make this happen. **They are opportunists, and if it looks like the ship is sinking, they will throw the captain overboard before they go down with the ship.** (And yes, that would make Vance president, but as horrible as Vance is, Trump represents a unique and existential threat to America) [**Add your name, and demand the 25th amendment be used to remove Trump NOW.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3d1a1cfb-5658-4eb5-8c17-1f0fe8bdad13/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---
| | | Thank you, Left Action

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | It's hard to believe it, but Trump has gotten even worse. His asinine trade wars have wrought economic havoc and turned the world against us. He is no longer even pretending to follow the Constitution. He is sending combat troops to be used against our own citizens. And his cognitive decline has been rapid, obvious, and incredibly frightening. Trump needs to go NOW. We can't endure 3 1/2 more years of this. The 25th Amendment allows the Vice President and a majority of cabinet members to remove the president, if they believe he is unable to perform his duties. We've reached that point. And we need put pressure on them to move NOW. Yes, the cabinet is full of Trump supporters, and is unlikely to move immediately. But as time goes on, and Trump worsens, there's a chance they will start turning against him, the way cabinet members from his first term did. The more pressure we put on them, the quicker we can make this happen. They are opportunists, and if it looks like the ship is sinking, they will throw the captain overboard before they go down with the ship. (And yes, that would make Vance president, but as horrible as Vance is, Trump represents a unique and existential threat to America) | | | | | | | Thank you, Left Action | | | | | | Other things you can do: Follow us on * Follow Us | | LeftAction Washington, District of Columbia info@leftaction.com | Having trouble viewing this email? | | | or

* * *
Trump escalated his authoritarian assault on Los Angeles over the last 48 hours.
Not only did he deploy **2,000 additional National Guard troops,** but he also sent **700 active-duty Marines** against peaceful protesters who were simply standing up for their neighbors targeted by ICE raids.
**This is the first time in 60 years a president has seized control of a state's National Guard without the governor's consent.** The last time it happened? 1965 — when President Lyndon B. Johnson federalized Alabama's National Guard to PROTECT civil rights marchers walking from Selma to Montgomery against violent state opposition.
This is a sick inversion of that history.
If we stay silent now, it won't stop in LA. Tomorrow, it could be Cresco. Your neighbors. Your community could be the one facing military force for exercising constitutional rights.
**History is watching. And it will remember how we respond next.**

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: California may be first, but it clearly will not end here
body:
This isn't just about protests here in Los Angeles, when Donald Trump sought blanket authority to commandeer the National Guard, he made that order apply to every state in this nation. This is about all of us. This is about you. | Peter, Donald Trump, without consulting with California's law enforcement leaders, commandeered 2,000 of our state's National Guard members to deploy on our streets. Illegally, and for no reason. This brazen abuse of power by a sitting President inflamed a combustible situation putting our people, our officers, and the National Guard at risk. Last night I gave a speech about the situation that was carried on the cable networks and viewed millions of times on the internet. I hope you had a chance to watch it. **[You can find the video here. Please watch and share.](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtQ015DALyoo_p911pB7NOahTzsdINICiN7QmDZY3Jo90r53B7A-f7oatdtNZYkBIwzrYWhMwkx19ZZEhXDJqTl3GVPAhWzPvWNwXVNY4vQUl-Vh9g33xV__cqOxlIIVi-BNYS-8gres6Ks5y0hC7YYM1_SwbNYDsbF4Wl9588smLX9pgS0t2ArZHWtL1PiSlyAFWMbaaP-u6sRKHNGsGn0DyEJRRQkNaYAJyl4PjLjsZU10_LCrfp5P9Kw7vHX25WNuVvkmV4n8C9eDiwlVVxcF4mcuymFzwK7djiWtLBgfeYerSPAcHGdxoctU2turRx-pqir9F2d76PILsgfCPXE/4h9/hvZWOJoaTOauHypoH_Ckgg/h0/h001.UdaTPlZFlUbDe0vwaUahD-OJOQ9Y7cR7SkfrXkB6XQI)**

This is about all of us. This is about you. | Peter, Donald Trump, without consulting with California's law enforcement leaders, commandeered 2,000 of our state's National Guard members to deploy on our streets. name: Katie Porter
subject: Some reflections on the school year
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39797%2E3422442%2EvggCsj)
Dear Derek,
I just finished my first term back in the classroom after my time in Congress, and my kids just wrapped up their school year, so I’ve been thinking again about the importance of teaching and learning.
In many ways, serving in elected office is pretty similar to being a professor.
I learned how to question (sometimes incompetent) witnesses in hearings because as a teacher, **I had learned how to get an answer out of hungover students who hadn’t done the reading.** I had also learned that if you only call on the highest, loudest hands, you’ll only ever hear from a certain subset of people.
If elected officials are doing the job right, **they should be constantly learning** —from colleagues, experts, stakeholders, and everyday people—about the challenges communities face and possible solutions. **And, they should be teaching:** bringing people together, building political support, and keeping constituents up to date about what’s happening in government.
That’s the kind of mindset I’ll bring to my work as governor. I’m going to be in communities, touring, listening, and learning. I want to bring all voices to the table to tackle California’s biggest challenges.
**[If you agree that we should have more teachers in politics, would you consider making a $5 donation today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250611_1_ak?refcode=em20250611-39797&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39797_3422442_vggCsj&akid=39797%2E3422442%2EvggCsj)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250611_1_ak?refcode=em20250611-39797&refcode2=39797_3422442_vggCsj&akid=39797%2E3422442%2EvggCsj)
Happy summer!
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250611-39797&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39797_3422442_vggCsj&akid=39797%2E3422442%2EvggCsj)**

Peter — What we’ve witnessed in Los Angeles should terrify every American. **Donald Trump deployed nearly 5,000 military personnel, including 700 Marines, against American citizens exercising their First Amendment rights.**
And to make matters worse, he seized control of California's National Guard against Governor Newsom's explicit objections. This hasn't happened since the 1960s. There's a reason for that.
Trump has done nothing but torch the rule of law — he’s pardoned 1,500 insurrectionists, spat on court orders, stripped people of their constitutional due process, called for a governor's arrest, hijacked the California National Guard, and has now deployed 700 U.S. Marines on an American city.
**Let’s be clear: We're staring down the barrel of a full-blown dictator.**
We can’t stay silent while Trump shreds every democratic norm that makes America, America. What's happening in Los Angeles is dangerous.

clean_body: This is what authoritarianism looks like. | | Peter — What we’ve witnessed in Los Angeles should terrify every American. Donald Trump deployed nearly 5,000 military personnel, including 700 Marines, against American citizens exercising their First Amendment rights. And to make matters worse, he seized control of California's National Guard against Governor Newsom's explicit objections. This hasn't happened since the 1960s. There's a reason for that. Trump has done nothing but torch the rule of law — he’s pardoned 1,500 insurrectionists, spat on court orders, stripped people of their constitutional due process, called for a governor's arrest, hijacked the California National Guard, and has now deployed 700 U.S. Marines on an American city. Let’s be clear: We're staring down the barrel of a full-blown dictator. We can’t stay silent while Trump shreds every democratic norm that makes America, America. What's happening in Los Angeles is dangerous. Thank you for speaking out, Unite the Country | Unite the Country is fighting to hold Donald Trump accountable, expose his broken promises, and protect the progress we’ve made over the past four years — but we can’t do it without you! At this critical moment in American history, we’re calling on every Democrat to join Unite the Country in this fight. = = = Follow along: | Paid for by Unite the Country, , and not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. | Here’s the truth, team –

Republicans are no longer the "party of family values" or "fiscal responsibility." They’re the party of selling out those who need the most help for those who ALREADY have the most.

We saw this play out last month, when a Republican House majority pushed through a disastrous budget bill – the single biggest cut to healthcare in history, and the biggest tax breaks to billionaires and big corporations.

**Not only are they ripping away your hard-earned money, they’re ripping away your hard-earned benefits too.**

I’m showing up and fighting back – not just with words, but with actions. I’m fighting to protect affordable healthcare, preserve the Great Lakes, and support Michigan’s rail and clean energy projects to create jobs and strengthen our rural communities.

**I’ll never stop fighting, but right now, national Republican mega-donors are planning to flood our state with millions of dollars in attack ads to cover more ground and undo the progress we’ve made. subject: Texas Republicans are trying to rig the rules
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY POWERED BY PEOPLE
body:
[1]Powered By People

Texas Republicans are trying to rig the game.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250611.uyT6IS&refcode=ema20250611-240147&t=1001&akid=240147%2E444211%2EDOLIxW ]The Texas Tribune: Texas' GOP congressional delegation meets to discuss
redrawing districts ahead of midterms

At the urging of Trump’s political team, nearly every Texas Republican in
the House met to discuss a plan to redraw our state’s congressional map.
Their goal? Gerrymander districts even more aggressively so they stay in
power after the midterm elections no matter how unpopular their agenda
becomes.

They’re pushing Governor Abbott to call a special legislative session to
redraw district lines mid-decade – an extremely rare and deeply
undemocratic move.

Why are they doing this? Beto put it best:

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250611.uyT6IS&refcode=ema20250611-240147&t=1002&akid=240147%2E444211%2EDOLIxW ]A post on X from Beto O'Rourke: 'Used to be that voters chose their
member of Congress. But TX Republicans are so worried that they can’t win
on the merits of slashing health care, defunding public education, and
taking food away from hungry kids that they’re trying to rig the rules
before the elections begin.'

Instead of trying to improve the lives of working Texans, Republicans
would rather push Donald Trump’s unpopular agenda and rewrite the rules to
make sure they win no matter what.

Texas deserves better. That’s why Powered by People is fighting back.
We’re on the ground right now registering as many voters as possible and
organizing communities to protect our democracy at the ballot box. But we
need a powerful grassroots movement if we’re going to win in 2026.

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250611.uyT6IS&refcode=ema20250611-240147&amount=3&t=1003&akid=240147%2E444211%2EDOLIxW ]Can you chip in $3 today to help us register more voters
across Texas and fight back against Republican gerrymandering?

[ https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20250611.uyT6IS&refcode=ema20250611-240147&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=240147%2E444211%2EDOLIxW ]DONATE $3

Thank you for being in this fight with us,

Powered by People

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to act. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://act.betoorourke.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1023&akid=240147%2E444211%2EDOLIxW

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: My story is not so different
body:
Fellow American, I grew up in a single room behind my parents’ family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. |
---
Fellow American,

I grew up in a single room behind my parents' family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina.

I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. I quickly took on the responsibility of helping raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, and running the family businesses.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3f24cb43ee344366ac01ac06716b4da9&_e=zxHaBgqz-fno4iBhS7Ev-ocQpNA9Tbfb-whtuAgRsvKk9dKX-2A2YYAZQqe3l_UtSZbtNaFZ8rWob5EwKaUBAt7Z-fj0BtXf7CibXT3yoGg9c75pPpxfFbNAvPHFEut5NXSQrx8cxyd2bFMi6NB7waFxg_iCdSDGv_I7YpDn6l8U0rNc5TTtlBJjH_Er3Sf3c1bq7nAykPd0W6eSLcErR3A0kQ8Fu_W1At2nahlJJiGmUGQvaHUTGFGNNxNTfZ_YU1K5ghIaHBStxkAq7v3u3AwJh89HVKugR6B3fAvOs3KJqgBwVRICNIT0JfZ4zzbbvLzdGtn07yZN4JOcn-rVoKR4oznwojHBv25YgDQ0d42jw3-IOQmHUnN_ggGcqP_H)
**I had to grow up fast, Fellow American,_and I learned many life lessons at an early age._**

After attending law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a member of the Judge Advocate General Corps, where I served as a military prosecutor and defense attorney.

Even after being elected to the United States Senate, I continued to wear the uniform and served in the U.S. Air Force Reserves, where I performed several short deployments in the war zones of Afghanistan and Iraq.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3f24cb43ee344366ac01ac06716b4da9&_e=zxHaBgqz-fno4iBhS7Ev-ocQpNA9Tbfb-whtuAgRsvKk9dKX-2A2YYAZQqe3l_UtSZbtNaFZ8rWob5EwKaUBAt7Z-fj0BtXf7CibXT3yoGg9c75pPpxfFbNAvPHFEut5NXSQrx8cxyd2bFMi6NB7waFxg_iCdSDGv_I7YpDn6l8U0rNc5TTtlBJjH_Er3Sf3c1bq7nAykPd0W6eSLcErR3A0kQ8Fu_W1At2nahlJJiEENr9n2HgHtT9lihQn5Ulqa7mojww5_lWjCICorNSQCHBWu9D5CKhGz92z8f3pYIRrGPB8nH3Y4duoqTLjIjlHeWJLsfsyfn3uNw_Qz24pl5tK-ws43Sp6EjvdXL5iaclyXBxvzr2TshezS6ihe8Qc)
Fellow American, my story is similar to that of most Americans. I didn't grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth with everything handed to me. I had to grow up fast and work hard. I learned a lot of valuable lessons at a young age and took on a whole lot of responsibility.

But one thing stuck with me over the years -- the perspectives I gained from listening to the hard-working South Carolinians who were regulars at my family's pool hall or my brave colleagues in the military. Their perspectives, whether I agreed with them or not, helped build my foundation for understanding what Americans need.

**It's no secret that our nation is sharply divided right now, but there are some things we should all agree on.**

**We need a country that is a safe place to live and raise a family, and we need a country where the American Dream is alive and possible for everyone, no matter where they start from.**

Fellow American, I'm fighting every day to make those two things a reality. Sadly, there are people across the aisle in Washington who simply can't agree with us on these issues. They are okay with open borders and the flow of violent crime into our neighborhoods and onto our streets. They are okay with punishing hard-working Americans with higher taxes, deepening the burden on them and their families.

**[That's why I'm reaching out with a simple request: if you have a few dollars to spare, would you consider making a contribution to support my campaign by clicking this link or the button below?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3f24cb43ee344366ac01ac06716b4da9&_e=zxHaBgqz-fno4iBhS7Ev-ocQpNA9Tbfb-whtuAgRsvKk9dKX-2A2YYAZQqe3l_UtSZbtNaFZ8rWob5EwKaUBAt7Z-fj0BtXf7CibXT3yoGg9c75pPpxfFbNAvPHFEut5NXSQrx8cxyd2bFMi6NB7waFxg_iCdSDGv_I7YpDn6l8U0rNc5TTtlBJjH_Er3Sf3c1bq7nAykPd0W6eSLcErR3A0kQ8Fu_W1At2nahlJJiGdiKpiwkIt_In13gS0J_kkYE9ttEaNYmTTeh-bEl64a49dIcsrudtSVBJUNBgdmoBHCQhaf0J7NhsGDD74zsQplvgRdOg412xf929-Mz4zlxI1Vy8fHEn2-jjMPXYjDczzXPdZ7vmRgFkuhVxN64dQ)**

| [** CONTRIBUTE HERE **](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3f24cb43ee344366ac01ac06716b4da9&_e=zxHaBgqz-fno4iBhS7Ev-ocQpNA9Tbfb-whtuAgRsvKk9dKX-2A2YYAZQqe3l_UtSZbtNaFZ8rWob5EwKaUBAt7Z-fj0BtXf7CibXT3yoGg9c75pPpxfFbNAvPHFEut5NXSQrx8cxyd2bFMi6NB7waFxg_iCdSDGv_I7YpDn6l8U0rNc5TTtlBJjH_Er3Sf3c1bq7nAykPd0W6eSLcErR3A0kQ8Fu_W1At2nahlJJiFnENRGzv3BPoWDFVf0gEKt96A1bDTW9HTiy8xjrL_hUXX6B2qWKHWgvlitm83wcjjGtcLRorqjL6r_l_iCfSwyNbYfrEQquPdyHSOdW4i6tsjhK2qvCZ1B-oS2DJKRKSpGrdf-lJoJZBu-yNwq8QT_)
---

If you're unable to contribute financially, I understand. I'd greatly appreciate it if you could forward this email along to a friend or family member to help amplify my message.

Together, I know we can build the country that protects our communities, rewards hard work, and ensures every hard-working American has a shot at their dreams, just like I was so fortunate to have.

Thank you for taking a moment out of your busy day to read this message.

Sincerely,
Lindsey Graham

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3f24cb43ee344366ac01ac06716b4da9&_e=zxHaBgqz-fno4iBhS7Ev-qpLATs2j0YippUrgqNtDRbYyedM3kBWlv2oQXXSgwecokkAl8dlnJsJaWRZaIbVPgpdLbjIgO66kf0D9fhxTxh19CYz4xaDjzKqBHwx6BgwgHdTA1CjHA2k_xAA9PfsW7qUiQ8J4oECvg0_Vz-4_Jz3ofgFl2_vF792YPtUlVlkUofjNpIKWUYMcg7PfXCkzxGRDaxRBXQTqvmZba9DmYk%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=3f24cb43ee344366ac01ac06716b4da9&_e=zxHaBgqz-fno4iBhS7Ev-ocQpNA9Tbfb-whtuAgRsvKk9dKX-2A2YYAZQqe3l_UtSZbtNaFZ8rWob5EwKaUBAt7Z-fj0BtXf7CibXT3yoGg9c75pPpxfFbNAvPHFEut5NXSQrx8cxyd2bFMi6NB7waFxg_iCdSDGv_I7YpDn6l8U0rNc5TTtlBJjH_Er3Sf3c1bq7nAykPd0W6eSLcErR3A0kQ8Fu_W1At2nahlJJiHiA2hwMDpM8wgEa4MBsH2erowoOIOFxAuuGf2YoT3z3gxwzzcJKM6x8aGP4g6KVcr1VYeOQM-rEvFaLNlss7BxrDtAPAeaebsBTKQHHGcy3EdHj4VBOlB3O8JUffChZ6GOlVSlGfBhDsmckBIok6Fx)
In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges.

clean_body: Fellow American, I grew up in a single room behind my parents’ family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. | Fellow American, I grew up in a single room behind my parents' family-owned liquor store, restaurant, and pool hall in Central, South Carolina. I was the first in my family to attend college, and while I was in school, I lost my mother and father within two years of one another. I quickly took on the responsibility of helping raise my 13-year-old sister, Darline, and running the family businesses. I had to grow up fast, Fellow American,and I learned many life lessons at an early age. After attending law school, I joined the U.S. Air Force as a member of the Judge Advocate General Corps, where I served as a military prosecutor and defense attorney. Even after being elected to the United States Senate, I continued to wear the uniform and served in the U.S. Air Force Reserves, where I performed several short deployments in the war zones of Afghanistan and Iraq. Fellow American, my story is similar to that of most Americans. I didn't grow up with a silver spoon in my mouth with everything handed to me. I had to grow up fast and work hard. I learned a lot of valuable lessons at a young age and took on a whole lot of responsibility. But one thing stuck with me over the years -- the perspectives I gained from listening to the hard-working South Carolinians who were regulars at my family's pool hall or my brave colleagues in the military. Their perspectives, whether I agreed with them or not, helped build my foundation for understanding what Americans need. It's no secret that our nation is sharply divided right now, but there are some things we should all agree on. We need a country that is a safe place to live and raise a family, and we need a country where the American Dream is alive and possible for everyone, no matter where they start from. Fellow American, I'm fighting every day to make those two things a reality. Sadly, there are people across the aisle in Washington who simply can't agree with us on these issues. They are okay with open borders and the flow of violent crime into our neighborhoods and onto our streets. They are okay with punishing hard-working Americans with higher taxes, deepening the burden on them and their families. | If you're unable to contribute financially, I understand. I'd greatly appreciate it if you could forward this email along to a friend or family member to help amplify my message. Together, I know we can build the country that protects our communities, rewards hard work, and ensures every hard-working American has a shot at their dreams, just like I was so fortunate to have. Thank you for taking a moment out of your busy day to read this message. Sincerely, Lindsey Graham In the United States Senate, South Carolina's Lindsey Graham has earned a reputation as a conservative, a problem-solver, and a leader who gets things done. He is a great friend to our men and women serving in uniform, a respected voice on national security matters, a leading advocate for cutting the out-of-control spending in Washington, and a champion for confirming conservative judges. | Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Air Force or the Department of Defense. body:
This Pride Month, help us support our LGBTQ+ neighbors across the Volunteer State.

| | | | Dear Peter, June is Pride Month — a time to celebrate the courage, resilience and joy of LGBTQ+ Tennesseans. While communities across our state raise their flags in solidarity, Republican legislators continue to attack our friends and loved ones in the LGBTQ+ community. Tennessee Democrats are standing up, speaking out, and fighting back — but we need your help to keep going. 🌟 Our caucus has introduced legislation to protect Tennessee’s youth and fought every step of the way against bigoted bills.
🌟 We’re organizing in every corner of the state to elect leaders who believe in equality and justice.
🌟 And we’re not afraid to take the fight directly to the far right. **Will you chip in today to help us build a Tennessee that’s safe and welcoming for _everyone_?**

Peter,

You’re not gonna believe this...

**George Soros just dumped MILLIONS into Texas** to try and flip our state blue.

I wish I were kidding.

Soros is bankrolling a group called ****Texas Majority PAC**** , and they’ve teamed up with the Texas Democrats to launch a massive campaign—** _eight figures_** —to try and buy the 2026 elections.

They’re calling it “Blue Texas.”

I call it an absolute nightmare.

[**Before I continue, will you chip in an emergency contribution immediately to help stop George Soros and the radical left from turning Texas blue?**](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=88e8557841bf4f7a8c33f4b3771d2211&_e=QiDzo5RG-xfbYvCfJskgLPAkjfyaD-FjJJIOChhUX0LMnXPtAx3Zpce4Ju_I3qyYydg2MH7de1hUNvYdassEc6uDybEW1ECXVC3ibFbzUydstojzxz-tr3AzWIUOa0a3Yd8idaRR6x4HCONQMEz8OqOlJVNlzaXcvVJMcNqpzHjJKUFgW1msCyt-pvSmHVccQlm23a6kwPMGlUhi2GV5viIIZp5aq9RpKjnWj2ySg43gXT5AH7c6FTo_x2lE-P1EivPkZlo5h2Mhl8eIq93ncuWRMaix4Y7pQiMk-XqoFEBYxgS3A1JN2FoaG23-O0K6Og-MP2_DJaJFuaADUP_ZB3cUtguK5yMaBC5LBVT48tmxk1kqkkYED_lBlvJDJPp0fKYgehuYrls54jtZQDZV7qjKwKs-VKmskN7YBDA4De1ZypF9xVtgUrDoaOS0y-Df)

They’re planning rallies all over the state—Dallas, Houston, Austin, San Antonio—you name it. They’ve even got a “Turn Texas Blue” tour hitting over **24 cities**.

Look, Soros has spent years successfully destroying cities with soft-on-crime DAs and radical leftist prosecutors. And now he wants to bring that same chaos to every city across Texas?

_**Not on my watch.**_

I’ll tell you what this is really about:

The left knows they can’t win on ideas. So they’re trying to BUY power. They want to pump cash into every corner of our state and hope Texans don’t notice what’s happening.

Well, we noticed. And we’re not gonna sit back and let it happen.

Beth Van Duyne
Congresswoman, TX-24

**GET TO KNOW BETH:
** | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world.

Where else but the United States could a girl leave home at the age of 17, put herself through college, become the first female Mayor of her hometown, and then be asked to serve America in a presidential administration?

**Beth Van Duyne is running for Congress because she knows the people of the 24th District deserve to have a strong, principled voice in Congress.**

She's been asked what prompted her to run for public office; the answer is simple – her children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorist jihad. When Beth thinks about her two children, she wants them to have the same opportunities in life that she did; She wants them to be able to grow up safe and proud of our country.

**Beth is a single mom, a conservative Republican, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, a believer in the rule of law** who has helped remove thousands of criminal aliens from North Texas, a leader who helped deliver growth and new job opportunities, and a Constitutionalist who has never backed down when it comes to protecting the rights of all North Texans.

clean_body: They’re planning rallies all over the state—Dallas, Houston, Austin, San Antonio—you name it. They’ve even got a “Turn Texas Blue” tour hitting over 24 cities. | Peter, You’re not gonna believe this... George Soros just dumped MILLIONS into Texas to try and flip our state blue. I wish I were kidding. Soros is bankrolling a group called **Texas Majority PAC , and they’ve teamed up with the Texas Democrats to launch a massive campaign— eight figures —to try and buy the 2026 elections. They’re calling it “Blue Texas.” I call it an absolute nightmare. They’re planning rallies all over the state—Dallas, Houston, Austin, San Antonio—you name it. They’ve even got a “Turn Texas Blue” tour hitting over 24 cities. Look, Soros has spent years successfully destroying cities with soft-on-crime DAs and radical leftist prosecutors. And now he wants to bring that same chaos to every city across Texas? Not on my watch. I’ll tell you what this is really about: The left knows they can’t win on ideas. So they’re trying to BUY power. They want to pump cash into every corner of our state and hope Texans don’t notice what’s happening. Well, we noticed. And we’re not gonna sit back and let it happen. This is a critical moment. If Soros turns Texas blue, it’s game over for the country. We’re the last line of defense—and the radical left knows it. Let’s remind them who they’re messing with. Beth Van Duyne Congresswoman, TX-24 GET TO KNOW BETH: | Beth is a single, working mother of two amazing kids. Every day, she reminds them that we live in the greatest state, in the greatest nation, in the history of the world. Where else but the United States could a girl leave home at the age of 17, put herself through college, become the first female Mayor of her hometown, and then be asked to serve America in a presidential administration? Beth Van Duyne is running for Congress because she knows the people of the 24th District deserve to have a strong, principled voice in Congress. She's been asked what prompted her to run for public office; the answer is simple – her children. We live in a very fragile time for our nation, our families, and the future of the American Dream. Socialism is on the rise, our border crisis has never been worse, and we face constant threats from hostile nations willing to use cyber-attacks, nuclear weapons, and terrorist jihad. When Beth thinks about her two children, she wants them to have the same opportunities in life that she did; She wants them to be able to grow up safe and proud of our country. Beth is a single mom, a conservative Republican, a reformer who has defeated government corruption, a believer in the rule of law** who has helped remove thousands of criminal aliens from North Texas, a leader who helped deliver growth and new job opportunities, and a Constitutionalist who has never backed down when it comes to protecting the rights of all North Texans. | PAID FOR BY BETH VAN DUYNE FOR CONGRESS

#### This is not just bad budgeting.
It’s a betrayal of the people—and the purpose—of Alaska.
#### Our upcoming film, _The Permanent Short: Alaska’s Billion Dollar Betrayal_ , will expose this corruption. We’ll follow the money and show how generations of Alaskans are being denied their share, their voice, and their future.
#### And the movement is already growing.
#### Our **Angel tickets were the first to sell out for “Frozen Odds”** —a powerful signal that Alaskans are ready to fight back. Angel supporters receive exclusive access to both _The Permanent Short_ and _Frozen Odds_ , the film that lit the fuse.
#### This is just the beginning.
#### The fight for Alaska’s future isn’t over.
It’s just getting started.
---
#### [**Click Here To Get Your Angel Ticket**](https://mgcp02.engage.squarespace-mail.com/r?m=6849d71aa27fa22d08d8924c&u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.tropictundra.com%2Fthe-permanent-short&w=636d98a80d1d302f275cb244&c=b_6849d5dc41eaf137c2b0866c&l=en-US&s=78XO4KB11_PDDL4Q-HOFI8AxGUQ%3D)
---
#### **In 2001, Enron collapsed under the weight of one of the largest corporate frauds in American history—over $25 billion evaporated overnight, leaving pensions gutted and lives destroyed. It was called the smartest disaster money could buy.**
#### But what if the next Enron wasn’t a corporation?
What if it was your own government?
#### This film asks the billion-dollar question:
**What happens when a state quietly reallocates tens of billions of dollars meant for its citizens—without a vote, without consent, and without accountability?**
#### We follow the money—through shadowy nonprofits, bloated bureaucracies, and politically connected networks like **Arabella Advisors** , **Alaska Venture Fund** , and the **1630 Fund**.
#### It’s a financial betrayal not buried in spreadsheets—but broadcast in silence.
**$25 billion gone** —not from shareholders this time, but from the people of Alaska.
#### This is _The Permanent Short_.
#### More announcements coming soon.
**Thank you for being part of this journey.**

### **Now we have 108 supporters for “Frozen Odds”**
---
#### **Frozen Odds How do you take on $15 million with nothing but determination, grassroots organizing, and a clipboard? Frozen Odds is a gripping documentary that uncovers the raw power of citizen-led initiatives in Alaska. Following the journey of a small but determined movement, this film reveals how everyday people—outspent 100 to 1 by out-of-state interests—rallied together to challenge the system. Led by an Alaskans for Alaskans who helped write the law and push it to the ballot, this battle wasn’t just about policy—it was about democracy in its purest form. With 400+ volunteers braving the cold, gathering 42,000 signatures when only 26,000 were needed, they proved that people—not money—should shape the laws that govern them. Through intimate interviews, on-the-ground footage, and stunning Alaskan landscapes, Frozen Odds captures the high-stakes struggle against political elites (aka Lisa Murkowski and George Soros, etc.) and the enduring spirit of grassroots activism. Though the campaign fell just 700 votes short out of 320,000, it laid the groundwork for a new wave of initiatives—this time, with three fresh petitions ready to take the fight forward. In a world where billionaires and lobbyists try to control the political process.**
#### **Frozen Odds asks a bold question: What happens when ordinary citizens refuse to back down?**

Our upcoming film, The Permanent Short: Alaska’s Billion Dollar Betrayal , will expose this corruption. We’ll follow the money and show how generations of Alaskans are being denied their share, their voice, and their future. And the movement is already growing. Our Angel tickets were the first to sell out for “Frozen Odds” —a powerful signal that Alaskans are ready to fight back. Angel supporters receive exclusive access to both The Permanent Short and Frozen Odds , the film that lit the fuse. This is just the beginning. The fight for Alaska’s future isn’t over. It’s just getting started. In 2001, Enron collapsed under the weight of one of the largest corporate frauds in American history—over $25 billion evaporated overnight, leaving pensions gutted and lives destroyed. It was called the smartest disaster money could buy. But what if the next Enron wasn’t a corporation? What if it was your own government? This film asks the billion-dollar question: What happens when a state quietly reallocates tens of billions of dollars meant for its citizens—without a vote, without consent, and without accountability? We follow the money—through shadowy nonprofits, bloated bureaucracies, and politically connected networks like Arabella Advisors , Alaska Venture Fund , and the 1630 Fund. It’s a financial betrayal not buried in spreadsheets—but broadcast in silence. $25 billion gone —not from shareholders this time, but from the people of Alaska. This is The Permanent Short. I was raised to believe that we have an obligation to our community and our country.
It’s why I took my first oath to the Constitution as a teenager when I entered the Naval Academy.
It’s why I spent nearly a decade in the Navy as a helicopter pilot and Russian policy officer.
It’s why I went to law school, and became an outreach and reentry coordinator and a federal prosecutor.
It’s why I first ran for office — flipping a Republican-held congressional seat here in New Jersey that no one thought we could win at the time.
And it’s why I’m running to serve as our next governor. It’s too hard to get ahead in New Jersey, and too often, our kids have fewer opportunities than we did. The system feels broken, and Donald Trump’s agenda is only making it worse. I can’t accept that — and as governor, I won’t.
**But the fact is, New Jersey is now a battleground state, and Trump is _already_ campaigning for my opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, a career politician who has promised to pass an abortion ban, defund public schools, and bring DOGE to New Jersey. So, truthfully, we won’t win this race unless we have a strong grassroots team behind us right from the start.**

clean_body: The general election begins now. | = Peter, I am so honored to be the official Democratic nominee for governor here in New Jersey. Thank you to everyone who played a part in this victory. I wouldn’t be here without this incredible grassroots team who chipped in, volunteered, and voted. And we can’t stop now. We know what we are up against. The general election has begun — and if recent history is any indication, it’s going to be an expensive, hard-fought race decided by a razor-thin margin. = | | | = Peter, I was raised to believe that we have an obligation to our community and our country. It’s why I took my first oath to the Constitution as a teenager when I entered the Naval Academy. It’s why I spent nearly a decade in the Navy as a helicopter pilot and Russian policy officer. It’s why I went to law school, and became an outreach and reentry coordinator and a federal prosecutor. It’s why I first ran for office — flipping a Republican-held congressional seat here in New Jersey that no one thought we could win at the time. And it’s why, Peter, I’m running to serve as our next governor. It’s too hard to get ahead in New Jersey, and too often, our kids have fewer opportunities than we did. The system feels broken, and Donald Trump’s agenda is only making it worse. I can’t accept that — and as governor, I won’t. But the fact is, New Jersey is now a battleground state, and Trump is already campaigning for my opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, a career politician who has promised to pass an abortion ban, defund public schools, and bring DOGE to New Jersey. So, truthfully, we won’t win this race unless we have a strong grassroots team behind us right from the start. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you so much for your support, Mikie Use of photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. * | | = Paid for by Stand with Sanchez Stand with Sánchez PO BOX 4006 Whittier, CA 90607 United States | = = Congresswoman Linda Sánchez has dedicated her life to improving the community where she grew up and making Southern California a better place to live and work for generations to come. |
