clean_body: | | Peter, I can't believe I'm writing this but here we are: Marie Gluesenkamp Perez just supported House Resolution 488, a Republican-led measure glorifying Trump 's mass deportation regime and expanding ICE's unchecked power. Let me repeat that: She backed a resolution glorifying Trump's mass deportation regime, right as that same regime turns Marines and the National Guard against their own civilians. If you think ICE has been targeting "criminals" in Los Angeles I've got a story for you. ICE agents have raided Home Depots. They've raided the historic garment district in Los Angeles, following tax records to sewing shop workers who were literally on the job. You know, people paying taxes. Unlike the billionaire class Marie just cozied up to at her DC WelcomeFestappearance. You can't claim to stand with working people while rubber-stamping the playbook of the same right-wing extremists trying to purge them from this country. I believe in public safety. But we don't get that by letting ICE play judge, jury, and executioner. We need due process. We need leadership that doesn't support disappearing people for a headline. Marie voted for the SAVE Act. She voted for the Laken Riley Act. And now she's thrown her weight behind House Resolution 488: three bills that attack immigrants, criminalize families, and spread the debunked lie that immigration is fueling the fentanyl crisis. Let 's call this out for what it is: These are not just bad votes, it's clear and indisputable evidence that Marie Gluesenkamp Perez is virulently anti-immigrant and completely in sync with Trump's racist immigration enforcement. I'm running because this is the line in the sand. You 're either standing firm for the rule of law, due process for all, and fighting for the people - or you're siding with the jackboots. Marie made her choice. I've made mine. Now, Democratic primary voters get to make theirs. I won't go to DC to play footsie with fascists or make excuses for state-sponsored cruelty. I'll go to fight for working people, the ones ICE is targeting while Marie keeps siding with the folks writing the orders. Heal Washington! Brent | | Marie Gluesenkamp-Perez has betrayed Democrats and the voters of WA-3 by repeatedly voting with MAGA against women's rights, immigrants, and more. Brent Hennrich is a lifelong Washingtonian, a proud working class dad, and lifelong Democratic activist. Chip in now to help elect a Democrat ready to stand up to MAGA. | | | | Paid for by Brent Hennrich for Washington ---|--- (C)2025 Brent Hennrich for Washington, all rights reserved Our mailing address is: Brent Hennrich for Washington PO BOX 820070 Vancouver, WA 98682 We hate to see you go, but if you believe you received this email in error, or you no longer wish to receive our emails you can | | Sent via . name: Christen Sparago, EMILYs List
subject: Cruelty is not a platform.
body:
Pride is political. 🧱🌈 |
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109407707/551001835/86887870?recurring=true&amount=15&refcode=WUEFE622_20250611_CSPride_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056372&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmQ1ZDI0Yi0wMzQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZxJSeWZbphuK3sdRJuQoZ2V3ZjzUE1IDSWegUCGg0gg=) Hi Peter,

It's Christen, the interim vice president of digital here at EMILYs List — and a queer person who has spent years working to elect pro-choice women because I know what it costs when we don't.

Pride started as a protest. And more than 50 years after the first bricks were thrown at Stonewall, LGBTQ+ people are still under attack from a Republican Party that would rather legislate us out of existence than let us live our lives.

I'll say it plainly: **This moment is terrifying.** LGBTQ+ people are under siege in this country. In the last year alone, Republicans have introduced over 500 anti-LGBTQ+ bills in state legislatures — more than 100 of them specifically targeting transgender people. This isn't a culture war. It's a strategy to erase us.

To put a finer point on it, **the GOP has made cruelty its platform.** They're banning books, criminalizing gender-affirming care, gutting abortion rights, and pushing queer families out of public life. It's all connected — a carefully coordinated strategy to control our bodies, restrict our freedoms, and erase anyone who doesn't fit their narrow vision of America. The same people coming for queer rights are the ones coming for abortion access. It's the same playbook, repackaged to target our communities, one by one.

So EMILYs List is doing what we've always done: fighting back like our rights — and our lives — depend on it. Because they do. That means electing LGBTQ+ pro-choice candidates who understand what's at stake. And after years at EMILYs List, I’ve seen just how urgently we need to elect leaders who get it. Women who understand the stakes not as talking points, but as a present, urgent reality that affects us all.

If you're looking for a way to join the fight this Pride Month, don't just read this email — help us push back. For $15/month, you can join Friends of the List and get access to the EMILYs List Substack, where our staff and candidates pull back the curtain and share what's really happening on the ground. It's a space for strategy, storytelling, and solidarity — and it's powered by people like you who refuse to give up this fight. | [JOIN TODAY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109407708/551001836/86887870?recurring=true&amount=15&refcode=WUEFE622_20250611_CSPride_ALL_v1s1&sourceid=1056372&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMmQ1ZDI0Yi0wMzQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZxJSeWZbphuK3sdRJuQoZ2V3ZjzUE1IDSWegUCGg0gg=)
---
In solidarity,
Christen

The same people coming for queer rights are the ones coming for abortion access. It's the same playbook, repackaged to target our communities, one by one. So EMILYs List is doing what we've always done: fighting back like our rights — and our lives — depend on it. Because they do. That means electing LGBTQ+ pro-choice candidates who understand what's at stake. And after years at EMILYs List, I’ve seen just how urgently we need to elect leaders who get it. Women who understand the stakes not as talking points, but as a present, urgent reality that affects us all. If you're looking for a way to join the fight this Pride Month, don't just read this email — help us push back. For $15/month, you can join Friends of the List and get access to the EMILYs List Substack, where our staff and candidates pull back the curtain and share what's really happening on the ground. It's a space for strategy, storytelling, and solidarity — and it's powered by people like you who refuse to give up this fight. | = In solidarity, Christen Christen Sparago (they/them/theirs, she/her/hers) Interim Vice President, Digital = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. # [Karoline Leavitt SHUTS DOWN reporter's "stupid question" in front of the whole press room](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=165720799&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1NzIwNzk5LCJpYXQiOjE3NDk2NzUzNDgsImV4cCI6MTc1MjI2NzM0OCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMwNzI3ODAiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Jyt_-5smWr5Z7eVdwhCq22cU2HrGFC5t0D6f9wxpc-4)

| | [Politibrawl](https://substack.com/@politibrawl)
---
| Jun 11
---
| [](https://substack.com/@politibrawl)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3072780&post_id=165720799&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTY1NzIwNzk5LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc0OTY3NTM0OCwiZXhwIjoxNzUyMjY3MzQ4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzA3Mjc4MCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.obtS22TkvMVChMbnJXkyThIAPu9FGJhRC5rcpXCvSv0&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)

White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt **[snapped at a reporter](https://substack.com/redirect/b265a74a-13bb-4f3e-aab4-2c735c5bbb3e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for asking if President Donald Trump would "allow" peaceful protests at his military parade this weekend celebrating the Army's 250th birthday.
She was not messing around...
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/b265a74a-13bb-4f3e-aab4-2c735c5bbb3e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/b265a74a-13bb-4f3e-aab4-2c735c5bbb3e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5f74f012-3f1d-4906-aafa-ecf53ed64b43?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
During today's press briefing, Leavitt sparred with several reporters asking pointed questions about Trump's response to the LA riots and his anticipated response to further nationwide protests.
"If there were peaceful protests on Saturday for the military parade, President Trump would allow that?" the reporter asked Leavitt.
"Of course the president supports peaceful protests," Leavitt made clear. **["What a stupid question!" ](https://substack.com/redirect/b265a74a-13bb-4f3e-aab4-2c735c5bbb3e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Another reporter pressed Leavitt on if President Trump was committed to defending the First Amendment as he handles the ensuing riots in California.
"As I just answered, the president supports the right of Americans to peacefully protest!" Leavitt answered. "But that is not the majority of the behavior we see taking place in Los Angeles. We have seen mobs of violent rioters and agitators assaulting law enforcement officers, asserting federal authorities!"
The reporter pushed back, **[claiming that the protesters were mostly peaceful, not violent.](https://substack.com/redirect/b265a74a-13bb-4f3e-aab4-2c735c5bbb3e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Leavitt fired back, "The Democrat governor and the Democrat mayor of Los Angles have failed their citizens and the majority of Californias do not want to see law enforcement officers assaulted in the streets and thankfully the president stepped in!!"
Watch the tense moment here:
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/b265a74a-13bb-4f3e-aab4-2c735c5bbb3e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Together with BOXABL](https://substack.com/redirect/5f74f012-3f1d-4906-aafa-ecf53ed64b43?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **Most car factories, like Ford or Tesla, reportedly build one car per minute. Isn't it time we do that for houses?**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5f74f012-3f1d-4906-aafa-ecf53ed64b43?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
BOXABL believes they have the potential to disrupt a **[massive and outdated trillion-dollar building construction market](https://substack.com/redirect/5f74f012-3f1d-4906-aafa-ecf53ed64b43?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** by bringing assembly line automation to the home industry.
BOXABL homes are built in their Las Vegas factory, folded, shipped on a truck, and then unfolded on site in one hour. They aim to**transform** **home construction** , much like how Henry Ford automated car manufacturing - bringing assembly line efficiency and mass production to an artisanal, slow industry.
And they're not just dreaming big; they're delivering:
* Initial prototype order delivered to **SpaceX** in 2020.
* Subsequent project order of **156 homes from the Department of Defense completed in 2021**.
* Now, after implementing what was learned from those prior orders, actively **delivering to developers and consumers**.

# Illegal immigrant arrested for alleged murder attempt of LA law enforcement: anti-immigration violence rages on
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/c3fe3ee0-20a8-48a6-a7ae-bf07f9531eca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Photo: DHS
Officers charged illegal immigrant Emiliano Garduno-Galvez, 31, for attempted murder after **[he allegedly threw a Molotov cocktail at law enforcement](https://substack.com/redirect/c3fe3ee0-20a8-48a6-a7ae-bf07f9531eca?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** officers during violent anti-ICE protest in LA, the DHS announced Wednesday.
* **Garduno-Galvez, was previously deported** with a criminal record and was arrested by U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement where he remains in federal custody, according to the statement.
* **The alleged attack occurred near a Home Depot** in Paramount, California, during protests against recent ICE raids; the Molotov cocktail was reportedly thrown at federal officers during a confrontation. "The Los Angeles rioters will not stop us or slow us down." Department of Homeland Security (DHS) Assistant Secretary Tricia McLaughlin said. "And if you lay a hand on a law enforcement officer, you will be prosecuted to the fullest extent of the law."
* **Violence Rages in LA:** This news comes as violence continues to escalate with President Donald Trump deploying 2,000 National Guard troops and 700 Marines to Los Angeles; California Gov. Gavin Newsom criticized the move as federal overreach.

* * *
# **MAGA Marjorie Taylor Greene GOES OFF on Jasmine Crockett for trashing Trump 's bill**
Rep. Marjorie Taylor Greene **[rebuked Democrat Rep. Jasmine Crockett's "outrageous lies"](https://substack.com/redirect/12449436-2970-40cb-8817-8bdc8d7ab2a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** about President Trump's "Big Beautiful Bill."
"The American people's money is being stollen, it's being lost, it is outright treason to treat the American people this way!!" Greene erupted.
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/12449436-2970-40cb-8817-8bdc8d7ab2a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/12449436-2970-40cb-8817-8bdc8d7ab2a3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Martha's Vineyard elites ENRAGED over Trump's recent ICE deportations ahead of busy season
Liberal elites in Martha's Vineyard **[push back as ICE cracks down](https://substack.com/redirect/7b67f6d2-1888-4721-a97b-8e1bc240305f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** with deportations on the island.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7b67f6d2-1888-4721-a97b-8e1bc240305f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Martha's Vineyard residents are upset** about Trump administration deportation raids that arrested 40 illegal immigrants on Martha's Vineyard and Nantucket as part of a larger Massachusetts operation that netted nearly 1,500 arrests in late May. One resident called it "bullying," saying he doesn't care about legal status but cares "about how they're treated."
* **Local Workforce is Full of Illegal Migrants:** The arrests have created panic among undocumented workers who "form the backbone of the workforce" just as the busy summer season begins, with many immigrants going into hiding and speaking anonymously out of fear of being targeted in future raids. Brazilian immigrants have reportedly become central to the island's service economy.
* **Business owners warn the local economy will "crater"** due to the arrests and deportations, with one undocumented Brazilian businessman who owns three local businesses saying "The money is just going to stop flowing. The U.S. is only losing in pushing us out."

name: AOC
subject: Common sense.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
We deserve better.
#
What they like to call ‘radical’, I believe is common sense.
I believe that in the wealthiest nation in the history of the world, when a person gets sick, they shouldn’t go bankrupt.
Common sense.
I believe that a minimum wage should cover the minimum cost to live.
Common sense.
And by the way — we should see that _not_ paying a minimum wage is _corporate welfare_ , because **big companies like Walmart and Amazon rely on the food stamp program and public coffers** to cover the wages that they won't pay.
I believe that homes are not slot machines for investors and Wall Street to extort working families out of every last dollar that they have.
When your landlord jacks up your rent overnight, or housing prices skyrocket because Wall Street treats our housing market like a casino, your government should fight for your ability to keep an affordable roof over your head.
And I believe that **our elected officials should take on abuses of corporate greed everywhere they find it**.
That is why I don’t — and never will — take money from industry lobbyists or corporations. **We deserve better**.
Now, our movement for real progress for everyday people will have to push harder than ever these next four years.
[Help us continue the fight by making a grassroots donation today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250611.E2CCQv&refcode=em20250611-9073-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9073%2E2526796%2EdMIoiF)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250611.E2CCQv&refcode=em20250611-9073-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=9073%2E2526796%2EdMIoiF)**
In solidarity,
Alexandria

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250611?refcode=em20250611-9073-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=21&refcode2=9073_2526796_dMIoiF&akid=9073%2E2526796%2EdMIoiF)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250611-9073-P_FND_EGR_GRM&t=22&akid=9073%2E2526796%2EdMIoiF)**

clean_body: We deserve better. What they like to call ‘radical’, I believe is common sense. I believe that in the wealthiest nation in the history of the world, when a person gets sick, they shouldn’t go bankrupt. Common sense. I believe that a minimum wage should cover the minimum cost to live. Common sense. And by the way — we should see that not paying a minimum wage is corporate welfare , because big companies like Walmart and Amazon rely on the food stamp program and public coffers to cover the wages that they won't pay. I believe that homes are not slot machines for investors and Wall Street to extort working families out of every last dollar that they have. When your landlord jacks up your rent overnight, or housing prices skyrocket because Wall Street treats our housing market like a casino, your government should fight for your ability to keep an affordable roof over your head. And I believe that our elected officials should take on abuses of corporate greed everywhere they find it. That is why I don’t — and never will — take money from industry lobbyists or corporations. We deserve better. Now, our movement for real progress for everyday people will have to push harder than ever these next four years. In solidarity, Alexandria | ---|--- | | ---|---|--- Email us: mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com

Peter, Donald Trump came to North Carolina under the guise of celebrating the U.S. Army’s 250th birthday. But instead of just honoring our troops, he turned the celebration into a political spectacle — attacking Democrats and pushing a hyper-partisan agenda. **And as usual, Senator Thom Tillis stood by and said nothing. ** This is exactly the kind of performative partisanship that North Carolinians are sick and tired of. It’s divisive. It’s disrespectful. And it does nothing to solve real problems. Wiley Nickel is running for Senate to change that — to rise above the toxic partisanship and deliver results for the people of North Carolina. subject: Did you see the buzz around WelcomeFest?
body:
It was amazing!

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109408056/551002958/1219929396?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyZTI2NzlmLTA0NDctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XWdRSHZHstNo--ELiZlmEFr34VdgIzOUzd5oJff-EF8=) | Hi Peter, Have you seen all the recent coverage of WelcomeFest? **Blue Dogs Jared Golden, Marie Gluesenkamp Perez, and Adam Gray came together with hundreds in person — and thousands more online — to talk about the future of the Democratic Party and how we start winning again.** **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109408057/551002959/-2029526969?&refcode=E13683-20250611-WelcomeFest-Image-CampaignNews&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyZTI2NzlmLTA0NDctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XWdRSHZHstNo--ELiZlmEFr34VdgIzOUzd5oJff-EF8=)** These are candidates who’ve _already done it_ by connecting with voters who too often feel overlooked and flipping tough districts. Their conversation was a powerful reminder: when we meet people where they are, we win. [_**Now, we need your help to take this message around the country. Will you chip in today to help us build a more inclusive, welcoming Democratic Party?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109408058/551002960/-2029526969?&refcode=E13683-20250611-WelcomeFest-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyZTI2NzlmLTA0NDctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XWdRSHZHstNo--ELiZlmEFr34VdgIzOUzd5oJff-EF8=) [DONATE $5 »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109408059/551002961/-2029526969?&refcode=E13683-20250611-WelcomeFest-SB-CampaignNews&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk4MjcyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjIyZTI2NzlmLTA0NDctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=XWdRSHZHstNo--ELiZlmEFr34VdgIzOUzd5oJff-EF8=) Our goal is simple but ambitious: bring more voters across the political spectrum into the fold by focusing on the local issues that matter most. That means standing up for independent businesses, like chicken farmers in Washington and lobstermen in Maine. **The Blue Dogs have a proven track record in red-to-blue districts — and we’re ready to do it again. With your support, we can:**
* Defend our most vulnerable members
* Flip more seats from red-to-blue in 2026

name: BAF Action Fund
subject: It's Game Time: Don't Let the Administration Steal Alaska's Future
body:
Working Alaskans are not pawns in a political game. We ARE the game.| | |
---
| | Dear Supporter, The word for 2025 is **ACTION**. **Working Alaskans are not pawns in a political game. We ARE the game.** Thanks to the Bipartisan Infrastructure Law—guided by Senators Lisa Murkowski and Dan Sullivan—our state has secured a historic opportunity. More than $10 billion in federal investment is slated for Alaska, with some already arriving and more expected. These funds promise to create thousands of jobs and build a stronger foundation for our future. From upgrading airports and roads to securing our ferry system and expanding broadband, these investments are crucial for our economy and quality of life. **But just as we’re prepared to score, a new D.C. agency—the Department of Government Efficiency—is trying to pull the ball away and change the rules.** This isn’t just about holding back or canceling much-needed federal funds; the administration has also gutted the agencies responsible for permitting, oversight, and processing these funds. This has led to severe delays—stalling vital projects like roads, water systems, and broadband expansion—slowing down or even halting progress altogether. Every delay means jobs lost, communities left behind, and opportunities missed. **This reckless obstruction is a direct attack on Alaska’s future, and it’s a pattern we’re seeing in other states as well.** The work we’re doing here in Alaska isn’t just for us—it can serve as a blueprint for other states fighting to protect their fair share of federal resources. We are actively collaborating with partners in other states to share strategies, amplify our voice, and push back against these harmful policies. **[Build Alaska’s Future (BAF) Action Fund](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109408129/551003174/1533895835?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTk5ZDBmZC0wNDQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y29lHRvtr814GY2-0uUsznfSHAoOEHr_VgbeT0SvDI4=&emci=25eae01d-e046-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=2a99d0fd-0447-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9512399)** is a homegrown nonprofit dedicated to keeping this conversation honest, fact-based, and transparent. We’re fighting to promote civic engagement, close the trust gap, and ensure that federal investments are managed responsibly. Our efforts include raising awareness through campaigns like a homegrown nonprofit dedicated to keeping this conversation honest, fact-based, and transparent. We’re working to promote civic engagement, close the trust gap, and ensure that federal investments are used responsibly and effectively. Our efforts include raising awareness through campaigns like **[our recent radio spot](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109408130/551003175/-1361474580?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTk5ZDBmZC0wNDQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y29lHRvtr814GY2-0uUsznfSHAoOEHr_VgbeT0SvDI4=&emci=25eae01d-e046-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=2a99d0fd-0447-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9512399)** —which we are now expanding—and advocating for policies that prioritize transparency, accountability, and community involvement. We recently took to the airwaves to spread this urgent message, and you can listen to our new radio spot [here](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109408131/551003176/-1361474580?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTk5ZDBmZC0wNDQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y29lHRvtr814GY2-0uUsznfSHAoOEHr_VgbeT0SvDI4=&emci=25eae01d-e046-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=2a99d0fd-0447-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9512399). Your support is vital as we build on this momentum and continue our work to protect Alaska’s future—and, by extension, inspire similar efforts in other states. **This is a game we can’t afford to lose. Your contribution gives us the home-court advantage we need.** We must take control of the ball NOW—because if we don’t, we risk losing everything we’ve fought for. **Here’s how you can help:**
* **Donate:** Your financial support is critical. It allows us to amplify our message, mobilize grassroots campaigns, and hold decision-makers accountable. Please visit [**http://bafaction.org/donate**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109408132/551003177/-432983406?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzEwMjc1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyYTk5ZDBmZC0wNDQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=y29lHRvtr814GY2-0uUsznfSHAoOEHr_VgbeT0SvDI4=&emci=25eae01d-e046-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=2a99d0fd-0447-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9512399) to make a contribution today.
* **Share this Message:** Forward this email and our radio spot to friends, family, and colleagues. The more Alaskans who understand the threat, the stronger our collective voice becomes.
* **Engage with Us:** Follow BAF Action Fund on our social media channels for the latest updates and to share your story. Your engagement raises awareness and helps us build a powerful coalition.

Together, we can ensure that Alaska’s future—built on transparency, community involvement, and responsible federal investment—remains secure. If you’re interested in how this work can be replicated in other states or want us to collaborate further, please contact us at [info@bafaction.org](mailto:info@bafaction.org "info@bafaction.org"). We believe that strong, informed communities can change the game nationwide. Thank you for your support. The BAF Action Fund Team

Flipping these suits blue IS possible - but only if we start preparing NOW. Will you help us build up a warchest of funding to rush to the Democrats who run for these seats? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-floridaspecials?refcode=111724_1]

name: Nancy Northup
subject: I've been talking to Congress, now I'm talking to you.
body:
We must strengthen the FACE Act, not repeal it | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109408135/551003263/1126318745?sourceid=1150751&utm_campaign=25emius-0601aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=faceact&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmE2NTZmMC0wNDQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eJrB2hEdBSokym0dO5E_rahQ_0Qi08FFXAe-Z7O3ytA=&emci=160eb4df-f946-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=16a656f0-0447-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)
---
Dear Peter,

Yesterday, members of the U.S. House Judiciary Committee debated whether to push forward the repeal of the Freedom of Access to Clinic Entrances (FACE) Act—the only federal law protecting patients and providers from threats, harassment, and violence.

Without the FACE Act, there would be no federal penalties for extremists who blockade clinics, terrorize providers, or threaten patients. [**Peter, we need to fight back—with legal action, advocacy, and unwavering support for the people risking everything to protect reproductive rights.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109408136/551003264/1126318745?sourceid=1150751&utm_campaign=25emius-0601aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=faceact&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmE2NTZmMC0wNDQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eJrB2hEdBSokym0dO5E_rahQ_0Qi08FFXAe-Z7O3ytA=&emci=160eb4df-f946-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=16a656f0-0447-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237) | [**FIGHT BACK**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109408137/551003265/1126318745?sourceid=1150751&utm_campaign=25emius-0601aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=faceact&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmE2NTZmMC0wNDQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eJrB2hEdBSokym0dO5E_rahQ_0Qi08FFXAe-Z7O3ytA=&emci=160eb4df-f946-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=16a656f0-0447-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237 "FIGHT BACK")
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109408138/551003266/1126318745?sourceid=1150751&utm_campaign=25emius-0601aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=faceact&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmE2NTZmMC0wNDQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eJrB2hEdBSokym0dO5E_rahQ_0Qi08FFXAe-Z7O3ytA=&emci=160eb4df-f946-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=16a656f0-0447-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)
[**These attacks are happening right now. Since _Roe v. Wade_ was overturned, reports of death threats and violence have surged.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109408139/551003267/1126318745?sourceid=1150751&utm_campaign=25emius-0601aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=faceact&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmE2NTZmMC0wNDQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eJrB2hEdBSokym0dO5E_rahQ_0Qi08FFXAe-Z7O3ytA=&emci=160eb4df-f946-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=16a656f0-0447-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237) This is not hypothetical. And Congress debating this repeal only emboldens those who seek to do harm.

Our clients are experiencing these threats personally. Eight people who attacked the Northland Family Planning Centers in Michigan, a Center client, were convicted of conspiracy charges and violating the FACE Act, only to be pardoned by Trump.
> _"And now Congress is attempting to repeal the law altogether, encouraging violence against both patients and health care workers,"_ Northland Family Planning Centers Founder Renee Chelian wrote in response to the repeal attempt. _"There is no explanation for repealing this law other than purposefully inspiring violence against patients and clinic staff."_
[**Let me be clear: Threats to reproductive health care facilities are escalating, and we need your support to meet this moment.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109408140/551003268/1126318745?sourceid=1150751&utm_campaign=25emius-0601aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=faceact&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmE2NTZmMC0wNDQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eJrB2hEdBSokym0dO5E_rahQ_0Qi08FFXAe-Z7O3ytA=&emci=160eb4df-f946-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=16a656f0-0447-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=954237)

Thank you for standing with us.

In solidarity,

Nancy Northup
President & CEO

P.S. name: Ron Wyden
subject: SAVE the vote? Not if we listen to Republicans…
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109408326/551003919/2140832878?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDM0ZjRhNi0wNTQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ngjyYZBb97lXf_BqcsgRv_K3MuGmPKxW3r1Gun4tT64=&emci=df595d57-fd46-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=9034f4a6-0547-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9818364)
---

| | Recently, I introduced the Vote at Home Act – which would bring Oregon's convenient and widely accessible vote-at-home system nationwide. It would give _all_ eligible voters the option to vote by mail with pre-paid envelopes. **This bill gives Americans a greater voice in government – something sorely needed at a time when so many feel that leaders don't hear them.** But what are Republicans working on in the meantime? **Voter suppression.** A few weeks ago, the GOP House passed a bill with a _deeply_ deceptive title: the SAVE Act. It's a blatant attempt to roll back state practices – like those right here in Oregon – that make voting secure and easy. And Senate Republicans hope to send it to Donald Trump's desk. [**Will you join in opposing the SAVE Act? Add your name and show Republicans just how many of us are ready to stand strong for reliable voting access >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109408327/551003920/2027333591?ms=2025-06-11-save&refcode=2025-06-11-save&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDM0ZjRhNi0wNTQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ngjyYZBb97lXf_BqcsgRv_K3MuGmPKxW3r1Gun4tT64=&emci=df595d57-fd46-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=9034f4a6-0547-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9818364) [Add Your Name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109408328/551003921/2027333591?ms=2025-06-11-save&refcode=2025-06-11-save&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDM0ZjRhNi0wNTQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ngjyYZBb97lXf_BqcsgRv_K3MuGmPKxW3r1Gun4tT64=&emci=df595d57-fd46-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=9034f4a6-0547-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9818364) The SAVE Act forces states to conduct unnecessary purges of voter rolls. It outlaws online and mail-in voter registration (used heavily in Oregon), making voting access especially difficult for Americans in rural areas. And if you're among the millions of people who've changed their names since birth – including through marriage – the SAVE Act means that your current documentation may not be enough to prove your identity. That's the height of absurdity – and it shows just how deep Republicans are willing to go to suppress people's voices. Their bill doesn't "secure" elections; **it just punishes people who live far away from government offices, and people who've legally changed their names.** **Voting by mail is safe, secure, and easy. Oregonians know that because we've been doing it for decades. We should be making voting easier and more accessible, not harder.** [**I'm going to do everything in my power to stop the GOP's voter suppression tricks. So if you believe in**** _actually saving_****our elections, please add your name to oppose the SAVE Act >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109408329/551003922/2027333591?ms=2025-06-11-save&refcode=2025-06-11-save&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTQxMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5MDM0ZjRhNi0wNTQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ngjyYZBb97lXf_BqcsgRv_K3MuGmPKxW3r1Gun4tT64=&emci=df595d57-fd46-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=9034f4a6-0547-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=9818364) More soon, _Ron_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Ron Wyden instantly:

clean_body: | | | | Recently, I introduced the Vote at Home Act – which would bring Oregon's convenient and widely accessible vote-at-home system nationwide. It would give all eligible voters the option to vote by mail with pre-paid envelopes. This bill gives Americans a greater voice in government – something sorely needed at a time when so many feel that leaders don't hear them. But what are Republicans working on in the meantime? Voter suppression. A few weeks ago, the GOP House passed a bill with a deeply deceptive title: the SAVE Act. It's a blatant attempt to roll back state practices – like those right here in Oregon – that make voting secure and easy. And Senate Republicans hope to send it to Donald Trump's desk. The SAVE Act forces states to conduct unnecessary purges of voter rolls. It outlaws online and mail-in voter registration (used heavily in Oregon), making voting access especially difficult for Americans in rural areas. And if you're among the millions of people who've changed their names since birth – including through marriage – the SAVE Act means that your current documentation may not be enough to prove your identity. That's the height of absurdity – and it shows just how deep Republicans are willing to go to suppress people's voices. Their bill doesn't "secure" elections; it just punishes people who live far away from government offices, and people who've legally changed their names. Voting by mail is safe, secure, and easy. Oregonians know that because we've been doing it for decades. We should be making voting easier and more accessible, not harder. More soon, Ron | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Ron Wyden instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for and authorized by Wyden for Senate. | This email was sent by Wyden for Senate P.O. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Marines should not be on the streets of Los Angeles.
body:
Trump and Hegseth aren’t sending the Marines and the National Guard into Los Angeles to solve any problem. They’re putting on a show to look tough on TV.
#

I’m a Marine.
I’ll always be a Marine.
And I am telling you this without any reservations: The Marines should be nowhere near these protests.
Trump and Hegseth aren’t sending the Marines and the National Guard into Los Angeles to solve any problem. They’re putting on a show to look tough on TV. It’s a deliberate provocation. It’s a waste of time. It’s an insult to the men and women who serve.
The military exists to defend our Constitution and our people from foreign threats. They are not political pawns. They are not props for Trump to play with and showboat. This has to stop, or it is only going to escalate.
**I’m calling on Trump and Hegseth to roll back these orders.**
[**Join me and demand that Trump and Hegseth rescind the orders federalizing the California National Guard and sending the Marines into Los Angeles. This is not necessary, and it only invites more violence.** [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/signup/550609_pet_em_LA/?source=em250611-1-160&akid=3887%2E734936%2EoxRiL6) We’ve got to press for cooler heads to prevail now. That’s my responsibility, and I’m going to continue pushing for it. Hold fast, Ruben

name: Oregon GOP
subject: For Immediate Release: Oregon Republican Party Elects New Vice Chair
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE OREGON REPUBLICAN PARTY (COMMITTEE ID 379) 187 HIGH ST
body:
Dave Brown joins the Oregon Republican Party leadership, ready to strengthen communities and champion conservative values across Oregon.
| |
---
| | [ ](https://links.infooregongop.com/els/v2/m_b6CPZ63dcK/NDZVd08xZTFEVXpHLzRxcnU1MjlTSUROT0NqSmlTWUxNbWUwTmhXZXR3MGU2VkFCY1pWMTdpdzZkMmpXc1JKWjYxanFIK3hLdHI5Vyt3NjVRUGUyQ0c5cXlLcE9kSW5MdVUyZTViQ1phNUE9S0/)
---
| | **FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE ** CONTACT: Oregon Republican Party LaJuana Decker, Communications Chair communications.chair@oregon.gop Release Date: June 11, 2025 PRESS RELEASE: **Oregon Republican Party Elects New Vice Chair Dave Brown ** Salem, OR — The Oregon Republican Party (ORP) is pleased to announce the May 31 election of new Vice Chair **Dave Brown**. A dedicated leader, seasoned public servant, and lifelong advocate for Oregon communities, Dave brings a wealth of grassroots experience and unwavering commitment to the role. “We are thrilled to welcome Dave Brown to the ORP leadership team,” said Chair Connie Whelchel. “Dave embodies the heart and grit of our movement. His energy, experience, and deep ties to local communities will be a tremendous asset to help build a strong, unified Republican Party across Oregon.” As Chair of the Yamhill County Republican Party, Brown has been instrumental in local political engagement—door-knocking, marketing, fundraising, and recruiting. He also serves as Vice Chair of Newberg Dundee Strong, a grassroots coalition promoting community safety, government accountability, and support for first responders, healthcare providers, and local businesses. The nonpartisan group played a pivotal role in recent city council, school board, and commissioner elections. No stranger to leadership in high-pressure environments, Brown is a 20-year veteran of the Newberg School District and former Chair of the Newberg School Board. During his tenure, he helped defeat recall attempts of two board members. His experience includes extensive service on educational committees, safety task forces, and statewide panels where he consistently championed parental rights, educational transparency, and student safety. He also brings decades of coaching experience leading high school tennis and basketball teams and earning multiple Coach of the Year honors while mentoring dozens of student-athletes. His leadership extended beyond the court through his long-standing role on the OSAA seeding committee and as a conference coaching representative. Brown also hosts the podcast _Stand Tall with Dave Brown_ , where he discusses education, politics, faith, and community issues, while promoting citizen engagement and inspiring Oregonians to take action. “I’m deeply honored to serve as Vice Chair of the Oregon Republican Party,” said Dave Brown. “Oregon is worth fighting for, and I’m ready to roll up my sleeves and help elect strong Republican leaders across this great state.” ####

body:

Friend,

_Have you seen what's happening in Los Angeles?!_

The city is on fire, ICE agents and local law enforcement are under attack, and Democrats are siding with the rioters.

What's happening in Los Angeles is NOT a protest. It is an entire city declaring open rebellion against American sovereignty and authority.

Frankly, I've had it.

If you burn or spit on our flag, I want you _out_ of our country.
If you're an illegal alien, I want ICE to _remove and deport_ you.

Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. Peter — Marjorie Taylor Greene may have ruled out a Senate run — but make no mistake, she’s now eyeing a bid for Governor of Georgia.
And she’s made it clear how she plans to lead:
**“I don’t think anybody should run on their relationship with President Trump, because I certainly could run on that probably better than anyone," — MTG**
Let that sink in. Trump’s most loyal defender now wants to run Georgia — the same way Donald Trump is running the country. And we all know how badly that’s going.
MTG wants to bring Trump-style chaos to the Governor’s Mansion. Here’s what that means for Georgia:
❌ **He's hurting working families' bottom lines** — Trump's erratic tariffs have triggered price hikes, market swings, and economic uncertainty. And MTG backed him every step of the way — even profiting off the chaos herself.
❌ **His “big, beautiful bill” is a disaster** — It guts critical programs millions rely on — from food assistance to health care to education funding. Georgians will pay the price, but MTG didn’t even read the bill before voting yes.
❌ **He's attacking our democracy** — Trump is openly defying court rulings, pushing to strip checks and balances, and laying the groundwork for authoritarian power. MTG? She’s cheering him on, defending him at every turn.
[YOUR RESPONSE IS NEEDED: Should Marjorie Taylor Greene run for Governor of Georgia?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109409281/551007251/-360394974?source=SBD_DPG_EM_EN_061125_MTGPOLL_2x30DO-60DC-60DD_D1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTA4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTU2YjZlNi0wNzQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fdg4y41mU06fLNkVnQclJW83hjxHjJtWGcqqoVJkDso=&emci=3756b6e6-0747-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=3956b6e6-0747-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=43566853)

clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = MTG FLIRTS WITH GEORGIA GOVERNOR BID | | | Peter — Marjorie Taylor Greene may have ruled out a Senate run — but make no mistake, she’s now eyeing a bid for Governor of Georgia. And she’s made it clear how she plans to lead: “I don’t think anybody should run on their relationship with President Trump, because I certainly could run on that probably better than anyone," — MTG Let that sink in. Trump’s most loyal defender now wants to run Georgia — the same way Donald Trump is running the country. And we all know how badly that’s going. MTG wants to bring Trump-style chaos to the Governor’s Mansion. Here’s what that means for Georgia: ❌ He's hurting working families' bottom lines — Trump's erratic tariffs have triggered price hikes, market swings, and economic uncertainty. And MTG backed him every step of the way — even profiting off the chaos herself. ❌ His “big, beautiful bill” is a disaster — It guts critical programs millions rely on — from food assistance to health care to education funding. Georgians will pay the price, but MTG didn’t even read the bill before voting yes. ❌ He's attacking our democracy — Trump is openly defying court rulings, pushing to strip checks and balances, and laying the groundwork for authoritarian power. MTG? She’s cheering him on, defending him at every turn. | | — Georgia Dems | = Help Elect Georgia Democrats. name: Working Families Party
subject: June 14: NO KINGS! National Day of Action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Working Families Party PAC (77 Sands St
body:
| | | **This Saturday, June 14th, Donald Trump is throwing himself a $100 million military parade for his birthday, Peter.** There won’t be cake. Or candles. Just tanks rolling down D.C. streets. Troops on display. A show of brute force — paid for with our tax dollars. All while Trump and his Republican allies gut Medicaid, slash food stamps, and claim there's “just no money” for Social Security. We refuse to let their authoritarian flex go unanswered. That’s why on June 14th, people in over 100 cities are hitting the streets for **NO KINGS** — a national, peaceful day of action to reject authoritarian rule, billionaire corruption, and to say: _No_ Thrones. _No_ Crowns. _No_ Kings. [**Find a NO KINGS event near you now.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbIwXrUx9efdTq_vbf4FLD1mutwQpxuQHH8rlqx2V5t6ZC8eldqt8JSuFVNZcXRFPLOL_0SFdmZTHcmxHinhdHl32RGYuUp_cvW6eIn7QRC2LG6MEqHwtGJhRWpyE7L8ksw5oS2965dwJtxbmCq0JI8TL5LFziGuivXyiqwj5V-qMWqCv10Mztx9dyaIhbfmm07hku5v1P5STphPrlCDUq6iKgIJshfwOCOjoZj8LacI/4h9/uJbTvzxJQCaf-8Hv9PIQ4Q/h0/h001.V0jRYHRz59o57x8ZbAFLPMxgria_-Hi2o7p_n0HuxbY) [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbIwXrUx9efdTq_vbf4FLD1mutwQpxuQHH8rlqx2V5t6ehx93vRwU2Ae38noOBV9xce0shOY9huDeEgzpLrZX448YNZAeqScKcY3Wpl9j5eOCJYk5KemT1Y7XCuJkJ6vfebzGaAf6SYQ-GB8-qWbKlBHB087HCwnDmeFf055Yn02ChRVMPRqo3bAplHL3uISIGd9cO4P_zdfj_CVEoIcViHtDKPctp0YlzIOLSChYDm5/4h9/uJbTvzxJQCaf-8Hv9PIQ4Q/h1/h001.B6E6Jemh03Wkf7P8r6_DwEKUtjl6Jrz1Ws_2ptBIouM) **[Find an event near you »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbIwXrUx9efdTq_vbf4FLD1mutwQpxuQHH8rlqx2V5t6S78WSHrQRvQMxikhg-OXiB75MzY4EztpR4N-vSkLPbUod72WBju3sQsL8q9gbu6I1xzfmnA5o5uPBbNlks3oezQ2v5-C0irZLvkPnqVfeXUFD02BJnanKWe1X8nDnTYBMBsAbPSgvaDNf1eWDdqR1UKrwe-ERxpYCDBH_qVXATJ7SoxPT9Qz5xPSGg2KvGdH/4h9/uJbTvzxJQCaf-8Hv9PIQ4Q/h2/h001.y1urbYQwPi13NHaxuBI_rGd1WpSSGI8PY6lC7oQyqm8)** This isn’t just some ego-stroking birthday stunt, Peter — it’s a warning. Just days ago, ICE launched coordinated raids in Los Angeles, abducting over 100 people — including SEIU California President David Huerta. Now, Trump’s DHS is escalating with National Guard deployments and even threats to send in the Marines to crush protest and punish dissent. **Trump wants fear. Loyalty. Silence. Obedience.** A $100 million spectacle of state-sponsored intimidation — draped in patriotism, designed to hijack news headlines, distract the public, and make us feel powerless. But working people aren’t shrinking back. **This weekend, join the NO KINGS** **mass mobilization** led by organizers, workers, immigrants, and everyday people in every corner of the country. While Trump parades tanks through D.C., people across the country will be coming out to show him where real power lives — in our communities, in our movements, and in the streets. From coast to coast, we are rising up to say: We don’t serve kings. We don’t worship tyrants. We don’t bow to fear. [**Find a NO KINGS event near you and be a part of the movement on Saturday, June 14th.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMbIwXrUx9efdTq_vbf4FLD1mutwQpxuQHH8rlqx2V5t6mGrFbhAllkbhKBRoFhNF_dg4MKjyIhXRth85taoJLM1AJjO9zY8PvJENk3ktZxdG63xR57LhCH9uvoWp29-zy-6KtI9ueFwE3I8uiL9jcsRW4_pG0f3xY48PWKqHHc-IAB8-9mSTFjZP33WOET4IMWlYf23PcYvpdfXN-6nfBKU9H0stkYm21ZJjA-53XONp/4h9/uJbTvzxJQCaf-8Hv9PIQ4Q/h3/h001.ZJVIhi8K7EFt1Zigz1xxk3360ZtHdl0YSiW_Hs28QT0) clean_body: | | | This Saturday, June 14th, Donald Trump is throwing himself a $100 million military parade for his birthday, Peter. There won’t be cake. Or candles. Just tanks rolling down D.C. streets. Troops on display. A show of brute force — paid for with our tax dollars. All while Trump and his Republican allies gut Medicaid, slash food stamps, and claim there's “just no money” for Social Security. We refuse to let their authoritarian flex go unanswered. That’s why on June 14th, people in over 100 cities are hitting the streets for NO KINGS — a national, peaceful day of action to reject authoritarian rule, billionaire corruption, and to say: No Thrones. No Crowns. No Kings. This isn’t just some ego-stroking birthday stunt, Peter — it’s a warning. Just days ago, ICE launched coordinated raids in Los Angeles, abducting over 100 people — including SEIU California President David Huerta. Now, Trump’s DHS is escalating with National Guard deployments and even threats to send in the Marines to crush protest and punish dissent. Trump wants fear. Loyalty. Silence. Obedience. A $100 million spectacle of state-sponsored intimidation — draped in patriotism, designed to hijack news headlines, distract the public, and make us feel powerless. But working people aren’t shrinking back. This weekend, join the NO KINGS mass mobilization led by organizers, workers, immigrants, and everyday people in every corner of the country. While Trump parades tanks through D.C., people across the country will be coming out to show him where real power lives — in our communities, in our movements, and in the streets. From coast to coast, we are rising up to say: We don’t serve kings. We don’t worship tyrants. We don’t bow to fear. In solidarity and resistance, Working Families Party Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. name: Survey [Team MGP]
subject: LED headlights are absurdly bright
body:
| | Peter, you’ve probably experienced this before: You’re driving along when suddenly, extremely bright headlights flood your field of vision – best case scenario, leaving you momentarily stunned, or worst case scenario, leaving you unable to see the road ahead.

**It’s not just a temporary annoyance, Peter. Overly bright LED headlights present a real danger to drivers, including rural Americans, older Americans, law enforcement, and more. The average headlights have become _twice as bright_ in recent years, with no regulation on maximum levels currently on the books.**

Marie is working to change that. She’s calling for the upcoming infrastructure bill to include maximum brightness standards that will preserve driver visibility while keeping others on the road safe.

name: Charlie Kirk
subject: Friend, help me take our country back!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc
body:
This is civilizational suicide...
[View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e12542869/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvakFQQkdqODd1WQ/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA2MTE/LbmNsWE1SdUJFSw/qP2hpZHM9bmNlejV1dnI5SEFER2tscw/gaEnxfg/s3n797b7329)
[](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

Friend,

_Have you seen what’s happening in Los Angeles?!_

The city is on fire, ICE agents and local law enforcement are under attack, and Democrats are siding with the rioters.

What’s happening in Los Angeles is NOT a protest. It is an entire city declaring open rebellion against American sovereignty and authority.

Frankly, I’ve had it.

If you burn or spit on our flag, I want you _out_ of our country.
If you’re an illegal alien, I want ICE to _remove and deport_ you.
If you’re an American _citizen_ who thinks Mexican culture is preferable, _please_ GET OUT.

This is a preview of our future if we DO NOT defeat Democrats.

Friend, _THIS_ is why it is CRITICAL that we Build the Red Wall now to ensure America First victories in 2026, 2028, and beyond. This craziness cannot be allowed to fester any longer.

[Please, stand with me — stand FOR America First — today by donating $50, $250, $500, or even just $10 to help Turning Point PAC fund new field operations in key battleground states like Arizona, Nevada, and New Hampshire! >>](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

[Donate](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

President Trump was elected to close the border and restore law and order. If we fail, our nation will be permanently populated by foreigners who hate us and owe their allegiance to another country.

As patriots, we CANNOT stand by and let this happen.

President Trump is doing his part, leading the way on mass deportations, calling for the National Guard to be deployed, and standing firm in the face of arrows being hurled toward him from every side.

Now, it’s time for us to do our part...

And that starts by building a winning ground game to Build the Red Wall.

Together, we CAN take our country back, restore law and order, and rebuild our civilization around our shared _America First values_.

_**Are you with me, Friend?**_

[If you’re as enraged as I am about what’s happening to the once-great City of Los Angeles, please donate today to fuel TurningPoint PAC’s WINNING strategy for 2026, 2028, and beyond.](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

**Failure is NOT an option.**

[Donate $10](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

[Donate $35](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

[Donate $50](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

[Donate $100](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

[Donate $250](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

[Donate $500](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

[Donate $1,000](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

[Donate Any Other Amount](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)

Thank you for standing with TurningPoint PAC in support of President Trump’s America First agenda.

It’s going to take each and every one of us, but together we CAN and WILL win the war for Western Civilization.

For Freedom and America First,

Charlie Kirk
Turning Point PAC

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. This is a preview of our future if we DO NOT defeat Democrats. Friend, THIS is why it is CRITICAL that we Build the Red Wall now to ensure America First victories in 2026, 2028, and beyond. This craziness cannot be allowed to fester any longer. President Trump was elected to close the border and restore law and order. If we fail, our nation will be permanently populated by foreigners who hate us and owe their allegiance to another country. As patriots, we CANNOT stand by and let this happen. President Trump is doing his part, leading the way on mass deportations, calling for the National Guard to be deployed, and standing firm in the face of arrows being hurled toward him from every side. Now, it’s time for us to do our part... And that starts by building a winning ground game to Build the Red Wall. Together, we CAN take our country back, restore law and order, and rebuild our civilization around our shared America First values. Are you with me, Friend? Failure is NOT an option. Thank you for standing with TurningPoint PAC in support of President Trump’s America First agenda. It’s going to take each and every one of us, but together we CAN and WILL win the war for Western Civilization. For Freedom and America First, Charlie Kirk Turning Point PAC Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees) As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information. Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law. Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Donald Trump is dismantling our government, consolidating power, and dismissing the rule of law. And far too many people and organizations are bending the knee.
But I won't. Not now. Not ever.

name: Art Mitchell, All On The Line
subject: A big (but not beautiful) part of this bill
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
The courts need to be able to enforce rulings, period.
|
---

Hi Peter!
Today, I want to talk to you about an obscure and dangerous part of what Donald Trump is referring to as his “big, beautiful bill,” aka the devastating reconciliation package that the House passed last month.
Buried in the text is the following provision that reads:
_“No court of the United States may use appropriated funds to enforce a contempt citation for failure to comply with an injunction or temporary restraining order if no security was given when the injunction or order was issued pursuant to Federal Rule of Civil Procedure 65(c), whether issued prior to, on, or subsequent to the date of enactment of this section.”_
**So, what does this even mean?** At a glance, the provision might seem minor or too technical to have big implications. But in reality, it would have severe consequences on our checks and balances, and would encourage more lawless attempts to defy court rulings. This provision aims to limit courts’ ability to enforce certain types of urgent requests from plaintiffs and advocates.
**So, why does it matter?** This provision would prohibit courts from enforcing certain rulings that have an immediate effect. Among those types of rulings, this new rule could particularly affect rulings made on an emergency basis against a government action — such as challenges against Donald Trump’s attempts to weaponize the federal government, while also potentially rendering hundreds and hundreds of other court orders in cases unrelated to Trump completely unenforceable. (That’s very bad for those of us who believe in the rule of law.)
**Finally, here’s how it’s relevant to our work at All On The Line:** Of course, this kind of provision would affect countless issues. For our work, if it were to become law, it could encourage more mapmakers to act like Alabama did in the face of a preliminary injunction. Faced with a map that violated the law, our affiliate at the National Redistricting Foundation (NRF) won a court order to toss the map, which the Supreme Court affirmed in its decision in _Allen v. Milligan_. If this provision had been in effect, voters could have faced even more costs and barriers in their long struggle for fair maps — or even been powerless to make mapmakers in Alabama follow the law.
**The rule of law is a foundational piece of the fair maps movement and our work in ending extreme partisan _and racial gerrymandering, and we need courts to be able to enforce their rulings._**
[**We need to stop this extreme, dangerous provision from becoming law, Peter. Will you make a contribution to All On The Line and help fight for fair maps and hold gerrymandering lawmakers accountable?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109409601/551008435/302038796?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_HdnPrvn_email_20250611-AOTL-Tier1-HdnPrvn_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250611-AOTL-Tier1-HdnPrvn_&utm_campaign=HdnPrvn&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU2MGNjMzI0LTA5NDctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=BvsmZi1nCOwKHQU4w3agNCANe1duE6OGCv0HsIZKl6I=)

clean_body: The courts need to be able to enforce rulings, period. | Hi Peter! Today, I want to talk to you about an obscure and dangerous part of what Donald Trump is referring to as his “big, beautiful bill,” aka the devastating reconciliation package that the House passed last month. Buried in the text is the following provision that reads: “No court of the United States may use appropriated funds to enforce a contempt citation for failure to comply with an injunction or temporary restraining order if no security was given when the injunction or order was issued pursuant to Federal Rule of Civil Procedure 65(c), whether issued prior to, on, or subsequent to the date of enactment of this section.” So, what does this even mean? At a glance, the provision might seem minor or too technical to have big implications. But in reality, it would have severe consequences on our checks and balances, and would encourage more lawless attempts to defy court rulings. This provision aims to limit courts’ ability to enforce certain types of urgent requests from plaintiffs and advocates. So, why does it matter? This provision would prohibit courts from enforcing certain rulings that have an immediate effect. Among those types of rulings, this new rule could particularly affect rulings made on an emergency basis against a government action — such as challenges against Donald Trump’s attempts to weaponize the federal government, while also potentially rendering hundreds and hundreds of other court orders in cases unrelated to Trump completely unenforceable. (That’s very bad for those of us who believe in the rule of law.) Finally, here’s how it’s relevant to our work at All On The Line: Of course, this kind of provision would affect countless issues. For our work, if it were to become law, it could encourage more mapmakers to act like Alabama did in the face of a preliminary injunction. Faced with a map that violated the law, our affiliate at the National Redistricting Foundation (NRF) won a court order to toss the map, which the Supreme Court affirmed in its decision in Allen v. Milligan. If this provision had been in effect, voters could have faced even more costs and barriers in their long struggle for fair maps — or even been powerless to make mapmakers in Alabama follow the law. The rule of law is a foundational piece of the fair maps movement and our work in ending extreme partisan and racial gerrymandering, and we need courts to be able to enforce their rulings. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = At this perilous moment in our nation’s history, we need our checks and balances and the rule of law more than ever. I’ll be in touch soon with more on this. Thanks! Art Deputy Director of Litigation All On The Line = is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Fellow Conservative, every law-abiding American should be sickened by the riots happening in Los Angeles.

I wanted to directly share a few thoughts about this with you:

**First, California liberals have lost their minds.** Anyone who physically assaults a law enforcement officer or National Guard member should be arrested and prosecuted ASAP.

_Thefts, arson, and violence are not protected by the First Amendment._

**Second, President Trump is exactly right about sending in the National Guard.**

_If California politicians and Los Angeles officials won’t do their jobs, I know the Trump administration will._

**Third, of course Jon Ossoff hasn’t said a single word about rioters destroying property and attacking law enforcement in LA.** He stands with Kamala Harris, Gavin Newsom, and others who are defending these rioters.

| [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fc1e3de2c3984cf6917e1c3c2195801e&_e=Msq3QwfmYKUFw1GIaKNpJdb-w4PlQu_6H1qMAPUVmFQMfBz9OP9upDZg401Krk6CcwYkJASc62HMOKV8BvPsXLTYB4E7KjrPipZTOR81CHhtPW-Qaxxm29piPbrvxcdnlWgnGrOzt_yaUaP4jXg_OEeKczNmL1pWigkka-eOTwcQMAwsS1wqz63f2wg48p1Jskr1o3GjSb8sBt9pDNTP1hVwbD9PtVbd3w-NxMDLjVj8J30dvWdi2ojQCjp5kQvrJwNOnz2cO4oU5ZSQYuW8xzv4UyLfeuwUqPgPcmp6Ou_yLuLvfl0X5LmGotUEb1F1H2bFIZO9MNX4FCp_nrvN0lwMjvhDlxL8LJWr5E-Dlx4LevpzxKAq6w-mwEJmqIOR)
---
Peter,
---
Over the course of the last two years, many friends and kind souls have asked me if it was worth it.
---
Was it worth it to be relentlessly targeted by the Democrats’ Deep State all because I defended our 45th and 47th President – Donald J. Trump – from unimaginable and vicious witch hunts and refused to disavow the truth?
---
These rabid leftists have labeled me a “ _DEAD_ _MAN_ _WALKING_ ,” RAIDED my home, ARRESTED me, took a MUGSHOT of me, forced me into BANKRUPTCY, and even now, are _still_ attempting to throw me in PRISON for the rest of my life, but the _TRUTH_ remains...
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fc1e3de2c3984cf6917e1c3c2195801e&_e=Msq3QwfmYKUFw1GIaKNpJdb-w4PlQu_6H1qMAPUVmFQMfBz9OP9upDZg401Krk6CcwYkJASc62HMOKV8BvPsXLTYB4E7KjrPipZTOR81CHhtPW-Qaxxm29piPbrvxcdnlWgnGrOzt_yaUaP4jXg_OEeKczNmL1pWigkka-eOTwcQMAwsS1wqz63f2wg48p1Jskr1o3GjSb8sBt9pDNTP1hVwbD9PtVbd3w-NxMDLjVg_2SJY-x8ATVXST2s4bjzIcGMGEH6A3r7WtGzuijLr3VM1Qv6YB-jzsXrVvH2MgyjLqFn0kfKj_TTFA3gkW0Sj8M_3aR7szkR-VnDR6nA4yNIDM5SxiiEKzODnYQ8huEz7roQ3zrhK2701MwdIzbjQ)
__
---
...Being an _enemy_ of the Deep State like President Trump is not something to fear, _it’s a badge of honor – a sign that you were willing to take the arrows for what you know is RIGHT!_
---
**_So yes, Peter. For the truth, liberty, and justice – you bet it was worth it._**
---
When I look back at the past few years and all that the Radical Democrats and the Biden-Harris _regime_ did to try and make an example out of me, I have ZERO REGRETS.
---
My resolve _NEVER_ wavered, and that’s all thanks to you!
---
_Every step of the way I’ve fought with every fiber of my being – supported by generous patriots like _YOU_._
---
**But there is one thing I must confess: through every sham indictment, false arrest, and bogus charge where I’ve had to defend my innocence and good name, I’ve been saddled with enormous legal bills, unimaginable costs, and debts.**
---
And if we’re being honest with each other, it’s a cost I simply cannot bear on my own.
---
Make no mistake, this was the vindictive Democrats’ plan all along...
---
_This latest sham criminal case in Arizona – where if the Democrat Attorney General gets her way, I could take my last breath in prison – is designed to bleed me dry._
---
**That’s why I now have no choice but to set a goal to raise $100,000 this month for my Legal Defense Trust – the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund – so that I can continue fighting to remain a _FREE_ man.**
---
I hate reaching out like this, and this is difficult for me to say, but right now, my fate is truly in _your_ hands.
---
[**Please make a grassroots contribution to the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund to help me raise the $100,000 I need to cover the costs to continue fighting for my freedom and justice as the Democrats try to JAIL me for LIFE as an innocent man.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=fc1e3de2c3984cf6917e1c3c2195801e&_e=Msq3QwfmYKUFw1GIaKNpJdb-w4PlQu_6H1qMAPUVmFQMfBz9OP9upDZg401Krk6CcwYkJASc62HMOKV8BvPsXLTYB4E7KjrPipZTOR81CHhtPW-Qaxxm29piPbrvxcdnlWgnGrOzt_yaUaP4jXg_OEeKczNmL1pWigkka-eOTwcQMAwsS1wqz63f2wg48p1Jskr1o3GjSb8sBt9pDNTP1hVwbD9PtVbd3w-NxMDLjVgHdUENN_x6_5Oi26r_nAqtxfP7DQkQCAIcrGYAdxJjy4t8vw4njdtW0hbAon6_tapAXqv4tintzZqpdzQWk912eX3r9jDbQQhM-RLy4ldQ387nW0LAo316Yyw5E_WpIztHJA09S0gxeXLRwctgtvGo)

name: Wesley Bell
subject: Trump's move is reckless, cruel, and it will cost people their lives when disaster strikes.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI
body:
Peter,

When people aren’t given enough notice about severe weather, the results can be devastating — _and we’re seeing it right now, in real time._

Over the past few weeks, tornadoes have torn through parts of St. Louis, Oklahoma, Kentucky, and more; destroying homes, uprooting families, and leaving communities in crisis.

But instead of learning from these disasters and investing in early-warning systems, Donald Trump is doubling down on the decisions to strip funding from the National Weather Service.

That’s right: **Trump wants to gut the very agency responsible for tracking storms, sounding the alarms, and helping people get out of harm’s way.**

It’s reckless. It’s cruel. And it’s part of a larger pattern. Donald Trump’s anti-climate agenda is threatening to public safety. He pulled us out of the Paris Climate Agreement, rolled back clean air protections, and now, he’s coming for the tools we rely on to survive deadly weather...and I refuse to stay silent.

[**Add your name to my petition demanding Congress do their job and protect the National Weather Service and reject Trump’s anti-climate cuts that put Americans in harm's way. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109409939/551009800/1373402598?ms=em25_250611_climcu_adv_gq_act___WB_ettx&refcode=em25_250611_climcu_adv_gq_act___WB_ettx&source=em25_250611_climcu_adv_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250611_climcu_adv_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=8tAsIciu3BpWjc3/o4sLvIlD1i2m+rE0iHk0OtZRcyON7GDPwm897BQEmMheSQkPG5j7AASzCJ91KTWK1FLy+20W6GwXECnXmxsS5qQgb+sOBO0tKelmIeXFZ/qQbDykro1Yqs2HL4iAhegiOEyH+ZhJQrrjGEZCWZnixEVMFeA=&refcode2=f0d6c140-0b47-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjBkNmMxNDAtMGI0Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=F9JgDqwwQnj_30iO9g1PwjoJjLdWTLjDKPWFOko8bnc=&emci=d9d4e06e-da46-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=f0d6c140-0b47-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1020964) | [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109409942/551009803/1373402598?ms=em25_250611_climcu_adv_gq_act___WB_ettx&refcode=em25_250611_climcu_adv_gq_act___WB_ettx&source=em25_250611_climcu_adv_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_campaign=em25_250611_climcu_adv_gq_act___WB_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=8tAsIciu3BpWjc3/o4sLvIlD1i2m+rE0iHk0OtZRcyON7GDPwm897BQEmMheSQkPG5j7AASzCJ91KTWK1FLy+20W6GwXECnXmxsS5qQgb+sOBO0tKelmIeXFZ/qQbDykro1Yqs2HL4iAhegiOEyH+ZhJQrrjGEZCWZnixEVMFeA=&refcode2=f0d6c140-0b47-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYzODkiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjBkNmMxNDAtMGI0Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=F9JgDqwwQnj_30iO9g1PwjoJjLdWTLjDKPWFOko8bnc=&emci=d9d4e06e-da46-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=f0d6c140-0b47-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1020964)

clean_body: Peter, When people aren’t given enough notice about severe weather, the results can be devastating — and we’re seeing it right now, in real time. Over the past few weeks, tornadoes have torn through parts of St. Louis, Oklahoma, Kentucky, and more; destroying homes, uprooting families, and leaving communities in crisis. But instead of learning from these disasters and investing in early-warning systems, Donald Trump is doubling down on the decisions to strip funding from the National Weather Service. That’s right: Trump wants to gut the very agency responsible for tracking storms, sounding the alarms, and helping people get out of harm’s way. It’s reckless. It’s cruel. And it’s part of a larger pattern. Donald Trump’s anti-climate agenda is threatening to public safety. He pulled us out of the Paris Climate Agreement, rolled back clean air protections, and now, he’s coming for the tools we rely on to survive deadly weather...and I refuse to stay silent. | Every family deserves timely warnings when storms are coming. Every community deserves the resources to stay safe. We can't let political games put lives at risk. Thanks for using your voice, Wesley = = PAID FOR BY BELL FOR MISSOURI PO Box 190669, ST LOUIS, MO 63119
