name: John Fetterman
subject: trickle-down economics w/ a MAGA hat
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Hey, Derek, it’s John.

Trump and his MAGA guys are hyping up this “Big, Beautiful Bill” like it's some kinda magical wand for all the problems in America.

But here’s the truth: It’s a bullsh*t budget proposal. It’ll screw over working families, slash programs we *need*, and give Trump’s rich buddies even more tax breaks.

I’m a hard NO. Here’s why:

Here's the Truth About Trump’s Bill 👇

🔻 Nearly 300,000 Pennsylvanians would lose their Medicaid coverage.

💡 Families could see energy costs go up by $1,200 a year.

🏭 Domestic manufacturing tax credits would be gutted, costing us $50 BILLION.

📉 And this thing adds a *massive* deficit. Because I guess “fiscal responsibility” only applies to poor people?

I would NEVER vote for a bill that hurts regular people and hands more money to corporations and their rich friends. This is the same trickle-down nonsense we’ve seen before – this time, it's wearing a MAGA hat.

If you’re with me in this fight and you want a government that actually helps working families, would you toss in a few bucks to help fuel our grassroots campaign? I need to raise $5,000 by midnight to stay on track, so please give now if you can.

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/50482?refcode=jtk125-fr-fl&t=1001&akid=10141%2E434096%2EoEG6Wf

Appreciate yinz,

John ❤️

--------

This email was sent to EMAIL.

To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here: null

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. But here’s the truth: It’s a bullsht budget proposal. It’ll screw over working families, slash programs we need, and give Trump’s rich buddies even more tax breaks. I’m a hard NO. Here’s why: Here's the Truth About Trump’s Bill 👇 🔻 Nearly 300,000 Pennsylvanians would lose their Medicaid coverage. 💡 Families could see energy costs go up by $1,200 a year. 🏭 Domestic manufacturing tax credits would be gutted, costing us $50 BILLION. 📉 And this thing adds a massive* deficit. Because I guess “fiscal responsibility” only applies to poor people? I would NEVER vote for a bill that hurts regular people and hands more money to corporations and their rich friends. This is the same trickle-down nonsense we’ve seen before – this time, it's wearing a MAGA hat. If you’re with me in this fight and you want a government that actually helps working families, would you toss in a few bucks to help fuel our grassroots campaign? I need to raise $5,000 by midnight to stay on track, so please give now if you can. Appreciate yinz, John ❤️

body:
I’m with the people: It’s time to defund and abolish ICE. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEW-X_mVWKxsGqK2iuQEcMimWlTJ0l6je4cl69vHBsDhrm5Ulyt27pwqegPjFWLD6GPRnjDHk8tX5sE023ZR7sZe4tNPKVFXcqkW9tsi5J9JTIiL4RWQKyJyySuIRkmT3ZgS-qsSibQnWTuW-gu-ZOxAfqqBhqueE90GOch3ksVL3Kqe5zCER9LbOEnb0F-dMLR/4h9/jQiIfgxQRMCgprRo4gKQXw/h0/h001.n6AYZ3Jf91sTWham-KliIXVB25GsubcyrAJ9JAKxVIA)
---
Friend, I’m joining my community in demanding the release of a Detroit high schooler who was stopped on his way to a field trip—he’s currently in ICE detention and is at risk of immediate deportation. Now folks are also protesting in response to today’s outrageous news: Five immigrants who showed up for asylum cases in Detroit today were detained in the courtroom, and had their protected status revoked without explanation. In Michigan, Los Angeles, and around the country, people have been coming together to protect their immigrant neighbors and protest ICE. We know that ICE kidnaps children, tears apart families, and makes all of us less safe. Just over 20 years ago, the agency was created to criminalize, dehumanize, and terrorize immigrants. Its agents have done so under Democratic and Republican administrations. Now, corporations run most of ICE’s detention centers and Trump is working with Republican Congressmembers to send those for-profit private prison corporations billions _more_ taxpayer dollars. I’ve visited inhumane detention centers, introduced policies to free people from ICE detention, and pushed to hold ICE accountable for human rights abuses—including forced sterilizations, sexual assault, and fatal medical neglect. This agency is rooted in racism and pain; it cannot be reformed**.** **I’m with the people: It’s time to defund and abolish ICE.** [**Will you join me and people across the country in speaking out to abolish ICE and end mass deportations?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9wmxxlPC1YrcVcGnurtwMTFQ0UpF5L4OOxrdHlV14wnVETiwlxqJZDAyjEQ4BlS3EKU2Dnmbua0X5cx2X9f6i9S_ZpePpLdNmuy1tctYLA41Lx2I6lczBjSwW19vO8ag5AtziRK0wa6qUDT44f6MBdvcPuxgRIxO9a8OZuRFl5G44Zn3qhrwPhKKQQVtPrFWfCfVBZbMhKFgXXqKxdE0G0yAuvdlI9LOh7xuz8DhilStKUu2qYIcOMf7a1EvfdPaPa36ZkbI2qkeWW1Au0O7WCIBJb77YOXE1x8S98cX7nZBFeHEGsbFQBZeSSZ2CegqkvefTzEOtLINN1DUBYWd3ww/4h9/jQiIfgxQRMCgprRo4gKQXw/h1/h001.uRO-pAT7PGSmVyjcR_IQypmmzGZW0vkQt4FBRKakt8I) | [ADD YOUR NAME TODAY](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9wmxxlPC1YrcVcGnurtwMTFQ0UpF5L4OOxrdHlV14wnVETiwlxqJZDAyjEQ4BlS3EKU2Dnmbua0X5cx2X9f6i9SSes7Z2Xq-7yY6NVzY2b0hBYeMvoqqBWmuAztH3VjUFbUerFkLWjDLmNGMPC_rAVrpnEkkZONrP7p9w7mL4_jGIovGh2rbmVJcYJoP2tT4A-WihOMlyKulUU8g2s6jJy5e8zZXcE_JOe91149M14ojlMid994kbSrr3p8N4F831ZjEfC7pjm-TV_VaHtEXJCaePOyH79iFGuFHAcbp0ouWqV6Nnm5SW01KHRsGls1Huhl0lOrKytzuC0DOYx1zcFg/4h9/jQiIfgxQRMCgprRo4gKQXw/h2/h001.5gZ4-_RqpqkLjOw8HTCok0qKbIC9S-xQ-FQIflZhf0M)
---
As a former immigration attorney, I want to clarify that immigration legal proceedings fall under civil law—not criminal law. Migration is not a crime, and we must push back against the criminalization of immigrants.
During his first term, I blocked Trump’s attempts to collect DNA from immigrant detainees, including residents of Detroit as young as 14 years old.
Now I’m working with grassroots immigrant justice groups in my district to run Know Your Rights trainings, connect families with free legal assistance, and support people on their path to obtaining citizenship.
I will keep pushing for a just and humane immigration system, with paths to citizenship for immigrants and asylum-seekers. And I will not back down in the fight against Trump’s attacks on our communities and our rights.
[**Let’s raise our voices together and demand an end to mass deportations, mass detentions, and ICE!**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.qUXRBnqZ7T8nxbpAcIVwoUsWLkUMWlo_0JmZttSlm38h9nrsCCiMen3CGd5zila9wmxxlPC1YrcVcGnurtwMTFQ0UpF5L4OOxrdHlV14wnVETiwlxqJZDAyjEQ4BlS3EKU2Dnmbua0X5cx2X9f6i9UZS_EfOuM-VymFyTytnRVj9wWJOGilbyQU59IVRP-Wcd87OWaDqY6v2iE-hWjXgt3GXxV8tITiQkRKsqjIUh0F3Ss6Hfm-DzifCCz-gCEP_FmnfxTo_zCwkb75b_FwtN6c1ROgB28Hxh0WoVdQMnnIre1Ce6i22qhXe88anb3H484UGvVIlSa7PLiMtHU1RI2xutUq3C8L4JqVkpfblbmk0y14umYhYbyBzutSYlNBiixumymiU_wTUHEGGtNFnQw/4h9/jQiIfgxQRMCgprRo4gKQXw/h3/h001.7NYCHcgPXj3BdzlQDrgbEtUam3NoR3nEAx5Lp-K54Pk)
Thank you. Together we will resist harmful policies that demonize our neighbors, and we will continue demanding a future with dignity and safety for all people.
In solidarity,
Rashida

using the military to attack American citizens, both presidents
crossed some dangerous red lines for democracy.

[](https://substack.com/redirect/73a99239-372e-4610-9fd0-fe20ab6c308c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

The Republican Party has fully embraced fascism and destroyed American
democracy. But some Democrats still say Latinx. I have never felt more
politically homeless.
### **Cliff 's Note: **They Cheer Traitors but Attack Immigrants
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/253945ab-78a1-4b23-b6e6-995370f6a70d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Let me get this straight, Charlie Kirk, you unauthorized Mr. Potato Head ripoff.
In America, one can waltz down Main Street waving a Confederate flag--the literal banner of armed rebellion against the United States--and not only will no federal agents come for you, you may get a wink and a nod from your local Republican congressman.
But wave a _Mexican_ flag in Los Angeles--a city whose very name is Spanish, in a state that was once part of Mexico--especially during the siege Trump unleashed on the city, and suddenly it's a a free round of jackboots and tear gas for anyone with this flag? Is this the argument you're making, Charles?
Because, it's not just hypocrisy. It's fascism in broad daylight.
Now I get that after many grueling hours of laborious study and physical torment, during those two separate stints as a community-college dropout (bone spurs, was it?), you think you got this, Charlie. Like Clarence Thomas got to the head of the line the moment of the release of the digitally remastered Long Dong Silver collection.
But, for argument's sake, what if there were people who aren't as dumb as a syphilitic doorknob who disagree with you, Charles? Because they successfully made it somewhere beyond Sean Hannity's education level?
To begin with, let's not pretend the Confederate flag is some misunderstood "heritage" symbol. It represents most murderous act of treason in American history.
Over 600,000 Americans died because a group of white slaveholders wanted to keep their human property, and fooled the motley MAGAs of their day to fight and die for the top 1% of rich white, lazy racists to keep their slaves. Sound kinda familiar?
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8ce06d9e-cb88-4f47-8fd3-be34c1b834d8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
So it's sad, but not really surprising, that MAGA rallies are filled with Confederate cosplay--and the same people who scream "LAW AND ORDER!" are fine with antebellum regalia. Some of these Low-T losers even _fund_ it. Hell, some of them _ARE it_.
But go ahead and wave the flag of your Mexican ancestors while you're protesting in a majority-Latino city, and suddenly you're some kind of an "invader." A "threat." A "target."
Because, the physically repulsive ratfucking in which these Confederate Republicans are engaged in Los Angeles isn't, in the slightest bit, about law. And it sure AF ain't about order. It's about pure, unadulterated power--and who gets to have it and, in Trump's case, wield it against their foes.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a3f97f2b-47e9-47b5-bd7b-afaa1cd364a7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
It's about reminding people of color who may have momentarily forgotten that a whole lot of white people in this country--not all, but, still, _way too many_ --will always treat them like outsiders. Even after their families have lived among us for multiple generations.
It's the goons in the body armor with the armored vehicles sent by Trump who fit a classic definition of "invaders." **Those bleached and blotty true outsiders are all about using federal muscle to intimidate dissent and criminalize pride in your own culture**.
If it sounds familiar, it should--it's the same playbook authoritarians have used around the world. And are using right now, from Trump's boss in the Kremlin to Turkey's Erdogan, from Orban in Hungary to Xi in China. They aren't what you'd call creative types, it's a pretty standard set of rules.
Weaponize fear. Silence opposition. Paint the Other as the enemy.

This ain't hard: waving the Mexican flag is not treason. It is the very opposite actually, if you're cerebrally whole enough to do that whole critical thinking thing. This is pride in your family, your friends, your group, which is completely consistent with loving the United States of America.
Have none of these fourteen-words inhaling, ICE asshats ever been to a soccer game? I mean, they can't all be held on the same nights at their Klan bakes.
Protesting injustice is not illegal, you calcified colostomy bags, it's what we're supposed to do in a free society. **Dissent, as they say, is the highest form of patriotism. It is the very essence of the American experiment.**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a0fe450f-3f9b-4645-b585-811030947277?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Even if regurgitated human thumb, Tom Homan--and when I say regurgitated, I'm not talking immediately, I'm pretty sure that dipstick spent a solid 12 hours as a gallbladder resident--is such a vicious prick he doesn't have the slightest what America is about. We do.
And as long as we have a Constitution--and as long as people like us are willing to fight for it -- this kind of racist, authoritarian thuggery will not go unchecked. Y**ou want to defend America? Start by defending the people who actually** _**believe**_**in democracy enough to stand up for it in the streets.**
Not those power-humping shape-shifters who never understood America and would persecute is people or overthrow its government in a heartbeat. All while porting around their little Confederate flag participation trophy.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/04e5c204-252f-45f1-830e-e42d6af053ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
So the next time some Republican near you claims to be a member of the party of "freedom," show 'em a video of federal agents attacking peaceful protestors in California with chemical weapons, rubber bullets and batons. Ask why they didn't flinch when a Confederate flag was paraded through the U.S. Capitol as they wiped feces on the walls. But they bring along a fucking tank to use on a teenager holding a Mexican flag.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/82e0d59c-051b-41f5-ae3d-77f2b7204159?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This isn't about patriotism. Or anything in the same universe as that concept. It's about power -- and who the Trump's doughy dolts think deserves it. And I promise you this: they'll learn soon enough. **We 're not going anywhere.**
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d7cc882c-5417-40b9-aca5-827a6306f654?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_Donald's Dickensian directives are going to have Americans eating
gruel this Christmas while they're visited by the ghosts of democracy
past. And after Bobby's through with the polio vaccines, there will be
plenty of Tiny Tims on crutches.

by Maureen Dowd_

But some Democrats still say Latinx. I have never felt more politically homeless. Cliff 's Note: They Cheer Traitors but Attack Immigrants | | ---|---|--- Let me get this straight, Charlie Kirk, you unauthorized Mr. Potato Head ripoff. In America, one can waltz down Main Street waving a Confederate flag--the literal banner of armed rebellion against the United States--and not only will no federal agents come for you, you may get a wink and a nod from your local Republican congressman. But wave a Mexican flag in Los Angeles--a city whose very name is Spanish, in a state that was once part of Mexico--especially during the siege Trump unleashed on the city, and suddenly it's a a free round of jackboots and tear gas for anyone with this flag? Is this the argument you're making, Charles? Because, it's not just hypocrisy. It's fascism in broad daylight. Now I get that after many grueling hours of laborious study and physical torment, during those two separate stints as a community-college dropout (bone spurs, was it?), you think you got this, Charlie. Like Clarence Thomas got to the head of the line the moment of the release of the digitally remastered Long Dong Silver collection. But, for argument's sake, what if there were people who aren't as dumb as a syphilitic doorknob who disagree with you, Charles? Because they successfully made it somewhere beyond Sean Hannity's education level? To begin with, let's not pretend the Confederate flag is some misunderstood "heritage" symbol. It represents most murderous act of treason in American history. Over 600,000 Americans died because a group of white slaveholders wanted to keep their human property, and fooled the motley MAGAs of their day to fight and die for the top 1% of rich white, lazy racists to keep their slaves. Sound kinda familiar? | | ---|---|--- So it's sad, but not really surprising, that MAGA rallies are filled with Confederate cosplay--and the same people who scream "LAW AND ORDER!" are fine with antebellum regalia. Some of these Low-T losers even fund it. Hell, some of them ARE it. But go ahead and wave the flag of your Mexican ancestors while you're protesting in a majority-Latino city, and suddenly you're some kind of an "invader." A "threat." A "target." Because, the physically repulsive ratfucking in which these Confederate Republicans are engaged in Los Angeles isn't, in the slightest bit, about law. And it sure AF ain't about order. It's about pure, unadulterated power--and who gets to have it and, in Trump's case, wield it against their foes. | | ---|---|--- It's about reminding people of color who may have momentarily forgotten that a whole lot of white people in this country--not all, but, still, way too many --will always treat them like outsiders. Even after their families have lived among us for multiple generations. It's the goons in the body armor with the armored vehicles sent by Trump who fit a classic definition of "invaders." Those bleached and blotty true outsiders are all about using federal muscle to intimidate dissent and criminalize pride in your own culture. If it sounds familiar, it should--it's the same playbook authoritarians have used around the world. And are using right now, from Trump's boss in the Kremlin to Turkey's Erdogan, from Orban in Hungary to Xi in China. They aren't what you'd call creative types, it's a pretty standard set of rules. Weaponize fear. Silence opposition. Paint the Other as the enemy. `Independent Media For $1.32/Week!` We 're running a special! Full Access to Blue Amp for only $1.32 per week! Please support our work covering stories monopoly media ignores. And amplifying indy media to create a viable, powerful, media ecosystem independent of corporate interests! Amplify Good. Support Indy Media! This ain't hard: waving the Mexican flag is not treason. It is the very opposite actually, if you're cerebrally whole enough to do that whole critical thinking thing. This is pride in your family, your friends, your group, which is completely consistent with loving the United States of America. Have none of these fourteen-words inhaling, ICE asshats ever been to a soccer game? I mean, they can't all be held on the same nights at their Klan bakes. Protesting injustice is not illegal, you calcified colostomy bags, it's what we're supposed to do in a free society. Dissent, as they say, is the highest form of patriotism. It is the very essence of the American experiment. | | ---|---|--- Even if regurgitated human thumb, Tom Homan--and when I say regurgitated, I'm not talking immediately, I'm pretty sure that dipstick spent a solid 12 hours as a gallbladder resident--is such a vicious prick he doesn't have the slightest what America is about. We do. And as long as we have a Constitution--and as long as people like us are willing to fight for it -- this kind of racist, authoritarian thuggery will not go unchecked. You want to defend America? Start by defending the people who actually believein democracy enough to stand up for it in the streets. Not those power-humping shape-shifters who never understood America and would persecute is people or overthrow its government in a heartbeat. All while porting around their little Confederate flag participation trophy. | | ---|---|--- So the next time some Republican near you claims to be a member of the party of "freedom," show 'em a video of federal agents attacking peaceful protestors in California with chemical weapons, rubber bullets and batons. Ask why they didn't flinch when a Confederate flag was paraded through the U.S. Capitol as they wiped feces on the walls. But they bring along a fucking tank to use on a teenager holding a Mexican flag. | | ---|---|--- This isn't about patriotism. Or anything in the same universe as that concept. It's about power -- and who the Trump's doughy dolts think deserves it. And I promise you this: they'll learn soon enough. We 're not going anywhere. | | ---|---|--- Donald's Dickensian directives are going to have Americans eating gruel this Christmas while they're visited by the ghosts of democracy past. And after Bobby's through with the polio vaccines, there will be plenty of Tiny Tims on crutches. by Maureen Dowd VIDEO ON DEMAND! subject: It’s official
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Peter,
We’re asking you to support Jon’s re-election campaign today. Here’s why:
_Cook Political Report_ has officially called this race a “TOSS-UP” and said Jon Ossoff is the “most endangered incumbent” in the country.
_The Hill_ reported: “Sen. Jon Ossoff (Ga.) is considered the most vulnerable Democrat on the Senate map, and Republicans have been eagerly awaiting the chance to win back the seat.”
**Peter, we can’t sit back and wait to respond. Republicans are _already_ spending millions of dollars attacking Jon.**
[**Please, use this link to give $5 or any amount to Jon Ossoff’s Senate campaign in Georgia. We need all hands on deck to fight back against the GOP’s attacks and protect this seat.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-june25.2OdyOr&refcode=em250611-1-full&t=1&akid=457%2E5691347%2ELXs5Fh)

name: Gretchen Whitmer
subject: State by state, they’re chipping away at reproductive freedom
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
This is exactly why we fight |
#
---
Team, Last week, the Department of Health and Human Services — under its new leadership — revoked a guidance that protected emergency abortion care nationwide. That means hospitals in states like Indiana can use this as cover to not treat women whose lives or health are at risk during pregnancy, simply because they need an abortion. I wish I were exaggerating. **Thanks to the work we’ve done in Michigan, women can still receive the care they need, no matter what.** We elected leaders who put reproductive freedom first, and as a result, we passed laws that protect people’s right to make decisions about their own bodies, especially in a life-threatening crisis. But my heart breaks for the women in states where that’s not the case. That’s why I launched Fight Like Hell PAC — to elect more leaders who won’t flinch when reproductive rights are on the line. **[We _cannot_ sit back while extremists chip away at our most basic freedoms, state by state. Chip in right now to help us push back and fight like hell for reproductive freedom everywhere:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109410763/551012211/687912175?amount=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250611_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWU4MjZkYzAtMGU0Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Xfn1uLzvqyTHgJBc48mHeNID33IBFM1Ss7RzDw3_BMQ=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109410764/551012212/-1809995021?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20250611_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZWU4MjZkYzAtMGU0Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Xfn1uLzvqyTHgJBc48mHeNID33IBFM1Ss7RzDw3_BMQ=)

body:

conservative movement—and good friends of Judicial Watch—for many
years.

[alt_text]

RIGHTS AND FREEDOMS IN PERIL

_"When it comes to fighting for the American people’s ‘right to
know,’ no one holds a candle to Tom Fitton and his team at Judicial
Watch"_ - SEAN HANNITY

Tom Fitton returns with an exhaustive investigation into the
progressive movement’s efforts to dismantle the venerable
institutions of American rights and freedoms.

Kash Patel and Dan Bongino have been stalwart allies of the

years. Judicial Watch applauded their appointments as director and
deputy director of the FBI. Expectations were high. In a
statement following Patel’s confirmation as FBI director, JW
President Tom Fitton noted that Patel has “his work set out for
him.” He called on Patel to “bring transparency and
accountability back to an agency that became irredeemably corrupt and
the tip of the spear in unfettered lawfare against any American seen
as a threat to the ruling class. From sitting on Hunter Biden’s
laptop in order to influence the 2020 election, the raid of President
Trump’s Mar-a-Lago home, and the censorship of Americans, to the
targeting of traditional Catholics, the FBI has shown itself as a
tainted domestic and intelligence service.”

50th Speaker of the United States House of Representatives, Newt Gingrich joins me today. Newt's new book Trump's Triumph is a New York Times best seller. Newt documents President Trump's greatest comeback in political history. Despite a 9 year effort to destroy him, President Trump won popular and electoral votes and became the first president to be nonconsecutively re-elected since President Grover Cleveland. Today we unpack the big, beautiful bill and how detrimental it is to get is passed so the agenda President Trump has promised can move forward. Newt's message to Republicans is if you want to stay in the majority, find a way to vote yes. Nearly the entire country shifted red last election cycle and passing the bill so Americans can start to feel and live the effects of it is the best way to grow an even bigger majority in 2026. Democrats on the other hand, have become the party of weakness. With a lack of vision and anti-American policies, the only facade they portray is standing up to Trump. President Trump is trying to solve real problems, mostly created by Democrats as seen by the American people. President Trump is showing strong leadership, common sense policy, and wild popularity, will MAGA live on after he is gone?
Featuring:
**Speaker Newt Gingrich**
Host | Newt's World

Newt's new book Trump's Triumph is a New York Times best seller. Newt documents President Trump's greatest comeback in political history. Despite a 9 year effort to destroy him, President Trump won popular and electoral votes and became the first president to be nonconsecutively re-elected since President Grover Cleveland. Today we unpack the big, beautiful bill and how detrimental it is to get is passed so the agenda President Trump has promised can move forward. Newt's message to Republicans is if you want to stay in the majority, find a way to vote yes. Nearly the entire country shifted red last election cycle and passing the bill so Americans can start to feel and live the effects of it is the best way to grow an even bigger majority in 2026. Democrats on the other hand, have become the party of weakness. With a lack of vision and anti-American policies, the only facade they portray is standing up to Trump. President Trump is trying to solve real problems, mostly created by Democrats as seen by the American people. President Trump is showing strong leadership, common sense policy, and wild popularity, will MAGA live on after he is gone? # LegiTrack is Here!
---
| Hi, Friend!
---
We are so excited to announce that [LegiTrack is LIVE](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.-oquW6_J_l0FuhjVorz1E6nfbR8EfI5MbMhw0Uo47-Fa3ZGpdRN9h1JAuOXb-GPHyyXR8M4DFdr8JejKM2rbRHxavUrILjiD22nQNvq4I789cMaQoyiucjVfn-Gc3Vc3swafwLLy9Lm9gIQ4CozUeBaBymH1jLUe1SFLDO5f-pRAUeTjFOUYB8126lW56eKkozllma4u29hbqiy07PruRwzXfcMtMAPNL-hbeLpQ6DY/4h9/rhjGVi1-T5qIuDj3kPxAVA/h1/h001.3JgE8bHYe9J6vd3BOr3SDsh73sA06eLxUAkcr1Leeio)! Let’s dive into what to expect and how you, as a volunteer, can utilize this platform to get even more involved!
**What is LegiTrack?**
LegiTrack is a bill and regulatory-tracking tool to empower freedom-minded citizens to engage with and influence election integrity through the legislative process. Legislation _can appear intimidating_ , but we make it easy!
Please keep in mind that **LegiTrack is currently in beta (test) mode** while we work towards launching the full version.
**Here’s how to start!**
1. 👉 Visit [LegiTrack.org](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.g-A_E1G8FCXYi7CiuNjJd-2Xn0ABG44tYGC7KZyvtVpPGqwbI4kYsCR1-msP9JflHrpFHHQ-8D-TTmKHSaD5WNIvXtpMeFY7U1BTjR9jtEXIrkLBZZ5Be-IRlFR5rvEccjDAZtnmbvbu8gbZ0shyRLUYIKSOVtj6uO1gvuc-7LlUwDCTNwkrvt0EuSnyXTD6li7OaIr4vl7AGTRgH6xdzYiLY2Q7Xn3ymC6ucAllCik/4h9/rhjGVi1-T5qIuDj3kPxAVA/h2/h001.X7WFvP0KI6djhGfs0QMKS4nOB-iUWo82eOtZmyYQtyc)
2. 👉 [Sign up](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.-oquW6_J_l0FuhjVorz1E60N4D7LLUCE71EdeMtoFZ61IUmOpP4sSx7UvYLz_By9YiaRipw6pgyFknoFuAtGHE9Nn38z2CuLNy9y2bQOLKpseYIsLA7oCSDSMOekTdR05bF8_UfgH7igx4TUT23EeeIPL2YH1WU-qoRN28ZyVuiJS5dQz_HURnJi2GJ8f0r4cbGU8AVY0byJcYCuLIHpZ_iVYbeBTdHkmZwJ3Zp6iLo/4h9/rhjGVi1-T5qIuDj3kPxAVA/h3/h001.VhBGSNFcqE6yE4CHuu72cvgayQMz4wQ0E5cFUyoUWbw) to receive updates
3. 👉 Check out the [LegiTrack Index](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.-oquW6_J_l0FuhjVorz1E51sJee9xS35ufuJ31R3PTolNTlyxhsoSq5U-INeVnWTegQUwfNlLrBLy-fNTMy26zG8tNVldMHDdc1IaQl64cumsFbHFLcktZJCqyd8K0D6TFziOiRcYr75beX2xdis-9gYuIf3RPOax5G1FGoZHXzDJG3EeuGnj1p7-HnykErc3sGJlA7vWGVMb2lmy6OGYmr3u8pbybg5Ej58iY5_Fa4/4h9/rhjGVi1-T5qIuDj3kPxAVA/h4/h001.EAOwYAyqMd8bEWYr2a5QSU8U_33rZ4RnqQGGTWKKq-Y) and [FAQs](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.-oquW6_J_l0FuhjVorz1EwqoJtwh8YGBd9cwJUQebVKWz2FDpdO7O22omTM7Yus5kk9J58K4b25eq6fgPCM7pSrMxCG-wPgaaPaCYmU4C4-_aHsW6BANJiKJcBMnQbokX9Oc4KwNza9sWnUhY7cf1NVaSTW-fGVZ6DtvBh-WS1_8U0XcG9gHaRofluMI5WFhGJWVU9F51_TbelA5Ocs0-7RqQiNnrDZL-CedyJFVxek/4h9/rhjGVi1-T5qIuDj3kPxAVA/h5/h001.93H8kqrq4sfihGlcfm69ML5Z89GDfg3rH7iw-7im-4M)
4. 👉 [Contact us](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.bYZLwP2tKNW52PF5H5Fs6VuLNfu_Aw7Ny_5hgf-aHkTOG__youAz7czSfRs7dU2DavQ4-xmF5-LRDD2OexDxQOHdyUthVjevyTQUye6Zyl_6nqiaNFh53h8mGn-_ZexQV2BR7_9iY3o47Lm-7uhlgR7KtwrB3OjwwSkRrVemSFXgUHP_KXWAqOLKMlgcFs45SnMjpD17Bfn7MlNi7k3gC2e5HZhj66OAb_WgUSU9gNcoDPvKNLrvYvkuBLjD0aXt/4h9/rhjGVi1-T5qIuDj3kPxAVA/h6/h001.JmeOCVxSn6YiiHeJVd4eM_mNT91Tm2TNo3AV6n5BkgE) or join us on our first [LegiTrack walkthrough](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.flIQTCCIxNEqWg_ApxSzTossZ5Xb3HKShiqufGpW6VaklPuDZJdYTExZae2xye2UxBtTOtK0qcmlCzjMm0bRgYskjdJxHIbOHM6Z4gQUOImgmSdxef6DfvDKwCFnAx-0mZwhnZlQi65a4qpRbHoBQZiZ6yegkk0_Yrmu4VSB7EA8LBlOIyI2h5mn3TaYhwcq8ejaZMNaxQwEC0OJlCE3x-s349ucmTTmMg4cKcxkbMxyRx-tH2WhNGU8ko18v8odFHOT32lkaWGZRZy_Zw5fxZcDrp0ej2hZWl_3ka0ZQnBlabIqPNfl7xl3LLcOJWGt/4h9/rhjGVi1-T5qIuDj3kPxAVA/h7/h001.q2yp2Bqc4DlPOPJX-UF2lFK2eWCcPYh9dDqGaS_RmtI)! We’d love your feedback:

* Do or have you ever reached out to your elected officials?
* Which sources or apps do you use to reach out?
* Which issues tend to drive your ambition to reach out?

Join us on Locals next Thursday, June 19th at 6pm ct/7pm et👇👇👇
| [](https://link.mail.beehiiv.com/ss/c/u001.flIQTCCIxNEqWg_ApxSzTossZ5Xb3HKShiqufGpW6VaklPuDZJdYTExZae2xye2UxBtTOtK0qcmlCzjMm0bRgYskjdJxHIbOHM6Z4gQUOImgmSdxef6DfvDKwCFnAx-0mZwhnZlQi65a4qpRbHoBQZiZ6yegkk0_Yrmu4VSB7EA8LBlOIyI2h5mn3TaYhwcq8ejaZMNaxQwEC0OJlCE3x-s349ucmTTmMg4cKcxkbMxyRx-tH2WhNGU8ko18v8odJTZRwrjuEZp4uKyZOJzzTihW3EzVVt0-MTzRylMkcgH8Q_jqAdufneZcUf07I2iE/4h9/rhjGVi1-T5qIuDj3kPxAVA/h8/h001.M7jD-dui_fwrQ7KNt0WtCIrG7bTJCPQmSEQA8mXa1MU)

name: Lee Johnson
subject: Lindsey Graham forgot where he came from
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109411551/551014760/2109746102?refcode=250611_MFC_Johnson_GrahamForgot&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkODkyMTMyMS0xMDQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=700M4V1NSlO7XiPQsuGmDkB18jTbOqQbsSSOV6Am_F0=) Friend, Lindsey Graham used to be a small-town kid from South Carolina. But you wouldn’t know it now. After over three decades in Washington, Lindsey’s loyalty lies with lobbyists, billionaires, and party bosses — not the people of our state. While our rural hospitals shut down and our schools fall apart, Lindsey gets richer, louder, and more disconnected from us. South Carolinians are tired of being forgotten. And I’m tired of watching our state fall behind while Lindsey chases TV cameras. I’m running for U.S. Senate to fight for the people Lindsey Graham left behind. Fellow Conservative, I wanted to personally share our campaign’s first ad with my top supporters.

[WATCH: Soldier. Lawman. The ad talks about my record, from deploying to the southern border to serving on the streets as a cop. It also talks about Georgia’s AWOL senator, Jon Ossoff. When Biden opened our borders and humiliated our country in Afghanistan, he was nowhere to be found.

__**Believe me, Jon Ossoff and the Democrats don’t want Georgia voters to see this ad.**__

[**And the last thing they want is for conservatives like you to help us keep this ad running.**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=d3ff5483ea3b4edf96823fea2eb7cea6&_e=llx36GWcSqX8IU0aAi0W5J3M8Lynd5hGf_OUJ6pV9eHhU63mK5H96TCCx86_ovfEbyTc2S-v-6F-TA_gpqUKtVox47q1eDQtw36oZ4x9Wi4H7oia-zBG9yH_LabdKrhjtFaA_11wLccCE9cMvttPjst0z1na-c8zFdWWtJYSCb8UgPRau9gDvbbRuQTt3khGWaDe0JJlQLYN4zLZS75W0SDcOomhHo6SrbKp_KhGuaZ9qVyiKRc1nND0iY7O12oYdaWZDTG05VGUXH6YqmFtBS7CbNwTE6mWCpLV1G_HP9g3K8P7yMyoKnEYFLqkyqVYf1MqN0jteGGzJJhpLCa8ZfheWGEbT6JD8hIRfPK5O8UcqDPUddcvdupoMQlE02V1MHEy_D3hcLBug8ebe9Dn-A%3D%3D)

name: Gregory Wrightstone, CO2 Coalition
subject: Your Book to Expose the Climate Myth
body:
|

Please read the following message from our sponsor.
* * *
| | | | [](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuesbyIteknop5IaITmbsrc6f6&s=GCIHHDGKGEFALOCH)
---
Friend, The Climate Cult is pushing their BIGGEST lie yet: that the very air you exhale – carbon dioxide – is a "dangerous pollutant" that must be regulated and controlled. **_Their real agenda?_**__**_To control every aspect of your life_** _,_**_from the car or truck you drive to the stove you cook on._** The CO2 Coalition is fighting back with an arsenal of truth that the Green Lobby fears most: real science. With over 180 renowned scientists, including 2022 Nobel Laureate in Physics Dr. John Clauser, we're exposing the Climate Fiction that's being used to steal your freedoms. _**[_**Your immediate gift of $30, $50, or $100 will help us flood the public sector, schools, and halls of Congress with scientific truth that dismantles their fear-mongering propaganda.**_](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuesbyIteknop5IbITmbsrc6f6&s=GCIHHDGKGEFALOCH)**_
---
[ **EXCLUSIVE OFFER - DONATE NOW AND**
**RECEIVE MY BOOK AS A GIFT**](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuesbyIteknop5IcITmbsrc6f6&s=GCIHHDGKGEFALOCH)
---
[](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuesbyIteknop5IdITmbsrc6f6&s=GCIHHDGKGEFALOCH)
---
Friend, our impact is already sending shockwaves through the establishment. Governments, international organizations, and big businesses are all getting behind the false climate narrative and seeking to silence voices like ours. That’s because the science, the facts, and the data dispute what you are being told. **Not only is there NOT a climate crisis** , but the human condition is THRIVING because of modest warming and more CO2.
---
[](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuesbyIteknop5IeITmbsrc6f6&s=GCIHHDGKGEFALOCH)
---
_But the Climate Cult is doubling down._ They're pouring billions into "green" initiatives that will destroy our economy while enriching their political allies. And they're indoctrinating our children from kindergarten through college with their apocalyptic fantasy that seeks to infringe on our individual liberties and control people through fear. Your support today will help us:
* Publish groundbreaking scientific studies

* Launch aggressive education campaigns

* Fight back against Green Lobby propaganda

* Restore scientific integrity in our schools

With your help, we can reach MILLIONS of Americans this year with facts that shatter the Green Lobby’s narrative. _**[_**Will you please make an immediate gift of $30, $50, or $100 to expose the biggest Climate Fictions, defend the truth about CO 2, and fuel our efforts to preserve freedom?**_](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuesbyIteknop5IfITmbsrc6f6&s=GCIHHDGKGEFALOCH)**_
---
[ **Fight Back Against Climate Propaganda – Donate Now AND RECEIVE LIMITED TIME BOOK OFFER AS A GIFT**](https://e.pm.tarise.com/re?l=D0I2xuesbyIteknop5IgITmbsrc6f6&s=GCIHHDGKGEFALOCH)
---
_Time is critical, Friend._ **While we have momentum and truth on our side, the Green Lobby is working overtime to silence voices like ours.** They NEED to silence people like me and my colleagues at the CO2 Coalition because we tell a compelling, fact-based story that confirms _there is no climate crisis_. But we won't be silenced so easily, especially with you standing alongside us. _**If you donate today with an amount of $30 of more, I will send you my newest book as a gift for your support. This book contains all of the facts that you need to stand against the big lie. **_ Thank you for standing with science and truth. Together, we'll defeat the Climate Cult's dangerous agenda. Best regards, Gregory Wrightstone
Executive Director
CO2 Coalition P.S. The Climate Cult fears nothing more than informed citizens armed with scientific facts. Please don't wait – act now to protect our freedoms and restore scientific integrity.
---

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: Still hoping to hear from you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warnock for Georgia
body:
---
Friend, I’m deeply grateful for everyone who has taken a moment to share their thoughts with me in my brief focus group.
In the face of so much chaos and confusion from Donald Trump and Washington Republicans, your direct input helps me make sure I’m fighting for the issues that matter most to you – the issues that will make the biggest difference in your life.
**But I still need a few more responses, so if you haven’t already, can you join my focus group? Please take just a minute or two now to share your thoughts, priorities, and concerns with me. Here's the link:[https://surveys.signforgood.com/warnock-june-focus-group-surv-email](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109412368/551017734/1195651860?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk5545-su-seg1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmNjNDRhMS0xMzQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OZxrUgMMlleUuHCCUIuatgYv9TaYjyXN0Bs2WMokce8=&emci=6d74f3aa-4742-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=02cc44a1-1347-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1586379)**
Thank you,
Rev. Raphael Warnock
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Rev. Raphael Warnock**
Subject: What is weighing heaviest on your mind right now?
| | |
---
Friend, the chaos coming from Washington Republicans is showing no signs of stopping anytime soon.
They voted to keep Trump's Tariff Tax in place – forcing working families to continue bearing the brunt of this president's reckless trade war. They just released their plan to gut Medicaid – a plan that would rip health care away from millions of Americans. And at every turn, they're slashing and burning crucial services to pay for tax cuts for billionaires.
It's the honor of my life to fight for you in the Senate, and I'm doing everything I possibly can to hold the line against Donald Trump and his allies in Washington. **But at a moment when there are so many challenges that folks are facing in their everyday lives because of Trump's disastrous agenda, it's crucial that I hear about what is top of mind for you right now.**
**[That's why I asked my team to put together a brief focus group so you can share your thoughts, priorities, and concerns with me directly, and I'm counting on your participation this month. Will you take a moment now to let me know what is weighing heaviest on your mind?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109412369/551017735/1195651860?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk5545-su-seg1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmNjNDRhMS0xMzQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OZxrUgMMlleUuHCCUIuatgYv9TaYjyXN0Bs2WMokce8=&emci=6d74f3aa-4742-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=02cc44a1-1347-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1586379)**
| | [Begin the Focus Group](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109412371/551017738/1195651860?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100&code=jtk5545-su-seg1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTEvMS85MDkwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmNjNDRhMS0xMzQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OZxrUgMMlleUuHCCUIuatgYv9TaYjyXN0Bs2WMokce8=&emci=6d74f3aa-4742-f011-a5f1-6045bda9d96b&emdi=02cc44a1-1347-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=1586379)
---
I know this is a dark chapter in our country's history, but we cannot give in to despair. The disastrous agenda that Donald Trump and Washington Republicans are pushing is wildly unpopular, and we can win the battles ahead of us so long as we're fighting together.
Now and always, that is my steadfast promise to you: **I will never stop fighting for you and your family. For lower everyday costs. For our health care. For our fundamental freedoms. For the issues you care about most.**
Thanks for taking a moment to share your thoughts with me. It's a huge help as I work to make sure I'm focused on your top priorities in the Senate.
Sincerely,
Rev. Raphael Warnock
| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://action.warnockforgeorgia.com/p/UBjz5MzSPkqVKiEwLzz2KA2?unsubscribedata=CuyguxrHIuczvwdb51ClgCV8vu7eXc93dEN7sSJ8yKb7p%2BzGBk9t5lXZMsCDGP4qgE3Nxq859KxQ0FRgGJbdk6t73mWvquWef69csIIeEhzRrlzgNF%2FXsySH3ruM5VJG%2FLpPS4u5knvxx5tzuC5KQhqXmXbKEyx1JXf6obeQqvEwmF5rd3gg%2BikZu9SYUkFLOwPCE9wvZLsOy36Jet0SKbn3mWH3qJlPxHyEmH9a9TlMwsBm%2FCgv0EluoPyU3NQCxpodEh5MtboZwEzweevE4HkfwSqKIP%2BZCi9R13FaBkRx0GEc6zlHgu8OECYX3o5Og1tiFNvCyxdHULovyWYn9Qz290DV4S3rqMb2NOToPu9r0dm3Hs2whHxyxaI965VvBJmnueaJxxiMyawF1tiZDWn1swTB7iuGIGZC6Ieb59k%3D) For your reference, any donor history or identification in this message reflects what we have on file for the email address [dpwillis67@gmail.com] to which this message was sent. If you have donated from another address or via another method, many thanks for supporting our historic campaign for Senate! name: David Hogg
subject: About our first endorsement of the cycle
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
This is a critical opportunity to shape the narrative around this race.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20250611-1&t=1&akid=2247%2E587540%2EcRho6R)
Peter,
Not long ago, we made our very _first_ endorsement of the 2026 election cycle:
**We’re backing State Senator Robert Peters for Congress in Illinois’ 2nd District.**
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250611_1_peters?refcode=em20250611-2247&amount=1&refcode2=2247_587540_cRho6R&akid=2247%2E587540%2EcRho6R)
Robert is a fighter. He’s led on violence prevention, criminal justice reform, and real economic justice in Illinois. And now, he’s stepping up to run for an open seat in Congress — and he’s ready to bring that same progressive fire to Washington.
But here’s the deal: Robert just launched his campaign. He doesn’t have a massive war chest or party machine behind him. What he does have is _us_ — a network of grassroots supporters who believe in the next generation of progressive leaders.
**This is a critical opportunity to shape the narrative around this race, Peter.**
If we can show that hundreds, even thousands of people chipped in — even just a buck — it sends a clear message about the strength of this brand new campaign. It will prove that Robert has real momentum and serious grassroots support. That can scare off potential opponents, get the press to take notice, and help him win.
**[Will you make a $1 donation right now to help Robert Peters and Leaders We Deserve build the kind of grassroots-powered campaign that can’t be ignored?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250611_1_peters?refcode=em20250611-2247&amount=1&refcode2=2247_587540_cRho6R&akid=2247%2E587540%2EcRho6R)**
**[Donate $1 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250611_1_peters?amount=1&refcode=em20250611-2247&refcode2=2247_587540_cRho6R&akid=2247%2E587540%2EcRho6R)**
It’s not about how much we raise — today, it’s about how many people step up.
If you’ve got more to give, that’s amazing and deeply appreciated. But if everyone reading this email gave just $1, we’d make headlines. **[Can you contribute now?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250611_1_peters?refcode=em20250611-2247&amount=1&refcode2=2247_587540_cRho6R&akid=2247%2E587540%2EcRho6R)**
**[Donate $1 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_lwd_20250611_1_peters?amount=1&refcode=em20250611-2247&refcode2=2247_587540_cRho6R&akid=2247%2E587540%2EcRho6R)**
Let’s get Robert the support he deserves.
Thank you for believing in this movement — and in leaders like Robert.
David Hogg
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lwd-em-footer?refcode=em20250611-1&t=2&refcode2=2247_587540_cRho6R&akid=2247%2E587540%2EcRho6R)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=2247%2E587540%2EcRho6R)

Leaders We Deserve

name: Randy Villegas
subject: One thing I hear over and over…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Villegas for Congress Villegas for Congress
body:
|
#
Hi there, I’ve been out on the campaign trail – knocking on doors, showing up at community events, visiting small businesses, and having real conversations with our neighbors in the Central Valley. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109412918/551019756/701031030?refcode=em-6.11.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGE2ZDE3ZDEtMTc0Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qpbPuMuD_CsvlUTJd7d1xYmAG3kzgJGmAfeuizKYMd0=) | | [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109412925/551019763/701031030?refcode=em-6.11.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGE2ZDE3ZDEtMTc0Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qpbPuMuD_CsvlUTJd7d1xYmAG3kzgJGmAfeuizKYMd0=)
---
_One thing I hear over and over?_ Folks feel like they're doing everything right – and yet it’s still not enough to get ahead.
Overtime, extra shifts, side hustles – and still, the bills keep piling up. Groceries cost more. Rent and mortgage payments are through the roof. And when folks ask for help, all our leaders are silent.
Meanwhile, the Trump administration is spending millions deploying marines to incite fear in the immigrant community. It's a cruel and deliberate choice that puts billionaires and politics ahead of our most basic needs.
The Central Valley deserves a leader who’ll stand up to powerful interests and fight for affordable healthcare, good jobs, and dignity for all.
[**We have a real chance to flip this seat. But that’s only possible if we build a grassroots movement strong enough to take on the big money and powerful interests trying to hold us back. That’s why I’m hoping you’ll chip in $3 today.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109412936/551019773/701031030?refcode=em-6.11.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc1MjUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMGE2ZDE3ZDEtMTc0Ny1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=qpbPuMuD_CsvlUTJd7d1xYmAG3kzgJGmAfeuizKYMd0=)

clean_body: | Hi there, I’ve been out on the campaign trail – knocking on doors, showing up at community events, visiting small businesses, and having real conversations with our neighbors in the Central Valley. = | | = One thing I hear over and over? Folks feel like they're doing everything right – and yet it’s still not enough to get ahead. Overtime, extra shifts, side hustles – and still, the bills keep piling up. Groceries cost more. Rent and mortgage payments are through the roof. And when folks ask for help, all our leaders are silent. Meanwhile, the Trump administration is spending millions deploying marines to incite fear in the immigrant community. It's a cruel and deliberate choice that puts billionaires and politics ahead of our most basic needs. The Central Valley deserves a leader who’ll stand up to powerful interests and fight for affordable healthcare, good jobs, and dignity for all. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Randy | With deep ties to our community and a lifelong commitment to justice and equity, Randy is running for Congress in California’s 22nd District to bring bold, compassionate leadership to Washington. To support Randy's campaign = We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Paid for by Villegas for Congress Villegas for Congress PO Box 1346 Visalia, CA 93279 United States

body:
Across the country, LGBTQ+ Americans are under attack — from book bans to healthcare restrictions to violent rhetoric. And in the face of it all, Emerge women are standing tall and fighting back.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109413005/551019857/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-06-11_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBkNmQxN2QxLTE3NDctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QS36d4ntsJoqaE7WvCIlEdXlShfWqMAzLE1tJrqtNfE=)

| Peter,

This Pride Month, we’re not just celebrating, we’re organizing.

Across the country, LGBTQ+ Americans are under attack — from book bans to healthcare restrictions to violent rhetoric. And in the face of it all, Emerge women are standing tall and fighting back.
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109413011/551019864/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-06-11_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBkNmQxN2QxLTE3NDctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QS36d4ntsJoqaE7WvCIlEdXlShfWqMAzLE1tJrqtNfE=)
**Mayor Erica Deuso** , a scientist and advocate, is running to become Pennsylvania’s first out transgender mayor.

**Councilor Angelita Morillo** , a formerly unhoused LGBTQ+ Latina, just won a Portland City Council seat, as one of the youngest ever to do it.

**Sen. Keturah Herron** made history in Kentucky as the first openly LGBTQ+ person of color elected to the State Senate.

**Rep. Becca Balint** became the first woman and first openly LGBTQ+ person elected to represent Vermont in Congress.

**They aren’t just making history. They’re changing the future. And they all came through Emerge.**

[_**If you believe Pride means action, not silence, donate before the end-of-quarter deadline to help us train more LGBTQ+ Democratic women and non-binary leaders.**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109413017/551019870/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-06-11_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBkNmQxN2QxLTE3NDctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QS36d4ntsJoqaE7WvCIlEdXlShfWqMAzLE1tJrqtNfE=)
| [DONATE NOW ](https://click.everyaction.com/k/109413020/551019873/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-06-11_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBkNmQxN2QxLTE3NDctZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=QS36d4ntsJoqaE7WvCIlEdXlShfWqMAzLE1tJrqtNfE=)
---
We’re not backing down. We’re building power.

Let’s make this Pride about progress.

— Team Emerge

P.S. | **Dear Friend,** The recent chaos in Los Angeles underscores a critical truth: America needs strong, decisive leadership to tackle the border crisis and restore law and order. Under President Trump's administration, we have witnessed remarkable progress.

Key initiatives like the Remain in Mexico policy have dismantled asylum fraud, while ICE works to deport illegal aliens. Additionally, the continued construction of the border wall has effectively shut down cartel routes, safeguarding our communities. Your support is not just important; it is essential. We are at a pivotal moment, and maintaining this momentum requires every one of us. Together, we can ensure that the voices of Americans demanding secure borders are heard. _Join us in this fight. _ Help us:
* **END THE INVASION.**
* **DEPORT LAWLESSNESS.**
* **AND RESTORE LAW & ORDER.**

**Donate now. Your contribution will make a difference.**

name: Mikie Sherrill
subject: It’s official: we just won the Democratic primary in New Jersey
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
The general election begins now.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89627?refcode=em20250611-8999&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=8999%2E614464%2EbOC5Uz)
Peter, I am so honored to be the official Democratic nominee for governor here in New Jersey. Thank you to everyone who played a part in this victory. I wouldn’t be here without this incredible grassroots team who chipped in, volunteered, and voted.
And we can’t stop now.
We know what we are up against. The general election has begun — and if recent history is any indication, it’s going to be an expensive, hard-fought race decided by a razor-thin margin. **[Will you help us get off to a strong start against Trump’s handpicked Republican nominee by splitting $10 between my campaign and Heartland Patriots today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89627?refcode=em20250611-8999&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=8999%2E614464%2EbOC5Uz)**
**[DONATE →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89627?refcode=em20250611-8999&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=8999%2E614464%2EbOC5Uz)**
Peter, I was raised to believe that we have an obligation to our community and our country.
It’s why I took my first oath to the Constitution as a teenager when I entered the Naval Academy.
It’s why I spent nearly a decade in the Navy as a helicopter pilot and Russian policy officer.
It’s why I went to law school, and became an outreach and reentry coordinator and a federal prosecutor.
It’s why I first ran for office — flipping a Republican-held congressional seat here in New Jersey that no one thought we could win at the time.
And it’s why, Peter, I’m running to serve as our next governor. It’s too hard to get ahead in New Jersey, and too often, our kids have fewer opportunities than we did. The system feels broken, and Donald Trump’s agenda is only making it worse. I can’t accept that — and as governor, I won’t.
**But the fact is, New Jersey is now a battleground state, and Trump is _already_ campaigning for my opponent, Jack Ciattarelli, a career politician who has promised to pass an abortion ban, defund public schools, and bring DOGE to New Jersey. So, truthfully, we won’t win this race unless we have a strong grassroots team behind us right from the start.**
**[Peter, if you’re with me in this fight, I would be incredibly grateful if you could become a Founding Donor to our general election campaign by splitting a donation between my campaign and Heartland Patriots today →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89627?refcode=em20250611-8999&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=8999%2E614464%2EbOC5Uz)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89628?refcode=em20250611-8999&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=5&akid=8999%2E614464%2EbOC5Uz) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89628?refcode=em20250611-8999&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=6&akid=8999%2E614464%2EbOC5Uz) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89628?refcode=em20250611-8999&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=7&akid=8999%2E614464%2EbOC5Uz) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89628?refcode=em20250611-8999&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=8&akid=8999%2E614464%2EbOC5Uz) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89628?refcode=em20250611-8999&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=9&akid=8999%2E614464%2EbOC5Uz) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89628?refcode=em20250611-8999&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=10&akid=8999%2E614464%2EbOC5Uz) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/89627?refcode=em20250611-8999&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=8999%2E614464%2EbOC5Uz)
---
Thank you so much for your support,
Mikie

| | | **BREAKING via CNN: "Voice of America channels fall silent as Trump administration guts agency"**
[](https://go.dscc.org/go/21380?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250611-NewsAlert-TrumpGutsMediaOutletsPetition-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250611-NewsAlert-TrumpGutsMediaOutletsPetition-Pros-sl1&akid=20470%2E9716520%2EVyxKc2)
**[We need to act before Trump shuts down _even more_ news sources! Support independent journalism by signing our _massive_ petition before it closes at midnight >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21380?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250611-NewsAlert-TrumpGutsMediaOutletsPetition-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250611-NewsAlert-TrumpGutsMediaOutletsPetition-Pros-sl1&akid=20470%2E9716520%2EVyxKc2)**
| | [ADD MY NAME](https://go.dscc.org/go/21380?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250611-NewsAlert-TrumpGutsMediaOutletsPetition-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250611-NewsAlert-TrumpGutsMediaOutletsPetition-Pros-sl1&akid=20470%2E9716520%2EVyxKc2)
---

**Trump is attacking independent media -- and we _have_ to take a stand, team.**

**FIRST:** Trump threatened to _defund_ NPR and PBS.

**THEN:** Trump called for MSNBC to be _shut down_ \-- saying they "shouldn't even have a right to broadcast."

**NOW:** He's officially _GUTTED_ Voice of America and the hard-hitting journalism it's provided to listeners in authoritarian countries for _nearly a century_ \-- so we have to act NOW to save more crucial media outlets from meeting the same fate!

We're DEMANDING Trump leave the press alone -- and we need YOU to sign on before our petition closes at midnight. **Please, this is _absolutely essential:_**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/21380?ask=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250611-NewsAlert-TrumpGutsMediaOutletsPetition-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250611-NewsAlert-TrumpGutsMediaOutletsPetition-Pros-sl1&akid=20470%2E9716520%2EVyxKc2)
**13,924 signatures still needed:****[Sign our petition to support independent journalism and SAVE outlets like NPR, PBS, and MSNBC from Trump's attacks>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/21380?ask=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250611-NewsAlert-TrumpGutsMediaOutletsPetition-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250611-NewsAlert-TrumpGutsMediaOutletsPetition-Pros-sl1&akid=20470%2E9716520%2EVyxKc2)**
| [ADD MY NAME](https://go.dscc.org/go/21380?ask=5&t=10&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-ND-20250611-NewsAlert-TrumpGutsMediaOutletsPetition-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20250611-NewsAlert-TrumpGutsMediaOutletsPetition-Pros-sl1&akid=20470%2E9716520%2EVyxKc2)

Team DSCC

To meet our goals and fund the mission-critical investments this work depends on, we'll need the full strength of this grassroots team. | | | | | ---|--- Our team has identified the cycle’s best and most consequential opportunities to build durable Democratic power in state legislatures, and I’m so excited to share our target map with you: This map is ambitious, strategic, and forward-focused. To meet our goals and fund the mission-critical investments this work depends on, we'll need the full strength of this grassroots team. To optimize our budget and make strategic investments, we’ve divided our target states into three categories: 🚨 Battlegrounds: Our most competitive chambers where majorities are determined by the slimmest of margins, including five chambers where majorities are decided by a single seat. 💪 Power Building Chambers: Our best opportunities to gain seats on our path to new majorities or defend the veto pens of Democratic governors. 👀 Watch List: Our team is tracking opportunities to maximize state legislative power and block the GOP’s agenda when possible. name: DASS Legal
subject: BREAKING: States sue to block Trump’s federal election takeover
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democratic Association of Secretaries of State, Treasurer Denise Merrill
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109414331/551024470/-729519538?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGNiZTAwNS0xYzQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3vhZxR_D7XDQXhYB3Y-2d6_pbtRExuoZV2bOAMY5WzY=)
**➤➤ BREAKING: States file lawsuit to stop Trump’s election power grab** [****](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109414333/551024472/-1878656517?refcode=em-6.11.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGNiZTAwNS0xYzQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3vhZxR_D7XDQXhYB3Y-2d6_pbtRExuoZV2bOAMY5WzY=)
* * *
This is huge, friend. A coalition of state Attorneys General is suing to block Donald Trump’s sweeping executive order on elections that would give the federal government unprecedented control over how elections are run across the country. The lawsuit argues what we already know: **this order is unconstitutional**. It’s a blatant attempt to strip states of their authority to run elections. This is power that the Constitution explicitly gives to the states and Congress, **not the President**. Let’s be clear about what’s happening here. **Trump is trying to rewrite election law by executive order.** He’s bypassing Congress, undermining state election officials, and creating a blueprint for rigging the rules in his favor. This lawsuit is a crucial first step in fighting back, but legal battles like this don’t come cheap. The stakes couldn’t be higher, and we don’t have time to wait and see what their next move will be. At DASS, we’re building the infrastructure to support the officials and legal teams who will be on the front lines of this fight. **Our Legal Fund is how we respond** — fast, forcefully, and with the resources it takes to win. [**Can you rush a donation of $3 or whatever you can to help us stop Trump’s illegal power grab and protect free, fair elections in every state?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109414336/551024475/-1751156451?refcode=em-6.11.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGNiZTAwNS0xYzQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3vhZxR_D7XDQXhYB3Y-2d6_pbtRExuoZV2bOAMY5WzY=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: __ | | | **[Chip in $5 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/109414337/551024476/-1751156451?refcode=em-6.11.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGNiZTAwNS0xYzQ3LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3vhZxR_D7XDQXhYB3Y-2d6_pbtRExuoZV2bOAMY5WzY=)**

Patriot,

_Have you seen what’s happening in Los Angeles?!_

The city is on fire, ICE agents and local law enforcement are under attack, and Democrats are siding with the rioters.

What’s happening in Los Angeles is NOT a protest. It is an entire city declaring open rebellion against American sovereignty and authority.

Frankly, I’ve had it.

If you burn or spit on our flag, I want you _out_ of our country.
If you’re an illegal alien, I want ICE to _remove and deport_ you.
If you’re an American _citizen_ who thinks Mexican culture is preferable, _please_ GET OUT.

This is a preview of our future if we DO NOT defeat Democrats.

Patriot, _THIS_ is why it is CRITICAL that we Build the Red Wall now to ensure America First victories in 2026, 2028, and beyond. This craziness cannot be allowed to fester any longer.

[Please, stand with me — stand FOR America First — today by donating $50, $250, $500, or even just $10 to help Turning Point PAC fund new field operations in key battleground states like Arizona, Nevada, and New Hampshire! >>](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8GumzAURL_G7ILsazCwYPFSRKVW6qKbqqvoYi6JEwx-tgl9f185QtmeOdLMoHWzmb5aVp0ZwM2MgQEw-cEAPv_u1m93-_P76foDfp8-1S9bphS-HeoT3vKi8eM898Ufmu4BH_fp4erzU7z1-OXoLR-lOVk0c6JVl42tnEZeZNSKqmhUXTayym5towesm0qOcqhqKkrQWAGpSXMlFQBmpgUOJVdCgCxBlDkfaqEVDAoEoMCaFfzVk6MlbzSKEHf0fl1trlebze0tRhdew3oGfSC9ecpxoXGNyWDQR-dQp2w4oY5mXZIq-y3ai0br0FwXJru0gksGKnFLo9ksk52nZ7ihp4NH8okCV4267F4cOKyb18RkF4aD6HWJtEQmu0j_4mU2y0Nkvh3dbubZBFWxgl9fv9KLZwv_AwAA__-nAo2Q)
[Donate](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8GuoyAYhZ8GdzXwo6gLF7djnGQmmcVsJrNqfhFaekW4gDV9-xsa0-13vuScg9YvRj970pwJwM3MkQAQ_kEAvv7vNmx3-_vn6foL_p6-xB9b5xR-HOoD3vIq8eO8jNU_pe8RP-_607fnB3vr6enVWz5KS2XRLJk2QzH3XM-0KlTPmqoTbd3xprj1WtaScqAUO6l5JxEmqTVWoOuKtZwWpgcKNRWMAa-B1SWdWiYFTAIYIMOWVPTVU6JVwUhkMe0YgnO2lM4WS39LycfXsJHAGJXcgipxVbNL2SAwJu9R5mw6oUzGrVnl45bsRaL1aK4r4UNeQTkBkblVs9ks4UNQj3jDoA6eVMgUqOjEZQ_swNFtQSrChzgdRLo1qTURPsxuxaQu05aSW1kR-tnvZllMFA2p6PX1LT959PAdAAD__zp3j3s)
President Trump was elected to close the border and restore law and order. If we fail, our nation will be permanently populated by foreigners who hate us and owe their allegiance to another country.

As patriots, we CANNOT stand by and let this happen.

President Trump is doing his part, leading the way on mass deportations, calling for the National Guard to be deployed, and standing firm in the face of arrows being hurled toward him from every side.

Now, it’s time for us to do our part...

And that starts by building a winning ground game to Build the Red Wall.

Together, we CAN take our country back, restore law and order, and rebuild our civilization around our shared _America First values_.

_**Are you with me, Patriot?**_

[If you’re as enraged as I am about what’s happening to the once-great City of Los Angeles, please donate today to fuel TurningPoint PAC’s WINNING strategy for 2026, 2028, and beyond.](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j8GumzAURL_G7ILsazBkweKliEqt1EU3VVfRxb4kTjD42Sbp-_vKEcr2zJFmBp2f7fTVsebEAK7WRAbA5AcD-Pz7dGG7uZ_fD5cf8PvwqX65OqfwbVcf8JYXjR-neaj-0HSLeL9Nd9-eHuKtpy9Pb3kvLcmhnTNt-sJ0cjK8KqgTTXVUbX2UTXHtNOHRyElS1dRYt82oTMXbtiLZNgbRFLYDDjVXQoCsQdQlH1uhFYwKBKDAllX81VOio2A1ipieGMK6ulKvrpi7a0o-voYNDIZIegtU4kJmTdlgMCTvUedsPKBOdl2yKoctubNG59FeFib7vIJLBipzR8Zujsk-0CNeMdDOE4VMgaujOj-D2HFct6CJyT6OO9HrkmhJTPaJ_qXzbJc7FKEz_mnn2UbVsIpfXr_yi0cH_wMAAP__GhaN-w)

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | Patriot, Have you seen what’s happening in Los Angeles?! The city is on fire, ICE agents and local law enforcement are under attack, and Democrats are siding with the rioters. What’s happening in Los Angeles is NOT a protest. It is an entire city declaring open rebellion against American sovereignty and authority. Frankly, I’ve had it. If you burn or spit on our flag, I want you out of our country. If you’re an illegal alien, I want ICE to remove and deport you. If you’re an American citizen who thinks Mexican culture is preferable, please GET OUT. This is a preview of our future if we DO NOT defeat Democrats. Patriot, THIS is why it is CRITICAL that we Build the Red Wall now to ensure America First victories in 2026, 2028, and beyond. This craziness cannot be allowed to fester any longer. President Trump was elected to close the border and restore law and order. If we fail, our nation will be permanently populated by foreigners who hate us and owe their allegiance to another country. As patriots, we CANNOT stand by and let this happen. President Trump is doing his part, leading the way on mass deportations, calling for the National Guard to be deployed, and standing firm in the face of arrows being hurled toward him from every side. Now, it’s time for us to do our part... And that starts by building a winning ground game to Build the Red Wall. Together, we CAN take our country back, restore law and order, and rebuild our civilization around our shared America First values. Are you with me, Patriot? Failure is NOT an option. Thank you for standing with TurningPoint PAC in support of President Trump’s America First agenda. It’s going to take each and every one of us, but together we CAN and WILL win the war for Western Civilization.
